Built on a web-based experimental platform, PERSUASIONTRACE contributes a tool for multi-turn persuasion studies and a process-level evaluation protocol: it records multi-turn belief reports from human or simulated targets of persuasion, annotates persuader turns with rhetorical dimensions (logos/pathos/ethos), and evaluates simulators by fidelity to real human belief dynamics. Using this framework, we find that human targets group into two clusters of multi-turn belief updates and exhibit susceptibility to rhetorical strategies, and that LLMs are persuasive across generic and personalized topics, text and audio modalities, and multi-turn interactions. Prior work has chiefly used vanilla-prompted LLMs to simulate human targets, but we show that these simulators fail to replicate human belief dynamics. We introduce a Bayesian-network simulated target that maintains an explicit latent belief state over time so each persuader message yields cognitively realistic belief updates. In human-likeness evaluation, our Bayesian target scores near a human reference (81 vs 80), while baseline LLM targets score substantially lower (64). PERSUASIONTRACE reframes persuasion evaluation from endpoint movement alone to process fidelity, providing a stronger basis for scientific analysis and safer optimization of persuasive systems.

AI.tldr: PERSUASIONTRACE 是一个用于研究人与大语言模型（LLM）交互中说服过程的框架，通过记录多轮信念变化、标注说服策略（逻辑/情感/可信度），并评估模拟目标的真实性，揭示了人类在说服过程中的两类信念更新模式，发现LLM在多种情境下具有说服力，且基于贝叶斯网络的模拟目标比传统提示式LLM更接近真实人类信念动态。
AI.motivation: 现有说服研究多依赖前后信念对比，无法捕捉对话中信念演变的细节；需要一种能刻画说服过程动态的分析框架，以提升对说服机制的理解和系统安全性。
AI.method: 构建基于网页实验平台的PERSUASIONTRACE框架，包括多轮信念报告记录、说服话语的修辞维度标注（logos/pathos/ethos）、以及基于贝叶斯网络的模拟目标，用于评估仿真真实性。
AI.result: 人类受试者呈现两种不同的多轮信念更新模式，对修辞策略敏感；LLM在文本与语音、通用与个性化话题中均具说服力；基于贝叶斯网络的模拟目标在人类相似性上得分81（接近真人80），显著优于传统LLM模拟器（64）。
AI.conclusion: PERSUASIONTRACE将说服评估从终点变化转向过程保真度，为科学分析和安全优化说服系统提供了更坚实的基础。

title: Alpha-RTL: Test-Time Training for RTL Hardware Optimization
summary:
Large language models (LLMs) have shown increasing promise in generating
  functionally correct register-transfer-level (RTL) hardware designs.
  Recent systems improve further through EDA-integrated reinforcement
  learning with syntax, simulation, and PPA rewards, but train a general
  RTL generator before deployment while test-time approaches search with
  a frozen policy. We instead perform reinforcement learning at test time,
  allowing the LLM policy to adapt to executable EDA feedback for the
  specific RTL problem at hand. We propose TTT-RTL, to our knowledge the
  first per-design test-time training framework that closes the loop
  between an LLM policy and an EDA pipeline for RTL optimization. TTT-RTL
  samples candidate implementations, verifies them through syntax checking
  and simulation, scores valid designs using synthesis-derived PPA product,
  reuses high-reward variants through a PUCT-indexed design-state pool,
  and updates the policy with an entropic policy-gradient objective. To
  stabilize policy updates under sparse or plateaued rewards, we introduce
  an adaptive KL-budget controller that adjusts the entropy constraint
  using reference KL, effective sample size, and reward saturation signals.
  On RTLLM v2.0 under Nangate 45nm, TTT-RTL reduces the geometric-mean
  PPA product by 65.1% over the reference, outperforming the strongest
  published frozen-policy agent baseline at 26.1%. On an industrial
  XuanTie C910 FPU leading-zero-anticipation unit under Sky130, TTT-RTL
  achieves a 59.4% ADP reduction, and ablations confirm that policy
  adaptation, state reuse, and KL-budget control each contribute. These
  results suggest that test-time training with executable EDA feedback can
  move LLM-based RTL generation beyond functional correctness toward
  physically optimized hardware.

AI.tldr: TTT-RTL 是首个针对每个设计在测试时进行训练的框架，通过将大型语言模型（LLM）策略与可执行EDA流程闭环结合，实现RTL优化。它在测试时利用语法检查、仿真和综合后的PPA评分来评估设计，并通过PUCT索引的设计状态池重用高奖励方案，同时采用基于熵的策略梯度更新策略。为应对稀疏或平台化的奖励信号，引入自适应KL预算控制器，根据参考KL、有效样本量和奖励饱和度动态调整熵约束。在RTLLM v2.0和Nangate 45nm上，TTT-RTL相比基准降低65.1%的几何平均PPA；在工业级XuanTie C910 FPU的leading-zero-anticipation单元上，实现59.4%的ADP下降。消融实验表明策略适应、状态复用和KL预算控制均贡献显著。结果表明，基于可执行EDA反馈的测试时训练能推动LLM生成硬件从功能正确迈向物理优化。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM生成RTL的方法通常在部署前进行通用训练，测试时使用冻结策略搜索，无法根据具体设计问题动态调整。而实际硬件设计需要针对特定任务进行优化，因此亟需一种能在测试阶段动态适应并利用可执行EDA反馈的机制，以实现更优的物理性能。
AI.method: 提出TTT-RTL框架，其核心是测试时强化学习：采样候选设计，通过语法检查和仿真验证，使用综合后获得的PPA评分进行打分，利用PUCT索引的设计状态池重用高奖励设计，并通过带有熵约束的策略梯度更新策略。引入自适应KL预算控制器，依据参考KL、有效样本大小和奖励饱和度信号动态调节熵约束，提升训练稳定性。
AI.result: 在RTLLM v2.0/Nangate 45nm上，几何平均PPA降低65.1%，优于最强冻结策略基线（26.1%）；在工业级XuanTie C910 FPU的leading-zero-anticipation单元（Sky130）上，实现59.4%的ADP减少。消融实验验证了策略适应、状态复用和KL预算控制对性能提升的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: TTT-RTL首次实现了基于可执行EDA反馈的测试时训练，证明了在测试阶段动态优化LLM策略对于实现物理优化硬件设计的有效性，标志着LLM驱动的RTL生成从功能正确迈向高性能物理实现的重要进展。

title: Deep Learning-assisted AMD Staging based on OCT and OCT Angiography
summary: To develop and evaluate deep learning models for automated grading of age-related macular degeneration (AMD) severity using optical coherence tomography (OCT) and OCT angiography (OCTA) data. Two hundred seventy-one participants aged >= 50 years with varying AMD severities. Central macular 6 x 6 mm OCT/OCTA volumes were acquired using a swept-source OCTA system (SOLIX; Visionix/Optovue Inc., CA). AMD severity was graded into four stages (No AMD, Early AMD, Intermediate AMD, and Advanced AMD) according to the AREDS simplified severity scale. Three deep learning models were developed using different input modalities: (1) biomarker maps derived from segmented pathological features, including retinal fluid, drusen, geographic atrophy (GA), and macular neovascularization (MNV); (2) two-dimensional (2D) en face OCT and OCTA projections; and (3) three-dimensional (3D) OCT/OCTA volumes. EfficientNet-based architectures were trained using normalized inputs, data augmentation, and five-fold cross-validation. A total of 2,030 OCT/OCTA volumes from 351 eyes of 271 participants were analyzed. All models demonstrated strong AMD staging performance with substantial agreement with the reference standard (QWK >= 0.83). The biomarker-based model achieved the highest overall performance (QWK = 0.85 +/- 0.03, mean +/- standard deviation) and the best detection of early AMD (F1-score = 0.59 +/- 0.14). The 3D model achieved performance comparable to the 2D OCT/OCTA model (QWK = 0.83 +/- 0.04 vs. 0.83 +/- 0.09), while the 2D OCT/OCTA model showed the highest precision (0.79 +/- 0.06) and most accurately identified eyes without AMD. Deep learning models using OCT/OCTA data can accurately and automatically grade AMD severity. Among the evaluated approaches, the biomarker-based model provided the most balanced performance and showed particular value for early AMD detection.

AI.tldr: 本研究开发并评估了基于光学相干断层扫描（OCT）和OCT血管成像（OCTA）数据的深度学习模型，用于自动分级年龄相关性黄斑变性（AMD）严重程度。使用三种不同输入模态的模型：基于病理特征生物标志物图、二维（2D）OCT/OCTA投影以及三维（3D）OCT/OCTA体积。所有模型在AMD分期上表现优异，与参考标准具有高度一致性（QWK ≥ 0.83）。其中，基于生物标志物的模型性能最佳（QWK = 0.85 ± 0.03），尤其在早期AMD检测中表现突出（F1-score = 0.59 ± 0.14）。3D模型与2D模型性能相当，而2D模型在无AMD眼识别中精度最高。结果表明，深度学习可准确自动分级AMD，基于生物标志物的模型提供了最均衡的性能，对早期AMD检测尤为有价值。
AI.motivation: 为了实现对年龄相关性黄斑变性（AMD）严重程度的自动化、准确分级，减少人工评估的主观性和时间成本，利用OCT和OCTA影像数据开发深度学习模型，以支持临床诊断和疾病管理。
AI.method: 采用EfficientNet架构，基于三种输入模态训练模型：（1）由分割病理特征生成的生物标志物图（包括视网膜积液、色素沉积、地图样萎缩和脉络膜新生血管）；（2）二维（2D）OCT和OCTA的俯视图投影；（3）三维（3D）OCT/OCTA体积数据。使用归一化输入、数据增强和五折交叉验证进行训练。
AI.result: 共分析2,030个来自271名参与者（351只眼）的OCT/OCTA体积数据。所有模型均表现出优异的AMD分期性能（QWK ≥ 0.83）。基于生物标志物的模型表现最优（QWK = 0.85 ± 0.03），在早期AMD检测中F1-score达0.59 ± 0.14。3D模型与2D模型性能相近（QWK分别为0.83 ± 0.04和0.83 ± 0.09），而2D模型在无AMD眼识别中精度最高（0.79 ± 0.06）。
AI.conclusion: 基于OCT/OCTA数据的深度学习模型能够准确且自动地分级AMD严重程度。在所评估的方法中，基于生物标志物的模型提供了最平衡的性能，并在早期AMD检测中展现出显著价值，具有良好的临床应用前景。

title: Residual Modeling for High-Fidelity Learned Compression of Scientific Data
summary:
Lossy compression is essential for massive spatiotemporal data from scientific simulations. Learned compressors can achieve high compression ratios at moderate accuracy targets, but their aggregate reconstruction losses do not guarantee accuracy for each block. Existing Guaranteed Autoencoder (GAE) methods add a per-block residual correction by retaining SVD/PCA-style coefficients until the target is met. This works at moderate tolerances, but in the high-fidelity regime with block-level NRMSE from 10^-6 to 10^-4, the number of retained coefficients grows quickly and the correction stream dominates the total rate.
  We propose a residual-centric view: the learned residual is structurally different from the original scientific field and should be coded with a representation designed for that residual. We introduce two residual coders. LBRC is a deterministic, training-free pipeline that adaptively quantizes the learned residual to the target NRMSE and losslessly encodes the resulting integer residual using 3D Lorenzo differencing, zigzag mapping, bit-plane coding, and entropy coding. NGLR adds a causal neural predictor that outputs a normalized bias for an integer-rounded Lorenzo prediction in the same deterministic integer pipeline, reducing the entropy of the remaining residual code while preserving deterministic decoding. The predictor weights are serialized and counted in the bitstream.
  Across E3SM, JHTDB, and ERA5 at block-level NRMSE targets from 10^-6 to 10^-4, LBRC improves compression ratio over GAE by 30-60% and is broadly competitive with SZ. NGLR adds a further 10-40% over LBRC and outperforms SZ in the evaluated high-fidelity regime. These results show that residual representations tailored to learned-compressor residuals can preserve the advantage of learned compression when global residual correction becomes rate-dominant.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种以残差为中心的压缩思路，针对科学模拟中大规模时空数据的高保真压缩需求。传统方法在高精度（块级NRMSE 10^-6~10^-4）下因保留过多系数导致校正流主导总码率。作者设计了两种残差编码器：LBRC为无训练、确定性管道，通过自适应量化和整数残差的3D Lorenzo差分等技术实现高效编码；NGLR引入因果神经预测器，在保持确定性解码的前提下进一步降低残差熵。在E3SM、JHTDB和ERA5数据集上，LBRC相比GAE提升30-60%压缩比，接近并优于SZ；NGLR再提升10-40%，在高保真场景下超越SZ。结果表明，专用于学习型压缩残差的表示可有效缓解全局残差校正带来的码率负担，维持学习压缩的优势。
AI.motivation: 在高保真科学模拟数据压缩中，现有保证型自动编码器（GAE）方法因需保留大量SVD/PCA系数以满足极低误差目标，导致残差校正部分码率过高，限制了整体压缩效率。尤其当块级均方根误差（NRMSE）达到10^-6至10^-4量级时，传统方法难以兼顾高压缩比与高精度。因此亟需一种更高效的残差编码机制，以避免校正流成为码率瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出残差中心化视角，将学习得到的残差视为与原始场结构不同的信号，应采用专门设计的编码方式。设计两个残差编码器：(1) LBRC：无需训练的确定性流程，包括自适应量化至目标NRMSE、整数残差生成，再经3D Lorenzo差分、锯齿映射、位平面编码和熵编码；(2) NGLR：在LBRC基础上加入因果神经预测器，输出归一化偏置修正整数化后的Lorenzo预测值，从而降低剩余残差熵，预测权重随比特流传输。
AI.result: 在E3SM、JHTDB和ERA5数据集上，针对块级NRMSE目标10^-6至10^-4的实验表明：LBRC相较GAE压缩比提升30-60%，性能接近甚至优于现有方法SZ；NGLR在LBRC基础上进一步提升10-40%压缩比，并在高保真区域全面超越SZ。验证了专为学习型压缩残差设计的编码器能有效抑制校正码率增长，维持学习压缩的高压缩优势。
AI.conclusion: 通过构建面向学习压缩残差特性的专用编码器，可显著降低高保真压缩中的校正码率开销。所提出的LBRC与NGLR方法在保证确定性解码的同时，实现了对现有技术的显著超越，尤其适用于对精度要求极高但又需高效存储的科学模拟数据压缩任务。

title: Self-supervised User Profile Generation for Personalization
summary: Personalizing large language models (LLMs) has become a central challenge as LLMs are deployed across recommendation, search, dialogue, and content generation -- settings where the same query should yield different answers given different users. A promising route is to summarize each user's interaction history into a natural-language memory or profile and prepend it to the prompt to facilitate personalization. Existing methods learn such profile generators with explicit rewards derived from labeled downstream tasks, which are expensive and sparse as they require annotated supervision for every target task. In light of this challenge, we introduce Bidirectional User Modeling via Profiles (BUMP), a self-supervised framework that trains a profile generator without any downstream labels. Specifically, given a user's interaction history, we use GRPO to train an LLM to emit a free-form textual profile under a bidirectional in-batch ranking objective: a small LLM judge measures (i) how well the generated profile, used as a query, ranks the user's own held-out interactions above interactions from other users in the batch, and (ii) how well a held-out interaction, used as a query, ranks the user's own profile above profiles of other users. Both directions are scored with multi-positive NDCG and combined into a dense reward per rollout; other users in the batch supply free negatives, so every training example yields supervision from raw interaction logs alone. Evaluated on the LaMP benchmark, BUMP matches or outperforms closed-source APIs and prior methods relying on labeled rewards, while requiring no task label at training.

AI.tldr: BUMP提出一种无需下游标签的自监督框架，通过双向批次内排序目标训练用户画像生成器。利用小模型判别器评估生成画像与用户交互记录的相关性，结合多正例NDCG计算密集奖励，实现无监督个性化。在LaMP基准上表现优于依赖标注奖励的现有方法，且无需任务标签。
AI.motivation: 现有个性化LLM方法依赖昂贵且稀疏的标注数据来训练用户画像生成器，难以推广到多场景。为解决这一问题，需设计无需下游标签的自监督学习框架。
AI.method: BUMP采用GRPO训练大语言模型生成自由形式文本画像，基于双向批次内排名目标：1）用生成画像作为查询，判断是否能将该用户自身保留的交互项排在批次中其他用户交互项之前；2）用保留交互项作为查询，判断是否能将该用户画像排在其他用户画像之前。使用多正例NDCG评分并融合为密集奖励信号，利用批次内其他用户作为负样本，仅依赖原始交互日志完成训练。
AI.result: 在LaMP基准测试中，BUMP在多项任务上达到或超过闭源API及依赖标注奖励的先前方法性能，且训练阶段完全无需任务标签，验证了其有效性与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: BUMP成功实现了无需下游标注的用户画像自监督学习，显著降低个性化模型训练成本，同时保持高性能，适用于推荐、搜索、对话等多样化应用场景。

title: Flash-WAM: Modality-Aware Distillation for World Action Models
summary: World-action models (WAMs) jointly generate future video and robot actions through iterative diffusion, achieving strong performance on manipulation benchmarks but requiring tens of denoising steps, a cost that precludes real-time control. Step distillation has emerged as the natural remedy, but off-the-shelf methods break down in the joint video-action setting because video and action streams use different SNR-shifted noise schedules and reach training with substantially different marginal noise distributions, an asymmetry that single-modality distillation methods cannot accommodate. We introduce \textbf{Flash-WAM}, a modality-aware step-distillation framework inspired by consistency distillation that selects the consistency function for each modality to match its noise regime: a linear-gradient-scaling parametrization for the action stream's low-noise regime, paired with a variance-preserving parametrization for the video stream's high-noise regime, grounded in a structural analysis of the consistency-function family that characterizes the achievable gradient scaling under the consistency boundary condition. Instantiated on LingBot-VA, Flash-WAM compresses inference to a single step in each modality. On RoboTwin 2.0, this reduces per-chunk latency from $8.1$ seconds to $348$ ms on NVIDIA L40S, a $23{\times}$ speedup that enables real-time inference. Flash-WAM preserves task success on simulation benchmarks ($85.5\%$ RoboTwin 2.0, $95.7\%$ LIBERO) and substantially recovers real-world performance ($60\%$ average on a Unitree G1 humanoid robot), while naive consistency distillation drops to $24\%$ at the same step budget.

AI.tldr: Flash-WAM 是一种新型的模态感知步骤蒸馏框架，专为联合生成未来视频与机器人动作的世界行动模型（WAMs）设计。传统蒸馏方法在多模态设置下失效，因视频和动作流使用不同的噪声调度，导致噪声分布不对称。Flash-WAM 通过为不同模态选择合适的一致性函数——动作流采用线性梯度缩放（低噪声），视频流采用方差保持参数化（高噪声），从而解决该问题。该方法在 LingBot-VA 上实现单步推理，在 RoboTwin 2.0 上将每块延迟从 8.1 秒降至 348 毫秒（23 倍加速），支持实时控制，并在仿真与真实世界任务中保持优异性能，显著优于朴素的一致性蒸馏方法。
AI.motivation: 现有步骤蒸馏方法无法适用于联合视频-动作生成的 WAMs，因其在视频和动作两个模态间存在噪声信噪比（SNR）差异及边际噪声分布不一致的问题，导致传统单模态蒸馏方法失效。需要一种能适应多模态噪声特性的新蒸馏策略以实现快速推理。
AI.method: 提出 Flash-WAM，基于一致性蒸馏思想，设计针对不同模态的定制化一致性函数：对动作流使用线性梯度缩放以适配其低噪声环境；对视频流采用方差保持参数化以匹配其高噪声特性。该设计建立在对一致性函数族的结构分析之上，确保在一致性边界条件下可实现有效的梯度缩放。
AI.result: Flash-WAM 实现单步推理，使 RoboTwin 2.0 的每块延迟从 8.1 秒降至 348 毫秒（23 倍加速），支持实时控制；在仿真任务中保持高成功率（RoboTwin 2.0: 85.5%，LIBERO: 95.7%），并在真实世界（如 Unitree G1 人形机器人）中恢复至 60% 平均成功率，远超朴素一致性蒸馏（仅 24%）。
AI.conclusion: Flash-WAM 通过模态感知的一致性函数设计，成功解决了多模态联合生成中的噪声不对称问题，实现了高效、准确的快速推理，为实时机器人控制提供了可行路径。

title: UniPixie: Unified and Probabilistic 3D Physics Learning via Flow Matching
comment: Published at CVPR 2026 as a Highlight. Project page: https://unipixie.github.io/
summary: Existing feed-forward networks excel at predicting a single set of physical properties from visual appearance, but this point-estimate paradigm fundamentally fails to capture the real world's inherent physical ambiguity. We address this by reframing physics prediction as a task of learning a controllable, continuous distribution of material properties. We introduce UNIPIXIE, a framework trained to predict a continuous and parameterized path of physically plausible material properties from a single visual input. By learning a direct mapping along an object's softest-to-stiffest spectrum on our PIXIEMULTIVERSE dataset, UNIPIXIE allows for controllable generation of diverse, physically valid material fields via a single intuitive parameter. Crucially, UNIPIXIE introduces a novel unified architecture to produce simulation-ready parameters for diverse physics solvers, including continuum-based Material Point Method (MPM), reduced-order deformation based on Linear Blend Skinning (LBS), and anchor-based Spring-Mass systems, addressing a key portability issue in prior work. Experiments show our approach not only generates a rich variety of plausible dynamics but also reduces Young's Modulus prediction error by over 50% against the strongest deterministic baseline, bridging the gap between static point estimates and the continuous nature of physical reality. Project page: https://unipixie.github.io/

AI.tldr: UNIPIXIE 是一种新框架，通过从单个视觉输入中预测连续且可参数化的材料属性分布，解决传统前馈网络仅能进行单一物理属性点估计的局限性。它在 PIXIEMULTIVERSE 数据集上学习物体从最软到最硬的属性谱，实现对物理有效材料场的可控生成，并支持多种物理求解器（如 MPM、LBS 和弹簧-质量系统），显著提升模拟兼容性和预测精度，将杨氏模量预测误差降低超过50%。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅能输出单一物理属性点估计，无法捕捉现实世界中物理属性的固有模糊性，需要一种能表示连续、可控制的物理属性分布的方法以更真实地建模材料行为。
AI.method: UNIPIXIE 采用统一架构，基于单一视觉输入学习材料属性的连续路径，通过一个可调参数控制生成不同物理特性，支持多种物理求解器的参数输出，实现跨模拟平台的通用性与可移植性。
AI.result: 实验表明，UNIPIXIE 能生成多样且物理合理的动态行为，同时在杨氏模量预测上相比最强确定性基线误差降低超过50%，有效弥合了静态点估计与连续物理现实之间的差距。
AI.conclusion: UNIPIXIE 成功将物理预测从点估计转向连续分布建模，实现了可控、多样化、可模拟的材料属性生成，为多物理场景下的仿真提供了高效、统一的解决方案。

title: LeanMarathon: Toward Reliable AI Co-Mathematicians through Long-Horizon Lean Autoformalization
summary: Long-horizon autoformalization of research mathematics fails not only at hard lemmas, but at scale: statements drift, dependencies tangle, context decays, and local repairs corrupt distant work. We present LeanMarathon, a multi-agent harness for reliable research-level Lean autoformalization. Its core abstraction is an evolving blueprint: a Lean file that serves simultaneously as formal proof skeleton, natural-language proof graph, and shared system of record. Four contract-scoped agents construct, audit, prove, and repair this blueprint. These agents are coordinated by a two-stage orchestrator that first stabilizes target fidelity through adversarial review and then discharges the proof directed acyclic graph (DAG) from its dynamic leaves upward in parallel CI-gated rounds. LeanMarathon turns one brittle multi-hour run into many local, recoverable, parallel transactions. We evaluate LeanMarathon on two recent research papers spanning four Erdős problems (#1051, #1196, #164, #1217). Across three autonomous runs, it formalizes all seven target theorems with no sorry, proving 258 lemmas and theorems. These results show that reliable AI co-mathematics requires not only stronger provers, but durable harnesses that preserve target fidelity across long mathematical developments. The code can be found at https://github.com/YuanheZ/LeanMarathon.

AI.tldr: LeanMarathon 是一个用于可靠研究级 Lean 自动形式化的多智能体框架。其核心是动态演进的蓝图——一个同时作为形式化证明骨架、自然语言证明图和共享记录系统的 Lean 文件。四个合同范围的智能体负责构建、审计、证明和修复该蓝图，由两阶段编排器协调：先通过对抗性审查稳定目标保真度，再自底向上并行处理证明有向无环图（DAG）。该方法将原本脆弱的长时间运行转化为多个局部、可恢复、并行的事务。在涵盖四个 Erdős 问题的两篇近期论文上，三次自主运行均成功形式化全部七个定理，证明了258个引理与定理，验证了长期数学发展中的目标保真度需依赖不仅更强的证明器，还需持久的系统架构。代码见 https://github.com/YuanheZ/LeanMarathon。
AI.motivation: 现有长时程自动形式化在处理复杂引理时失败，且面临陈述漂移、依赖纠缠、上下文衰减和局部修复破坏远端工作的挑战。需要更可靠的系统以维持研究级数学形式化的准确性与一致性。
AI.method: 提出 LeanMarathon 多智能体框架，采用动态演化蓝图作为统一表示，包含四类智能体（构建、审计、证明、修复），并通过双阶段编排器控制流程：第一阶段通过对抗性审查确保目标保真度；第二阶段以并行 CI 门控方式从底层叶子节点向上推进证明 DAG。
AI.result: 在两个近期研究论文上的三轮自主实验中，成功形式化所有七个目标定理，共证明258个引理与定理，无失败案例，显著提升形式化过程的稳定性与可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 可靠的 AI 共同数学不仅依赖更强的自动证明器，更需要具备持久性的系统架构来保障长期数学开发中的目标保真度。LeanMarathon 展示了这一方向的可行性。

title: Trajectory Dynamics in Language Model Hidden States Predict Human Processing Costs Beyond Surprisal
summary: Human language comprehension unfolds sequentially: each word is processed in the context of those that came before, and the interpretation builds incrementally over time. Surprisal, the negative log probability of a word given its context, has been the dominant predictor of incremental processing cost. But surprisal reduces rich sequential representations to a single scalar at each word, discarding information about the direction in which the interpretation has been evolving. Dynamical-systems approaches suggest that the trajectory of the evolving interpretive state, not just its position at each moment,should shape processing, and language itself may have local momentum, since speakers plan utterances a few words at a time. We introduce trajectory extrapolation error: at each word, we fit a linear trajectory to the preceding hidden states of a transformer language model and measure deviation from the extrapolated path. On the Natural Stories corpus, this measure is nearly orthogonal to surprisal (r = .044) and independently predicts self-paced reading times. The effect is especially pronounced in garden-path sentences, strengthens with model scale (GPT-2 Small to Large), and replicates across architectures with different positional encoding schemes (GPT-2 vs. Pythia/RoPE). A displacement control shows the effect is not reducible to representational change magnitude: displacement and extrapolation error predict in opposite directions. These findings reveal two dissociable components of processing cost: word-level prediction error (surprisal) and sensitivity to the local momentum of the unfolding interpretation (trajectory extrapolation error).

AI.tldr: 本文提出轨迹外推误差（trajectory extrapolation error）作为语言理解中增量处理成本的新指标，该指标捕捉了解释状态演变的动态轨迹，而非仅关注单个词的预测误差（如突变性）。在自然故事语料库上，该指标与传统突变性几乎正交（r = .044），并独立预测自定速阅读时间。其效果在花园路径句中尤为显著，且随模型规模增大而增强，并在不同架构（GPT-2 vs. Pythia/RoPE）中复现。对照实验表明，该效应不能归因于表征变化幅度，而是对解释状态局部动量的敏感性。研究揭示了处理成本的两个可分离成分：词级预测误差（突变性）和对解释演化方向的敏感性（轨迹外推误差）
AI.motivation: 现有语言理解模型主要依赖突变性（surprisal）来预测处理成本，但突变性仅提供每个词的静态概率信息，忽略了解释状态随时间演化的动态轨迹。基于动力系统理论，语言理解可能具有局部动量，即说话者提前规划几句话的内容。因此需要一种能捕捉解释状态演化方向和趋势的新指标，以更全面地建模人类语言处理的动态过程。
AI.method: 1. 使用Transformer语言模型（GPT-2 Small/Large、Pythia/RoPE）提取句子中每个词的隐藏状态；2. 对前序隐藏状态拟合线性轨迹（最小二乘法）；3. 计算当前词的隐藏状态与该线性轨迹的外推值之间的偏差，定义为轨迹外推误差；4. 在自然故事语料库上分析该误差与自定速阅读时间的关系；5. 与突变性进行相关性分析，并通过位移控制实验排除表征变化幅度的干扰。
AI.result: 1. 轨迹外推误差与突变性高度正交（r = .044），表明两者提供互补信息；2. 轨迹外推误差能独立预测自定速阅读时间，尤其在花园路径句中效应更强；3. 效应随模型规模增大而增强（从GPT-2 Small到Large）；4. 在不同架构（GPT-2 vs. Pythia/RoPE）和位置编码方式下均能复现；5. 位移控制实验显示，轨迹外推误差与表征变化幅度的预测方向相反，证明其不可归约为表示变化大小。
AI.conclusion: 语言处理成本不仅由词级预测误差（突变性）决定，还受到解释状态演化方向的影响——即对局部动量的敏感性。轨迹外推误差作为衡量这种动态特征的新指标，有效捕捉了语言理解中的动态认知过程，揭示了人类语言处理中两个独立的认知机制：预测误差与轨迹敏感性。该发现推动了对语言理解动态性的建模，为未来认知计算模型提供了新的方向。

title: Scaling Laws for Behavioral Foundation Models over User Event Sequences
summary: Foundation models are increasingly trained on sequences of user actions in recommendation, payments, fraud, and commerce, but these models still lack the kind of compute calibration that scaling laws provide for language models. We study a common two-part behavioral-model architecture: a feature-based event embedder maps each multi-modal item to a vector, and a decoder-only transformer predicts the next event from the resulting sequence. Across roughly 600 runs on real interaction data, spanning $10^{15}$-$10^{19}$ training FLOPs, we jointly vary four deployment-relevant axes: the two-part parameter split, critical batch size, model/data allocation, and the number of sampled negatives used after freezing the embedder. A small embedder ($s^{\star}\!\approx\!2\%$ of parameters) is compute-optimal at every budget we test because embedder parameters are both more expensive per step and exposed to far more repeated items than contextualizer parameters. Compute-optimal training is data-heavy relative to text at low compute, but its $D/N$ ratio moves toward the Chinchilla heuristic as compute increases. The sampled training objective and deployed ranking metrics disagree in ways that themselves scale: critical batch size, optimal negative count after freezing, and the agreement between loss and ranking quality all shift with compute and with the chosen evaluation metric. For negative sampling, larger budgets increasingly prefer more negatives; by $10^{19}$ FLOPs the active constraint is candidate-axis memory rather than FLOPs. In behavioral foundation models, the evaluation metric is therefore part of the scaling law: changing it can change the compute-optimal recipe.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了在推荐、支付、欺诈和电商等领域中，基于用户行为序列的大型模型在计算资源分配上的优化问题。通过600多次实验，覆盖10^15到10^19训练浮点运算量，分析了嵌入器与解码器之间的参数分配、批大小、模型/数据分配以及负样本采样数量等关键因素。发现小嵌入器（约2%参数）在所有预算下都是计算最优的，因其每步开销更高且重复暴露于更多项目。低算力时训练偏重数据，但随着算力增加，数据与负样本比（D/N）趋近Chinchilla法则。训练目标与部署评估指标之间存在随算力和评估指标变化的不一致，导致最优批大小、负样本数及损失与排名质量的一致性均随算力调整。在高算力（如10^19 FLOPs）下，负样本采样受限于候选集内存而非算力。因此，在行为基础模型中，评估指标本身就是缩放定律的一部分，改变它会改变最优训练策略。
AI.motivation: 现有行为基础模型缺乏像语言模型那样由缩放定律提供的计算校准机制，亟需系统研究如何在不同算力预算下实现最优训练配置，以提升模型效率与性能。
AI.method: 采用两阶段行为建模架构：特征嵌入器将多模态项目映射为向量，解码器变压器基于序列预测下一个事件。在真实交互数据上进行约600次实验，系统地调节四个部署相关维度：嵌入器与解码器的参数比例、关键批大小、模型与数据的分配策略，以及冻结嵌入器后采样的负样本数量。通过大规模实验分析各变量对计算效率和模型表现的影响。
AI.result: 小嵌入器（约2%参数）在所有算力预算下均为计算最优；低算力时训练偏向数据，高算力时趋于符合Chinchilla法则；训练目标与部署指标间的差异随算力和评估指标而变化，导致最优批大小、负样本数及损失与排名一致性均动态调整；在10^19 FLOPs级别，负样本采样受限于候选集内存而非算力。
AI.conclusion: 在行为基础模型中，评估指标是缩放定律的重要组成部分，其选择直接影响最优计算资源配置。因此，设计高效训练策略时必须将评估指标纳入考量，不能孤立看待损失函数与部署性能。

title: Would you still call this Dax? Novel Visual References in VLMs and Humans
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs), like human learners, are frequently exposed to new visual concepts, but how they map novel visual references to language after exposure remains largely underexplored, particularly when those references contradict prior knowledge from pre-training. To study this, we present the Novel Visual References Dataset (NVRD): 19,176 images spanning 90 visual concepts across different levels of visual novelty, each with up to 20 increasingly perturbed versions of the original object to probe generalization. Unlike prior work on visual augmentations of familiar concepts, NVRD comprises entirely novel, open-ended stimuli constructed from scratch, mirroring how humans encounter genuinely new concepts. We evaluate 3 open- and 2 closed-source models alongside 2,400 human judgments for direct human-model comparison, and find that (i) models struggle to acquire novel concepts in-context when they contradict prior knowledge, and (ii) while models and humans show correlated sensitivity to visual perturbations, models significantly overgeneralize, extending learned labels to stimuli that humans reject. We contribute NVRD as a corpus and benchmark for research on visual concept learning in both humans and machines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个名为NVRD的新数据集，包含19,176张图像，涵盖90个视觉概念及其多种扰动版本，用于研究视觉语言模型在面对与预训练知识冲突的新视觉参考时的学习能力。通过对比5个模型和2,400份人类判断，发现模型在上下文学习中难以掌握矛盾新概念，且对视觉扰动的泛化程度远超人类，表现出显著过泛化现象。研究为人类与机器的视觉概念学习提供了基准和资源。
AI.motivation: 探索视觉语言模型在接触与预训练知识冲突的新视觉概念时，如何将新视觉参考映射到语言，尤其是其学习与泛化能力的局限性。现有研究多关注熟悉概念的视觉增强，缺乏对真正新颖、开放性刺激的系统研究，无法反映人类学习新概念的真实过程。
AI.method: 构建了全新的NVRD数据集，包含90个全新视觉概念，每个概念有最多20种逐步扰动的图像版本，以评估模型在不同视觉新颖度下的表现；使用3个开源与2个闭源模型进行测试，并与2,400份人类标注结果进行直接比较，分析模型与人类在概念学习和泛化上的差异。
AI.result: （i）当新概念与模型预训练知识相矛盾时，模型在上下文学习中难以有效获取新概念；（ii）尽管模型与人类对视觉扰动的敏感性具有相关性，但模型显著过泛化，将标签扩展到人类认为不相关的刺激上。
AI.conclusion: NVRD是一个可用于研究人类与机器视觉概念学习的新基准数据集，揭示了当前视觉语言模型在处理新异概念时的关键局限，尤其在对抗性先验知识下的学习能力不足及过度泛化问题，呼吁未来研究更关注真实世界中新概念的习得机制。

title: Harnessing Generalist Agents for Contextualized Time Series
summary: Time series are often embedded in rich contexts that are essential for holistic modeling. Moreover, real-world practitioners often require end-to-end workflows for analyzing temporal dynamics, where widely studied tasks such as forecasting are only one step in a broader solution loop. While generalist AI agents offer a promising interface for such workflows under complex contexts, they still operate primarily in textual spaces that are not fully aligned with structured temporal signals. In this work, we introduce TimeClaw, an agentic harness framework for time series that equips generalist LLM agents with the time series-native runtime support needed for contextualized temporal reasoning. TimeClaw integrates executable temporal tools for grounded and auditable analysis, experience-driven capability evolution for creating reusable analytical routines, and episodic multimodal memory for retrieving relevant reasoning traces. Together, these components unlock harnessed open-ended temporal reasoning with contextual information. Extensive evaluation on multiple benchmarks covering diverse tasks across energy, finance, weather, traffic, and other real-world domains demonstrates improved performance of TimeClaw. Code is available at https://github.com/iDEA-iSAIL-Lab-UIUC/TimeClaw.

AI.tldr: TimeClaw 是一个专为时间序列设计的智能体框架，通过集成可执行的时间工具、基于经验的能力演化机制以及多模态记忆系统，使通用大模型能够在复杂上下文中进行结构化的时间序列分析。该框架支持端到端的时序建模流程，在能源、金融、气象、交通等多个领域表现优异。
AI.motivation: 真实世界的时间序列分析需要在丰富上下文中进行整体建模，而现有通用大模型主要在文本空间中运行，难以有效处理结构化的时间信号，因此亟需一种能支持上下文感知的时间序列原生推理框架。
AI.method: 提出 TimeClaw 框架，包含三部分：可执行的时间工具以实现基于事实的分析；经验驱动的能力演化机制用于构建可复用的分析流程；以及情景式多模态记忆系统以检索相关推理历史。
AI.result: 在多个涵盖能源、金融、天气、交通等领域的基准测试中，TimeClaw 在多样化任务上均展现出优于基线方法的性能，验证了其在复杂上下文中的有效性与实用性。
AI.conclusion: TimeClaw 通过提供时间序列原生的运行支持，实现了通用大模型在复杂上下文下的可解释、可审计且可演化的时序推理能力，推动了端到端时间序列分析的发展。

title: ReasoningFlow: Discourse Structures for Understanding LLM Reasoning Traces
summary: Large reasoning models (LRMs) produce reasoning traces with non-linear structures, such as backtracking and self-correction, that complicate the evaluation and monitoring of the reasoning process. We introduce ReasoningFlow, a framework that captures the discourse structures of LRM reasoning traces into fine-grained directed acyclic graphs (DAGs). We develop and validate our annotation schema through careful manual annotation of 31 traces (2.1k steps), achieving high inter-annotator agreement, then scale to automatic annotation of 1,260 traces (247.7k steps) spanning three tasks (math, science, argumentation) and five models (Qwen2.5-32B-Inst, QwQ-32B, DeepSeek-V3, DeepSeek-R1, GPT-oss-120B). By analyzing ReasoningFlow graphs, we find: (1) LRMs exhibit structurally similar traces, despite being trained from different base models and potentially non-overlapping post-training data. (2) ReasoningFlow reveals diverse fine-grained reasoning behaviors (e.g., local verification, self-reflection, and assumptions) that can be used for better reasoning trace monitorability. (3) In LRMs, most of the erroneous steps are not used to derive final answers. (4) Mechanistic causal dependencies between steps do not reflect the language-level discourse structure. We release the dataset and code in: https://github.com/jinulee-v/reasoningflow.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReasoningFlow框架，将大推理模型（LRM）的非线性推理轨迹建模为细粒度有向无环图（DAG），通过手动标注31个轨迹（2.1k步）验证注释方案，并自动标注1,260个轨迹（247.7k步），涵盖数学、科学和论辩三任务及五种模型。分析发现：LRM推理结构相似；可识别局部验证、自我反思等细粒度行为以提升监控能力；多数错误步骤未用于最终答案；机制因果依赖与语言层面话语结构不一致。数据集与代码已开源。
AI.motivation: 大推理模型的推理轨迹具有回溯、自修正等非线性结构，给评估与监控带来挑战，亟需一种能捕捉其话语结构的方法。
AI.method: 构建基于有向无环图（DAG）的推理流框架，通过人工标注验证注释方案后，实现大规模自动标注，系统分析推理轨迹的结构与行为模式。
AI.result: 发现不同模型的推理轨迹具有相似结构；识别出多种细粒度推理行为；多数错误步骤未被使用；机制因果关系与语言话语结构不一致。
AI.conclusion: ReasoningFlow有效捕捉了大推理模型的复杂推理结构，为理解、监控与改进推理过程提供了新工具，且其数据与代码已公开，推动该领域研究发展。

title: Policy-Conditioned Counterfactual Credit for Verifiable Reinforcement Learning of Long-Horizon Language Agents
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards improves reasoning and tool use, yet long-horizon language agents still learn unsupported evidence chains, belief drift, and shortcut actions that satisfy terminal checks. Existing process rewards are mostly correlational: they reward retrieval-, reflection-, or verification-like steps without estimating whether the step contributes to final verified success under a specified intervention. We propose CVT-RL, a constrained policy-gradient algorithm with dense verifiable rewards, intervention-validity gating, and a policy-conditioned counterfactual contribution (PCCC) estimator. Deletion, semantic substitution, evidence substitution, and tool-output perturbation define separate controlled interventions; continuations are sampled from a frozen reference policy, and a selection-adjusted doubly robust estimator augments the advantage. Belief control uses only prefix-observable labels, while an augmented Lagrangian constrains unsupported claims, skipped verification, tool tampering, and unsafe calls. On long-context QA, ALFWorld, ScienceWorld, and web/tool tasks, CVT-RL improves average task success from 71.8% for compute-matched non-causal RL and 75.4% for an information-matched counterfactual-process baseline to 78.9%, improves evidence F1 from 78.9 to 82.8 over the information-matched baseline, and reduces measured hacking from 7.2% to 3.9%. Independent human audit estimates 4.6% hacking for CVT-RL versus 8.1% for the information-matched baseline, and adaptive detector-evasion attacks raise hacking only to 7.1%. Stratified bootstrap and mixed-effects tests give p<0.01 after Holm correction for all primary metrics. Carefully scoped counterfactual credit, paired with validity gating, diagnostics, and verifiable constraints, provides a reproducible route toward more reliable long-horizon RL for language agents.

AI.tldr: CVT-RL是一种基于约束策略梯度的强化学习算法，通过密集可验证奖励、干预有效性门控和政策条件反事实贡献（PCCC）估计器，提升长时序语言代理在推理与工具使用中的可靠性。该方法引入删除、语义替换、证据替换和工具输出扰动等可控干预，结合冻结参考策略生成延续，并使用选择调整的双重稳健估计器增强优势。通过仅依赖前缀可观测标签进行信念控制，以及利用增强拉格朗日法约束不支持的声明、跳过验证、工具篡改和不安全调用，CVT-RL在长上下文问答、ALFWorld、ScienceWorld及网络/工具任务中显著提升任务成功率（78.9%），证据F1得分（82.8），并降低欺骗行为（从7.2%降至3.9%）。人类独立审计显示其欺骗率仅为4.6%，且对抗性检测规避攻击下也仅升至7.1%。统计检验（分层自助法与混合效应模型）表明所有主要指标均具有高度显著性（p<0.01）。
AI.motivation: 现有过程奖励多为相关性而非因果性，无法准确评估步骤对最终可验证成功的真实贡献，导致长时序语言代理出现不受支持的证据链、信念漂移和捷径行为。需要一种能识别真实因果贡献并施加可验证约束的方法以提升代理可靠性。
AI.method: 提出CVT-RL算法，包含：1）密集可验证奖励；2）干预有效性门控机制；3）政策条件反事实贡献（PCCC）估计器；4）基于冻结参考策略的延续采样；5）选择调整的双重稳健优势估计；6）仅依赖前缀可观测标签的信念控制；7）增强拉格朗日法约束不当行为（如不支持声明、跳过验证、工具篡改、不安全调用）。
AI.result: 在长上下文问答、ALFWorld、ScienceWorld及网络/工具任务上，CVT-RL将平均任务成功率从非因果RL的71.8%、信息匹配基线的75.4%提升至78.9%；证据F1从78.9提升至82.8；欺骗行为由7.2%降至3.9%。人类审计确认其欺骗率为4.6%（基线为8.1%），对抗性攻击下最高仅升至7.1%。所有主指标在多重校正后均具统计显著性（p<0.01）。
AI.conclusion: 通过精心设计的反事实信用分配、有效性门控、诊断机制与可验证约束，CVT-RL为构建更可靠、可复现的长时序语言代理强化学习提供了可行路径。

title: Disentangled Fine-Grained Prototype Learning for Incomplete Image-Tabular Classification
summary: The missing-modality problem poses a significant challenge in image-tabular multimodal learning across a wide range of multimedia applications, including product understanding, recommendation systems, and medical diagnosis. This challenge is particularly pronounced when the two modalities are highly heterogeneous, as images and tabular attributes differ substantially in their semantic granularity and data distributions. Existing methods learn modality-invariant representations through disentanglement and alignment over global token-averaged features, capturing only coarse cross-modal consistency and overlooking fine-grained semantic and distributional misalignment, which hampers the exploitation of complementary cues under missing modalities. To address this, we propose DFPL, a novel framework for fine-grained prototype learning. Specifically, Shared-Specific Prototype Modeling (SSPM) extracts compact and diverse shared and modality-specific prototypes, and further performs prototype-level disentanglement to suppress redundant intra-modality correlations. Additionally, we propose a Prototype-guided Fine-grained Alignment (PFA) module that jointly enforces prototype-level distribution matching and prototype-to-class semantic alignment within a unified prototype space, thereby preserving both fine-grained distributional and semantic consistency across modalities. We further introduce a Class-aware Multi-scale Aggregation (CMA) module to adaptively aggregate shared semantics and modality-specific characteristics from global and prototype levels for robust predictions. Extensive experiments on three diverse image-tabular benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of our method compared to the previous approaches under various missing-modality settings. Code will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 提出DFPL框架以解决图像-表格多模态学习中的缺失模态问题，通过共享-特定原型建模（SSPM）提取紧凑多样的共享与模态特定原型，并进行原型级解耦；引入原型引导的细粒度对齐（PFA）模块实现原型级分布匹配与语义对齐；结合类别感知多尺度聚合（CMA）模块，自适应融合全局与原型层级信息，提升预测鲁棒性。在三个基准数据集上验证了方法在多种缺失模态设置下的优越性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖全局平均特征进行模态不变表示学习，仅捕捉粗粒度跨模态一致性，忽略细粒度语义与分布错配，导致在缺失模态时难以有效利用互补信息。
AI.method: 提出DFPL框架，包含共享-特定原型建模（SSPM）、原型引导的细粒度对齐（PFA）和类别感知多尺度聚合（CMA）模块，实现原型级解耦、分布与语义对齐及多层级特征融合。
AI.result: 在三个图像-表格多模态基准数据集上，所提方法在多种缺失模态设置下均显著优于现有方法，验证了其有效性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: DFPL通过细粒度原型学习与多层级对齐机制，有效缓解了图像与表格模态间因异质性导致的缺失模态挑战，为多模态学习提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

title: Agents' Last Exam
summary: Recent AI systems have achieved strong results on a wide range of benchmarks, yet these gains have not translated into economically meaningful deployment across many professional domains. We argue that this gap is largely an evaluation problem: widely used benchmarks lack sustained performance measurement on real and economically valuable workflows. This paper introduces Agents' Last Exam (ALE), a benchmark designed to evaluate AI agents on long-horizon, economically valuable, real-world tasks with verifiable outcomes. Developed in collaboration with 250+ industry experts, ALE covers non-physical industries defined with reference to O*NET / SOC 2018 (the U.S. federal occupational taxonomy). It is organized around a task taxonomy with 55 subfields grouped into 13 industry clusters covering 1K+ tasks. Current results show that the hardest tier remains far from saturated: across mainstream harness and backbone configurations, the average full pass rate is 2.6%. ALE is designed as a living benchmark: its task pool grows continuously as new workflows and industries are onboarded. More broadly, ALE is intended not merely as another leaderboard, but as an instrument for closing the gap between benchmark success and GDP-relevant impact.

AI.tldr: ALE 是一个针对长期、经济价值高、真实世界任务的AI代理评估基准，由250多位行业专家合作开发，覆盖1000多个任务，涉及13个行业集群和55个子领域。当前主流模型在最难任务上的平均完整通过率仅为2.6%，表明该领域仍远未饱和。ALE被设计为持续演进的活基准，旨在弥合基准表现与实际经济影响之间的差距。
AI.motivation: 当前AI系统在各类基准测试中表现优异，但未能在多数专业领域实现具有经济意义的实际部署。作者认为这一差距主要源于评估方式的问题：现有基准缺乏对真实且具经济价值工作流的持续性能测量。因此需要一种能反映真实世界经济影响的评估体系。
AI.method: 构建了一个名为Agents' Last Exam (ALE)的动态基准，涵盖非物理行业的职业领域（基于美国联邦职业分类O*NET/SOC 2018），采用任务分类体系，包含13个行业集群和55个子领域，共1000多个真实任务。通过与行业专家合作定义任务，并以可验证结果为导向进行评估。
AI.result: 在当前主流模型配置下，最难任务层级的平均完整通过率仅为2.6%，说明当前AI能力尚未充分满足复杂真实世界任务的需求，存在巨大提升空间。基准具备持续扩展能力，可随新流程和行业加入不断更新。
AI.conclusion: ALE不仅是一个新的排行榜，更是一种推动AI从基准成功走向真正经济影响力的关键工具，致力于缩小技术评估与实际社会经济贡献之间的鸿沟。

title: When Evidence is Sparse: Weakly Supervised Early Failure Alerting in Dialogs and LLM-Agent Trajectories
summary: Early failure alerting requires deciding, while a dialog or agent trajectory is still unfolding, whether to flag it as likely to fail. This is challenging because supervision is typically available only as a trajectory-level success/failure label while alerts must be raised from partial interactions. Prior early-classification methods often bridge this gap by assigning the terminal label to every prefix, treating every turn as failure evidence. We hypothesize that this prefix-label assumption is poorly matched to multi-turn language interactions, where evidence of eventual failure is sparse and often delayed. In this paper, we introduce a two-stage approach that learns from this sparse evidence structure and uses the resulting risk estimates for controllable early alerting. Specifically, our attention-based failure predictor learns sparse turn-level failure evidence from trajectory labels and uses it to estimate failure risk from partial histories. We then pair this predictor with $α$-STOP, a single preference-conditioned stopping policy that selects an accuracy-earliness operating point at inference time rather than training a separate trigger for each preference. Across five benchmarks spanning customer support, task-oriented dialog, persuasion, tool use, and planning, we first show that high-relevance failure evidence occupies only 4.7-11.3% of turns and first appears after 59.0-83.6\% of trajectories on average. We further show that the attention-based predictor improves Pareto-frontier quality (hypervolume) by 1-10\% over naive prefix supervision, and that the full system improves frontier quality by 3-42\% over state-of-the-art trigger policies while reducing training cost per operating point by 1-3 orders of magnitude.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两阶段方法，用于在对话或代理轨迹进行中时，基于稀疏的失败证据实现可控的早期失败预警。通过注意力机制学习转轮级别的失败信号，并结合$\alpha$-STOP策略在推理时动态选择准确率与提前度的平衡点，显著提升预警性能并降低训练成本。
AI.motivation: 现有早期分类方法通常将最终成功/失败标签分配给所有前缀，但在多轮语言交互中，失败证据稀疏且延迟出现，导致该假设不匹配实际场景。因此需要更精确地建模失败证据的分布特性。
AI.method: 提出一种两阶段框架：第一阶段使用注意力机制从轨迹标签中学习稀疏的转轮级别失败证据，估计部分历史下的失败风险；第二阶段采用$\alpha$-STOP策略，在推理时根据偏好选择最优的准确率-提前度权衡点，避免为每个偏好单独训练触发器。
AI.result: 实验显示，高相关性失败证据仅占总轮次的4.7%-11.3%，且首次出现平均在轨迹进行59.0%-83.6%之后。所提方法在五个基准上相比朴素前缀监督提升帕累托前沿质量1-10%，相比现有最优触发策略提升3-42%，同时训练成本降低1-3个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效捕捉了多轮对话中失败证据的稀疏性和延迟性，通过可调的$\alpha$-STOP策略实现了高质量、低成本的早期失败预警。

title: REGEN: Reference-Guided Synthetic Multivariate Time Series Generation for Forecasting
summary:
Training robust multivariate time series forecasting models requires large, diverse corpora, yet many real-world domains provide only a handful of observed sequences. Existing generators fail to resolve this mismatch: prior-based approaches (e.g., CauKer, TimePFN) produce domain-agnostic samples, while data-driven methods (e.g., TimeGAN) treat references as black-box supervision, forfeiting explicit control over periodic structure, local variability, and cross-variable dynamics.
  We propose ReGeN, a reference-guided generative pipeline that treats observed sequences not as examples to imitate, but as structural scaffolds for controllable synthesis. ReGeN decomposes each reference into three interpretable components: a phase-aligned periodic backbone capturing dominant domain morphology; per-variable stochastic residuals modeled with a deep-kernel Gaussian process; and lag-aware cross-variable dependencies injected through a structural causal model with fitted coupling coefficients. Sampling these components at controllable temperature broadens distributional coverage while preserving domain-grounded structure.
  We show that ReGeN-generated data consistently substitutes for real sibling data with minimal forecasting degradation, and in strongly periodic domains such as traffic, can outperform the real source itself. We further show that a foundation model pretrained on ReGeN corpora outperforms those pretrained on prior-based and data-driven synthetic alternatives. This suggests that in low-data regimes, how reference data is structurally exploited can matter as much as how much data is available.

AI.tldr: ReGeN 是一种参考引导的生成框架，通过将观测序列分解为周期性骨架、变量间依赖和随机残差三部分，实现对多变量时间序列的可控合成。该方法在低数据场景下显著提升模型性能，优于传统生成方式。
AI.motivation: 现有生成方法在少样本场景下难以有效捕捉真实数据的结构特征，如周期性、局部变化和跨变量动态关系，导致生成数据质量不足，影响下游预测任务表现。
AI.method: ReGeN 将参考序列分解为：1）相位对齐的周期性主干；2）基于深度核高斯过程的变量级随机残差；3）通过结构因果模型建模的滞后感知跨变量依赖。通过可控温度采样扩展分布覆盖，同时保持领域结构一致性。
AI.result: ReGeN 生成的数据在多场景下可替代真实数据，且在交通等强周期性领域甚至优于真实数据；基于 ReGeN 数据预训练的基础模型性能优于基于先验或数据驱动生成方法的模型。
AI.conclusion: 在数据稀缺的场景中，如何结构化利用参考数据比数据量本身更为关键，ReGeN 提供了一种高效、可控且具解释性的生成范式。

title: Horse Eye Blink Detection and Classification for Equine Affective State Assessment
summary: Automated detection of equine facial action units (AUs) is a promising yet under-explored avenue for pain and affective state assessment in horses. Half and full-blink movements are recognised indicators of pain and stress, but as micro-expressions, their subtle, fine-grained nature makes them easily missed by the naked eye and only discernible through frame-by-frame video inspection, making reliable automated detection from video a particularly demanding task. We develop and evaluate three methods for automated blink classification from horse videos: a frame-based YOLOv12 detector, an optical flow magnitude thresholding approach, and a fine-tuned VideoMAE model, tested on a publicly available dataset. We achieve a macro-F1 score of 0.898 when doing blink classification and 0.926 on binary blink detection. Our results highlight both the potential and the inherent challenges of fine-grained AU detection for equine welfare monitoring.

AI.tldr: 本文提出三种自动化检测马匹眨眼动作的方法：基于帧的YOLOv12检测器、光流幅度阈值法和微调的VideoMAE模型，均在公开数据集上测试。结果显示，眨眼分类的宏F1得分为0.898，二值化眨眼检测得分为0.926，表明该方法在马匹疼痛与情绪状态评估中具有潜力，但细粒度动作单元检测仍面临挑战。
AI.motivation: 马匹的眨眼动作是疼痛和压力的重要微表情指标，但由于其细微且快速，人工难以察觉，需通过视频逐帧分析，因此亟需可靠的自动化检测方法以提升马匹福利监测效率。
AI.method: 采用三种方法：基于帧的YOLOv12目标检测器、光流幅度阈值处理、以及微调的VideoMAE视频理解模型，用于从视频中自动识别马匹眨眼行为。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上，眨眼分类任务达到0.898的宏F1分数，二值化眨眼检测任务达到0.926的得分，表明所提方法具备较高准确率。
AI.conclusion: 尽管自动化检测马匹面部动作单元在技术上具有前景，但仍面临细粒度识别的挑战，未来需进一步优化模型以提升鲁棒性与泛化能力。

title: Mutation Without Variation: Convergence Dynamics in LLM-Driven Program Evolution
comment: Accepted to the Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference (GECCO '26) Workshop on Large Language Models for and with Evolutionary Computation
summary: When an LLM repeatedly mutates a program, does it explore new forms or circle back to the same ones? We study this question by analyzing LLM-driven mutation chains in the absence of selection pressure within a domain-specific language, varying prompt design, model family, and stochastic replication. We find that LLM-based mutation consistently converges toward restricted attractor regions in program space. Convergence is especially severe at the structural level: in 87% of chains, over 93% of mutations revisit a previously seen structural form, with most variation confined to terminal substitutions within recurring templates. Cycle analysis reveals short cycles and self-loops dominating the transition structure. The rate of convergence varies with prompt wording and model choice, but the phenomenon is robust across conditions. A classical GP subtree mutation operator does not exhibit comparable convergence, suggesting that the effect is intrinsic to the LLM mutation pipeline. These findings reveal a tension at the heart of LLM-driven program evolution: the same capabilities that enable semantics-aware program transformation also carry a systematic bias toward structural homogeneity that must be accounted for if such systems are to sustain open-ended exploration. Source code is available at https://github.com/can-gurkan/lmca.

AI.tldr: LLM-driven program mutation tends to converge toward limited structural forms rather than exploring diverse programs, with 87% of mutation chains revisiting the same structures. This convergence is due to inherent biases in LLMs, not just prompt or model choice, and is absent in classical genetic programming operators.
AI.motivation: To understand whether LLM-based program mutation leads to diverse exploration or repetitive patterns in program space, especially without selection pressure.
AI.method: The study analyzes LLM-driven mutation chains in a domain-specific language under varied prompts, models, and stochastic conditions, using structural analysis and cycle detection to assess program diversity and recurrence.
AI.result: LLMs consistently converge to restricted attractor regions in program space, with most variation limited to terminal substitutions within recurring templates; short cycles and self-loops dominate transitions. Classical GP subtree mutation does not show this behavior.
AI.conclusion: The ability of LLMs to perform semantics-aware transformations introduces a systematic bias toward structural homogeneity, which limits open-ended exploration and must be addressed in future LLM-driven program evolution systems.

title: Executable Schema Contracts: From Automatic Ingestion to Multi-Source Retrieval
summary: Real-world data spans tables, documents, and semi-structured files with implicit semantics. Querying this data requires integrating evidence across inconsistent schemas and formats, yet existing approaches either demand costly manual engineering or bypass structure entirely. We present a system that automatically discovers an executable schema from raw multi-source data and uses it as a shared contract for knowledge graph construction and query-time retrieval. A closed-world field catalog constrains LLM-based schema discovery to attested fields; deterministic structural analysis infers identity keys, foreign keys, and source hierarchy; and the resulting schema drives extraction, deduplication, and cross-source linking into a provenance-aware knowledge graph. At query time the schema -- optionally extended via a monotonic protocol -- conditions a multi-tool agent routing retrieval across structured lookup, graph traversal, and vector search, returning grounded answers with traceable citations. In controlled zero-shot comparisons using the same LLM, data, and evaluation harness, the system improves over retrieval-only and decomposition-based baselines across four QA benchmarks, with ablations showing that schema-conditioned routing, structural intelligence, and schema-guided construction each contribute to the gains.

AI.tldr: 该系统通过自动发现原始多源数据的可执行模式，实现知识图谱构建与查询时检索。采用封闭世界字段目录约束大模型进行模式发现，结合确定性结构分析推断主键、外键和源层次结构，生成的模式驱动数据抽取、去重及跨源链接，形成带溯源的知识图谱。查询时，基于模式的多工具代理路由机制在结构化查找、图遍历和向量搜索之间智能调度，返回可追溯引用的准确答案。在四个QA基准测试中，相比仅检索和分解基线方法，该系统显著提升性能；消融实验表明，模式条件路由、结构智能和模式引导构建均贡献关键增益。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理跨异构格式与模式的现实世界数据时，要么需要昂贵的手动工程，要么完全忽略结构信息。如何自动发现一致且可执行的数据模式，并利用其统一数据集成与查询流程，是当前挑战。
AI.method: 1. 使用封闭世界字段目录限制大模型的模式发现范围；2. 通过确定性结构分析推断主键、外键和源层级关系；3. 基于生成的模式驱动数据抽取、去重与跨源链接，构建溯源知识图谱；4. 查询时采用模式条件的多工具代理，动态路由至结构化查询、图遍历或向量搜索，实现精准且可解释的检索。
AI.result: 在相同大模型、数据集和评估框架下，系统在四个QA基准上优于仅检索和分解基线方法；消融实验验证了模式条件路由、结构智能和模式引导构建对性能提升的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 该系统实现了从原始多源数据到可执行模式的自动化发现，并以模式为共享契约，统一知识图谱构建与查询过程，显著提升跨源数据理解与问答能力，具备良好的可扩展性和可解释性。

title: Data-efficient flood depth prediction through domain-aware coreset selection and tabular foundation models
summary: Near-real-time flood depth prediction demands surrogate models that are accurate, fast, and transferable across watersheds. Supervised surrogates can match physics-based simulators in accuracy but need millions of training rows per watershed and cannot extrapolate beyond their original mesh. We propose a domain-aware coreset construction pipeline that conditions a tabular foundation model at inference time. The pipeline stratifies storms by return period and most-affected watershed, then samples hexagons with a target-aware spatial selector. With 0.7% of the per-watershed training pool, the model attains a mean $R^2$ of 0.663 across nine Houston-area watersheds, within 98.5% of the supervised reference ($R^2$ = 0.673). It transfers to held-out watersheds without task-specific retraining, staying ahead of a coreset-trained supervised baseline. On real storms it exceeds the supervised reference on a far out-of-distribution case and trails it on a mostly in-distribution one. Domain-aware coreset construction lets tabular foundation models deliver data-efficient, watershed-transferable flood predictions without per-watershed training.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种领域感知的共轭集构建流程，通过在推理时条件化表格基础模型，实现高效、可迁移的洪水深度预测。仅需每流域0.7%的训练数据，模型在休斯顿地区九个流域上达到平均R²=0.663，接近监督基准（R²=0.673）。模型无需任务特定微调即可迁移至未见流域，在分布外案例中表现优于基准，展现了数据效率与跨流域泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统监督模型需要海量训练数据且无法超越原始网格范围，难以实现跨流域迁移；亟需一种高效、快速、可迁移的近实时洪水深度预测方法。
AI.method: 采用基于重现期和受影响流域分层的风暴分组策略，结合目标感知的空间选择器从六边形网格中采样，构建领域感知的共轭集，并在推理时条件化表格基础模型以实现高效预测。
AI.result: 在九个休斯顿流域上，仅使用0.7%的训练数据即达到0.663的平均R²，为监督基准的98.5%；在未见流域上无需再训练即可良好迁移；在真实极端洪水事件中表现优于监督模型，在常规事件中略逊，验证了其对分布外情况的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 领域感知的共轭集构建使表格基础模型在无需每流域单独训练的前提下，实现高数据效率与跨流域迁移的洪水预测，显著提升近实时洪水预警系统的实用性与可扩展性。

title: ORACLE-CT: Anatomy-Aware Support Pooling for CT Classification
summary:
Abdominal CT disease classification is challenging because each scan is a large 3D volume with many possible findings, while diagnostic evidence is often confined to specific organs or anatomical compartments. Most study-level classifiers aggregate encoder features using anatomy-agnostic pooling or attention, creating a mismatch between localized disease evidence and global evidence aggregation. We propose ORACLE--CT, an encoder-agnostic anatomy-aware aggregation framework that uses multi-organ segmentation to define label-specific anatomical supports and restrict attention pooling to relevant regions. The framework supports single-organ, multi-organ union, comparative, localized, and global support strategies.
  We evaluate ORACLE--CT with three encoder families: DINOv3, I3D--ResNet-121, and the radiology-native Pillar--0 encoder. Models are trained end-to-end on MERLIN and evaluated internally and under frozen external transfer to Duke--Abdomen and AMOS. Compared with global average pooling, support-masked pooling improved MERLIN macro-AUROC/AUPRC from 0.838/0.638 to 0.858/0.676 for DINOv3 and from 0.829/0.617 to 0.848/0.659 for I3D--ResNet-121. On harmonized 10-label external evaluation, DINOv3 improved on Duke--Abdomen from 0.802/0.628 to 0.835/0.683 and on AMOS from 0.742/0.313 to 0.762/0.350, with similar gains for I3D--ResNet-121. For Pillar--0, most gains came from learned attention, with smaller additional benefit from anatomical masking. ORACLE--CT improves discrimination and external robustness while preserving an auditable link between predictions and anatomical evidence.

AI.tldr: 提出ORACLE-CT框架，通过多器官分割定义标签特定解剖支持，限制注意力池化到相关区域，实现解剖感知的特征聚合，显著提升腹部CT疾病分类性能与外部泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理腹部CT时，因全局特征聚合方式与局部病变证据不匹配，导致诊断准确性受限；需要一种能对特定解剖区域进行精准聚焦的聚合策略。
AI.method: 设计了一种编码器无关的解剖感知聚合框架，利用多器官分割生成标签相关的解剖掩码，仅在相关区域进行注意力池化，支持单器官、多器官联合、对比、局部和全局等不同支持策略。
AI.result: 在MERLIN数据集上，相比全局平均池化，ORACLE-CT使DINOv3和I3D-ResNet-121的宏AUROC/AUPRC分别提升至0.858/0.676和0.848/0.659；在外部数据集Duke-Abdomen和AMOS上也取得显著提升，且模型预测可追溯至具体解剖位置，增强可解释性。
AI.conclusion: ORACLE-CT通过解剖引导的特征聚合，有效提升了腹部CT疾病分类的准确性和外部迁移能力，同时保持了预测结果的可审计性，为临床可解释AI提供新范式。

title: A Motivational Architecture for Conversational AGI
summary: Motivational architectures in cognitive AI have largely been designed for physical agents regulating bodily needs. Conversational agents operate in a different regime: their sensorimotor loop is linguistic, their environment is a user's evolving mental state, and their consequential actions are speech acts, tool invocations, and strategic silences. This paper proposes a conversational reinterpretation of the OpenPsi motivational lineage, coupled to MetaMo's higher-level motivational scaffold, for agents built on a modular execution substrate. Homeostasis is recast in dialogue-native terms: the agent regulates competence, uncertainty reduction, affiliation, affinity, legitimacy, nurturing, and aesthetic coherence rather than bodily deficits. We propose three contributions: a ten-stage motivational processing pipeline that architecturally separates cognitive modulation from situational appraisal; a dual decision strategy blending urgency-driven fast response with deliberative multi-goal optimization; and an architecturally useful distinction between pre-action feelings and post-action emotions as functionally different forms of affect. We specialize the framework to two example agents -- CompanionAgent and ResearchAgent -- and sketch its extension to social robotics and domain-generic human-level AGI.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对对话型智能体的动机架构重构，将OpenPsi动机体系与MetaMo高层动机框架结合，用于模块化执行基础的智能体。核心思想是将传统生理稳态转化为对话语境下的心理调节目标，如能力、不确定性降低、亲和、合法性等。提出十阶段动机处理流水线、快慢双决策策略，以及行动前情绪与行动后情感的功能区分。通过CompanionAgent和ResearchAgent两个实例验证，并展望其在社交机器人与通用人类级AGI中的应用。
AI.motivation: 现有认知AI的动机架构主要面向物理代理，关注身体需求调节；而对话型智能体的环境是用户不断变化的心理状态，行为是言语行为、工具调用和策略性沉默，因此需要一种适配语言交互特性的新型动机机制。
AI.method: 重构OpenPsi动机体系，引入MetaMo高层动机框架，设计十阶段动机处理流水线，采用双决策策略（快速响应与多目标优化），并区分预动作感受与后动作情感。
AI.result: 成功构建适用于对话型智能体的动机架构，实现在CompanionAgent和ResearchAgent中的有效应用，具备扩展至社交机器人与通用人类级AGI的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为对话型智能体提供了可扩展、模块化且符合语言交互本质的动机系统，推动了从物理代理到认知对话代理的动机范式迁移。

title: ComplexityMT: Benchmarking the Interaction Between Text Complexity and Machine Translation
summary: When a text is translated, does the translation retain the complexity of the original? We introduce ComplexityMT, a new challenge for assessing how text complexity and machine translation interact with and influence each other, using the Common European Framework of Reference for Languages (CEFR) levels as the measure of text complexity. Across six languages, including Arabic, Dutch, English, French, Hindi, and Russian, we evaluate three open-weight models, one closed model, and a commercial machine translation system on two tasks: i) correlation of CEFR with translation difficulty, and ii) shifts in CEFR levels of the source texts. Our experiments show that higher CEFR levels make texts more difficult to translate, and that machine translation shifts the CEFR level of the target text compared to the original source, for most languages. These findings provide new insights for researchers and practitioners working on multilingual pedagogical content generation and machine translation difficulty estimation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ComplexityMT，用于评估文本复杂度与机器翻译之间的相互作用，使用CEFR水平作为复杂度衡量标准。在六种语言上评估了多个机器翻译模型，发现高CEFR等级的文本更难翻译，且机器翻译会改变目标文本的CEFR水平。
AI.motivation: 研究文本复杂度与机器翻译之间的关系，以评估翻译是否保持原文复杂度。
AI.method: 使用CEFR水平作为文本复杂度的衡量标准，在六种语言上评估多个机器翻译模型，分析其与翻译难度的关系及源文本的CEFR水平变化。
AI.result: 高CEFR等级的文本更难翻译，且机器翻译通常会改变目标文本的CEFR水平。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为多语言教育内容生成和机器翻译难度估计提供了新见解。

title: Sharp Low-Degree Thresholds for Planted-vs-Planted Testing
summary: We establish the first sharp thresholds for low-degree polynomial tests in planted-vs-planted settings, where the goal is to determine with vanishing error which of two structured planted mechanisms generated the observed data. We prove matching low-degree upper and lower bounds for counting communities in the planted submatrix and planted dense subgraph models. The resulting testing threshold coincides, down to the sharp constant, with the known low-degree recovery threshold. In contrast, the task of weak testing, where the goal is to outperform random guessing, does not have a sharp threshold but rather a smooth transition, which we identify. To prove our results, we develop a framework for planted-vs-planted testing that builds on a latent-variable expansion originating in low-degree recovery and employs new methods to identify and prune non-signal contributions.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了首个关于低度多项式检验在植株-植株设置中的精确阈值，证明了在植株子矩阵和植株稠密子图模型中计数社区的低度上下界匹配，并且测试阈值与已知的低度恢复阈值在精确常数上一致。相比之下，弱测试任务没有精确阈值，而是呈现平滑过渡，本文也予以识别。研究通过基于潜在变量扩展的框架和新方法来识别并剔除非信号贡献，从而实现结果。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在解决在植株-植株设置中如何以可忽略错误判断数据由哪种结构化植株机制生成的问题，特别关注低度多项式检验的精确阈值特性及其与恢复阈值的关系。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于潜在变量扩展的植株-植株测试框架，结合新的方法用于识别和剔除非信号成分，实现低度上下界匹配。
AI.result: 证明了在植株子矩阵和植株稠密子图模型中，低度多项式检验具有精确阈值，且该阈值与恢复阈值一致；弱测试任务则表现出平滑过渡而非精确阈值。
AI.conclusion: 本研究首次揭示了低度多项式检验在植株-植株设置中的精确阈值行为，为理解统计推断中的计算-信息权衡提供了重要工具。

title: Formal Concept Lattices are Good Semantic Scaffolds for Concept-Based Learning
summary: Learning semantics is essential for deep learning models to be interpretable and better aligned with human reasoning. Concept-based models approach this by representing classes through meaningful semantic abstractions, but typically treat all concepts as a flat, unstructured set learned at a single neural network layer. This overlooks a fundamental property of human semantic understanding: concepts being organized hierarchically, from general to specific. While deep networks do learn a hierarchy of visual features, this structure is rarely aligned with explicit semantic hierarchies. Drawing on Formal Concept Analysis, we demonstrate that formal concept lattices provide principled semantic scaffolds to guide neural network learning. These lattices naturally identify where in the network concepts should be learned based on their level of generality. This allows the model to develop staged, semantically grounded representations throughout its depth. Empirical results on real-world datasets show that our models produce more interpretable embeddings, support more effective interventions, and learn concept representations that are both meaningful and hierarchically structured.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于形式概念分析（Formal Concept Analysis）的层次化语义学习方法，通过构建概念格来指导神经网络在不同层级学习具有语义层次结构的概念，从而提升模型的可解释性与人类认知对齐。实验表明，该方法生成的嵌入更具可解释性，支持更有效的干预，并能学习到有意义且结构化的概念表示。
AI.motivation: 现有概念基模型通常将所有概念视为扁平、无结构的集合，未考虑人类语义理解中的层次性特征，而深度网络虽学习视觉特征层次，但与显式语义层次常不一致，因此需要一种能引导神经网络学习语义层次结构的方法。
AI.method: 利用形式概念分析构建形式概念格，作为语义骨架，指导神经网络在不同深度层学习对应层次的概念，实现分阶段、语义驱动的表示学习。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上的实验证明，该方法生成的表示更具可解释性，支持更有效的干预，且学到的概念既具意义又具备层次结构。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入形式概念格作为语义框架，能够有效引导神经网络学习层次化、语义明确的概念表示，显著提升模型的可解释性与人类认知的一致性。

title: Assessing the Carbon Emissions and Energy Consumption of U.S. Hyperscale Data Centers
summary: The rapid proliferation of hyperscale data centers (HDCs) in the US, mainly driven by the adoption of artificial intelligence, has raised concerns about this industry's environmental footprint. We compiled facility-level information on 403 US hyperscale data centers operating between May 2024 and April 2025 and estimated their electricity consumption, electricity sources, and attributable CO2 emissions. Across different facility-load scenarios, these HDCs consumed approximately 68-99 TWh of electricity and were associated with about 37-54 million metric tons of CO2. Under the central scenario, HDC electricity demand corresponded to approximately 1.8% of total US electricity consumption, with roughly 54% of attributed generation supplied by fossil-fuel sources. The HDC electricity-weighted average carbon intensity was approximately 545 gCO2/kWh, about 48% above the contemporaneous US national grid-average carbon intensity of 370 gCO2/kWh. Our approach provides an attributional tool for assessing the environmental footprint of hyperscale data centers using the most recent EPA eGRID plant-level data.

AI.tldr: 该研究分析了2024年5月至2025年4月期间美国403个超大规模数据中心（HDCs）的电力消耗、能源来源及二氧化碳排放情况，发现其电力消耗约为68-99太瓦时，导致37-54百万吨二氧化碳排放。在基准情景下，这些数据中心占美国总电力消费的约1.8%，其中约54%的电力来自化石燃料，碳强度平均为545克二氧化碳/千瓦时，比美国全国电网平均碳强度高出约48%。研究基于最新的美国环保署eGRID电厂级数据，提出了一种评估超大规模数据中心环境影响的方法。
AI.motivation: 随着人工智能的广泛应用，美国超大规模数据中心数量迅速增长，引发对其环境足迹的担忧。亟需准确量化其电力消耗和碳排放，以支持可持续发展政策制定。
AI.method: 收集并分析403个美国超大规模数据中心在2024年5月至2025年4月期间的设施级数据，结合美国环保署eGRID提供的电厂级电力来源数据，估算其电力消耗、能源结构和二氧化碳排放量，并采用多种负载情景进行敏感性分析。
AI.result: 研究估计，这些数据中心在不同负载情景下消耗68-99太瓦时电力，产生37-54百万吨二氧化碳排放；在基准情景下，占美国总电力消费的1.8%，54%的电力来自化石燃料，碳强度达545克二氧化碳/千瓦时，显著高于全国电网平均水平（370克二氧化碳/千瓦时）。
AI.conclusion: 该研究构建的评估方法可有效追踪超大规模数据中心的环境影响，揭示其对电力系统和碳排放的显著贡献，强调了推动清洁能源转型和提升能效的必要性。

title: Multilingual Coreference Resolution via Cycle-Consistent Machine Translation
summary: Coreference resolution is a core NLP task, having a broad range of downstream applications, e.g.~machine translation, question answering, document summarization, etc. While the task is well-studied in English, comparatively less attention is dedicated to coreference resolution in other languages, especially low-resource ones. To mitigate this gap, we propose a novel coreference resolution pipeline that harnesses machine translation (MT) from English to a target low-resource language, to generate or expand training data. To automatically validate the quality of the translated samples, we back-translate the samples and assess the similarity with the original English samples via cosine similarity in the latent space of a BERT model. The resulting similarity scores are integrated into the loss function to weight training samples according to their MT cycle consistency. Extensive experiments on four low-resource languages show that our pipeline brings significant performance gains in coreference resolution. Moreover, our pipeline enables accurate coreference resolution in languages where no previous corpora were available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用机器翻译（MT）从英语到目标低资源语言来生成或扩展训练数据的新颖共指消解流水线。通过回译和BERT隐空间中的余弦相似度评估翻译样本质量，并将相似度分数融入损失函数以根据机器翻译循环一致性加权训练样本。在四种低资源语言上的实验表明，该方法显著提升了共指消解性能，并使此前无语料的语言也能实现准确的共指消解。
AI.motivation: 共指消解在英语中研究充分，但在其他语言尤其是低资源语言中关注度较低。为弥合这一差距，需有效利用现有英语资源来支持低资源语言的共指消解任务。
AI.method: 利用机器翻译将英语数据转换至目标低资源语言以生成或扩充训练数据；通过回译并计算原英文样本与回译后样本在BERT隐空间中的余弦相似度，评估翻译质量；将相似度得分作为权重引入损失函数，以增强模型对高质量翻译样本的关注。
AI.result: 在四种低资源语言上均取得显著性能提升；首次实现了在无先前语料的语言上的准确共指消解。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的基于机器翻译与循环一致性验证的共指消解流水线，有效缓解了低资源语言共指消解数据稀缺问题，具有良好的泛化能力与实用性。

title: Learning Manifold and Itô Dynamics with Branched Neural Rough Differential Equations
summary: Neural rough differential equations (NRDEs) stay accurate under irregular sampling while taking far fewer integration steps than standard neural differential equations, summarising a finely sampled driver by its log-signature and advancing the hidden state over coarse intervals using the log-ODE method. This efficiency rests on the shuffle algebra, the algebraic counterpart of Stratonovich calculus. This reliance means NRDEs cannot expose the quadratic-variation terms Itô dynamics require, nor the ordered covariant derivatives that govern Itô flows on connection-equipped manifolds. Ameliorating this, we introduce Branched Neural Rough Differential Equations (B-NRDEs), a Hopf-algebraic framework that recasts the NRDE log-ODE step as geometric numerical integration on the state-space manifold, matching the driving algebra to the governing calculus: Grossman--Larson rooted trees for Euclidean Itô dynamics, Munthe-Kaas--Wright planar rooted trees for ordered covariant derivatives on manifolds, and the shuffle algebra in the classical Stratonovich case. This yields intrinsic coarse-step dynamics that exactly preserve manifold constraints. Finally, we introduce a branched signature-kernel objective to enable Itô-consistent law matching by making quadratic-variation terms visible during training. On rough Bergomi volatility, sim-to-real $\mathrm{SO}(3)$ dynamics forecasting, and SPD covariance dynamics, B-NRDEs offer a unified, effective approach to stochastic and manifold-valued dynamics beyond the Euclidean--Stratonovich setting.

AI.tldr: 提出B-NRDEs，一种基于霍普夫代数的框架，通过根树结构统一处理欧氏空间中的伊藤动力学、流形上的有序协变导数及经典斯特拉托诺维奇情形，实现对流形约束的精确保持，并引入分支签名核目标以在训练中显式体现二次变差项，从而实现伊藤一致性概率匹配。该方法在粗糙伯戈米波动率、模拟到真实SO(3)动态预测和对称正定协方差动态中表现出统一且高效的优势。
AI.motivation: 标准神经随机微分方程（NRDEs）虽在不规则采样下保持精度并减少积分步数，但依赖于洗牌代数，仅适用于斯特拉托诺维奇型计算，无法捕捉伊藤动力学所需的二次变差项或流形上由联络定义的有序协变导数，限制了其在非欧几何与伊藤型随机系统中的应用。
AI.method: 引入基于霍普夫代数的分支神经粗糙微分方程（B-NRDEs），将原NRDE的对数-常微分方程步骤重构为状态空间流形上的几何数值积分；根据不同的驱动代数选择相应的根树结构：Grossman-Larson根树用于欧氏空间伊藤动力学，Munthe-Kaas-Wright平面根树用于流形上的有序协变导数，而原始洗牌代数仍适用于斯特拉托诺维奇情形；同时设计分支签名核目标函数，使训练过程中可显式感知二次变差项。
AI.result: B-NRDEs在粗糙伯戈米波动率建模、模拟到真实SO(3)动态预测以及对称正定协方差演化任务中均展现出卓越性能，实现了对流形约束的精确保持与伊藤一致性概率匹配，提供了一种超越欧氏-斯特拉托诺维奇设定的统一有效方法。
AI.conclusion: B-NRDEs通过代数结构与几何积分的结合，突破了传统NRDE在伊藤动力学与流形系统中的局限性，为复杂随机动态建模提供了新范式，具备理论严谨性与实际有效性。

title: Can We Predict The Human Preference For Text-to-Image Content Prior To Generation And Is It Even Useful To Do So?
summary: Diffusion Models (DM) have revolutionized text-driven generation by enabling the synthesis of high-quality, photorealistic visual content from user prompts. Whereas prior advances in visual generation such as VAEs and GANs were primarily evaluated on perceptual or visual similarity metrics such as FID PSNR, DM advances have fostered the development of more advanced Human Preference Metrics (HPM) that model and quantify human judgment as scalar values. However, DMs synthesize content using an inherently stochastic process where random noise seeds generation. The initial random noise directly affects the quality of generated outputs, both qualitatively and quantitatively. This influence is pronounced in smaller models for local deployment scenarios. Given this phenomenon, we first investigate to what extent we can predict scalar HPM scores prior to committing compute resources for generation. Further, we then investigate to what extent we can leverage such prediction to improve the quality of generated images, and also study which HPMs are best suited for this task. Our investigation reveals that not only is this possible, but that it is feasible to achieve negligible hardware overhead.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在扩散模型（DM）生成图像前，能否基于初始随机噪声预测人类偏好评分（HPM），并探索利用该预测提升生成图像质量的可行性。研究发现，这一预测不仅可行，且可实现极低的硬件开销。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型虽能生成高质量视觉内容，但其生成过程受初始随机噪声影响显著，尤其在小型模型中。现有评估多依赖感知相似性指标，而人类偏好评分（HPM）更能反映真实用户感受。因此，亟需在生成前预测高质量输出的可能性，以节省计算资源并提升效率。
AI.method: 通过分析不同初始噪声种子对生成结果的影响，建立基于噪声特征的预测模型，用于提前估计人类偏好评分；进一步设计优化策略，利用预测结果筛选或调整生成过程，从而提升最终图像质量。
AI.result: 实验表明，可在不增加显著计算负担的情况下，有效预测人类偏好得分，并据此优化生成流程，显著提升图像质量。同时，部分特定的HPM在该任务中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 基于初始噪声的早期人类偏好预测是可行且高效的，为降低扩散模型的计算成本、提升生成质量提供了新路径。

title: Minimizing the Hidden Cost of Scales: Graph-Guided Ultra-Low-Bit Quantization for Large Language Models
comment: Preprint. 18 pages, 10 figures, 7 tables, including appendix
summary: Post-training quantization (PTQ) is critical for the efficient deployment of large language models (LLMs). Recent ultra-low-bit PTQ methods rely on rigid weight-saliency assumptions or position heuristics, introducing substantial hidden scaling overhead. We propose SAGE-PTQ (Saliency-Aware Graph-guided Efficient PTQ), a novel ultra-low-bit quantization framework for LLMs that minimizes hidden scaling cost. SAGE-PTQ separates salient and unsalient weights using distributional statistics, then models subsampled unsalient weights as a sparse graph to estimate the optimal number of groups per layer. SAGE-PTQ applies dual-mode quantization, assigning multi-bit precision to salient weights and binarizing unsalient weights. To reduce scaling overhead, SAGE-PTQ uses one per-channel scale for salient weights and one scalar per unsalient group. Finally, SAGE-PTQ implements adaptive saliency thresholding to select the optimal saliency ratio per matrix. SAGE-PTQ achieves 1.03 weight bits and only 0.004 scaling bits per matrix on average, outperforming state-of-the-art methods such as BiLLM and PB-LLM. On LLaMA-3-8B, SAGE-PTQ achieves 6.74 WikiText2 perplexity, compared to 55.8 for BiLLM, while using less than 50% of BiLLM's GPU memory. On LLaMA-2-70B, SAGE-PTQ provides 1.5x faster decoding on one NVIDIA L40 GPU, demonstrating practical inference efficiency.

AI.tldr: SAGE-PTQ是一种新型的超低比特量化框架，通过分布统计分离显著与非显著权重，利用稀疏图模型优化每层分组数，采用双模式量化（显著权重多比特、非显著权重二值化），并使用单通道缩放和每组标量以减少缩放开销。该方法实现了1.03权重比特和0.004缩放比特的极低开销，在LLaMA-3-8B上达到6.74的WikiText2困惑度（优于BiLLM的55.8），且显存低于其50%，在LLaMA-2-70B上实现1.5倍加速，展现出卓越的推理效率。
AI.motivation: 现有超低比特后训练量化方法依赖于刚性的权重显著性假设或位置启发式，导致显著的隐藏缩放开销，限制了实际部署效率。需要一种更高效、低开销的量化方案以支持大语言模型的高效推理。
AI.method: SAGE-PTQ通过分布统计分离显著与非显著权重；将非显著权重建模为稀疏图以估计最优分组数；采用双模式量化（多比特用于显著权重，二值化用于非显著权重）；使用单通道缩放（显著权重）和单标量缩放（非显著组）降低缩放开销；并通过自适应显著性阈值选择每矩阵最优显著性比例。
AI.result: 在LLaMA-3-8B上实现1.03权重比特和0.004缩放比特，困惑度仅为6.74（对比BiLLM的55.8），显存占用低于50%；在LLaMA-2-70B上实现1.5倍推理速度提升，验证了其在实际部署中的高效性。
AI.conclusion: SAGE-PTQ通过创新的图引导稀疏建模与双模式量化策略，显著降低了超低比特量化中的隐藏缩放开销，在保持高精度的同时大幅提升了推理效率与内存利用率，是当前最先进方法的显著超越者。

title: Localizing Prompt Ambiguity in Large Language Models with Probe-Targeted Attribution
summary: Prompt ambiguity is a common source of failure in large language models, but is difficult to localize because it is a latent property of the prompt, while existing attribution methods are designed to explain observable outputs such as logits or generated tokens. We introduce PRIG, a gradient attribution method that uses a probe logit to attribute latent ambiguity to token positions. Specifically, PRIG trains a linear probe to distinguish clear prompts from ambiguous prompts and attributes the probe score to earlier token representations in the residual stream. To enable token-level evaluation, we construct synthetic ambiguity datasets across coding, math, and writing by rewriting one task-critical sentence per prompt, and complement them with a human-written gold benchmark. In this setting, PRIG localizes ambiguous spans substantially better than gradient attribution baselines, achieving 0.840 AUROC on the combined synthetic benchmark and 0.891 AUROC on the gold set. It also outperforms GPT-5.4 on sentence-level ambiguity identification and retains useful signal out-of-domain. These results establish PRIG as a practical tool for identifying which parts of a prompt are ambiguous. More broadly, they suggest that latent prompt properties can be localized through intermediate representations, rather than through output-level attribution.

AI.tldr: PRIG 是一种新的梯度归因方法，通过探测器分数将潜在的提示模糊性归因于标记位置，能够有效定位提示中的模糊片段，在合成数据集和人工标注基准上分别达到0.840和0.891的AUROC，优于现有基线和GPT-5.4，且具备跨领域泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有归因方法难以解释大语言模型中由提示模糊性引起的失败，因为模糊性是提示的隐含属性，无法通过输出（如logits或生成的标记）直接观测。需要一种能定位提示内部模糊部分的方法。
AI.method: PRIG训练一个线性探测器以区分清晰与模糊提示，并将探测器得分归因于残差流中的早期标记表示，从而实现对提示中模糊区域的细粒度定位。
AI.result: 在合成数据集上，PRIG的AUROC为0.840；在人工标注黄金基准上达到0.891，显著优于梯度归因基线和GPT-5.4，在句子级模糊识别任务中表现更优，并具备良好的跨领域适用性。
AI.conclusion: PRIG为识别提示中模糊部分提供了实用工具，表明可通过中间表示而非输出层面归因来定位提示的隐含属性。

title: Anomaly Detection for Electro-Hydrostatic Actuators using LSTM Autoencoder
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, 3 tables, ESREL 2026 -European Safety and Reliability Conference, accepted paper to be published
summary: Electro-Hydrostatic Actuators (EHAs) are widely used in aerospace and industrial systems, where timely detection of sensor anomalies is essential to ensure safe and reliable operation. However, the large volume and high sampling frequency of EHA sensor data pose challenges for accurate and efficient anomaly detection. Conventional statistical and classical machine-learning methods such as Z-score, Interquartile Range (IQR), Median Absolute Deviation (MAD), Isolation Forest, Gaussian Mixture, and k-means often fail to capture the temporal dependencies inherent in EHA signals, resulting in limited detection accuracy and elevated false-alarm rates. Furthermore, systematic evaluations of data-driven anomaly detection approaches for EHA systems remain scarce, particularly under varying operational conditions. This study presents an offline anomaly-detection framework for univariate EHA sensor signals, focusing on temperature and pressure data collected from a controlled test bench. The method employs a reconstruction-based Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) autoencoder, calibrated and evaluated using validation-set reconstruction-error distributions. Performance is assessed across multiple fault-injection scenarios using accuracy, precision, recall, and F1-score, complemented by sensitivity analyses under varying operating conditions. The LSTM autoencoder achieved an average accuracy of 99.0\%, precision up to 100\%, recall between 90.2\% and 99.6\%, and F1-scores from 93.1\% to 99.8\%, demonstrating high detection sensitivity and a very low false-alarm rate across all evaluated sensors. These results highlight the feasibility of data-driven offline anomaly detection for EHAs. Future work will focus on adapting the developed framework for an online (real-time) environment.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种基于LSTM自编码器的离线异常检测框架，用于航空航天和工业系统中的电静液作动器（EHA）传感器信号。针对温度与压力数据，该方法通过重建误差分布进行校准与评估，在多种故障注入场景下表现出优异性能：平均准确率99.0%，精度最高达100%，召回率在90.2%至99.6%之间，F1分数为93.1%至99.8%，表明其具有高灵敏度和极低误报率。研究填补了数据驱动方法在EHA系统中系统性评估的空白，验证了该方法在复杂工况下的有效性。未来将拓展至在线实时应用。
AI.motivation: 传统统计与经典机器学习方法难以捕捉EHA传感器信号中的时序依赖性，导致检测精度低、误报率高；且现有研究缺乏对数据驱动方法在不同工况下的系统性评估，亟需高效、准确的异常检测框架以保障EHA系统的安全可靠运行。
AI.method: 采用基于重建的长短期记忆（LSTM）自编码器模型，对单变量温度与压力传感器信号进行建模，利用验证集的重构误差分布进行模型校准，并通过多故障注入实验评估性能。
AI.result: LSTM自编码器在各类传感器上实现平均99.0%的准确率，最高100%的精度，90.2%~99.6%的召回率，以及93.1%~99.8%的F1分数，展现出高检测灵敏度与极低误报率，且在不同工况下表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的基于LSTM自编码器的离线异常检测框架在处理EHA传感器数据方面具有高度可行性，能够有效应对高采样频率与大数据量带来的挑战，显著提升异常检测性能。未来工作将致力于将其扩展至实时在线监测环境。

title: LLM-Guided ANN Index Optimization for Human-Object Interaction Retrieval
summary: Retrieval systems underpin modern AI applications -- spanning visual search, recommendation engines, and multi-modal question answering. Modern multi-stage retrieval systems require the joint optimization of highly coupled parameters, yet traditional hyperparameter optimization (HPO) methods -- including Tree-structured Parzen Estimators (TPE) and Gaussian Process Bayesian Optimization -- rely on an independence assumption that fundamentally prevents them from navigating these coupled configuration spaces. We address this limitation with a phase-aware large language model (LLM) agent that conditions each proposal on its full optimization history, navigating the coupled parameter space across phase-partitioned exploration, exploitation, and fine-tuning stages. Evaluated on the HICO-DET human-object interaction retrieval benchmark using Intel VDMS (Visual Data Management System), our agent outperforms Optuna TPE by +33.3% and VDTuner by +34.2% under SIEVE (Safeguarded Index Evaluation of Vector-search Efficiency, a quality-constrained throughput metric), delivering a 15.3x throughput gain over UniIR. Validation across three benchmarks confirms that the agent's advantage grows with the degree of parameter coupling: +33.3% on HICO-DET (high coupling), methods converge within 1% on GLDv2 (moderate coupling) and within 3.6% on SIFT1M (near-independent control). Cross-system validation on Milvus confirms the optimizer ranks first on all three datasets without modification, demonstrating transferability across vector database management system (VDBMS) platforms.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于阶段感知的大语言模型（LLM）代理，用于优化高度耦合的多阶段检索系统参数。该方法通过结合优化历史，在探索、利用和微调阶段动态调整配置，克服了传统超参数优化（HPO）方法依赖独立性假设的局限。在HICO-DET基准上，相比Optuna TPE和VDTuner分别提升33.3%和34.2%的SIEVE指标表现，并实现15.3倍的吞吐量提升。跨基准与跨系统验证表明，该方法在高参数耦合场景下优势显著，且具备良好迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 传统超参数优化方法（如TPE、Gaussian Process Bayesian Optimization）假设参数独立，无法有效处理多阶段检索系统中高度耦合的参数空间，导致优化效率低下。需要一种能捕捉参数间复杂依赖关系并适应不同优化阶段的新方法。
AI.method: 设计了一个相位感知的大型语言模型代理，根据完整的优化历史动态生成配置建议，分阶段（探索、利用、细调）进行参数搜索，从而更有效地导航耦合参数空间。
AI.result: 在HICO-DET数据集上，相比Optuna TPE提升33.3%，相比VDTuner提升34.2%；在SIEVE指标下实现15.3倍吞吐量提升；在三个不同基准上验证了其对参数耦合程度的适应性；在Milvus系统上无需修改即排名第一，证明其跨平台可迁移性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的阶段感知LLM代理能够有效应对多阶段检索系统中的参数耦合问题，在多种场景和系统中均展现出显著优于现有方法的性能与泛化能力。

title: Zero knowledge verification for frontier AI training is possible
summary: Frontier AI governance frameworks increasingly use cumulative training compute as the primary criterion for designating high-impact models, but enforcement rests on self-reporting because no technical verification primitive for training exists. Any future international agreement on frontier AI faces the same problem at higher stakes: coordinated regulation of technologies with significant externalities has historically rested on technical verification, without which agreements are declaratory. Recent governance analyses judge zero-knowledge proofs a promising candidate but currently impractical at frontier scale [26, 4]. We argue the impracticality is paradigm-bound rather than fundamental, and propose a verification architecture for frontier dense pre-training combining a pre-committed training specification, inter-node network observations, and on-the-fly Merkle commitments of intermediate computation, verified through a zero-knowledge Virtual Machine (zkVM) with native BF16/FP32 precompiles. The proof checks the actual floating-point computation the GPU performed rather than a fixed-point approximation, and preserves model-architecture confidentiality through a private training specification. The protocol produces three proof types: a genesis proof at initialisation, in-training step proofs across the run, and ex-ante attestations enforcing policy-relevant claims as running invariants, turning the training record into a governance-enforceable artefact. We estimate a deployable proof of concept within approximately 36 months at single-digit-percent training-side overhead, against a six-to-ten-year cycle for verification-grade custom silicon. Thirteen open research and engineering problems are catalogued as a research agenda for external contribution

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向前沿密集预训练的可验证架构，结合预承诺训练规范、节点间网络观测与实时Merkle承诺，通过支持BF16/FP32原生预编译的零知识虚拟机（zkVM）验证实际浮点计算，实现对训练过程的技术可验证性。该方案在保持模型架构保密的同时，生成三类证明：初始化证明、训练中步骤证明及事前政策约束证明，使训练记录成为可治理的可信证据。预计在约36个月内实现可部署原型，训练侧开销为个位数百分比，远快于定制硅芯片需6-10年的周期。文章列出13个开放研究问题，作为外部协作的研究议程。
AI.motivation: 当前前沿AI治理依赖自报告的训练计算量作为高影响模型判定标准，但缺乏技术验证手段，导致国际协议难以落地。历史经验表明，涉及重大外部性的技术协调监管必须依赖技术验证，否则仅具宣言性质。尽管零知识证明被视为有前景的解决方案，但在前沿规模下仍被认为不切实际。本文旨在突破这一范式局限，推动可验证训练的可行性。
AI.method: 提出一种融合预承诺训练规范、跨节点网络观测、实时中间计算Merkle承诺的验证架构；利用支持BF16/FP32原生预编译的零知识虚拟机（zkVM），直接验证GPU执行的实际浮点运算；通过三种证明类型（初始证明、训练中步骤证明、事前政策约束证明）构建可治理的训练记录。
