AI.result: 实现了对前沿预训练过程的可信验证，可在约36个月内达成可部署原型，训练开销低于10%，显著优于定制硅芯片所需6-10年周期；验证了在不牺牲模型架构隐私的前提下实现技术可验证性的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 技术验证并非不可实现，而是受制于现有范式的局限。本文提出的架构展示了在无需依赖定制硬件的情况下，实现前沿AI训练可验证性的路径，为全球协同治理提供了可行的技术基础，并为后续研究指明了13个关键方向。

title: MASF: A Multi-Model Adaptive Selection Framework for Abstractive Text summarization
summary: Automatic text summarization has become increasingly important due to the rapid growth of digital textual information. This paper presents a Multi-Model Adaptive Summarization Framework designed to improve the robustness and quality of abstractive text summarization. Relying on a single model often leads to inconsistent summarization quality across articles with varying structures and topics. To address this limitation, the proposed framework integrates multiple fine-tuned transformer-based summarization models and introduces an adaptive selection mechanism. In this framework, each model independently generates a candidate summary for the same input article. The generated summaries are then evaluated using automatic evaluation metrics that capture both lexical similarity and semantic relevance. Based on these scores, the framework selects the highest-quality summary as the final output. The models are fine-tuned and evaluated on the widely used CNN/DailyMail news summarization dataset. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves the highest BERTScore among all compared methods with a score of 88.63%. It also outperforms several LLMs such as GPT3-D2, Falcon-7b, and Mpt-7b, highlighting its effectiveness and robustness. These findings highlight the effectiveness of leveraging multiple transformer-based models within an adaptive selection strategy to improve the quality and robustness of automatic text summarization systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模型自适应摘要框架，通过集成多个微调的Transformer模型并引入自适应选择机制，提升抽取式摘要的质量与鲁棒性。该框架对同一文章生成多个候选摘要，并基于自动评估指标（如词汇相似性和语义相关性）选择最优摘要。在CNN/DailyMail数据集上的实验表明，该方法在BERTScore上达到88.63%，优于GPT3-D2、Falcon-7b和Mpt-7b等大模型，验证了其有效性与稳定性。
AI.motivation: 单一模型在处理不同结构和主题的文章时，常导致摘要质量不稳定，因此需要一种更鲁棒且高质量的摘要方法。
AI.method: 集成多个微调的Transformer模型，每个模型独立生成候选摘要；利用自动评估指标综合评估摘要质量，并通过自适应机制选择最优摘要作为最终输出。
AI.result: 在CNN/DailyMail数据集上，该框架的BERTScore达到88.63%，显著优于对比方法及多个主流大语言模型，证明其在质量与鲁棒性方面的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 通过多模型融合与自适应选择策略，可有效提升自动文本摘要系统的性能，为未来研究提供了一种高效且可靠的解决方案。

title: Agentic Monte Carlo: Simulating Reinforcement Learning for Black-Box Agents
summary: LLM agents operate in two distinct regimes: open-weight agents amenable to reinforcement learning (RL) and black-box agents whose behaviour must be controlled purely at test time. Although black-box agents are often backed by state-of-the-art proprietary LLMs, API-only access precludes parameter-level optimization, rendering most RL methods inapplicable. To address this limitation, we turn to a known equivalence between RL and Bayesian inference. We propose Agentic Monte Carlo (AMC) to directly sample from the optimal policy of a black-box agent rather than training it through RL. The optimal policy is a posterior over trajectories whose prior we define as the fixed black-box LLM agent. We employ Sequential Monte Carlo to sample from this posterior by learning a value function to steer the agent while leaving the underlying black-box model unchanged. We validate AMC on three diverse environments from the AgentGym benchmark, demonstrating significant improvements over prompting baselines and even outperforming Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) as we scale the test-time compute of our method. AMC demonstrates the feasibility of performing principled RL-style optimization of black-box LLM agents. Code is available at https://github.com/layer6ai-labs/Agentic-Monte-Carlo

AI.tldr: 提出Agentic Monte Carlo（AMC）方法，通过贝叶斯推断实现对黑盒大模型代理的原理性强化学习优化。利用序贯蒙特卡洛采样从最优策略后验中采样，不改变底层模型，仅通过学习价值函数引导代理行为。在AgentGym三个环境上验证，显著优于提示基线，且随测试时计算量增加超越GRPO。
AI.motivation: 黑盒大模型代理因无法访问参数而难以应用传统强化学习方法，需在推理阶段进行控制。现有方法受限于无法优化模型参数，亟需一种无需修改模型即可实现高效策略优化的新范式。
AI.method: 基于强化学习与贝叶斯推断的等价性，将最优策略建模为轨迹的后验分布，以固定黑盒模型为先验，采用序贯蒙特卡洛方法结合学习的价值函数来引导采样过程，从而实现对黑盒代理的优化。
AI.result: 在AgentGym基准的三个环境中，AMC显著优于提示基线，并随着测试时计算资源的增加，性能超过Group Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO），证明了其在黑盒代理上进行有效、可扩展优化的可行性。
AI.conclusion: Agentic Monte Carlo成功实现了对黑盒大模型代理的原理性强化学习优化，无需修改底层模型，仅通过测试时计算即可获得高性能策略，为黑盒代理的可控与优化提供了新路径。

title: Unpaired RGB-Thermal Gaussian-Splatting Using Visual Geometric Transformers
comment: Accepted at ICRA 2026's Workshop MM-SpatialAI: Multi-Modal Spatial AI for Robust Navigation and Open-World Understanding
summary: Multi-modal novel view synthesis (NVS) combining RGB and thermal imagery enables precise 3D scene reconstruction with visual and thermal information. However, existing methods typically rely on precisely calibrated RGB-thermal image pairs or stereo setups, limiting scalability and practical deployment. To address this, we introduce a framework for unpaired RGB-thermal NVS that leverages VGGT, a 3D feed-forward transformer architecture, to independently estimate camera poses for each modality. The pose sets are then aligned using the Procrustes algorithm with a cross-modal feature matcher, enabling joint registration without paired calibration. Building on this alignment, we further propose a multi-modal 3D Gaussian Splatting approach that learns directly from unpaired RGB and thermal images. Experiments on diverse scenes demonstrate that our method achieves competitive performance in thermal view synthesis while maintaining RGB fidelity. Moreover, we show that existing reconstruction approaches can produce modality-specific reconstructions that lack cross-modal consistency. We thus introduce a benchmarking framework to rigorously evaluate both per-modality image synthesis and the multi-modal coherence of reconstructed scenes.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无需配对校准的RGB-热成像多模态新视角合成框架，利用VGGT架构独立估计各模态相机位姿，并通过Procrustes算法与跨模态特征匹配实现位姿对齐，进而基于多模态3D高斯点云渲染直接从非配对图像中学习。实验表明该方法在热成像视图合成上表现优异且保持了RGB质量，同时建立了评估多模态一致性与单模态重建性能的基准测试体系。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖精确校准的RGB-热成像配对或立体设置，限制了可扩展性和实际部署；需要一种不依赖配对数据的多模态新视角合成方法以提升实用性与通用性。
AI.method: 采用VGGT（3D前馈变压器）分别估计RGB和热成像的相机位姿；通过Procrustes算法结合跨模态特征匹配对齐两组位姿；构建基于未配对数据的多模态3D高斯点云渲染模型进行联合重建。
AI.result: 所提方法在热成像视图合成方面达到竞争性性能，同时保持良好的RGB重建质量；验证了传统方法存在模态间不一致问题；提出的基准框架能有效评估单模态生成质量与多模态一致性。
AI.conclusion: 本工作实现了无需配对校准的高效多模态新视角合成，提升了实际应用潜力，并为多模态3D重建提供了新的评估标准。

title: Ten Headache Specialists versus Artificial Intelligence for Clinical Literature Summarization: A Critical Evaluation and Comparison
summary: Summarizing the latest medical literature to guide clinical decision-making is essential for evidence-based medicine and high-quality patient care. Yet clinicians face increasing challenges due to limited time with patients and a rapidly growing volume of published articles. Although retrieval-augmented large language models (LLMs) have shown promise in clinical summarization, human evaluations of their effectiveness in synthesizing broader scientific literature and direct comparisons to expert-written syntheses remain scarce. We constructed a RAG-based agentic AI framework using three state-of-the-art LLMs: Sonnet, GPT-4o, and Llama 3.1. A headache specialist created 13 questions, three for prompt optimization and ten for evaluation. Ten headache specialists across the United States and Canada each wrote a summary for one question, yielding four summaries per question (expert, Sonnet, GPT-4o, and Llama). The experts, blinded to authorship, critically evaluated the summaries, excluding the topic for which they wrote a summary, based on correctness, completeness, conciseness, and clinical utility, scoring each from 1 to 10 using standardized rubrics. They also ranked the summaries by preference and indicated whether they believed each summary was written by an expert or an LLM. Our study, comparing LLM- and expert-written literature summaries evaluated by headache specialists, showed that expert-written summaries were preferred, although experts sometimes found it challenging to distinguish between human- and AI-generated summaries. We also identified key expert-valued features beyond standard evaluation metrics that can guide future refinement of both human and AI literature summarization pipelines.

AI.tldr: 本研究构建了一个基于RAG的智能体AI框架，使用Sonnet、GPT-4o和Llama 3.1三个先进大语言模型，对头痛领域的医学文献进行总结。由头痛专科医生设计13个问题（3个用于提示优化，10个用于评估），来自美国和加拿大的十位头痛专家每人撰写一个问题的摘要，形成每题四个摘要（专家、Sonnet、GPT-4o、Llama）。专家在不知情情况下，根据正确性、完整性、简洁性和临床实用性等标准评分（1-10分），并进行偏好排序及判断摘要来源。结果显示，专家撰写的摘要更受青睐，但专家难以准确区分人类与AI生成的摘要。研究还识别出专家认为重要的关键特征，可指导未来人类与AI文献总结流程的优化。
AI.motivation: 临床决策需要基于最新医学文献的总结，但医生时间有限且文献量激增，传统方法面临挑战。尽管检索增强的大语言模型在临床摘要方面展现潜力，但其在综合更广泛科学文献方面的有效性及与专家摘要的直接对比仍缺乏充分的人类评估。
AI.method: 构建基于RAG的智能体AI框架，采用Sonnet、GPT-4o和Llama 3.1三个先进大语言模型；由头痛专科医生设计13个问题，10个用于评估；10位头痛专家分别撰写每个问题的摘要，形成四类摘要（专家、Sonnet、GPT-4o、Llama）；专家盲评，依据标准化评分表评估正确性、完整性、简洁性、临床实用性，并进行偏好排序与来源判断。
AI.result: 专家撰写的摘要被普遍偏好，但专家在区分人类与AI生成摘要时存在困难；研究识别出若干超越标准评估指标的专家重视特征，为改进人类与AI文献总结流程提供方向。
AI.conclusion: 尽管当前大语言模型在医学文献总结中表现良好，但仍无法完全替代专家摘要。未来需结合专家价值特征优化AI系统，提升其在真实临床环境中的可信度与实用性。

title: CHASE: Adversarial Red-Blue Teaming for Improving LLM Safety using Reinforcement Learning
summary: Despite advances in safety alignment, prompt-rewriting attacks such as persona modulation, fictional framing and persuasion-based reformulation, can bypass safety filters even on frontier models. Existing defenses either rely on non-scalable human curation or white-box optimisation that overfits to specific model internals, leaving aligned models brittle against the very class of adaptive black-box adversaries they will face in deployment. To address this gap, we introduce CHASE (Co-evolutionary Hardening through Adversarial Safety-Escalation), a closed-loop red-blue teaming framework in which a black-box attacker and a safety-aligned defender co-evolve. The attacker is trained via Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) under a multiplicative reward that jointly enforces bypass effectiveness and intent fidelity, while the defender is hardened on the harvested adversarial rewrites through a two-stage GRPO + rejection-sampled SFT pipeline balanced with benign data. Evaluated on BeaverTails and JailbreakBench against five held-out attack families (PAIR, TAP, AutoDAN, PAP, Translation), CHASE cuts mean StrongREJECT score by 43.2\% with 0\% false-refusal on benign prompts. Beyond the headline result, CHASE shows that template-free RL exploration recovers latent attack primitives that transfer across mechanistically distinct attack families, suggesting a path toward LLM safety hardening that generalises beyond the narrow distributions achieved thus far in adversarial training.

AI.tldr: CHASE 是一种闭环红蓝对抗框架，通过黑盒攻击者与安全对齐防御者共同进化来提升大模型安全性。攻击者采用分组相对策略优化（GRPO）训练，奖励函数兼顾绕过有效性和意图保真度；防御者则通过两阶段GRPO+拒绝采样监督微调（SFT）并结合良性数据进行强化。在BeaverTails和JailbreakBench上评估显示，CHASE使平均StrongREJECT得分降低43.2%，且对良性提示零误拒。此外，无模板的强化学习探索发现了可跨不同攻击机制迁移的潜在攻击原语，表明该方法有望实现超越现有对抗训练局限的通用安全加固。
AI.motivation: 现有安全对齐防御依赖人工标注或白盒优化，难以应对部署中实际存在的自适应黑盒攻击者，导致模型脆弱。需要一种可扩展、泛化能力强的防御机制来应对多样化攻击。
AI.method: 提出CHASE框架，采用红蓝团队协同进化机制：攻击者使用GRPO算法，在多因子奖励下优化绕过能力和意图保真度；防御者基于捕获的对抗重写样本，通过两阶段GRPO与拒绝采样SFT联合训练，并融合良性数据进行平衡优化。
AI.result: 在五个未见攻击家族（PAIR、TAP、AutoDAN、PAP、Translation）上，相比基线，强拒绝评分下降43.2%；对良性提示的误拒率为0%；揭示了可跨攻击类型迁移的潜在攻击原语，支持更广泛的安全泛化。
AI.conclusion: CHASE实现了可扩展、鲁棒且泛化的安全对齐，通过红蓝对抗共演化机制突破传统对抗训练的分布局限，为大模型在真实场景下的安全部署提供了新路径。

title: Statistically Reliable LLM-Based Ranking Evaluation via Prediction-Powered Inference
summary: With PRECISE, we extended Prediction-Powered Inference to produce bias-corrected estimates of ranking evaluation metrics by combining a small human-labeled set with a large LLM-judged set. PPI is provably unbiased regardless of the LLM judge's error profile. We make it applicable to hierarchical metrics like Precision@K, where annotations are per-document but the metric is per-query, by reducing the output-space computation from O(2^|C|) to O(2^K). On the ESCI benchmark, augmenting 30 human annotations with Claude 3 Sonnet judgments reduces the standard error of Precision@4 estimates from 4.45 to 3.50 (a 21% relative reduction). In a production system, our framework correctly identified the best of three system variants from 100 human labels and 2 hours of domain-expert annotation; A/B testing confirmed this ranking with +407 bps in daily sales.

AI.tldr: PRECISE extends Prediction-Powered Inference to create bias-corrected ranking evaluation metrics by combining small human-labeled data with large LLM-judged data, enabling accurate estimation for hierarchical metrics like Precision@K with reduced computational complexity. It achieves a 21% relative reduction in standard error on ESCI and successfully identified the top-performing system variant in production, validated by A/B testing showing +407 bps in daily sales.
AI.motivation: To improve the accuracy and efficiency of ranking evaluation metrics by correcting biases in LLM judgments while reducing reliance on costly human annotations.
AI.method: Extends Prediction-Powered Inference (PPI) to handle hierarchical metrics via a reduced output-space computation from O(2^|C|) to O(2^K), combining small human-labeled sets with large LLM-judged sets for bias correction.
AI.result: On ESCI benchmark, standard error of Precision@4 estimates dropped from 4.45 to 3.50 (21% reduction); in production, PRECISE identified the best system variant from 100 human labels and 2 hours of expert annotation, confirmed by A/B testing with +407 bps increase in daily sales.
AI.conclusion: PRECISE enables reliable, scalable, and cost-effective evaluation of ranking systems by leveraging LLM judgments with bias correction, outperforming traditional methods in both precision and real-world impact.

title: Robust Scene Transfer for PointGoal Navigation via Privileged Sensor Guided Contrastive Learning
summary:
We propose a sensor-guided adaptive contrastive learning framework for visual representation learning in PointGoal navigation. During training, privileged LiDAR sensing guides the contrastive objective through a geometry-aware similarity metric and adaptive temperature scaling, encouraging visual embeddings to capture navigation-relevant structure rather than scene-specific appearance. The resulting encoder is pretrained independently, frozen, and used as the perceptual backbone for reinforcement learning, decoupling representation learning from policy optimization. We further introduce a cross-stage domain mismatch between representation pretraining and policy learning to suppress environment-specific shortcuts and promote reliance on task-relevant features.
  Extensive experiments in high-fidelity simulation demonstrate that our approach significantly improves policy-level scene transfer across diverse indoor and outdoor environments. At deployment, the agent relies only on monocular RGB observations together with standard task-related inputs such as goal position and proprioceptive signals, without access to LiDAR or other privileged sensors. Our method outperforms large pretrained vision models and standard contrastive baselines under severe appearance and semantic shifts. We also release a multimodal dataset to support future research on privileged-guided visual representation learning for navigation. The code is available at:

AI.tldr: 提出了一种传感器引导的自适应对比学习框架，用于点目标导航中的视觉表征学习。通过LiDAR感知指导对比学习目标，利用几何感知相似性度量和自适应温度缩放，使视觉嵌入捕捉与导航相关的结构而非场景特定外观。该编码器可独立预训练并冻结，作为强化学习的感知主干，实现表征学习与策略优化解耦。引入跨阶段域不匹配机制以抑制环境特异性捷径，促进对任务相关特征的依赖。在高保真仿真中实验表明，该方法显著提升政策在多样室内与室外环境间的场景迁移能力。部署时仅需单目RGB观测及标准任务输入（如目标位置、本体感知信号），无需访问LiDAR等特权传感器。方法在严重外观与语义变化下优于大型预训练视觉模型和标准对比基线。同时发布多模态数据集支持未来研究。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉表征学习方法在点目标导航任务中容易依赖场景特定外观，导致泛化能力差；同时表征学习与策略优化常耦合，难以分离优化过程。为提升模型在不同环境下的泛化能力，需设计一种能引导视觉嵌入关注导航相关结构而非外观的方法，并实现表征学习与策略优化的解耦。
AI.method: 采用传感器引导的自适应对比学习框架，利用LiDAR提供的几何信息构建几何感知相似性度量，并引入自适应温度缩放调节对比学习难度。通过跨阶段域不匹配机制，在预训练与策略学习阶段之间制造差异，抑制环境特异性捷径。预训练后的编码器被冻结，作为强化学习的感知主干，实现表征学习与策略优化的解耦。
AI.result: 在多种高保真仿真环境中，所提方法显著提升了策略在不同场景间的迁移性能。部署时仅使用单目RGB和标准任务输入，无需特权传感器。在严重外观与语义变化条件下，优于大型预训练视觉模型和标准对比学习基线。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的传感器引导的自适应对比学习框架有效提升了视觉表征在点目标导航任务中的泛化能力，通过解耦表征学习与策略优化，实现了更鲁棒的场景迁移。该方法在仅依赖单目视觉输入的情况下仍表现出色，具备良好的实用前景。

title: Brick-Composer: Using MLLMs for Assembly with Diverse Bricks
summary: We dream of AI agents that can read arbitrary designs and construct real-world objects from reusable building blocks. As a first step toward this vision, we study whether multimodal large language models (MLLMs) possess the visual grounding and spatial reasoning capabilities required for brick assembly. We formulate brick assembly as a sequential decision-making problem, where each step involves two subtasks: brick selection, identifying the target brick from candidate components, and brick pose estimation, predicting where and how the selected brick should be placed. To support this study, we introduce BC-Bench (Brick Construction Benchmark), the first benchmark for evaluating MLLMs on assembly with diverse bricks. Experiments show that current state-of-the-art MLLMs remain far from reliable builders, struggling with fine-grained brick selection and failing at precise pose estimation. To bridge this gap, we propose Brick-Composer, a learning framework that equips MLLMs with assembly skills through three complementary signals: Human Design Sparks, which provide affordance-rich construction demonstrations; World Feedback, which grounds predicted actions in visual and physical consequences; and Synthetic Experience, which scales learning beyond existing object designs. Brick-Composer improves brick selection accuracy by over three times, substantially reduces pose estimation errors, and raises strict step-level assembly success from less than 1% to around 15%. After training, a Qwen-3-8B can correctly compose up to 42% of the steps for a complete object, suggesting that MLLMs can acquire assembly capabilities through targeted, physically grounded learning.

AI.tldr: 本文研究多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在积木组装任务中的视觉定位与空间推理能力，提出BC-Bench基准测试评估模型表现，并引入Brick-Composer学习框架，通过人类设计启发、世界反馈和合成经验三种信号提升模型装配能力。实验表明，该方法显著提高积木选择准确率与装配成功率，使Qwen-3-8B模型可正确完成42%的装配步骤，证明MLLMs可通过物理感知学习获得实际构建能力。
AI.motivation: 实现能够理解任意设计并用可复用积木构建真实物体的AI代理是长期愿景。当前多模态大语言模型在精细积木选择和精准位姿估计方面表现不佳，亟需评估其在积木组装任务中的能力，并探索有效训练方法以弥补差距。
AI.method: 将积木组装建模为序列决策问题，包含积木选择与位姿估计两个子任务；构建首个针对多样化积木装配的评测基准BC-Bench；提出Brick-Composer框架，融合人类设计启发、世界反馈与合成经验三类信号进行物理感知学习。
AI.result: Brick-Composer使积木选择准确率提升超过三倍，大幅降低位姿估计误差，将严格意义上的步骤级装配成功率从不足1%提升至约15%；训练后Qwen-3-8B模型可正确完成42%的完整对象装配步骤。
AI.conclusion: 当前先进MLLMs在积木装配任务中仍不成熟，但通过针对性的物理引导学习，如Brick-Composer框架，可显著提升其实际构建能力，为未来自主制造型AI代理的发展奠定基础。

title: Multilingual Detection of Alzheimer's Disease from Speech: A Cross-Linguistic Transfer Learning Approach
summary: The development of multilingual Alzheimer's Disease Dementia (AD) detection models presents significant challenges due to the resource-intensive and time-consuming nature of language-specific model training. We propose a novel solution using cross-language training to detect AD in languages beyond those used for model training. This study investigates multilingual deep learning models for detecting AD across different languages and cognitive impairment levels. Using datasets in English, Chinese, Arabic, and Hindi, we developed transformer-based models for binary AD classification. Our approach achieved F1 scores of 82\% across all languages, demonstrating strong cross-linguistic generalization. The rapid inference time (0.5 seconds) supports potential real-time screening applications, while consistent performance across languages indicates feasibility for global deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于跨语言训练的多语言阿尔茨海默病（AD）检测方法，利用英语、中文、阿拉伯语和印地语数据集，构建基于Transformer的模型进行二分类任务。该方法在所有语言上均达到82%的F1分数，表现出良好的跨语言泛化能力，推理时间仅0.5秒，具备实时筛查潜力，适用于全球部署。
AI.motivation: 传统语言特定模型训练资源密集且耗时，难以覆盖多种语言，亟需一种可泛化至未见语言的高效AD检测方法。
AI.method: 采用跨语言训练策略，基于Transformer架构构建多语言深度学习模型，利用多语言数据集进行联合训练，实现对不同语言和认知水平的AD检测。
AI.result: 模型在四种语言上均取得82%的F1分数，推理时间仅为0.5秒，表现稳定且具备跨语言一致性，支持实时应用与全球化部署。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的跨语言训练方法有效解决了多语言AD检测中的资源与泛化难题，为全球范围内快速、低成本的AD筛查提供了可行方案。

title: Multimarginal flow matching with optimal transport potentials
comment: 9 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables, and a 27 page appendix. Accepted to the Forty-Third International Conference on Machine Learning
summary: Flow matching (FM) has emerged as a powerful framework for learning dynamic transport maps between two empirical distributions. However, less explored is the setting with intermediate observed marginals that can help constrain the flows between the endpoints. This "multimarginal" regime is central to modeling temporal evolution in dynamical systems in many scientific domains that can sample sequential distributions. We tackle this problem with a novel approach that leverages the connection between FM and dynamic optimal transport (OT), softly steering the flow towards the intermediate marginals through potential terms in the dynamic OT action. By extending the conditional FM learning target to incorporate these potentials, we derive an efficient, simulation-free algorithm for multimarginal FM that offers considerable flexibility in the spatiotemporal dynamics of the learned flows. We demonstrate state-of-the-art performance and training efficiency of OT-potential FM (OTP-FM) on diverse single-cell RNA sequencing, oceanographic, and meteorological datasets. Our code is available at https://github.com/Bexorg-Inc/OTP-FM.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于动态最优传输（OT）势能项的多边缘流匹配（Multimarginal Flow Matching, OTP-FM）方法，通过在动态OT作用中引入势能项来软性引导流体路径，实现对中间边际分布的有效约束。该方法无需模拟即可高效学习复杂时空动态，显著提升训练效率与性能，在单细胞RNA测序、海洋学和气象学数据上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有流匹配方法主要关注端点间的分布传输，但在许多科学领域中，序列采样得到的中间边际分布提供了重要信息，如何有效利用这些中间信息以更准确地建模动态系统演化过程仍是一个未充分探索的问题。
AI.method: 将流匹配与动态最优传输相联系，引入势能项作为对中间边际分布的软约束，扩展条件流匹配的目标函数，从而设计出一种无需模拟的高效算法，实现对多边缘流匹配的灵活建模。
AI.result: OTP-FM在单细胞RNA测序、海洋学和气象学等多个真实世界数据集上实现了最先进的性能和更高的训练效率，验证了其在复杂时空动态建模中的有效性与灵活性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的OTP-FM方法通过结合动态最优传输与流匹配框架，成功解决了多边缘流匹配问题，为科学数据中的时序演化建模提供了一种强大且高效的工具。

title: BRepCLIP: Contrastive Multimodal Pretraining on BRep Primitives for CAD Understanding
summary: Learning representations of CAD models is a largely open problem. While 3D representation learning has flourished around point clouds and meshes, the native format of CAD - boundary representations BReps, which encodes exact parametric surfaces, curves, and their topology, has received little attention as a representation learning substrate. We introduce BRepCLIP, the first framework to align BRep geometry with language and image embeddings through contrastive pretraining. We model each CAD object as a sequence of face and edge tokens with separate discrete vocabularies for surface and curve geometry, augmented with spatial and semantic descriptors that capture surface types (e.g., cylindrical, torus, NURBS) and curve primitives (e.g., line, arc, B-spline). A transformer encoder aggregates these tokens into a global BRep embedding, aligned with CLIP's text and image encoders via a joint contrastive objective. BRepCLIP generates more discriminative and semantically grounded embeddings than existing point-based alternatives, improving Top-1 retrieval over OpenShape by 40.4%, 22.0%, and 23.9% on ABC, CADParser, and Automate, respectively, and improving zero-shot classification on FabWave by 15% in Top-1 score. We further demonstrate its utility as a CAD-aware similarity metric for evaluating text and image-conditioned CAD generation, establishing the importance of structure-aware pretraining for multimodal CAD understanding. Project page is available at https://muhammadusama100.github.io/BrepClip2026/

AI.tldr: BRepCLIP是首个通过对比预训练将边界表示（BReps）几何与语言及图像嵌入对齐的框架，将CAD模型建模为面和边的令牌序列，结合空间与语义描述符，利用Transformer编码器生成全局嵌入，显著提升检索与分类性能，并在多模态CAD生成评估中展现结构感知预训练的重要性。
AI.motivation: 现有3D表示学习主要集中在点云和网格，而CAD的原生格式——边界表示（BReps）因其精确的参数化曲面、曲线及其拓扑结构，尚未被充分用于表示学习，因此亟需一种能有效建模BReps并实现跨模态对齐的新方法。
AI.method: 将每个CAD对象表示为面和边的令牌序列，使用独立的离散词汇表分别表示表面和曲线几何，加入空间与语义描述符（如表面类型、曲线基元），采用Transformer编码器聚合这些令牌以生成全局BRep嵌入，并通过联合对比目标与CLIP的文本和图像编码器对齐。
AI.result: BRepCLIP生成的嵌入更具区分性和语义基础，在ABC、CADParser、Automate数据集上的Top-1检索性能相比OpenShape分别提升40.4%、22.0%和23.9%；在FabWave零样本分类任务中Top-1准确率提升15%；同时作为结构感知的相似性度量，有效评估文本和图像条件下的CAD生成质量。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了结构感知预训练对于多模态CAD理解的重要性，展示了BRepCLIP在提升几何与语义对齐方面的有效性，为未来基于BReps的表示学习提供了新范式。

title: Insurance of Agentic AI
summary: Agentic artificial intelligence (AI) systems are transforming the risk landscape by extending beyond information generation to autonomous planning, tool invocation, decision execution, and persistent modification of digital and physical environments. These capabilities introduce novel exposures that do not fit neatly within traditional insurance categories such as cyber, professional liability, product liability, or directors and officers coverage. This paper examines the emerging insurance market for agentic AI and develops a framework for understanding its underwriting, pricing, reinsurance, and product-design implications. We characterize agentic AI as a continuum of autonomy and delegated authority, emphasizing the distinction between informational outputs and systems capable of independently generating insured events through external actions. We analyze major risk pathways, including hallucinations, prompt-injection attacks, autonomous decision errors, model drift, dependency failures, and cyber-physical harms, and evaluate how existing insurance products are adapting to address these exposures. The paper further proposes an actuarial framework based on exposure assessment, scenario analysis, dependency mapping, and accumulation-risk management, drawing parallels to the evolution of cyber insurance. Finally, we present a coordinated insurance architecture that integrates cyber, technology errors and omissions, product liability, performance-warranty, and affirmative AI-liability coverages through explicit allocation mechanisms and dedicated AI aggregates. The analysis suggests that the future of agentic-AI insurance lies not in a single monoline product but in a layered ecosystem of complementary coverages supported by improved governance, transparency, telemetry, and regulatory clarity.

AI.tldr: 该论文探讨了自主代理型人工智能（agentic AI）带来的新型风险及其对保险市场的影响，提出了一种基于自主性与授权程度连续体的风险框架，并分析了包括幻觉、提示注入攻击、自主决策错误等在内的主要风险路径。论文建议通过暴露评估、情景分析、依赖关系映射和累积风险管控构建精算框架，主张建立一个整合网络安全、技术失误与疏忽、产品责任、性能保证及专门AI责任保险的协同保险架构，强调未来AI保险应为多层互补覆盖体系，而非单一险种。
AI.motivation: 传统保险类别无法充分涵盖自主代理型人工智能系统所引发的新风险，如自主规划、工具调用、决策执行及对数字和物理环境的持续修改，亟需新的保险解决方案以应对这些复杂且动态的风险暴露。
AI.method: 通过将自主代理型AI视为自主性与授权程度的连续体，识别关键风险路径；运用暴露评估、情景分析、依赖关系映射和累积风险管理构建精算框架；提出集成多种保险覆盖的协同架构，并设计明确的分配机制与专用AI风险聚合。
AI.result: 现有保险产品正在逐步适应新风险，但不足以全面覆盖；提出的精算框架与协同保险架构可有效管理复杂风险，推动保险生态向更透明、可治理、数据驱动的方向发展。
AI.conclusion: 未来自主代理型AI的保险不应依赖单一险种，而应构建一个由多重互补保障构成的生态系统，其可持续性取决于治理改进、透明度提升、实时遥测数据支持及监管明确性。

title: ArcANE: Do Role-Playing Language Agents Stay in Character at the Right Time?
summary: Role-playing language agents (RPLAs) should play characters whose values and behavior evolve as the story progresses, not maintain a fixed persona. Existing benchmarks measure factual recall at a given chapter, not whether responses align with the character's psychological trajectory, especially in scenarios the source text never explores. We introduce ArcANE (Arc-Aware Narrative Evaluation), an automatically constructed benchmark spanning 17 novels and 80 principal characters. A Character Arc segments the narrative into phases along a psychological axis, and each probe poses the same scenario across phases, spanning both situations within the source text and situations beyond it. Across six models and six context modes, conditioning on the Character Arc tops every other context strategy on every model, and the gap is largest on scenarios outside the source text where retrieval has nothing to find. We further fine-tune open-weight models on the same data to obtain ArcANE-8B/32B, which widen the Arc advantage even more on scenarios outside the source text.

AI.tldr: 提出ArcANE基准，评估角色扮演语言代理在故事进展中角色心理轨迹的适应性，发现基于角色弧线的上下文策略显著优于其他方法，尤其在源文本未涵盖的情境中表现更优。
AI.motivation: 现有基准仅衡量特定章节的事实回忆，无法评估角色回应是否符合其心理发展轨迹，尤其是在源文本未涉及的情境中。
AI.method: 构建ArcANE基准，通过角色弧线将叙事分为心理轴上的多个阶段，对同一情境在不同阶段进行探测，涵盖源文本内和外的情境；对比多种模型与上下文策略的表现。
AI.result: 基于角色弧线的上下文策略在所有模型和情境下均表现最佳，尤其在源文本外的情境中优势明显；微调后的ArcANE-8B/32B模型进一步扩大了该优势。
AI.conclusion: 角色弧线作为上下文信息能有效提升角色扮演语言代理在复杂叙事中的角色一致性与适应性，尤其在未知情境中表现突出。

title: A prism hierarchy of learning regimes in large linear autoencoders
summary: Theoretical studies of machine learning models commonly consider different limiting regimes in which the learning dynamics of gradient descent becomes theoretically tractable. It is, however, desirable to have a systematically obtained picture of all qualitatively different extreme learning regimes for a particular type of models. In this paper we propose such a picture for large weight-tied linear autoencoders characterized by input and latent dimensions, initialization magnitude, and training set size. This model is nonlinear in the weights and its gradient flow does not have a general theoretical solution. We show that at the level of the formal loss-expansion hierarchy, its extreme regimes are naturally associated with faces of a triangular prism. In particular, there are five basic extreme regimes associated with the 2-faces of the prism: (1) large-data, (2) small-data, (3) mean-field, (4) narrow-latent, and (5) free. For regimes (1,2,3,4), we derive explicit expressions for both train and population limiting loss evolutions under gradient flow, obtaining very good agreement with experimental results.

AI.tldr: 本文为大型权重绑定线性自编码器提出了一种系统性的极端学习模式图景，这些模式与三角棱柱的面相对应。研究揭示了五种基本极端模式：大数据、小数据、均场、窄潜在空间和自由模式。对于前四种模式，作者推导出训练和总体损失演化的显式表达式，并与实验结果高度吻合。
AI.motivation: 现有理论研究通常关注梯度下降在某些极限情况下的可分析性，但缺乏对特定模型所有定性不同的极端学习模式的系统性描述。本文旨在填补这一空白，为大重量绑定线性自编码器提供一个完整的极端学习模式框架。
AI.method: 通过形式化损失展开层次结构，将极端学习模式与三角棱柱的几何结构（特别是其2-面）进行关联，进而分类并推导各模式下的损失演化行为。
AI.result: 成功识别出五种基本极端学习模式，并对其中四种模式推导出训练和总体损失随时间演化的显式公式，且与实验结果高度一致。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为大重量绑定线性自编码器提供了系统性的极端学习模式分类，揭示了其动态行为的几何本质，并验证了理论预测的有效性。

title: Almieyar-Oryx-BloomBench: A Bilingual Multimodal Benchmark for Cognitively Informed Evaluation of Vision-Language Models
summary: Despite the rapid progress of Vision-Language Models (VLMs), the field lacks benchmarks that rigorously diagnose their true reasoning abilities and chart meaningful progress toward human-like multimodal intelligence. Most existing evaluations focus on piecemeal or disconnected tasks, obscuring critical cognitive weaknesses and providing little insight for targeted improvement. To address this gap, we introduce BloomBench, part of the Almieyar benchmarking series, the first cognitively human-grounded, bilingual (English-Arabic) multimodal benchmark for VLMs. Grounded in Bloom's Taxonomy, BloomBench systematically evaluates six levels of cognition (Remember, Understand, Apply, Analyze, Evaluate, Create) through carefully designed image-question-answer tasks. Built with a semi-automated pipeline and validated through a stratified hybrid quality assurance protocol, it ensures scalability, cultural inclusivity, and linguistic fidelity. Leveraging this framework, we conduct a comprehensive study of state-of-the-art VLMs to diagnose their cognitive profiles. Our analysis reveals a sharp cognitive asymmetry: while state-of-the-art models achieve strong performance ceilings in semantic understanding, they struggle substantially with factual recall and creative synthesis. This demonstrates that current general multimodal proficiency masks deeper limitations in specific cognitive layers. Furthermore, our study highlights a critical performance gap between Arabic and English, exposing limitations in current cross-lingual multimodal reasoning. These findings establish a foundation for developing more cognitively aligned and inclusive VLMs. The benchmark framework and dataset is available at: https://github.com/qcri/Almieyar-Oryx-BloomBench.

AI.tldr: BloomBench is a bilingual (English-Arabic) multimodal benchmark grounded in Bloom's Taxonomy, designed to evaluate Vision-Language Models across six cognitive levels. It reveals that current models excel in semantic understanding but struggle with factual recall and creative synthesis, and shows a significant performance gap between languages.
AI.motivation: Existing benchmarks fail to systematically assess the true reasoning abilities of Vision-Language Models, focusing instead on isolated tasks that obscure deeper cognitive limitations. There is a need for a human-grounded, scalable, and culturally inclusive benchmark to guide meaningful progress toward human-like multimodal intelligence.
AI.method: BloomBench is built using a semi-automated pipeline and validated via a stratified hybrid quality assurance protocol. It evaluates models across six cognitive levels (Remember, Understand, Apply, Analyze, Evaluate, Create) through carefully designed image-question-answer tasks grounded in Bloom's Taxonomy.
AI.result: State-of-the-art VLMs show strong performance in semantic understanding but exhibit significant weaknesses in factual recall and creative synthesis. A notable performance gap exists between Arabic and English, highlighting limitations in cross-lingual multimodal reasoning.
AI.conclusion: Current VLMs display cognitive asymmetry and limited cross-lingual capabilities. BloomBench provides a foundation for developing more cognitively aligned and inclusive models, with the dataset and framework publicly available.

title: Output Type Before Quality: A Standards-Derived XAI Admissibility Rubric for Autonomous-Driving Safety
summary:
Safety standards for ML-based autonomous driving specify the kind of evidence an assurance case must contain (directed cause-and-effect chains, quantified interventional effects, named root-cause variables), yet the XAI literature is organised by output type and technique family (saliency maps, feature attribution, counterfactuals, causal graphs, language traces). SHAP, the most-recommended ADS XAI method, returns a ranked feature list that no implementation effort can convert into a directed chain (Fig.1). We name this mismatch the evidence-type gap.
  From AMLAS, ISO 26262, ISO21448, ISO/PAS 8800 we derive 19 testable evidentiary criteria across 7 lifecycle stages with representative clause-cited derivations and score six XAI method classes structurally.
  Causal XAI emerges as structurally required to satisfy the derived criteria at three stages: hazard identification (+62% rubric gap), incident investigation (+50%), and data management (+50%); the verdict set is stable across thresholds T in (0%, 50%]$ and survives a worst-case single-cell flip down to T = 25%. At the remaining four stages, correlational or language-based methods are comparable or sufficient. The rubric identifies structural admissibility (necessary but not sufficient for compliance): an admissible method's specific output content may still be wrong, and validating that fidelity (the edges a fitted SCM produces, the cause a trace names) is the open assurance challenge. A single-VLA proof of concept on 1,996 real-world driving clips (79,840 rows, ten splits) is consistent with each method's observed output type matching its rubric prediction. XAI method selection for ADS safety assurance should be driven by lifecycle-stage evidence demand, not by method popularity.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了ML-based自动驾驶中XAI方法与安全标准之间的证据类型差距，提出基于ISO 26262、ISO 21448等标准的19项可测试证据标准，并对六类XAI方法进行结构评估。结果表明，因果XAI在危害识别、事故调查和数据管理三个阶段具有结构性必要性，其余阶段相关或语言类方法已足够。研究强调应根据生命周期阶段的需求选择XAI方法，而非依赖流行度。
AI.motivation: 当前XAI方法（如SHAP）输出为特征排序列表，无法满足自动驾驶安全标准所要求的因果链、干预效应等结构化证据，导致证据类型不匹配，影响安全保证可信度。
AI.method: 基于多个国际安全标准（AMLAS, ISO 26262, ISO 21448, ISO/PAS 8800）提取19项可测试的证据标准，覆盖7个生命周期阶段；对六类XAI方法进行结构化分析，评估其是否符合各阶段证据需求；通过单个视觉语言模型（VLA）的实证案例验证输出类型与理论预测的一致性。
AI.result: 因果XAI在危害识别（+62%）、事故调查（+50%）、数据管理（+50%）三个阶段具有显著优势，且结论在不同阈值下稳定；其他阶段相关或语言类方法表现可接受；结构可接纳性是合规的必要条件，但不充分，真实因果关系的验证仍是开放挑战。
AI.conclusion: XAI方法的选择应以自动驾驶系统生命周期各阶段的具体证据需求为导向，而非依据方法流行度，因果XAI在关键安全阶段具有不可替代的结构性价值。

title: AURA: Intent-Directed Probing for Implicit-Need Surfacing in Situated LLM Agents
comment: Submitted to EMNLP 2026. Code, simulator, and benchmark: https://github.com/innovation64/AURA
summary: A situated query like "where is Lin Wei?" often encodes more than its literal content: the user may also want to know whether Lin Wei is free, in a good mood, or worth interrupting now. Standard tool-use agents answer the literal question and stop. AURA inserts an inference step between scene perception and tool use that produces an IntentFrame: a structured estimate of the implicit need with a scalar gap score that controls per-query probe budget and tool selection. On a 100-query four-scene implicit-intent benchmark, AURA improves implicit-need coverage over ReAct-style probing (Delta = +0.07, p < 10^-6); three of four scenes are individually significant, the gain reproduces on a second backbone, and a prompt ablation attributes the lift to gap calibration rather than answer memorisation. On factual lookup the controller trades raw accuracy for 82% fewer probes and zero forbidden-tool violations on a privacy-sensitive slice; scope conditions are detailed in Limitations. Code, simulator, and benchmark are released at https://github.com/innovation64/AURA.

AI.tldr: AURA introduces an inference step between scene perception and tool use to estimate implicit user intents via an IntentFrame, improving coverage of implicit needs by 7% over ReAct-style methods while reducing probes by 82% and eliminating forbidden-tool violations in privacy-sensitive scenarios.
AI.motivation: Standard tool-use agents only address literal queries, missing implicit user intentions such as whether a person is available or worth interrupting. AURA aims to enhance contextual understanding by estimating these hidden needs.
AI.method: AURA employs an IntentFrame—a structured estimate of implicit intent with a gap score—to guide probe budget and tool selection, enabling more nuanced decision-making after scene perception.
AI.result: On a 100-query benchmark across four scenes, AURA significantly outperforms ReAct-style probing (Delta = +0.07, p < 10^-6); gains are consistent across scenes and model backbones, with ablation showing gap calibration as the key factor. It also reduces probes by 82% and avoids forbidden-tool usage in privacy-sensitive tasks.
AI.conclusion: AURA effectively captures implicit user intent through structured inference, improving both relevance and efficiency in tool-use agents, with strong reproducibility and practical benefits in real-world applications.

title: PJ-RoPE: A Fourier-Jet-Affine Position Space for Relative Attention
comment: 26 pages, 6 figures, 10 tables. Code available at https://github.com/ybzhang-nxu/Poincare_Rope
summary:
We unify RoPE's Fourier phase, Jordan-RoPE's finite jets, and ALiBi's affine recency into a single learnable relative-position space, and study which regions of this space are selected by different tasks. PJ-RoPE is a Fourier-Jet-Affine formulation for relative attention, with an optional Poincare-type reading as the affine completion of a homogeneous Fourier-jet positional representation. Algebraically, the same primitives form a finite constant-coefficient difference module: simple roots of the lag-shift operator give Fourier/RoPE characters, repeated nonzero roots give Jordan/Fourier jets, and the repeated unit root gives ALiBi-like affine recency.
  The framework separates scalar PJ-bias kernels from exact PJ-rotary feature transforms, introduces adaptive sector diagnostics, and uses LC/rapidity coordinates to stabilize high-order jets. Controlled probes verify sector containment and selection; small language runs expose an affine/recency boundary; music-token streams provide the clearest case where LC/affine variants remain strong while carrying measurable high-order corrections; and LC diagnostics show a scale-stability gain coupled to phase-resolution loss.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PJ-RoPE，统一了RoPE的傅里叶相位、Jordan-RoPE的有限阶数射线和ALiBi的仿射近期性，构建了一个可学习的相对位置空间，并通过控制性探针与实验揭示不同任务对空间区域的选择偏好。该框架分离了标量偏置核与精确旋转特征变换，引入自适应扇区诊断，并使用LC/快速度坐标稳定高阶射线。实验表明，音乐令牌流中LC/仿射变体保持较强性能并携带可测量的高阶修正，同时展示出尺度稳定性提升但相位分辨率下降的现象。
AI.motivation: 现有相对位置编码方法如RoPE、Jordan-RoPE和ALiBi各自具有不同的数学结构和表达能力，但缺乏统一的理论框架。本文旨在整合这些方法的核心思想，建立一个统一的可学习相对位置表示空间，以理解不同任务如何选择特定的位置信息区域。
AI.method: 提出基于傅里叶-射线-仿射（Fourier-Jet-Affine）的统一框架PJ-RoPE，将不同位置编码机制建模为拉普拉斯移位算子的代数根结构：简单根对应傅里叶/罗佩特征，非零重根对应乔丹/傅里叶射线，单位重根对应类似ALiBi的仿射近期性。引入标量偏置核与精确旋转特征变换的分离设计，采用LC/快速度坐标实现高阶射线的数值稳定，并开发自适应扇区诊断工具用于分析位置空间中的选择行为。
AI.result: 控制性探针验证了各任务在相对位置空间中的扇区包含与选择模式；小规模语言模型实验揭示了仿射/近期性边界的存在；音乐令牌流数据展示了LC/仿射变体在保留强性能的同时仍能捕捉显著的高阶修正；LC诊断显示其在尺度稳定性方面有提升，但伴随相位分辨率的下降。
AI.conclusion: PJ-RoPE成功构建了一个统一的相对位置编码框架，能够系统地解释多种现有方法的内在联系，并揭示不同任务对相对位置空间的不同选择倾向。实验表明，高阶位置信息虽具潜力，但需权衡稳定性与精度，且仿射结构在复杂序列建模中表现稳健。

title: Noise-Aware Visual Representation Learning for Medical Visual Question Answering
summary: Medical visual question answering (Med-VQA) has strong potential for clinical decision support by enabling AI models to interpret medical images and answer clinically relevant queries. Recent approaches typically connect off-the-shelf vision encoders with large language models (LLMs) through lightweight mapping networks to reduce computational cost. However, these methods often overlook the importance of handling noise and small irrelevant changes in visual representations. To address these challenges, we propose a noise-aware Med-VQA framework that incorporates a denoising autoencoder before visual embeddings are mapped into the input space of an LLM. The denoising autoencoder is pretrained to reconstruct clean visual embeddings from corrupted inputs, encouraging the model to learn robust visual representations that are less sensitive to noise. The resulting embeddings are then projected into the language model embedding space using a multi-layer perceptron (MLP), forming visual prefix tokens that provide image information to the LLM. To enable efficient adaptation without full retraining, we employ parameter-efficient fine-tuning using low-rank adaptation (LoRA). The proposed method is evaluated on the SLAKE and PathVQA benchmarks. Experimental results show improved robustness to noisy input embeddings while maintaining competitive clean performance across multiple evaluation criteria. These findings suggest that learning more robust visual representations can enhance Med-VQA performance and robustness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种噪声感知的医学视觉问答（Med-VQA）框架，通过在视觉嵌入映射到语言模型输入空间前引入预训练的去噪自编码器，增强对噪声和微小干扰的鲁棒性。该框架结合低秩适应（LoRA）实现高效参数化微调，在SLAKE和PathVQA基准上实现了对噪声输入的更强鲁棒性，同时保持了与现有方法相当的纯净性能。
AI.motivation: 现有Med-VQA方法多采用轻量级映射网络连接视觉编码器与大语言模型，但忽视了视觉表示中噪声和微小变化的影响，导致模型对输入扰动敏感，影响临床实用性。
AI.method: 提出一个噪声感知的Med-VQA框架，包含预训练的去噪自编码器以恢复被污染的视觉嵌入，从而学习更鲁棒的视觉表征；随后使用多层感知机（MLP）将处理后的嵌入投影为语言模型的前缀标记；采用低秩适应（LoRA）进行参数高效微调，避免全模型重训练。
AI.result: 在SLAKE和PathVQA数据集上的实验表明，该方法在面对噪声输入时表现出更强的鲁棒性，同时在干净数据上保持了竞争力，验证了鲁棒视觉表征对提升Med-VQA性能的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 学习更鲁棒的视觉表示可显著提升医学视觉问答系统的性能与稳定性，所提出的噪声感知框架为构建更具临床实用价值的AI辅助诊断系统提供了有效路径。

title: PSEBench: A Controllable and Verifiable Benchmark for Evaluating LLMs in Patient Safety Event Triage
summary: Patient safety event triage, determining whether a clinical event is reportable under jurisdiction-specific policy, is a high-stakes task typically performed manually by patient safety experts. Although LLMs may support this workflow, reliable evaluation is limited by the lack of benchmarks to capture evidence-grounded policy reasoning, proactive information seeking for incomplete reports, and principled abstention in irreducibly ambiguous cases. We address this gap with a policy-grounded construction methodology centered on the clause card, a structured representation that factorizes regulatory text into auditable decision specifications. Combining clause cards with anchor-driven instantiation and closed-loop verification, our scalable pipeline produces narratives with by-construction ground truth and naturally supports generating missing information and uncertain variants. We instantiate this method on Minnesota's 29 Reportable Adverse Health Events, producing PSEBench, a 5,074-case benchmark with an agentic evaluation environment. Evaluation on 15 representative LLMs reveals consistent capability trends, demonstrates the benchmark's utility, and identifies actionable gaps toward reliable LLM-based patient safety event triage.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于政策的构建方法，通过‘条款卡片’（clause card）将监管文本分解为可审计的决策规范，结合锚点驱动实例化和闭环验证，构建出具有内置真实标签的叙事数据集。该方法支持生成缺失信息和不确定变体，应用于明尼苏达州29种报告性健康事件，创建了包含5,074个案例的PSEBench基准数据集，并在15个代表性大模型上验证其有效性，揭示了当前模型在患者安全事件分类中的能力趋势与改进空间。
AI.motivation: 现有患者安全事件分诊依赖人工，且缺乏能捕捉证据基础政策推理、主动信息获取及在不可化解歧义情况下合理回避的评估基准，限制了大语言模型在该任务中的可靠评估与应用。
AI.method: 提出以‘条款卡片’为核心的方法，将法规文本结构化为可审计的决策单元；结合锚点驱动实例化生成具体案例，通过闭环验证确保真实性；构建具备自动生成缺失信息与不确定情形的可扩展流水线。
AI.result: 成功构建了包含5,074个案例的PSEBench基准数据集，涵盖明尼苏达州29种报告性不良健康事件；在15个代表性大模型上的评估显示一致的能力趋势，验证了该基准的实用性，并识别出实现可靠LLM辅助分诊的关键改进方向。
AI.conclusion: 本研究通过政策驱动的结构化方法与可验证的基准构建，为大语言模型在患者安全事件分诊中的可靠评估提供了坚实基础，推动了智能化医疗安全监管的发展。

title: InfoShield: Privacy-Preserving Speech Representations for Mental Health Screening via Information-Theoretic Optimization
summary: Speech-based mental health screening offers scalable depression detection, yet clinical deployment faces a significant barrier: users' privacy concerns about demographic information exposure. Current techniques struggle to resolve this conflict. Adversarial training often fails against unseen threats, whereas Differential Privacy tends to compromise diagnostic performance by injecting noise across all features. This paper presents InfoShield, which minimizes mutual information between speech representations and sensitive attributes while preserving depression classification accuracy. We identify that standard MINE estimators struggle with sequential speech due to temporal-static misalignment, and introduce TimeAwareMINE with cross-modal attention to align acoustic frames with attribute embeddings. Experiments on the Androids Corpus show InfoShield reduces gender inference from 92.6\% to 55.5\% and age inference from 55.7\% to 30.3\% with limited utility loss (6\% F1 reduction), achieving F1=0.784 compared to prior SOTA's 0.723.

title: Mamba-Assisted Non-Markovian Closure for Reduced-Order Modeling
comment: Code will be released upon acceptance
summary: Reduced-order modeling of high-dimensional dynamical systems is often hindered by the non-Markovian closure term that represents the effect of unresolved variables on the resolved dynamics. Inspired by the Mori--Zwanzig formalism, in which the closure takes the form of a memory functional of the resolved trajectory, we recast closure modeling as a sequence modeling problem and propose the Mamba-Assisted Closure (MAC) framework: a Mamba-based sequence model, trained to predict the closure from the resolved trajectory, is coupled with the reduced-order governing equations through a numerical integrator to advance the resolved variables in time. A key feature of the framework is its exploitation of the dual representation of state-space models -- the model is trained in a sequence-to-sequence fashion via the convolutional form, and deployed for step-by-step autoregressive rollout via the recurrent form, yielding both efficient long-trajectory training and constant per-step inference cost. On the viscous Burgers' equation and the chaotic two-scale Lorenz '96 system, the MAC model substantially outperforms the Markovian reduced-order model, the GRU-based sequence model, and the Wilks method in predictive accuracy and long-time rollout stability.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于Mamba的序列模型——Mamba-Assisted Closure (MAC)框架，用于解决高维动力系统降阶建模中的非马尔可夫闭包问题。通过将闭包建模转化为序列建模问题，MAC利用Mamba的双表示特性（卷积形式训练、递归形式推理），实现高效长轨迹训练和恒定每步推理成本。在黏性Burgers方程和混沌的两尺度Lorenz '96系统上，MAC显著优于马尔可夫降阶模型、GRU序列模型和Wilks方法，在预测精度和长时间滚动稳定性方面表现更优。
AI.motivation: 高维动力系统的降阶建模常受非马尔可夫闭包项阻碍，该闭包项代表未解析变量对解析动力学的影响。传统方法难以有效捕捉长期记忆效应，因此需要一种能建模复杂时间依赖性的新框架。
AI.method: 将闭包建模视为序列建模问题，采用Mamba架构构建序列模型，以解析轨迹为输入预测闭包项；模型在卷积形式下训练以获取长程依赖信息，部署时转为递归形式进行自回归滚动更新，结合数值积分器推进解析变量的时间演化。
AI.result: 在黏性Burgers方程和混沌的两尺度Lorenz '96系统上，MAC框架在预测准确性和长时间滚动稳定性方面均显著优于马尔可夫降阶模型、GRU序列模型及Wilks方法。
AI.conclusion: MAC框架成功将Mamba序列模型应用于非马尔可夫闭包建模，实现了高效训练与低延迟推理的平衡，为高维动力系统降阶建模提供了强有力的工具。

title: Dual Feature Decoupling for Fine-Grained OOD Detection
summary: Out-of-distribution detection (OOD) is an indispensable technique when applying machine learning models to real-world scenarios. Most existing OOD detection methods have been developed under the idealized assumption of large inter-class distributional differences, while largely overlooking fine-grained tasks characterized by subtle variations, such as medical image classification and vehicle recognition. The high visual similarity among fine-grained subcategories, together with the interference of background factors, makes OOD detection extremely challenging. To tackle this problem, we propose a novel Dual Feature Decoupling Network (DFDNet), which addresses fine-grained OOD detection from the perspective of feature disentanglement. The proposed DFDNet comprises two key components: a spatial-frequency decoupling module and a reconstruction-guided decoupling module. The spatial-frequency decoupling module is designed to preserve content features that are discriminative for classification while suppressing task-irrelevant style information. On the other hand, the reconstruction-guided decoupling module introduces a novel pixel-level adversarial reconstruction task to further remove low-level, non-discriminative information and enhance category-specific high-level semantic representations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves competitive performance improvements on multiple datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为双特征解耦网络（DFDNet）的新方法，用于解决细粒度分布外检测（OOD）问题。该方法通过空间-频率解耦模块和重建引导解耦模块，分别抑制与任务无关的风格信息并去除低层次非判别性信息，从而增强类别特定的高层次语义表示。实验表明，该方法在多个数据集上均取得了优异的性能表现。
AI.motivation: 现有大多数OOD检测方法基于类间分布差异较大的理想假设，忽略了医学图像分类、车辆识别等具有细微视觉差异的细粒度任务。细粒度子类别之间高视觉相似性及背景干扰使得此类任务中的OOD检测极具挑战性。
AI.method: 提出Dual Feature Decoupling Network（DFDNet），包含两个核心组件：空间-频率解耦模块用于保留判别性内容特征并抑制无关风格信息；重建引导解耦模块引入像素级对抗重建任务，以去除低层非判别信息，强化高层语义表征。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的大量实验证明，所提方法在细粒度OOD检测任务中显著提升了检测性能，表现出良好的竞争力。
AI.conclusion: DFDNet通过特征解耦策略有效应对了细粒度任务中分布外检测的挑战，为复杂现实场景下的模型可靠性提供了新思路。

title: Step-by-Step Optimization-like Reasoning in LLMs over Expanding Search Spaces
summary: Verifiable reward training has improved mathematical and coding reasoning, but these domains capture only part of step-by-step decision making. Many real-world tasks require finding a high-value feasible plan among many valid alternatives. We introduce OPT*, a scalable family of optimization-style tasks for training and evaluating LLM step-by-step optimization-like reasoning along a complexity axis: each task provides a feasibility checker and evaluator, while a complexity parameter expands the search space without requiring new human labels. This motivates studying these tasks in two regimes: (i) solver-guided online policy optimization, which uses a solver as a value oracle for partial states and applies rank-based reward shaping to reinforce better next steps, and (ii) search-based offline RL when such solvers are unavailable. Theoretically, we relate success in large search spaces to the information a reasoner extracts per unit of search budget. Empirically, we ablate the ingredients that make search efficient on OPT* and show that training on OPT* improves step-by-step optimization-like reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OPT*，一个可扩展的优化类任务家族，用于训练和评估大语言模型在复杂度轴上的逐步优化推理能力。该任务通过可行性检查器和评估器，利用复杂度参数扩展搜索空间而无需新的人工标注。研究分为两种范式：(i) 基于求解器的在线策略优化，使用求解器作为部分状态的价值代理并采用基于排名的奖励塑造；(ii) 当求解器不可用时的基于搜索的离线强化学习。理论分析表明，在大规模搜索空间中成功依赖于推理者每单位搜索预算提取的信息量。实验验证了OPT*训练能有效提升模型的逐步优化推理能力。
AI.motivation: 许多现实任务需要在众多可行方案中找到高价值的计划，而现有方法如可验证奖励训练主要集中在数学和编码推理，无法覆盖广泛的逐步决策过程。因此，亟需一种新的训练框架来建模和提升模型在复杂搜索空间中的优化式推理能力。
AI.method: 引入OPT*任务框架，包含可行性检查器与评估器，通过调整复杂度参数动态扩展搜索空间。采用两种策略：(i) solver-guided online policy optimization，利用求解器提供部分状态价值信号并进行排名奖励塑形；(ii) search-based offline RL，适用于无求解器场景。结合理论分析与实验验证，评估不同组件对搜索效率的影响。
AI.result: 实验证明，基于OPT*训练能显著提升模型在复杂优化任务中的逐步推理表现。理论分析揭示了信息提取效率与搜索成功率之间的关系。消融实验验证了关键设计要素的有效性，包括奖励塑造机制和求解器引导策略。
AI.conclusion: OPT*为训练和评估大语言模型在复杂搜索空间中的优化式推理提供了有效且可扩展的基准。其核心在于将求解器作为价值反馈工具，并通过可调节的复杂度参数实现持续训练。实验表明，该框架能够显著增强模型的步骤级优化推理能力，具有广泛的应用潜力。

title: Using Large Language Models to Support High Volume Application Review for an Undergraduate Research Program
summary: Undergraduate research programs such as the Summer Undergraduate Research Fellowship (SURF) at Purdue University receive thousands of applications every year, requiring significant time and effort for program staff to evaluate each submission consistently and within tight timelines. This work-in-progress paper describes the development and initial deployment of a large language model (LLM)-based tool to assist in the evaluation of approximately 1,200 student Statements of Purpose (SoPs) for the SURF 2026 cycle at Purdue University. The workflow utilizes OpenAI GPT models (GPT-4o, GPT-5-mini, and GPT-5.2) and uses a structured rubric across six subcategories, each scored on a 0-3 scale. A few SoPs, graded by program staff, were used to tune the model responses. The model prompt was designed to generate both numerical scores, rationales (including positive and negative aspects) and short excerpts from each submission. Using GPT-5.2, the full batch of 1,200 SoPs was processed in approximately 4.6 hours of compute time, averaging roughly 14 seconds per SoP (with per-SoP timing varying with SoP length, which ranged from 500 to 2,000 words). Notable differences in rubric adherence were observed across model versions, with GPT-5.2 adhering most closely. Disagreement in model scores was more pronounced for lower-scoring submissions. The LLM outputs replicated the role previously played by distributed human graders, providing the program coordinator with scored and rationale-annotated outputs for the entire applicant pool. The program coordinator then reviewed these outputs alongside each applicant's SoP, applying the same downstream office criteria used in prior SURF cycles, to produce a shortlist of strong candidates. This coordinator review was completed in approximately 4 hours, compared to the multi-week coordination effort required in prior program cycles.

AI.tldr: 本论文描述了为普渡大学夏季本科生研究奖学金（SURF）2026项目开发并初步部署的基于大语言模型（LLM）的申请材料评估工具。该工具利用OpenAI GPT系列模型（GPT-4o、GPT-5-mini、GPT-5.2），依据六项子维度的结构化评分标准（每项0-3分）对约1,200份个人陈述（SoP）进行自动化评分与评语生成。通过少量人工评分样本微调模型输出，最终使用GPT-5.2在约4.6小时内完成全部处理，平均耗时约14秒/篇。结果显示GPT-5.2在评分一致性上表现最佳，但低分申请的评分分歧较大。模型输出提供数值评分、理由分析及原文摘录，有效替代了以往多人力评流程，使项目负责人仅用约4小时完成筛选，远快于往年需数周的人工协调周期。
AI.motivation: 应对每年数千份本科生研究项目申请带来的评审压力，提升评审效率与一致性，减轻项目工作人员负担，并在严格时限内完成高质量筛选。
AI.method: 采用GPT-4o、GPT-5-mini和GPT-5.2等大语言模型，结合六维结构化评分体系（每项0-3分），对个人陈述进行自动评分与评语生成；通过少量人工标注样例对模型提示词进行微调；利用自动化批量处理实现大规模申请材料快速评估。
AI.result: GPT-5.2在评分一致性和规则遵循方面表现最优，1,200份申请在约4.6小时内完成处理，平均14秒/篇；模型输出包含分数、理由及原文摘录，显著减少人工评审时间；项目负责人仅用4小时完成最终候选名单确定，相比以往多周工作大幅提速。
AI.conclusion: 基于大语言模型的自动化评估工具可高效、一致地支持大规模本科生科研项目申请评审，显著提升流程效率，同时保持评审质量，具备在类似学术选拔场景中推广的潜力。

title: Evidence-Guided Neural Architecture Selection under Uncertainty for Subject-Specific Blood Glucose Forecasting
summary: Reliable neural architecture selection is an open challenge in time-series forecasting under limited, noisy, and heterogeneous data, where standard heuristic architecture design and validation approaches fail to ensure accurate and reliable prediction and generalization. We propose EVIDENT (EVidence-based IDEntification of Neural archiTectures), a framework for architecture selection that integrates Bayesian training, evidence-based ranking, and task-specific validation under uncertainty. The framework explores the candidate architecture pool and identifies the lowest-capacity model that satisfies a prescribed validation criterion. We demonstrate this method using temporal convolutional networks (TCNs) for individualized blood glucose forecasting in type 1 diabetes patients. The results show that EVIDENT systematically rejects both under- and over-parameterized TCN architectures on population-level diabetes data, while identifying models that generalize reliably to unseen patients. When multiple architectures are competitive, the framework further supports plausibility-weighted ensemble predictions that enhance predictive performance. Compared with a random-search baseline, EVIDENT identified smaller architectures with more consistent forecasting performance on unseen patients. These findings establish EVIDENT as a strategy to neural architecture discovery, enabling reliable model selection for high-consequence forecasting in data-limited and heterogeneous settings.

AI.tldr: EVIDENT 是一种基于证据的神经架构选择框架，结合贝叶斯训练、证据排名和任务特定不确定性验证，用于在数据有限、噪声大且异质的时间序列预测中识别最优低复杂度模型。在1型糖尿病患者血糖预测中，该方法有效排除过拟合与欠拟合的TCN架构，提升对未见患者的泛化能力，并支持可解释性集成预测。相比随机搜索，EVIDENT能发现更小但性能更稳定的模型。
AI.motivation: 在数据有限、噪声大且异质的时间序列预测中，传统启发式架构设计与验证方法难以保证预测准确性和泛化能力，亟需一种可靠的神经架构选择机制。
AI.method: 提出EVIDENT框架，融合贝叶斯训练、证据驱动的架构排名与不确定性下的任务特定验证，系统筛选满足预设标准的最低容量模型，并支持多架构竞争时的置信度加权集成。
AI.result: EVIDENT成功排除过拟合与欠拟合的TCN架构，在群体数据上实现对未见患者的可靠泛化；相较于随机搜索基线，所选模型更小且预测性能更一致，显著提升可靠性与可解释性。
AI.conclusion: EVIDENT为高风险时间序列预测中的神经架构发现提供了一种可靠策略，尤其适用于数据受限和异质性强的应用场景。

title: UltraVR: A Diagnostic Ultra-Resolution Image-VQA Benchmark for Evidence-Grounded Reasoning
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) excel on visual question answering and multimodal reasoning benchmarks. Yet their capability on ultra-resolution images - where critical evidence is tiny, subtle, spatially distant, or distributed - remains unclear. Existing evaluations largely report final-answer accuracy, offering limited insight into whether models acquire and integrate the necessary visual evidence. We introduce UltraVR, a diagnostic benchmark for evidence-grounded visual reasoning over ultra-resolution images. UltraVR spans four high-value scenarios: CCTV surveillance, remote sensing (RS), whole-slide image (WSI) pathology, and industrial anomaly detection (AD). These domains pose complementary challenges: fine-grained object grounding in crowded CCTV scenes, long-range spatial comparison in RS, multi-scale evidence navigation in WSI, and subtle irregularity detection in repetitive industrial layouts. Beyond standard QA triples, each instance includes a structured ground-truth chain of thought with step-level questions, intermediate answers, and reasoning labels. These labels decompose reasoning into evidence grounding, local perception, quantification, evidence integration, and decision inference, enabling process-level diagnosis over black-box scoring. Using UltraVR, we evaluate frontier VLMs and show that current models remain far from reliable on ultra-resolution reasoning. Importantly, the structured annotations allow us to localize failures across the visual-to-decision pipeline: errors concentrate in evidence grounding and local perception, while downstream inference often recovers when intermediate visual facts are supplied. These findings demonstrate UltraVR as a diagnostic testbed for measuring not only whether VLMs answer correctly, but where their ultra-resolution reasoning process breaks.

AI.tldr: 提出UltraVR基准，用于诊断超分辨率图像上的视觉-语言模型推理能力，涵盖CCTV监控、遥感、病理切片和工业缺陷检测四大场景，通过结构化思维链标注实现对模型推理过程的细粒度分析，发现当前模型主要在证据定位和局部感知环节失败，而下游推理在提供中间视觉事实时表现良好。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在超分辨率图像上的推理能力不明确，传统评估仅关注最终答案准确率，缺乏对模型是否有效获取和整合视觉证据的深入理解，亟需一种能够诊断推理过程的基准测试工具。
AI.method: 构建UltraVR基准，包含四个高价值应用场景，每个实例配有结构化的思维链标注，包括步骤级问题、中间答案和推理标签，将推理分解为证据定位、局部感知、量化、证据整合和决策推断等阶段，支持对模型推理流程的逐层诊断。
AI.result: 评估显示当前前沿视觉语言模型在超分辨率推理任务上仍不可靠；错误主要集中在证据定位和局部感知阶段，而当提供中间视觉事实时，下游推理通常能恢复正确结果。
AI.conclusion: UltraVR不仅可衡量模型是否答对，还能定位其推理过程中何处失效，是诊断超分辨率视觉推理能力的有效工具。

title: Severity-Aware Curriculum Learning with Multi-Model Response Selection for Medical Text Generation
summary: Telehealth systems have become increasingly important for delivering accessible and timely medical information. Existing large language models often struggle to provide consistent and contextually appropriate medical responses across varying levels of case severity. This limitation highlights the need for models that can effectively adapt to the progressive complexity in medical queries. To address this challenge, we introduce a severity-aware multi-model framework that integrates curriculum training strategy with relevance-based response selection. The proposed framework employs a three-stage curriculum learning strategy, where each model is trained sequentially on mild, moderate, and critical cases to progressively acquire domain knowledge. The approach utilizes five large language models, each independently trained under the same curriculum scheme. During inference, all models generate candidate responses, and the most appropriate response is selected as the final output. The framework is trained and evaluated on the MAQA dataset, which provides annotated medical question-answer pairs. Experimental results evaluated using BERTScore demonstrate that the proposed method achieves superior performance compared to both baseline and fine-tuned models, attaining 86.71% in the baseline setting and 90.30% after fine-tuning. These results highlight the effectiveness of combining curriculum learning with multi-model response selection in improving response quality and relevance in medical text generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种严重程度感知的多模型框架，结合课程学习策略与基于相关性的响应选择，以提升医疗问答系统在不同病情严重程度下的响应质量。通过三阶段课程学习，逐步训练模型处理轻度、中度和重度病例，利用五个独立训练的大语言模型生成候选回答，并在推理时选择最合适的输出。实验在MAQA数据集上进行，结果显示该方法在基准设置下达到86.71%的BERTScore，微调后提升至90.30%，优于基线和微调模型。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在处理不同严重程度的医疗问题时，难以保持响应的一致性和情境适应性，亟需能够适应病情复杂性递增的模型。
AI.method: 提出一种严重程度感知的多模型框架，采用三阶段课程学习策略，分阶段训练模型处理轻度、中度和重度病例；使用五个大语言模型并行训练，推理时通过相关性评估选择最优响应。
AI.result: 在MAQA数据集上的实验表明，该方法在基准设置下获得86.71%的BERTScore，微调后达到90.30%，显著优于基线和微调模型，验证了课程学习与多模型响应选择结合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 结合课程学习与多模型响应选择的框架能有效提升医疗文本生成中响应的质量与相关性，尤其在应对病情严重程度变化时表现更优。

title: Domain-Aware Mispronunciation Detection and Diagnosis Using Language-Specific Statistical Graphs
summary: Mispronunciation Detection and Diagnosis (MDD) has gained increasing importance in computer-assisted language learning and speech technology in recent years. In this paper, we propose a method for constructing statistical graphs that enable models to learn phoneme confusion patterns represented as directed graphs. Furthermore, we introduce a language-specific strategy to capture systematic pronunciation differences across various native language (L1) backgrounds. The effectiveness of our approach is demonstrated through extensive experiments on the L2-ARCTIC benchmark, where it achieves an F1-score of 59.52%, outperforming several competitive baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种构建统计图的方法，使模型能够学习音素混淆模式（以有向图表示），并引入语言特定策略捕捉不同母语背景下的系统性发音差异。在L2-ARCTIC基准上的实验表明，该方法达到59.52%的F1分数，优于多个基线模型。
AI.motivation: Mispronunciation Detection and Diagnosis (MDD) 在计算机辅助语言学习和语音技术中日益重要，但现有方法难以有效捕捉音素混淆模式及跨母语背景的发音差异。
AI.method: 通过构建统计图表示音素混淆模式，并设计语言特定策略以建模不同母语背景带来的发音系统性差异。
AI.result: 在L2-ARCTIC基准上取得59.52%的F1分数，优于多个竞争性基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效提升了音素混淆模式的学习能力，并能更好地适应不同母语背景的发音差异，显著增强了误读检测与诊断性能。

title: SHALA-LLM: Smartly Handling Ambiguous Labels in Aligning LLMs
summary: Many human-centered tasks, including natural language inference (NLI) and emotion recognition (ER), have multiple plausible interpretations, leading to label ambiguity and challenging disagreements across human annotators. As LLMs are increasingly deployed in real-world settings, faithfully modeling such ambiguity is essential to identify contested inputs, preserve variability in ambiguous cases, and capture the full distribution of human judgments. Yet, existing LLM alignment approaches have predominantly assumed a single correct label, excluding annotator disagreement during optimization. Instead of treating this ambiguity as noise, we show how to treat it as information that improves model behavior through a new algorithm called SMARTLY HANDLING AMBIGUOUS LABELS IN ALIGNING LLMS (SHALA-LLM). This reinforcement learning framework provides a new way for LLMs to learn directly from annotator distributions while dynamically prioritizing highly ambiguous samples during optimization. Experiments on ambiguity-sensitive NLI and ER benchmarks, including ChaosNLI, GoEmotions, and MSP-Podcast, demonstrate that SHALA-LLM improves agreement with annotator label distributions, e.g. on ChaosNLI, it reduces Jensen-Shannon Distance by up to 62.1%. At the same time, SHALA-LLM improves F1 by up to 16.7%, showing that modeling annotator disagreement can also strengthen classification performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SHALA-LLM的新算法，用于在对齐大型语言模型（LLM）时处理标签模糊性问题。该方法通过强化学习框架，利用标注者分布动态优先处理高模糊性样本，从而更好地捕捉人类判断的多样性。实验表明，在多个具有挑战性的基准测试中，该方法显著提升了与标注者标签分布的一致性，并提高了分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有大型语言模型对齐方法通常假设每个任务只有一个正确标签，忽略了标注者之间的分歧。然而，许多以人为中心的任务存在多种合理解释，导致标签模糊性和标注者间的不一致。这种模糊性不应被视为噪声，而应作为信息加以利用以改进模型表现。
AI.method: 提出SHALA-LLM，一种基于强化学习的框架，使模型能够直接从标注者分布中学习，并在优化过程中动态识别并优先处理高度模糊的样本。
AI.result: 在ChaosNLI、GoEmotions和MSP-Podcast等基准上，SHALA-LLM将与标注者标签分布的一致性提升显著，例如在ChaosNLI上降低了62.1%的Jensen-Shannon距离；同时分类F1得分最高提升16.7%，证明建模标注者分歧有助于提升模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过将标注者分歧视为信息而非噪声，SHALA-LLM有效提升了模型对人类判断多样性的建模能力，既增强了与人类共识的一致性，又改善了分类性能，为更真实地对齐人类偏好提供了新路径。

title: BMCR: Adaptive Backbone Module Composition via Reinforcement Learning for Remote Sensing Object Detection
summary: In remote sensing object detection, Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) excel at capturing local details while Vision Transformers (ViTs) are better at global context modeling. However, existing detectors typically rely on a single fixed backbone or a manually designed hybrid architecture, and thus fail to adaptively exploit these complementary strengths across inputs of diverse complexity. To address this limitation, we propose Backbone Module Composition via Reinforcement Learning (BMCR). BMCR dynamically assembles input-adaptive inference paths from reusable modules decomposed from off-the-shelf CNN and ViT backbones. To enable such cross-family composition, we first construct an extensible module toolbox. Specifically, we decompose representative CNN and ViT backbones into reusable functional modules and encapsulate each module with explicit structural, semantic, and computational metadata for compatibility-aware assembly. To bridge the gap between grid-based CNN features and token-based ViT representations, we design a lightweight Optimal Transport (OT) based transition interface that ensures distribution-aware alignment while respecting spatial consistency. The backbone composition process is then formulated as a sequential decision problem, in which a policy network progressively selects task-relevant modules according to intermediate multi-scale observations. To stabilize the joint optimization of reusable modules and the routing policy, we further develop an Adaptive Module Cooperative Optimization (AMCO) strategy that coordinates module updating, routing exploration, and reward assignment during training. On DOTA-v1.0, DOTA-v1.5 and DIOR-R, BMCR achieves 79.31\%, 73.41\% and 71.86\% mAP, respectively, surpassing strong static and dynamic baselines by up to 2.5 points while maintaining competitive efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的骨干模块组合方法BMCR，用于遥感目标检测。该方法通过动态组装来自CNN和ViT骨干网络的可重用模块，实现对复杂输入的自适应特征提取。为支持跨架构模块组合，构建了一个可扩展的模块工具箱，并设计轻量级最优传输接口以对齐网格与令牌表示。通过将骨干选择建模为序列决策问题，由策略网络根据多尺度观测选择任务相关模块。同时引入自适应模块协同优化策略（AMCO）以稳定联合训练。在DOTA-v1.0、DOTA-v1.5和DIOR-R数据集上，BMCR分别达到79.31%、73.41%和71.86% mAP，优于现有静态与动态基线模型，且保持高效。
AI.motivation: 现有遥感目标检测器通常依赖单一固定骨干或手动设计的混合架构，无法自适应地利用CNN的局部细节捕捉能力与ViT的全局上下文建模优势，尤其在面对不同复杂度输入时表现受限。
AI.method: 提出BMCR框架，包括：1）构建可扩展模块工具箱，将CNN与ViT分解为带结构、语义和计算元数据的可重用模块；2）设计基于最优传输的轻量级过渡接口，实现网格与令牌表示间的分布感知对齐；3）将骨干组合建模为序列决策问题，使用策略网络根据多尺度中间特征选择模块；4）引入自适应模块协同优化（AMCO）策略，协调模块更新、路由探索与奖励分配，以稳定联合训练。
AI.result: 在DOTA-v1.0、DOTA-v1.5和DIOR-R三个遥感数据集上，BMCR分别取得79.31%、73.41%和71.86%的mAP，超越强基线模型最高达2.5个百分点，同时保持良好效率。
AI.conclusion: BMCR实现了跨架构骨干模块的动态自适应组合，有效融合CNN与ViT的优势，在遥感目标检测中显著提升性能，为复杂场景下的模型设计提供了新范式。

title: EpiEvolve: Self-Evolving Agents for Streaming Pandemic Forecasting under Regime Shifts
summary: Epidemic LLM forecasters are usually trained and evaluated as static supervised models, whereas operational pandemic forecasting is a streaming process in which labels arrive after predictions and disease regimes shift over time. We study this mismatch in weekly COVID-19 hospitalization trend forecasting across five variant regimes. We introduce EpiEvolve, a self-evolving agent that wraps an LLM forecaster trained on the warm-start period and keeps its weights fixed during streaming. EpiEvolve adapts by storing forecast outcomes in a hierarchical episodic memory, reflecting on delayed labels, retrieving cases relevant to the current regime, and distilling recurring errors into strategic rules. The resulting context lets the forecaster reuse its own past predictions and outcomes in later weeks while following a chronological protocol that prevents future leakage. On the streaming dataset, EpiEvolve reaches $0.629$ average accuracy, compared with $0.561$ for the static backbone and $0.325$ for the external CDC ensemble, and reduces recovery lag after regime shifts from $5$ to $2$ weeks. Ablations show that reflection, strategic memory, and regime-aware retrieval each contribute to the gains.

AI.tldr: EpiEvolve 是一个自进化代理，用于改进基于大语言模型（LLM）的流行病预测，在动态、流式数据环境中通过存储预测结果、反思延迟标签、检索相关案例并提炼错误模式来适应疫情变化。在每周新冠住院趋势预测任务中，其平均准确率达0.629，优于静态基线（0.561）和外部CDC集成模型（0.325），并在疫情阶段转换后将恢复滞后从5周减少至2周。消融实验表明，反思机制、策略性记忆和制度感知检索均对性能提升有贡献。
AI.motivation: 当前流行病预测模型多以静态监督方式训练与评估，但实际操作中预测是流式过程，标签延迟出现且疫情状态随时间演变，导致模型难以适应新阶段。现有方法在疫情阶段切换时存在显著滞后，亟需一种能持续自我调整的动态预测框架。
AI.method: 提出EpiEvolve，一个自进化代理，其核心为固定权重的预训练LLM，结合层次化情景记忆系统：存储历史预测与实际结果，利用延迟标签进行反思，根据当前疫情阶段检索相关历史案例，并将重复错误提炼为策略规则。通过遵循时间顺序协议，避免未来信息泄露，实现安全的自我学习与适应。
AI.result: 在流式新冠疫情住院趋势预测数据集上，EpiEvolve达到0.629的平均准确率，显著优于静态基线（0.561）和外部CDC集成模型（0.325）。在疫情阶段转换后，恢复滞后从5周缩短至2周。消融实验验证了反思、策略记忆和制度感知检索三者对性能提升的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: EpiEvolve 有效缓解了静态模型在动态流式预测中的适应性缺陷，通过引入自我反思与情境记忆机制，使大语言模型具备持续进化能力，为真实世界中的疫情预测提供了可扩展、鲁棒的解决方案。

title: TensorBench: Benchmarking Coding Agents on a Compiler-Based Tensor Framework
summary: Repository-level coding benchmarks face a trade-off between task difficulty and evaluation reliability: tasks that challenge frontier models often involve large codebases with incomplete test coverage, while human review does not scale. We introduce TensorBench, a benchmark of 199 feature-addition and refactoring tasks on an open-source compiler-based tensor framework that extends PyTorch with first-class support for dense and sparse tensors. Tasks cover new sparse formats, dense optimization passes, IR transformations, scheduler changes, runtime components, and high-level numerical operators. TensorBench grades each run by applying the agent's patch and running the framework's test suite, which includes the pre-existing randomized regression tests and any tests the agent adds. For feature-addition tasks, a pass means that the patched repository preserves the tested pre-existing behavior and satisfies the agent-added checks for the requested feature. We evaluate seven coding agents spanning three frontier model families and one open-weight model. Pass rates under this criterion range from $64.8\%$ for the strongest agent to $22.1\%$ for the weakest. Agents pass different subsets of tasks: pairwise Cohen's $κ$ ranges from $-0.07$ to $0.43$, with $κ= 0.05$ for the two strongest agents.

AI.tldr: TensorBench 是一个针对开源编译器级张量框架的基准测试，包含199个功能添加和重构任务，涵盖稀疏格式、密集优化、IR转换、调度器更改、运行时组件和高级数值操作。通过应用代理补丁并运行框架的测试套件（包括随机回归测试和代理添加的测试）来评估每个任务的完成情况。对于功能添加任务，通过标准为保持原有行为并满足新增功能检查。评估了七个编码代理，表现从64.8%到22.1%不等，不同代理通过的任务子集差异显著，互评一致性较低（Cohen's κ 从 -0.07 到 0.43）。
AI.motivation: 现有代码库级别的编码基准在任务难度与评估可靠性之间存在权衡：高难度任务通常涉及大型代码库且测试覆盖不全，而人工评审又无法扩展。需要一种既能挑战前沿模型，又能保证可靠评估的基准。
AI.method: 构建 TensorBench 基准，包含199个真实世界中的功能添加与重构任务，基于扩展 PyTorch 的开源张量框架。使用自动化测试套件（含预置随机回归测试及代理添加的测试）对每个任务的补丁进行评分。通过是否保留原有行为并满足新增功能要求来判定任务是否通过。
AI.result: 评估的七个编码代理中，最强者通过率为64.8%，最弱者为22.1%。不同代理通过的任务集合差异大，两最强代理间 Cohen's κ 仅为 0.05，表明任务表现高度不一致，反映出当前模型在复杂任务上仍存在较大差距。
AI.conclusion: TensorBench 提供了一个高难度且可信赖的代码生成评估基准，能够有效揭示当前编码代理在真实软件工程任务中的能力边界，同时凸显模型间表现差异大、一致性低的问题。

title: Pattern Selectivity is Not Task-Causal Structure: A Cross-Architecture Mechanistic Study of Composed-Task Circuits in 1B-Class Language Models
summary:
We test whether a single screen-and-ablate recipe -- identify attention-head circuits by task-pattern selectivity, then verify by causal ablation against a matched-random null -- produces consistent mechanistic claims across model families. The recipe ports across pipelines; the specific circuit it identifies does not. Across four composed tasks (indirect-object identification, greater-than, successor sequences, variable binding) and three 1B-class language models from distinct training pipelines (Pythia 1B / Pile / dense; OLMo 1B / DCLM / dense; OLMoE 1B-7B / DCLM / mixture-of-experts), we run a unified protocol with the matched-random null sampled across ten seeds per cell. The resulting 12 (task, model) cells contain no two that share the same primary causal screen at comparable effect size: the same task, with the same behavioral capability, is implemented through different attention-pattern types across models.
  We introduce a five-category screen-outcome taxonomy -- primary cause, secondary cause, correlate, interferer, null -- with quantitative thresholds, and show that all five outcomes appear in the panel. We propose a falsifiable hypothesis: the MoE model in our panel builds composed-task circuits on top of a foundational previous-token positional substrate (the prev-token-circuit ablation is the strongest causal screen on 3 of 4 tasks for OLMoE 1B-7B), with the IOI exception consistent with IOI being a final-position name-copying task whose structure directly probes a different pattern. The hypothesis comes with explicit predictions for other MoE language models.
  We frame the methodology honestly: the spectral participation-ratio signal from the companion methodology paper is a general indicator of specialized computation; what makes a finding task-specific is the task-pattern screen plus a per-model causal verification.

AI.tldr: 本文测试了一种统一的‘屏幕-消融’方法（通过任务模式选择性识别注意力头电路，再通过因果消融验证）在不同模型家族中的可移植性。尽管方法一致，但所识别出的核心因果电路在不同模型间差异显著，即使在相同任务和行为能力下也表现出不同的注意力模式。研究涵盖四个复合任务和三种1B级语言模型（来自不同训练流水线），使用匹配随机零模型进行十次种子采样，结果表明12个（任务，模型）组合中无任何两组共享相同的主要因果筛选结果。作者提出一个五类结果分类体系（主因、次因、相关项、干扰项、空值），并引入定量阈值；所有五类均出现。进一步提出可证伪假说：MoE模型可能基于基础的前一词位置子结构构建复合任务电路（对OLMoE 1B-7B而言，前一词电路消融在3/4任务中为最强因果筛选），而IOI任务例外因是最终位置名称复制任务，直接探测不同模式。该假说可推广至其他MoE模型。最后强调方法论透明性：谱参与比信号是专用计算的一般指标，但任务特异性取决于任务模式筛选与每模型的因果验证。
AI.motivation: 探究一种统一的‘屏幕-消融’方法在不同语言模型家族中是否能产生一致的机制性结论。特别关注模型架构差异（如MoE vs. dense）如何影响任务实现的注意力模式结构。
AI.method: 采用统一协议：首先通过任务模式选择性识别注意力头电路，再通过匹配随机零模型进行因果消融验证；在12个（任务，模型）组合中重复实验，每组使用十次随机种子采样。引入五类结果分类体系，并设定定量阈值以区分因果关系类型。
AI.result: 不同模型在相同任务中实现方式完全不同，无两组共享相同主要因果筛选结果；五类结果均被观察到；提出关于MoE模型依赖前一词位置子结构的可证伪假说，且该假说对其他MoE模型具有预测力。
AI.conclusion: 虽然‘屏幕-消融’方法具有跨模型管道的可移植性，但其识别出的具体电路高度依赖于模型架构和训练过程。因此，机制解释必须结合任务模式筛选与特定模型的因果验证，不能泛化。

title: HDST-GNN: Heterogeneous Dynamic Spatiotemporal Graph Neural Networks for Multi-Object Tracking in UAV Aerial Imagery
summary: Multi-object tracking (MOT) from UAV imagery presents unique challenges: altitude varies across sequences, objects are small and densely packed, and frequent occlusion causes identity switches. Existing graph-based trackers assume fixed spatial context and treat all objects uniformly, ignoring the heterogeneous lifecycle states of detections, active tracklets, and lost targets. We propose HDST-GNN, a Heterogeneous Dynamic Spatiotemporal Graph Neural Network with three novel contributions. First, Altitude-Adaptive Edge Construction estimates a camera-altitude proxy from mean object area and adjusts the graph connectivity radius accordingly. Second, Heterogeneous Node Representation models detections (Type-D), confirmed tracklets (Type-T), and lost tracklets (Type-L) as distinct node types with dedicated projections and typed edge relations. Third, Occlusion-Gated Temporal Aggregation gates each node's attention contribution by its occlusion confidence, preventing occluded nodes from corrupting neighbour embeddings. HDST-GNN is trained end-to-end with a differentiable Sinkhorn head using joint cross-entropy and triplet loss. On VisDrone2019-MOT with oracle detections, HDST-GNN achieves 94.51% MOTA and 97.24% IDF1, outperforming SORT by +5.0 MOTA points and reducing identity switches by 81%. With real YOLOv8n detections, HDST-GNN reduces identity switches by 49% vs. SORT. Ablation studies confirm the independent contribution of each component.

AI.tldr: HDST-GNN 是一种针对无人机图像中多目标跟踪的异质动态时空图神经网络，通过自适应边缘构建、异质节点表示和遮挡门控时间聚合三个创新方法，有效应对高空视角下目标小、密集、易遮挡等问题。在 VisDrone2019-MOT 数据集上，使用理想检测结果时，其 MOTA 达到 94.51%，IDF1 为 97.24%，显著优于 SORT，且身份切换减少 81%；使用真实 YOLOv8n 检测结果时，身份切换仍减少 49%。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图的跟踪器假设固定空间上下文，对所有目标一视同仁，无法处理检测、活跃轨迹和丢失目标等异质生命周期状态，尤其在无人机图像中因高度变化、目标小而密集、频繁遮挡导致身份切换严重，因此需要更灵活、具有状态感知能力的建模方式。
AI.method: 提出 HDST-GNN，包含三项核心技术：1）基于平均目标面积估计相机高度并自适应调整图连接半径；2）将检测（Type-D）、确认轨迹（Type-T）、丢失轨迹（Type-L）作为不同类型节点，采用专用投影与类型化边关系建模；3）通过遮挡置信度门控每个节点的时间注意力贡献，防止被遮挡节点污染邻域特征。模型端到端训练，使用可微分 Sinkhorn 头结合交叉熵与三元组损失。
AI.result: 在 VisDrone2019-MOT 数据集上，使用理想检测时，HDST-GNN 达到 94.51% MOTA 和 97.24% IDF1，相比 SORT 提升 5.0 MOTA 点，身份切换减少 81%；使用真实 YOLOv8n 检测时，身份切换减少 49%。消融实验验证了各模块独立有效性。
AI.conclusion: HDST-GNN 通过引入异质性建模与动态时空感知机制，在复杂无人机场景下实现了高精度、低身份切换的多目标跟踪性能，为解决实际应用中的遮挡与尺度变化问题提供了有效方案。

title: SciVisAgentSkills: Design and Evaluation of Agent Skills for Scientific Data Analysis and Visualization
summary: Recent advances in agentic visualization have enabled the translation of natural language into executable scientific visualization (SciVis) workflows. While general-purpose coding agents show strong capabilities, they often lack the tool-specific expertise required for SciVis tasks. In this work, we present SciVisAgentSkills, a collection of reusable agent skills that augment coding agents for scientific data analysis and visualization by encoding environment assumptions, tool usage patterns, and domain heuristics across scientific tools such as ParaView, napari, VMD, and TTK. We evaluate these skills on Codex and Claude Code using SciVisAgentBench, a benchmark of 108 expert-designed multi-step tasks. Results show that agent skills improve mean task scores across the evaluated suites, with token-efficiency benefits that depend on the agent harness and tool setting. These findings highlight the importance of structured procedural knowledge for enabling reliable, long-horizon SciVis workflows, while also showing that skills should be studied alongside the execution harness that loads and applies them. The skills are available at https://github.com/KuangshiAi/SciVisAgentSkills.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SciVisAgentSkills，一个可复用的代理技能集合，用于增强编码代理在科学数据可视化（SciVis）任务中的表现。该技能集整合了工具使用模式、环境假设和领域启发式知识，涵盖ParaView、napari、VMD和TTK等科学工具。通过在SciVisAgentBench基准测试上评估Codex和Claude Code，结果显示这些技能显著提升了多步骤任务的平均得分，并带来了依赖于代理和工具设置的令牌效率优势。研究强调了结构化过程知识对实现可靠、长周期SciVis工作流的重要性，同时指出技能需与其执行环境共同研究。
AI.motivation: 现有通用编码代理虽具备强大能力，但在科学可视化任务中缺乏特定工具的专业知识，难以高效完成复杂、多步骤的可视化流程。因此需要引入领域特定的技能来弥补这一不足。
AI.method: 构建一组可复用的代理技能，包含环境假设、工具使用模式和领域启发式规则；将这些技能集成到编码代理中，并在SciVisAgentBench基准上进行评估，比较不同代理与技能组合的表现。
AI.result: 使用技能后，代理在108个专家设计的多步骤任务上的平均任务得分提升；不同代理和工具配置下表现出不同的令牌效率优势，证明了技能对长周期工作流的可靠性与效率具有积极影响。
AI.conclusion: 结构化的程序知识对于实现可靠的、长周期的科学可视化工作流至关重要。代理技能应与执行环境协同研究，以充分发挥其潜力。技能代码已开源。

title: Predictable Scaling Laws of Optimal Hyperparameters for LLM Continued Pre-training
summary: The efficacy of continued pre-training for Large Language Models (LLMs) hinges upon hyperparameter configurations, such as learning rate and batch size. However, current practices often rely on heuristics or grid searches, leading to training instability and excessive costs. In this work, we first empirically discover that optimal hyperparameters follow stable and predictable scaling laws throughout the continued pre-training process. Leveraging these insights, we propose a novel framework to establish quantitative relationships between compute budget and optimal hyperparameters for a given checkpoint.
