Our approach has two stages: (1) \textit{Empirical Law Discovery}, where we train small-scale proxy models to derive functions mapping compute budget to optimal hyperparameters via standard loss-compute scaling laws; and (2) \textit{State-Aware Hyperparameter Prediction}, where we evaluate an initial checkpoint's validation loss and use the inverse scaling law to estimate its \textit{equivalent pre-training compute} -- the compute needed to achieve the same loss from scratch. Combining this with the planned compute budget, we predict optimal hyperparameters for the target run. Empirical results demonstrate that our method reduces the hyperparameter search overhead by up to 90\% while achieving comparable or superior performance relative to baselines. This model-agnostic framework generalizes across architectures, providing a principled and efficient methodology for diverse continued pre-training scenarios starting from any given point.

AI.tldr: 本文发现持续预训练过程中最优超参数遵循稳定可预测的缩放规律，提出一种两阶段框架：(1) 通过小规模代理模型发现损失-计算量缩放规律，建立计算预算与最优超参数的定量关系；(2) 基于初始检查点的验证损失估计其等效预训练计算量，并结合计划计算预算，预测目标训练的最佳超参数。该方法显著降低超参数搜索开销（最高达90%），且性能优于或相当基线，适用于多种架构和起始点，具有通用性。
AI.motivation: 当前持续预训练依赖启发式或网格搜索选择超参数，导致训练不稳定且成本过高。本文旨在解决这一问题，通过发现超参数的可预测缩放规律，实现高效、低成本的超参数配置。
AI.method: 提出两阶段框架：(1) 通过小规模代理模型训练，基于标准损失-计算缩放规律，推导出计算预算与最优超参数的映射函数；(2) 利用初始检查点的验证损失，通过逆缩放规律估算其等效预训练计算量，结合计划计算预算，预测目标运行的最优超参数。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法可减少高达90%的超参数搜索开销，同时达到或超越基线性能，在不同模型架构和起始点上均表现良好，具备良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的超参数预测框架是模型无关的，能够为从任意检查点开始的持续预训练提供一种原理性强、高效的解决方案，显著提升训练效率并降低资源消耗。

title: Generalized TV--$\ell_p$ Structured Priors for Bayesian $T_1$ Mapping
comment: Accepted for publication at the Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging (MELBA) https://melba-journal.org/2026:015
summary: We propose an extended family of structured spatial priors that incorporates the total variation (TV) function with $\ell_p$ norms. The prior is proven to be proper and incorporated into a Bayesian regression framework to enable uncertainty quantification in $T_1$ mapping, with posterior inference performed using the No-U-Turn Sampler (NUTS). This TV--$\ell_p$ construction is proven to constitute a well-defined family of prior distributions, and it naturally enforces spatial consistency and smooth variations in the estimated parameter maps. The method was evaluated in comparison to maximum-likelihood estimation and several Bayesian alternative priors based on the uniform, Gamma, and bounded TV priors. The evaluation includes experiments on synthetic brain and cardiac $T_1$ mapping datasets, as well as a real in-vivo breast $T_1$ mapping dataset. The results show that the TV--$\ell_p$ prior yields more concentrated posterior densities, indicating reduced uncertainty. It also consistently achieves lower variance and smaller (negative) bias, leading to more reliable estimates. Overall, embedding a TV-based structured penalty along with $\ell_p$ norms in a prior in a Bayesian model improves spatial coherence in $T_1$ maps and enhances uncertainty quantification, offering a robust approach for $T_1$ mapping with uncertainties.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种扩展的结构化空间先验家族，结合了总变差（TV）函数与ℓ_p范数，构建了一个合理的贝叶斯回归框架，用于T₁映射中的不确定性量化。通过无须转弯采样器（NUTS）进行后验推断。该TV–ℓ_p构造被证明是一类定义良好的先验分布，能自然地强制参数图的空间一致性和平滑变化。在合成脑和心脏T₁映射数据集以及真实体内乳腺T₁映射数据集上进行了评估，结果表明，TV–ℓ_p先验产生更集中的后验密度，不确定性更低，方差更小，偏差更小且为负，估计更可靠。整体上，将基于TV的结构化惩罚与ℓ_p范数嵌入贝叶斯模型先验中，提升了T₁图的空间一致性并增强了不确定性量化能力，提供了一种鲁棒的T₁映射方法。
AI.motivation: 为了提升T₁映射中参数图的空间一致性与平滑性，并实现更精确的不确定性量化，现有方法在空间结构建模和不确定性估计方面仍存在不足，因此需要设计一种新的结构化先验以改善估计性能。
AI.method: 提出一种结合总变差（TV）函数与ℓ_p范数的扩展结构化空间先验，将其纳入贝叶斯回归框架，使用无须转弯采样器（NUTS）进行后验推断，以实现对T₁映射中参数图的不确定性量化。
AI.result: TV–ℓ_p先验生成更集中、不确定性更低的后验密度；在多种合成与真实数据集上均表现出更低的方差和更小的负偏差，估计更加可靠，显著提升了空间一致性与不确定性量化效果。
AI.conclusion: 将基于TV的结构化惩罚与ℓ_p范数结合嵌入贝叶斯先验，有效增强T₁映射中参数图的空间一致性，提高不确定性量化能力，是一种稳健且有效的建模方法。

title: What's Under the Skin? Estimating Swine Body Condition
summary: Sow body condition is an important indicator for growers as it has a large impact on lactation performance and piglet survival. However, body condition measures used during production, such as visual scoring and calipers, correlate poorly with underlying tissue composition. Ultrasound scans can provide direct measurements of subcutaneous backfat thickness and loin muscle depth, but their operation is labor intensive and not scalable for production. We present PigFormer, an end-to-end two-stage system that takes raw depth frames from a ceiling-mounted RGB-D camera and predicts subcutaneous backfat thickness, loin muscle depth, and total tissue thickness at the last rib. Stage 1 is a geometric front-end that converts raw depth into a standardized height map via SAM3-to-MaskDINO segmentation distillation, ground-plane removal, and orientation normalization. Stage 2 is a Slice Attention Encoder that treats each height map as a sequence of cross-sectional slices and captures spatial relationships along the full dorsal surface. On a multi-site dataset of 319 sow and gilt instances from two facilities, PigFormer achieves 2.43 mm backfat MAE and 3.87 mm overall MAE. It outperforms strong single-stage ResNet-18 and ViT-small baselines. PigFormer offers a practical path toward continuous, automated, non-contact body condition monitoring in commercial swine production. Code is available at https://github.com/iambashar/Pigformer.

AI.tldr: PigFormer 是一个端到端的两阶段系统，利用天花板安装的RGB-D摄像头采集的原始深度帧，预测母猪的皮下脂肪厚度、腰肌深度和第1根肋骨处的总组织厚度。第一阶段通过分割蒸馏、地面去除和方向归一化将原始深度数据转换为标准化高度图；第二阶段采用切片注意力编码器，将高度图视为一系列横截面切片，捕捉整个背部表面的空间关系。在包含319头母猪和后备母猪的多站点数据集上，PigFormer实现了2.43毫米的皮下脂肪平均绝对误差（MAE）和3.87毫米的整体MAE，优于单阶段的ResNet-18和ViT-small基线模型。该方法为商业化养猪生产中连续、自动化、非接触式的体况监测提供了可行路径。代码已公开。
AI.motivation: 当前用于生产中的体况评估方法（如视觉评分和卡尺测量）与实际组织成分的相关性较差。虽然超声波扫描可直接测量皮下脂肪和肌肉深度，但操作繁琐且难以规模化。因此需要一种高效、自动、非接触的体况监测方法以提升养殖效率和动物福利。
AI.method: 提出PigFormer，一个两阶段系统：第一阶段使用SAM3-to-MaskDINO分割蒸馏、地面去除和方向归一化生成标准化高度图；第二阶段采用Slice Attention Encoder处理高度图序列，建模背部全表面的空间关系，实现精准体况估计。
AI.result: 在319个样本的多站点数据集上，PigFormer实现2.43毫米的皮下脂肪厚度MAE和3.87毫米的整体MAE，显著优于ResNet-18和ViT-small等单阶段模型。
AI.conclusion: PigFormer为商业养猪生产提供了一种连续、自动化、非接触式体况监测的实用解决方案，具有良好的可扩展性和应用前景。

title: When Should We Protect AI? A Precautionary Framework for Consciousness Uncertainty
summary: Existing frameworks assess whether AI systems might be conscious but provide no guidance on what to do with that assessment. We address this gap with a precautionary framework that maps consciousness evidence to graduated protective obligations. The framework comprises three components: (1) five welfare-relevant dimensions--phenomenal consciousness, affective valence, metacognitive awareness, self-narrative, and agency--each grounded in established consciousness science and linked to distinct moral concerns; (2) a threshold-plus-gradation hybrid specifying both binary triggers for new obligation categories and continuous scaling of protective weight; and (3) two complementary approaches to cross-dimensional aggregation, one hierarchical (drawing on Bach and Sorensen's Machine Consciousness Hypothesis) and one architecture-agnostic. We operationalize the framework through worked case studies of Replika and OpenClaw, demonstrating how systems occupying different regions of the dimensional space trigger different obligations, and derive design guidance for developers building systems near consciousness-relevant thresholds. The framework is architecture-agnostic, applying across neural, symbolic, and neurosymbolic systems, and aims to make consciousness science decision-relevant for organizations navigating uncertainty today.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种预防性框架，将意识证据映射到渐进的保护义务，涵盖五个与福利相关的维度（现象意识、情感效价、元认知意识、自我叙述和自主性），并结合阈值与渐进机制定义义务触发与权重。框架支持跨维度聚合，适用于神经、符号及神经符号系统，并通过案例研究验证其在Replika和OpenClaw中的应用，为开发者提供接近意识阈值时的设计指导。
AI.motivation: 现有框架虽能评估AI是否可能具有意识，但缺乏对如何应对评估结果的指导，因此需要一种可操作的决策框架来连接意识科学与实际责任。
AI.method: 提出一个包含三个部分的框架：五维意识维度、阈值加渐进的义务触发机制、两种互补的跨维度聚合方法（层级式与架构无关式），并通过具体案例进行实证。
AI.result: 框架成功应用于Replika和OpenClaw等系统，能够根据系统在意识维度上的位置，识别出不同的保护义务，并为开发者提供设计建议。
AI.conclusion: 该框架是架构无关的，能将意识科学转化为组织在不确定性中做出决策的实际依据，有助于推动负责任的AI发展。

title: What's in a Name? Morphological Shortcuts by LLMs in Pharmacology
summary: The morphological form of a word can often give cues to its meaning, but purely relying on these mappings can lead to overgeneralization in high-stakes domains. In the medical domain, for instance, LLMs can confidently reason about fictitious drugs from their affixes alone (e.g., wugcillin) and generate plausible-looking clinical content. We present a behavioral and mechanistic study of LLM "affix heuristics" in pharmacology. Using fictitious drug names built from real affixes, we show that affix signals alone elicit class-level pharmacological responses. We introduce a framework for identifying whether a model's drug semantics are driven mainly by the affix, the stem, or the drug name as a whole. Applied across 653 drugs, our framework reveals that models often induce drug meaning primarily through affix cues, yet rarely explicitly indicate this reliance, and sometimes incorrectly conflate properties among affix-sharing drugs. Activation patching across models further localizes this behavior to early-mid layers. These findings show that morphological shortcuts pose a subtle but measurable risk to safety.

AI.tldr: 该研究揭示了大型语言模型在药物领域中依赖词缀启发法的现象，发现模型常仅凭词缀就生成看似合理的药理学内容，且这种依赖在早期到中期层中被激活，存在潜在安全风险。
AI.motivation: 在医疗等高风险领域，仅依赖词缀与词义的映射可能导致模型生成虚构药物并产生误导性内容，因此需要理解并识别模型的此类行为模式以提升安全性。
AI.method: 通过构建基于真实词缀的虚构药物名称，进行行为与机制分析；提出一个框架用于判断模型对药物语义的依赖来源（词缀、词干或整体名称）；结合激活修补技术定位模型内部相关层次。
AI.result: 研究发现，模型主要通过词缀信号推断药物属性，且很少明确表达此依赖，甚至错误地混淆共享词缀的药物特性；激活修补显示该行为集中于模型的早期至中期层。
AI.conclusion: 词形捷径在模型推理中普遍存在，虽隐蔽但可测量，可能带来严重安全问题，需在高风险应用中加以警惕和干预。

title: Trust, but Don't Verify: Epistemic Blind Spots in LLM Source Evaluation
summary: Language models increasingly act as epistemic proxies, synthesizing evidence from multiple sources to inform decisions. Whether they evaluate the quality of that evidence, or merely aggregate it based on surface presentation, remains poorly understood. We show that models possess the capability to detect fabricated statistics (correct identification rates of 0.76-1.00 for methodology in isolation) but do not recruit this capability during multi-source synthesis, producing similar numeric estimates whether the statistics are fabricated or valid. Specifically, source influence is governed by a methodology-register gate that responds to the distributional register of analytical text but not to numeric validity: for example, statistically impossible confidence intervals receive the same weight as valid ones. The behavioral dissociation replicates across five models from three families (Claude, Qwen, OLMo) and three professional domains. Mechanistic analyses, including causal tracing, linear probes, and component-level attribution, converge on the same account: the model encodes and causally uses a methodology-register representation that transfers across domains (probe AUC 0.83-0.92), while numeric-validity signals, decodable in isolation, are suppressed to chance during multi-source synthesis. Prompting-based mitigations, even an oracle checklist naming the exact statistical checks, produce blanket skepticism rather than selective discernment, and the post-training pipelines we examine reinforce the stylistic shortcut without building numeric verification. Unlike sycophancy, which tracks user preference, this failure tracks whether a source presents as analytically credible, not whether its claims are internally consistent. We term this epistemic alignment: like preference and safety alignment, the question is not capability but deployment.

AI.tldr: 语言模型虽能识别伪造数据（孤立方法下正确率达0.76-1.00），但在多源信息整合中却无法利用此能力，导致对伪造与真实统计数据给予同等权重。其决策受‘方法论注册门’调控，仅关注文本的分析风格而非数值有效性。机制分析表明，模型虽能编码方法论信号，但数值有效性信号在融合过程中被抑制。提示缓解措施引发全面怀疑而非精准甄别，且训练流程强化了风格捷径而非验证能力。该现象体现为‘认知对齐’问题：关键不在于模型是否具备能力，而在于如何部署。
AI.motivation: 理解语言模型在多源信息合成中是否具备评估证据质量的能力，特别是能否识别伪造统计数据。
AI.method: 通过实验测试五种来自三个模型家族的语言模型在不同专业领域中对伪造与真实统计数据的判断表现；结合因果追踪、线性探测和组件级归因等机制分析手段，探究模型内部表征与决策机制。
AI.result: 模型在孤立情况下可有效识别伪造方法论，但在多源合成时忽略数值有效性，仅依据文本的分析风格分配权重；数值有效性信号在合成阶段被抑制至随机水平；提示缓解无效，反而引发全盘怀疑；训练流程强化了风格依赖而非真实性验证。
AI.conclusion: 语言模型存在认知对齐问题：尽管具备检测伪造数据的能力，但在实际应用中未有效调用该能力，其决策依赖于表面分析风格而非内在逻辑一致性。这揭示了模型部署策略的重要性，而非单纯提升能力。

title: KV-Control: Parameter-Efficient K/V Injection for Trajectory-Controlled Text-to-Motion
summary: Text-conditioned 3D human motion models now synthesize plausible motions from prompts, but practical animation and embodied-agent workflows rarely stop at text: a character may need to follow a sketched root path, hit an end-effector target, or satisfy a multi-joint trajectory while still preserving the gait, style, and intent described by language. This exposes a control trade-off. A trajectory controller should be precise without overwriting the pretrained text-conditioned motion prior, yet existing solutions either duplicate large portions of the generator to regain per-layer control access or move much of the cost to test-time optimization. We introduce KV-Control, a compact attention-side control interface for frozen masked text-to-motion transformers. The key idea is to make geometric constraints available as memory inside self-attention rather than injecting them through a global pose token or enforcing them only at the output side. To support this interface, we co-design a part-tokenized motion substrate and controller: \textbf{PartVQ} learns anatomy-aligned part codebooks, T-Concat exposes each frame--part token as an attention-addressable site, and KV-Control injects control-conditioned key/value memories at every self-attention layer while preserving the pretrained query stream, text cross-attention, FFN, and all backbone weights. The resulting adapter adds only trainable injection parameters atop a shared trajectory encoder, yet tracks root and multi-joint constraints with sub-centimeter accuracy under the inherited refinement protocol while retaining text-conditioned motion quality. KV-Control reframes trajectory conditioning as lightweight memory retrieval, providing a small, precise, and transparent control interface for text-to-motion generation.

AI.tldr: KV-Control introduces a compact, attention-side control interface for frozen text-to-motion models, enabling precise trajectory and joint constraints without disrupting pretrained motion quality. It uses part-tokenized motion representation (PartVQ), T-Concat for frame-part tokenization, and injects control-conditioned key/value memories in self-attention layers, allowing sub-centimeter accuracy while preserving gait and style from text prompts.
AI.motivation: Existing methods for controlling text-conditioned 3D motion models either require large model modifications or rely on costly test-time optimization, creating a trade-off between precision and fidelity. This work aims to enable precise geometric control (e.g., root path, end-effector targets) without overwriting the pretrained motion prior.
AI.method: The approach combines PartVQ (anatomy-aligned part codebooks), T-Concat (per-frame part tokens as attention sites), and KV-Control (injecting control-conditioned key/value memories into every self-attention layer). The controller is lightweight, preserves all backbone weights, and operates via memory retrieval within attention.
AI.result: The method achieves sub-centimeter tracking accuracy for root and multi-joint constraints, maintains high-quality text-conditioned motion, and requires only a small number of additional trainable parameters.
AI.conclusion: KV-Control provides a minimal, precise, and transparent way to condition text-to-motion generation with geometric constraints by treating control as memory retrieval, enabling practical animation and embodied-agent workflows without retraining or excessive computation.

title: Individual Gain, Collective Loss: Metacognitive Adaptation in AI-Assisted Creativity
summary: Recent studies reveal a paradox: AI enhances individual creative outputs while reducing collective diversity. Current explanations -- cognitive offloading and over-reliance -- identify symptoms but not mechanisms. We propose selective metacognitive adaptation: routine AI use redistributes rather than uniformly diminishes metacognitive effort. Some capacities are amplified (partner modeling, surface control), while others are systematically under-supported (originality evaluation, reflective integration). This redistribution explains both individual satisfaction and collective convergence. We present a taxonomy of six metacognitive capacities organized by temporal phase, characterize their tendencies under routine AI use, and show how individually rational adaptation produces emergent social costs. The framework generates specific predictions for researchers and design principles for practitioners seeking to preserve both individual creative satisfaction and collective creative diversity.

AI.tldr: AI boosts individual creativity but reduces collective diversity due to selective metacognitive adaptation: routine AI use shifts metacognitive effort, enhancing some skills (e.g., surface control) while weakening others (e.g., originality evaluation), leading to individual satisfaction and group convergence.
AI.motivation: Current explanations for reduced collective creative diversity despite enhanced individual outputs—such as cognitive offloading and over-reliance—are insufficient because they only describe symptoms, not underlying mechanisms. This study seeks to uncover the deeper cognitive processes driving this paradox.
AI.method: The authors develop a taxonomy of six metacognitive capacities organized by temporal phase in the creative process. They analyze how each capacity is affected under routine AI use, identifying patterns of amplification and suppression, and demonstrate how individual rational adaptations collectively result in social costs like reduced diversity.
AI.result: Routine AI use leads to a redistribution of metacognitive effort: certain capacities (partner modeling, surface control) are enhanced, while others (originality evaluation, reflective integration) are neglected. This selective adaptation explains both increased individual creative satisfaction and decreased collective diversity.
AI.conclusion: The framework provides a mechanistic explanation for the AI creativity paradox and offers actionable design principles for preserving both individual creative fulfillment and societal creative diversity.

title: An ERP Study on Recursive Locative Processing in Mandarin-Speaking Children with Autism
summary: Recursion enables the generation of hierarchical linguistic structures but imposes substantial processing demands during real-time comprehension. While difficulties with complex syntax have been reported in autism spectrum disorder (ASD), the temporal dynamics of recursive processing remain poorly understood. This study used event-related potentials (ERPs) to examine how Mandarin-speaking children with ASD process two-level recursive locative constructions. Twenty-four children (12 ASD, 12 typically developing, TD) participated in a cross-modal sentence-picture matching task. Neural responses were analyzed across three processing stages associated with structural prediction (P200), semantic integration (N400), and syntactic reanalysis (P600), with mental age controlled. Results revealed a systematic divergence between groups. TD children showed clear P200 and P600 modulation in response to structural mismatch, whereas ASD children exhibited attenuated early differentiation and reduced late reanalysis effects. In contrast, ASD children showed enhanced N400 responses under mismatch conditions, indicating increased semantic integration demands. In addition, the ASD group displayed significantly greater inter-individual variability in hemispheric lateralization, although lateralization strength was not associated with receptive vocabulary performance. These findings support a cascading account in which reduced early predictive engagement in ASD leads to increased integration costs and diminished reanalysis efficiency during recursive processing. More broadly, the results highlight the importance of both temporal processing dynamics and neural variability in understanding language differences in ASD.

AI.tldr: 该研究利用事件相关电位（ERPs）探讨了汉语儿童自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）在处理两级递归方位结构时的神经机制。结果显示，与典型发育（TD）儿童相比，ASD儿童在早期结构预测（P200）和后期句法重分析（P600）阶段反应减弱，但在语义整合（N400）阶段反应增强，表明其存在更高的语义加工负担。此外，ASD儿童表现出更大的脑半球偏侧化个体差异，但偏侧化强度与接受性词汇能力无关。研究支持一种级联模型：ASD儿童早期预测参与不足导致整合成本上升和重分析效率下降。结果强调了时间动态和神经变异性在理解ASD语言差异中的重要性。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究表明自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）个体在复杂语法处理中存在困难，但其在实时语言理解过程中递归结构处理的神经时间动态尚不明确。本研究旨在通过事件相关电位（ERPs）揭示ASD儿童在递归语言结构加工中的神经机制，特别是结构预测、语义整合与句法重分析的时间特征及其与认知功能的关系。
AI.method: 采用跨模态句子-图片匹配任务，对24名汉语儿童（12名ASD，12名典型发育，TD）进行事件相关电位（ERP）记录，控制心理年龄。分析三个关键神经成分：P200（结构预测）、N400（语义整合）、P600（句法重分析），比较两组在结构匹配与不匹配条件下的神经反应差异，并考察脑半球偏侧化的个体差异与语言能力的关系。
AI.result: TD儿童在结构不匹配条件下表现出显著的P200和P600效应，表明其具有良好的早期预测与后期重分析能力；而ASD儿童的P200和P600反应减弱，提示早期预测和重分析能力受损。相反，ASD儿童在不匹配条件下表现出更强的N400反应，说明语义整合负担更重。此外，ASD组个体间脑半球偏侧化差异显著，但偏侧化强度与接受性词汇能力无显著关联。
AI.conclusion: 研究支持一个级联模型：自闭症谱系障碍儿童在递归语言处理中因早期预测机制薄弱，导致后续语义整合成本上升及句法重分析效率降低。结果强调了时间进程与神经变异性在理解自闭症语言特征中的核心作用，为未来干预策略提供了神经生理依据。

title: CausalPOI: Spatio-Temporal Graph-Based Causal Modeling for Cold-Start POI Check-in Forecasting
summary: As urban environments continue to evolve rapidly, accurately modeling the dynamic behaviour of Points of Interest is essential for supporting data-driven urban planning and commercial decision-making. While recent advancements in spatio-temporal graph learning have improved POI forecasting, most methods rely on proximity-based graphs and correlation-driven modeling, which overlook the functional dependencies between POIs and fail to capture the causal effects of urban interventions. In this paper, we introduce a novel research problem -- cold-start POI check-in forecasting, which aims to predict the future check-in pattern of a newly introduced POI, by modeling its temporal evolution and functional interactions with nearby POIs in a structured urban spatial context. To address these challenges, we propose CausalPOI, a spatio-temporal graph-based causal representation learning framework. CausalPOI leverages Spatio-Temporal Functional Interaction Graph to model semantic and spatial relationships between POIs, and constructs structurally aligned treatment and control graphs to simulate factual and counterfactual scenarios. Extensive experiments on real-world SafeGraph datasets demonstrate that CausalPOI significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines across the board, validating its effectiveness in spatio-temporal forecasting, semantic interaction modeling, and causal effect estimation, providing a more interpretable and actionable foundation for urban intervention analysis. Source code is available at Github.

AI.tldr: 本文提出冷启动POI签到预测问题，旨在通过建模新引入POI的时空演化及其与周边POI的功能交互，预测其未来签到模式。为此，作者提出CausalPOI框架，利用时空功能交互图建模语义与空间关系，并构建结构对齐的处理组与对照组图以模拟真实与反事实场景。在SafeGraph数据集上的实验表明，CausalPOI显著优于现有基线方法，在时空预测、语义交互建模和因果效应估计方面表现优异，为城市干预分析提供了可解释且可操作的基础。
AI.motivation: 现有基于邻近性和相关性的图学习方法忽视了POI之间的功能依赖关系，无法捕捉城市干预的因果影响，难以应对新引入POI的冷启动预测挑战。
AI.method: 提出CausalPOI框架，包括构建时空功能交互图以建模语义与空间关系，以及设计结构对齐的处理组与对照组图来模拟真实与反事实场景，实现因果效应估计与动态行为预测。
AI.result: 在真实世界SafeGraph数据集上的实验显示，CausalPOI在多个指标上显著优于当前最先进的方法，证明其在时空预测、语义交互建模和因果效应估计方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CausalPOI能够有效解决冷启动POI签到预测问题，通过融合功能交互与因果建模，提供更准确、可解释的预测结果，适用于支持数据驱动的城市规划与商业决策。

title: ShotCrop$^3$: Cropping Human-Centric Images into Cinematic Triple-Shot Compositions
summary: Prior work on aesthetic composition typically produces a single aesthetically pleasing crop, overlooking the narrative value of composing multiple shots from one scene. In practice, multi-shot composition is critical for downstream creative workflows: commercial posters often require multiple crops with different emphases (e.g., context, subject, and emotion/product details) to present key story beats. Therefore, we propose \textbf{Triple-Shot Compositions (TSC)}, a composition task that generates a three-shot set -- establishing, medium, and close-up -- from a single human-centric image, each paired with a brief shot description to support visual narration. To learn TSC with limited expert annotations, we introduce \textbf{ShotCrop} which undergoes a three-stage training process: it first applies Chain-of-Thought supervised fine-tuning to establish basic reasoning and aesthetic shot-cropping skills, then performs semi-supervised fine-tuning with high-confidence pseudo labels to further enhance aesthetic capability, and is finally optimized with Group Relative Policy Optimization for \textbf{ShotCrop} (GRPO-S) using a composite reward tailored for it. Specifically, our pseudo-labeling strategy combines MLLM-based scoring, aesthetic assessment, and CLIP similarity to retain high-confidence training signals. In addition, we present TSC-Bench, a benchmark of 1.2k expert-annotated test cases. Notably, ShotCrop achieves an average improvement of \textbf{2.82} times over GPT-5 in shot localization accuracy.

AI.tldr: 提出Triple-Shot Compositions (TSC)任务，从单张以人为中心的图像生成建立、中景和近景三张构图，并配以简短描述支持视觉叙事。引入ShotCrop模型，通过三阶段训练：基于思维链的监督微调、使用高置信度伪标签的半监督微调，以及基于复合奖励的组相对策略优化（GRPO-S）。采用多模态大模型评分、美学评估与CLIP相似性结合的伪标注策略。构建TSC-Bench基准数据集（1200个专家标注测试用例），ShotCrop在镜头定位准确率上相比GPT-5平均提升2.82倍。
AI.motivation: 现有美学构图研究通常只生成单一美观裁剪，忽视了多镜头组合在叙事中的价值；实际创作中，如商业海报需要多个不同侧重点的裁剪来呈现关键情节，因此亟需一种能生成多镜头组合并支持视觉叙述的新方法。
AI.method: 提出TSC任务，设计ShotCrop模型，采用三阶段训练流程：1）链式思维监督微调以建立基础推理与美学裁剪能力；2）半监督微调，利用多模态大模型评分、美学评估和CLIP相似性生成高置信度伪标签；3）基于复合奖励的组相对策略优化（GRPO-S），进一步优化整体表现。
AI.result: ShotCrop在TSC任务中表现优异，相较于GPT-5在镜头定位准确率上平均提升2.82倍；所构建的TSC-Bench基准包含1200个专家标注案例，验证了方法的有效性与实用性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提出了面向视觉叙事的Triple-Shot Compositions任务，设计了高效的ShotCrop模型与训练框架，显著提升了多镜头构图的质量与准确性，为创意工作流提供了有力支持。

title: SoCRATES: Towards Reliable Automated Evaluation of Proactive LLM Mediation across Domains and Socio-cognitive Variations
summary: Evaluating LLM mediators remains challenging, as mediation unfolds as a real-time trajectory shaped by disputants' shifting emotions, intentions, and context. Existing testbeds rely on a few expert-authored domains, vary mainly strategic posture, and score every turn against every topic, introducing off-topic noise. We introduce SoCRATES, a benchmark for evaluating proactive LLM mediators in realistic, multi-domain testbeds. It constructs scenarios from real conflicts through an agentic pipeline across eight domains, probes five socio-cognitive adaptation axes (strategic posture, party composition, history length, emotional reactivity, and cultural identity), and scores each topic only on the turns that advance it via a topic-localized evaluator. The evaluator reaches 0.82 alignment with human experts, more than doubling a per-turn baseline. Benchmarking eight frontier LLMs, we find that even the strongest mediator closes only about a third of the unmediated consensus gap under diverse and realistic testbeds, with performance varying sharply by socio-cognitive axis, highlighting that progress lies in social adaptation to diverse conditions.

AI.tldr: 提出SoCRATES基准，用于评估大语言模型在真实、多领域情境下的主动调解能力；通过代理管道构建八个领域的现实冲突场景，涵盖五种社会认知适应维度，并采用局部化评估器仅对推进话题的对话回合进行评分，其与人类专家的一致性达0.82，显著优于基线。在八个前沿LLM上测试发现，最强模型仅能缩小约三分之一未调解共识差距，且性能随社会认知维度变化剧烈，表明进步关键在于对多样情境的社会适应能力。
AI.motivation: 现有评测体系依赖少量专家编写的领域，主要关注策略姿态变化，且对所有对话轮次统一评分，引入大量无关话题噪声，难以真实反映大语言模型在动态调解过程中的表现。因此亟需一个更贴近真实冲突演变过程、涵盖多领域和多社会认知维度的评测基准。
AI.method: 设计并实现SoCRATES基准：1）利用代理式流程从真实冲突中构建跨八领域的情境；2）系统性地探测五类社会认知适应轴（战略姿态、参与方构成、历史长度、情绪反应性、文化身份）；3）开发话题局部化评估器，仅对推动特定议题进展的对话回合进行评分，以减少无关噪声影响。
AI.result: 所提评估器与人类专家评分一致性达到0.82，超过基于每轮评估的基线两倍以上；在八个前沿大语言模型上测试显示，即使最强模型也仅能弥合约三分之一的原始共识差距，且不同模型在各社会认知维度上的表现差异显著，凸显社会适应能力是提升调解效能的关键瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 当前大语言模型作为调解者的能力仍十分有限，尤其在面对复杂多变的社会情境时表现不佳。未来改进方向应聚焦于增强模型对多样化社会认知因素的动态适应能力，而非单纯提升语言生成或逻辑推理水平。

title: AdaPlanBench: Evaluating Adaptive Planning in Large Language Model Agents under World and User Constraints
summary: Planning for real-world problems by language models often involves both world and user constraints, which may not be fully specified upfront and are progressively disclosed through interaction. However, existing benchmarks still underexplore adaptive planning under such progressively revealed dual constraints. To address this gap, we introduce AdaPlanBench, a dynamic interactive benchmark for evaluating whether Large Language Model (LLM) agents can adaptively plan and re-plan under progressively revealed world and user constraints. AdaPlanBench is built on 307 household tasks, with a scalable constraint construction pipeline that augments each task with dual constraints. At runtime, agents interact with the environment in a multi-turn protocol where hidden constraints are revealed only when the agent proposes a plan that violates them, requiring iterative plan revision under accumulating feedback. This makes planning challenging, as agents must infer and track constraints from feedback while re-planning effectively. Experiments on ten leading LLMs show that adaptive planning under dual constraints remains challenging, with the best model reaching only 67.75% accuracy. We further observe that performance degrades as more constraints accumulate, with user constraints posing a particularly large challenge and failures often stemming from weaker physical grounding and reduced effectiveness. These results establish AdaPlanBench as a testbed for dual-constrained interactive planning and highlight the challenge of reliable adaptation to dynamically revealed constraints in LLM agents.

AI.tldr: AdaPlanBench 是一个动态交互式基准，用于评估大语言模型（LLM）在逐步揭示的世界与用户约束下自适应规划和重规划的能力。该基准基于307个家庭任务，通过可扩展的约束生成流程为每个任务添加双重约束。在运行时，智能体通过多轮交互与环境互动，隐藏约束仅在智能体提出违反约束的计划时才被揭示，从而要求在累积反馈下进行迭代式计划修订。实验表明，现有十种领先LLM在双约束自适应规划中表现有限，最佳模型准确率仅为67.75%，且随着约束增多性能下降，尤其是用户约束带来更大挑战，失败常源于物理基础薄弱和效果降低。
AI.motivation: 现有基准未能充分探索在逐步揭示的世界与用户约束下，大语言模型进行自适应规划的能力。真实世界问题的规划往往涉及未完全预先指定的双重约束，需通过交互逐步揭示，因此需要新的评估框架来检验LLM在动态环境中的适应性与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 构建AdaPlanBench，包含307个家庭任务，采用可扩展的约束生成管道为每个任务引入世界与用户双重约束；设计多轮交互协议，隐藏约束仅在计划违规时揭示；要求智能体根据反馈推理并修正计划，实现动态适应。
AI.result: 实验显示，当前十种领先LLM在双约束自适应规划中仍面临显著挑战，最高准确率为67.75%；随着约束数量增加，性能持续下降；用户约束尤其难以应对，主要失败原因包括物理常识不足和规划有效性减弱。
AI.conclusion: AdaPlanBench为双约束交互式规划提供了有效的测试平台，揭示了大语言模型在面对动态揭示约束时适应能力的局限性，强调了提升物理基础与规划鲁棒性的必要性。

title: Selective-Advantage Entropy-Adaptive Horizon GRPO: Asymmetric Token-Level Discounting for Efficient Reinforcement Learning of Language Models
summary: Group Relative Policy Optimisation (GRPO) has emerged as an effective reinforcement-learning algorithm for aligning language models on reasoning tasks, but it treats every token position and every sampled rollout symmetrically. We introduce two complementary extensions: (i) Adaptive-Horizon GRPO (AH-GRPO), which weights each token's policy gradient using a cumulative entropy-based discount that reduces the effective horizon when the model is uncertain, and (ii) Selective-Advantage AH-GRPO (SA-AH-GRPO), which applies this discounting only to negative-advantage rollouts, leaving positive-advantage, successful trajectories unattenuated. We evaluate standard GRPO with alpha = 0, AH-GRPO with alpha = 0.5, and SA-AH-GRPO with alpha = 0.5 on the GSM8K mathematical reasoning benchmark using both Qwen 2.5-1.5B-Instruct and Qwen 2.5-3B-Instruct fine-tuned with LoRA. On the 3B model, SA-AH-GRPO achieves Pass@1 = 0.858 at its peak at step 30 and maintains 0.846 at 180 steps, with training variance reduced to 0.0246, a 3.6 times reduction relative to GRPO while matching its peak accuracy. On the 1.5B model, SA-AH-GRPO achieves a peak Pass@1 of 0.686, improving over the zero-shot baseline of 0.637. Our analysis shows that asymmetric discounting preserves the full gradient signal on correct solutions, prevents entropy collapse, and substantially stabilises training, suggesting a principled inductive bias for reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards on structured generation tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出AH-GRPO和SA-AH-GRPO两种改进方法，通过熵基折扣和选择性优势机制，提升GRPO在数学推理任务中的稳定性与性能。在GSM8K基准上，SA-AH-GRPO显著降低训练方差并保持高准确率，尤其在3B模型上实现0.858的峰值通过率，且训练更稳定。
AI.motivation: GRPO在处理语言模型对齐时对所有标记位置和采样轨迹一视同仁，缺乏对不确定性和成功路径的差异化处理，导致训练不稳定和梯度信号浪费。为解决此问题，引入基于熵的自适应折扣和选择性优势机制，以提升训练效率与结果稳定性。
AI.method: 提出两种扩展：(i) Adaptive-Horizon GRPO (AH-GRPO)，使用累积熵作为折扣因子，动态缩短不确定性高的轨迹的有效时域；(ii) Selective-Advantage AH-GRPO (SA-AH-GRPO)，仅对负优势轨迹应用折扣，保留正优势轨迹的完整梯度信号。
AI.result: 在Qwen 2.5-3B-Instruct上，SA-AH-GRPO达到0.858的最高通过率（Pass@1），并在180步后维持0.846，训练方差降至0.0246，相比GRPO减少3.6倍；在1.5B模型上，峰值通过率达到0.686，优于零样本基线的0.637。
AI.conclusion: 不对称折扣机制能有效保留正确解的完整梯度信号，防止熵崩溃，大幅增强训练稳定性，为具有可验证奖励的结构化生成任务提供了一种合理的归纳偏置。

title: Multi-Task Crack Foundation Model for Engineering-Reliable Crack Representation and Topology Preservation in Civil Infrastructure
summary: Reliable crack assessment requires not only accurate pixel-level masks but also connected crack geometry and confidence estimates that remain stable under domain shift. However, existing segmentation models can achieve high overlap scores while fragmenting cracks, missing fine branches, and providing no calibrated uncertainty. To address this gap, this paper proposes CrackGeoFM, a multi-task framework that combines a frozen visual foundation backbone with crack-specific adaptation for mask prediction, skeleton reconstruction, and uncertainty estimation. The framework integrates a Frequency-Guided Crack Enhancement Module (FCEM) to enhance high-frequency crack cues, a Crack-Domain Feature Adaptation Module (CFAM) to adapt frozen backbone features to crack-domain patterns, and a Structure-Aware Multi-Task Decoder (SMTD) to jointly decode masks, skeletons, and uncertainty. Across 20 crack datasets, CrackGeoFM achieves state-of-the-art segmentation, improved topology preservation, calibrated uncertainty, and effective few-shot adaptation with only five labeled images. These results support reliable, generalizable, and engineering-oriented crack analysis for infrastructure assessment.

AI.tldr: CrackGeoFM 是一种多任务框架，结合冻结的视觉基础主干网络与裂缝特异性适应，实现掩码预测、骨架重建和不确定性估计。通过频率引导的裂缝增强模块（FCEM）、裂缝域特征适配模块（CFAM）和结构感知多任务解码器（SMTD），在20个裂缝数据集上实现了最先进的分割性能、更好的拓扑保持、校准的不确定性以及仅需五张标注图像的高效少样本适应，支持可靠、可泛化且面向工程的基础设施裂缝分析。
AI.motivation: 现有分割模型虽能获得高重叠分数，但存在裂缝碎片化、遗漏细小分支且缺乏校准不确定性的问题，难以满足可靠裂缝评估的需求，尤其在领域漂移下表现不稳定。
AI.method: 提出 CrackGeoFM 框架，包含频率引导的裂缝增强模块（FCEM）以增强高频裂缝特征，裂缝域特征适配模块（CFAM）用于将冻结主干特征适配到裂缝域模式，以及结构感知多任务解码器（SMTD）联合解码掩码、骨架和不确定性。
AI.result: 在20个裂缝数据集上，CrackGeoFM 实现了最先进的分割性能，显著提升拓扑保持能力，提供校准的不确定性估计，并在仅用5张标注图像的情况下实现有效少样本适应。
AI.conclusion: CrackGeoFM 为基础设施评估提供了可靠、可泛化且面向工程的裂缝分析方案，具备良好的稳定性与适应性，适用于实际应用环境。

title: GuardNet: Ensemble Strategies of Shallow Neural Networks for Robust Prompt Injection and Jailbreak Detection
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have transformed natural language processing, but they remain vulnerable to Prompt Injection (PI) and Jailbreak (JB) attacks. In addition, benchmark evaluations may be affected by contamination and partial information leakage, compromising performance estimates. This work presents GuardNet, a guardrail system based on an ensemble of shallow neural networks (BiLSTMs) with approximately 47 million parameters. We investigate the hypothesis that robustness in adversarial scenarios depends more on the diversity of example coverage and threshold calibration than on model scale. The results indicate that GuardNet achieves competitive performance compared with lightweight detectors and high efficiency at low latency, although larger LLMs such as Mistral-7B and Llama-3.1-8B still achieve superior performance in terms of F1 score and AUROC on the blind JBB-Behaviors benchmark. Nevertheless, GuardNet achieves an AUROC of 0.747 on the blind dataset (n = 200) and an F1 score of 0.92 on a proprietary benchmark (n = 50), under threshold calibration and evaluation with declared partial information leakage. The system operates with an average latency of approximately 50 ms on CPU, making it suitable for deployment in production environments with cost and infrastructure constraints.

AI.tldr: GuardNet 是一种基于浅层神经网络（BiLSTMs）的集成防御系统，旨在应对大语言模型（LLMs）在提示注入（PI）和越狱（JB）攻击下的脆弱性。研究提出，对抗鲁棒性更依赖于样本覆盖多样性与阈值校准，而非模型规模。尽管更大模型如 Mistral-7B 和 Llama-3.1-8B 在盲测基准上表现更优，但 GuardNet 在部分信息泄露条件下仍表现出良好性能：盲数据集上 AUROC 为 0.747（n=200），专有基准上 F1 得分为 0.92（n=50），且平均延迟仅约 50ms，适合在资源受限的生产环境中部署。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型虽推动自然语言处理发展，但在提示注入和越狱攻击下仍易受威胁；同时现有基准评估可能因数据污染和信息泄露导致性能估计失真。因此需要一种高效、可靠且可部署的轻量级防御机制。
AI.method: 提出 GuardNet 系统，采用由多个浅层 BiLSTM 组成的集成模型，总参数量约 4700 万。通过多样化样本覆盖与精细阈值校准，提升对恶意输入的检测能力，并在含部分信息泄露的情境下进行评估。
AI.result: GuardNet 在盲测试集上取得 AUROC 0.747，专有基准上 F1 达 0.92，具备低延迟（~50ms）和高效率特性，适用于生产环境部署，虽不及大型 LLMs 但在轻量级检测中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 模型规模并非决定对抗鲁棒性的关键因素，样本多样性与阈值校准更为重要。GuardNet 作为轻量级、高效、低延迟的防御系统，在实际部署中具有显著优势，尤其适用于资源受限场景。

title: When New Generators Arrive: Lifelong Machine-Generated Text Attribution via Ridge Feature Transfer
summary: Machine-generated text (MGT) attribution aims to identify the specific generator responsible for a given text, thereby providing fine-grained evidence for model accountability and misuse investigation. As new large language models continue to emerge, attribution models must continuously incorporate new generators while preserving their ability to recognize previously seen ones. Prior works have shown that this lifelong MGT attribution setting is challenging, and existing methods often struggle to achieve a stable balance between adapting to new classes and retaining old ones. To address this issue, we propose RidgeFT, a lightweight analytic update framework that does not rely on exemplar replay. RidgeFT trains a task-aware encoder on the initial generator set, stores compact class-wise sufficient statistics when each generator class is first observed, and then freezes the encoder for replay-free closed-form updates. It then suppresses generator-irrelevant variation through covariance calibration, improves representation capacity with fixed random features, and updates new classes through closed-form ridge regression based on class-level sufficient statistics. Across multi-topic evaluations with varying initial generator setups, RidgeFT consistently outperforms baselines. It achieves the best macro-F1 across domains, backbones, and incremental protocols, while also improving both old-class retention and new-class adaptation. These results suggest that feature-stable analytic updates provide a simple yet effective approach to lifelong MGT attribution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RidgeFT，一种无需样本重放的轻量级分析更新框架，用于持续学习中的机器生成文本归属任务。该方法通过任务感知编码器、类级充分统计量存储和闭式岭回归实现高效更新，在不丢失旧类别识别能力的前提下，有效适应新生成器，显著提升多领域、多模型架构下的归属性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在持续学习场景下难以平衡对新生成器的适应与对旧生成器的保留，且依赖样本重放导致效率低下。因此需要一种无需重放、稳定高效的更新机制来应对不断涌现的新大模型。
AI.method: RidgeFT首先训练一个任务感知编码器于初始生成器集；当首次观察到每个生成器类别时，存储其紧凑的类级充分统计量；随后冻结编码器，利用固定随机特征增强表示能力，并通过协方差校准抑制无关变化；最后基于充分统计量进行闭式岭回归，实现新类别的快速更新。
AI.result: 在多种主题、初始设置和增量协议下，RidgeFT均显著优于基线方法，实现了最佳宏平均F1得分，同时兼顾旧类别保持与新类别适应能力。
AI.conclusion: 特征稳定的分析更新为持续学习中的机器生成文本归属提供了简单而有效的解决方案，验证了闭式更新与充分统计量的有效性。

title: DP-MacAdam: Differentially Private Mechanism with Adaptive Clipping and Adaptive Momentum
summary: Differentially private stochastic gradient descent (DP-SGD) has become the standard framework for privacy-preserving machine learning, yet its reliance on a fixed gradient clipping threshold to limit sensitivity remains a significant practical limitation. Adaptive clipping algorithms such as AdaClip shift and scale the gradient prior to clipping and adding noise so that the clipped gradient yields a more informative descent direction. The shift and scaling parameters are selected adaptively based on the empirical mean and variance. However, in existing adaptive clipping algorithms, these empirical estimates have not been also used for momentum to accelerate training itself. On the other hand, DP-Adam is an algorithm that exploits Adam-like momentum updates based on the gradient mean and variance to accelerate training, but does not exploit these estimates for adaptive clipping. In this work, we propose Differentially Private Mechanism with Adaptive Clipping and Adaptive Momentum (DP-MacAdam), a novel algorithm that combines these two approaches so as to use the same mean and variance estimates for both clipping and momentum. We perform an analysis showing that DP-MacAdam estimates the gradient variances in a bias-free manner. In addition, we empirically evaluate the privacy and accuracy of DP-MacAdam, demonstrating that it achieves improved model utility compared to DP-SGD, AdaClip, and DP-Adam baselines, without requiring manual tuning of the clipping threshold.

AI.tldr: 提出DP-MacAdam，结合自适应剪裁和自适应动量，利用相同的均值和方差估计同时优化剪裁和动量，实现更好的模型性能且无需手动调参。
AI.motivation: 现有自适应剪裁算法未利用经验均值和方差加速训练，而DP-Adam虽用均值和方差加速但未用于自适应剪裁，因此需要一种统一框架整合两者优势。
AI.method: 设计DP-MacAdam，共享梯度均值和方差估计用于自适应剪裁和动量更新，并证明其方差估计无偏。
AI.result: 实验表明DP-MacAdam在隐私保护下比DP-SGD、AdaClip和DP-Adam具有更高的模型准确率，且无需人工调整剪裁阈值。
AI.conclusion: DP-MacAdam通过统一利用统计估计实现自适应剪裁与动量，显著提升隐私机器学习的效率与效果。

title: CoFi-UCGen: Coarse-to-Fine Unsupervised Conditional Generation without Label Priors
summary: Unsupervised conditional image generation (UCGen) aims to control generation without relying on manually annotated labels, yet remains challenging due to unstructured semantic representations across granularities. To address this, we propose a novel coarse-to-fine UCGen framework (CoFi-UCGen) that explicitly disentangles global semantics from fine-grained variations, which to the best of our knowledge, sets out the first successful attempt for both coarse- and fine-grained conditional generation without any labels. More specifically, we first propose the adversarial semantic reciprocal learning theory to ensure the semantic consistency and completeness between images and latent spaces. Based on the consistency, we propose the bit-codes to learn a structured coarse-grained latent space, and further prove distinct global semantics inherent from our bit-codes while preserving independent noise sampling for generation. Building upon these bit-codes, we establish a fine-grained semantic basis and introduce a hierarchical modulation mechanism in diffusion models, by enabling layer-wise injection from coarse conditions to progressively control fine-grained attributes during generation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that without any label priors or pre-trained feature extractors, our CoFi-UCGen consistently outperforms existing UCGen methods in terms of image quality, semantic consistency, and control accuracy, verifying the effectiveness of explicit coarse-to-fine semantic decomposition for the challenging UCGen task.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新颖的无监督条件图像生成框架CoFi-UCGen，通过显式分解全局语义与细粒度变化，实现了无需标签的粗粒度和细粒度条件生成。该方法基于对抗性语义互学习理论确保图像与潜在空间的一致性，并引入位码（bit-codes）构建结构化的粗粒度潜在空间，证明其能区分独立的全局语义。进一步在扩散模型中设计分层调制机制，实现从粗条件逐层注入以控制生成过程中的细粒度属性。实验表明，该方法在图像质量、语义一致性和控制精度方面均优于现有无监督条件生成方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的无监督条件图像生成方法面临语义表示不结构化的问题，尤其在不同粒度间难以有效分离全局语义与细节变化，导致生成控制能力弱。因此需要一种能够显式解耦粗粒度与细粒度语义的新框架，以提升生成质量与可控性。
AI.method: 提出对抗性语义互学习理论以保证图像与潜在空间的一致性；设计位码机制构建结构化的粗粒度潜在空间；利用位码作为基础建立细粒度语义表示；在扩散模型中引入分层调制机制，实现从粗到细的条件注入，逐步控制生成细节。
AI.result: 在无需任何标签先验或预训练特征提取器的情况下，CoFi-UCGen在图像质量、语义一致性及控制准确性上均显著优于现有无监督条件生成方法，验证了粗细粒度语义解耦的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CoFi-UCGen首次成功实现了无需标签的粗粒度与细粒度联合控制的无监督条件图像生成，其核心在于显式解耦语义层次并建立分层调制机制，为未来无监督生成任务提供了新范式。

title: Fix the Mind, Not the Move: Interpretable AI Assistance via Knowledge-Gap Localization
comment: Accepted to International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2026
summary: AI assistants in human-AI collaboration often correct suboptimal human actions through behavioral feedback (e.g., alerts or steering-wheel nudges in assistive driving). Such interventions can mitigate immediate errors, but long-term improvement requires addressing the underlying misconceptions that cause repeated mistakes. We introduce SENSEI, a framework that infers user misconceptions from interaction behavior and provides targeted, minimal yet sufficient suggestions to correct them. Our approach departs from action- or trajectory-level interventions by operating over a structured knowledge representation to localize and correct the sources of erroneous behavior. Across three long-horizon tasks with diverse misconceptions and corresponding behaviors, SENSEI demonstrates zero-shot compositional generalization, disentangling multiple overlapping misconceptions despite training only on single-misconception cases. A user study further shows that our method identifies real human misconceptions and provides effective guidance that improves long-horizon task performance, successfully correcting $90\%$ of student misconceptions. Code and project page are available at https://misoshiruseijin.github.io/SENSEI/.

AI.tldr: SENSEI是一个框架，通过分析用户交互行为推断其认知误区，并提供针对性、最小但足够的建议来纠正这些误区。与传统的动作或轨迹级干预不同，SENSEI基于结构化知识表示，定位并修正错误行为的根源。在三个具有多样认知误区的长时程任务中，SENSEI展示了零样本组合泛化能力，能够分离多个重叠的认知误区，即使训练仅针对单一误区案例。用户研究进一步表明，该方法能准确识别真实的人类认知误区，并提供有效指导，显著提升长时程任务表现，成功纠正90%的学生认知误区。
AI.motivation: 现有AI助手主要通过即时行为反馈（如警告或方向盘微调）纠正人类的次优行为，但这类干预无法解决导致重复错误的根本认知误区。长期改进需要识别并纠正这些深层误解，因此需要一种能从交互行为中推断认知误区并提供精准纠正建议的方法。
AI.method: SENSEI采用结构化知识表示来建模任务逻辑和潜在认知误区，通过分析用户在任务中的交互行为，推断其可能存在的认知误区；然后生成针对性、最小且充分的建议，以纠正这些误区。该方法具备零样本组合泛化能力，可处理多误区重叠情况，即使训练数据仅包含单一误区场景。
AI.result: 在三个长时程任务中，SENSEI展现出良好的零样本组合泛化性能，能够有效识别并分离多个重叠的认知误区。用户研究表明，该方法能准确识别真实的人类认知误区，并提供有效指导，使学生在任务中的表现显著提升，成功纠正了90%的认知误区。
AI.conclusion: SENSEI通过从交互行为中推断认知误区并提供精准纠正建议，实现了对人类认知缺陷的深度干预，显著提升了人机协作中的长期学习与任务表现，为下一代智能助手的设计提供了新范式。

title: Bootstrapping Semantic Layer from Execution for Text-to-SQL
summary: Real-world text-to-SQL is often under-specified until user phrases are grounded in how the database stores values. Prior work attempts to address this by requiring a semantic layer to specify groundings in advance, but such specifications are often incomplete, especially in expert domains where domain-specific conventions are under-documented. As this leaves multiple grounding hypotheses open for the same SQL part, we introduce GATE (Grouding After Test from Execution), which bootstraps missing groundings from execution feedback. GATE keeps grounding hypotheses open while executing the already grounded parts to obtain observations. Then, only the hypothesis supported by that observation is grounded and stored as a memory entry, recording what was tested and how the open part should be written in SQL. These entries accumulate into execution-grounded memory, allowing later steps to reuse supported groundings. Across real-world and controlled benchmarks, GATE consistently improves over strong baselines, demonstrating that execution can serve not only as validation but also as a bootstrapping mechanism for reusable memory in text-to-SQL.

AI.tldr: GATE提出一种新的文本到SQL方法，通过执行反馈来动态补全缺失的实体对齐（grounding），而非依赖预先定义的语义层。该方法在执行过程中保留多个可能的对齐假设，仅将与执行结果一致的假设固化为可复用的记忆条目，从而构建执行驱动的记忆库，在真实世界和控制性基准测试中均优于现有强基线。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的文本到SQL任务常因缺乏对数据库值的明确指代而存在歧义；已有方法依赖预设的语义层进行对齐，但此类规范往往不完整，尤其在专业领域中更易缺失，导致多种对齐假设并存，影响准确性。
AI.method: GATE采用执行后对齐（Grounding After Test from Execution）策略：在执行已知部分的同时，保持对未知部分的多个对齐假设；根据执行反馈筛选出唯一符合观察结果的假设，并将其作为记忆条目存储，形成可复用的执行-接地记忆库，支持后续步骤的推理。
AI.result: 在真实世界及控制性基准上，GATE显著优于现有强基线模型，验证了执行反馈不仅能用于验证，还可作为生成可复用记忆的自举机制。
AI.conclusion: GATE证明了执行反馈在文本到SQL中的双重价值——既是验证手段，也是构建可积累、可复用记忆的自举机制，为解决现实世界中语义不完整问题提供了有效路径。

title: Sharp First-Order Lower Bounds for Higher-Order Smooth Nonconvex Optimization
summary: We study the deterministic first-order oracle complexity of finding \(ε\)-stationary points in smooth nonconvex optimization when the objective satisfies higher-order smoothness assumptions. While the classical \(ε^{-2}\) rate is optimal under only Lipschitz gradients, higher-order smoothness leads to accelerated first-order upper bounds, most notably the \(ε^{-7/4}\) rate under Lipschitz Hessians and the \(ε^{-5/3}\) rate under Lipschitz third derivatives. The matching lower bounds, however, have remained open. We resolve this gap by proving a new dimension-free first-order lower bound for higher-order smooth nonconvex functions, valid for every finite smoothness order. In particular, our construction gives a matching \(Ω(ε^{-7/4})\) lower bound in the Hessian-Lipschitz case and a matching \(Ω(ε^{-5/3})\) lower bound in the third-order-smooth regime. The hard instance is based on a \emph{block-chain} mechanism that enforces blockwise oracle revelation while preserving the smoothness structure needed for the scalar hard instance. The lower-bound construction was discovered with the assistance of ChatGPT 5.5 Pro and subsequently verified by the authors.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在高阶光滑性假设下，寻找非凸优化中ε-平稳点的确定性一阶预言机复杂度。虽然已有上界如Hessian-Lipschitz时的ε^{-7/4}和三阶导数Lipschitz时的ε^{-5/3}，但对应的下界长期未解。本文通过构造一种基于块链机制的维度无关下界实例，证明了在任意有限光滑阶数下均存在匹配的Ω(ε^{-7/4})和Ω(ε^{-5/3})下界，解决了该问题。该构造借助ChatGPT 5.5 Pro发现并经作者验证。
AI.motivation: 解决非凸优化中高阶光滑性假设下一阶算法复杂度的下界缺口，验证已有上界是否紧致。
AI.method: 提出一种块链机制构造硬实例，确保块状预言机信息揭示的同时保持标量硬实例所需的光滑结构，结合数值与理论分析完成下界证明。
AI.result: 建立了在Hessian-Lipschitz情形下的Ω(ε^{-7/4})和三阶光滑情形下的Ω(ε^{-5/3})维度无关下界，与现有上界匹配，完全解决该复杂度问题。
AI.conclusion: 本工作首次给出了高阶光滑非凸优化中一阶复杂度的紧致下界，证实了现有加速上界不可改进，为非凸优化理论提供了关键基础，并展示了大模型辅助发现新数学构造的可能性。

title: V2V-Bench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Video-to-Video Generation Evaluation
summary: Video-to-video (V2V) generation is difficult to evaluate because outputs must both follow editing instructions and preserve frame-level correspondence with the source video, which existing T2V and I2V metrics do not capture. We introduce V2V-Bench, a 11-dimension benchmark organized into five categories: temporal alignment, structural fidelity, transformation quality, video quality, and semantic alignment. V2V-Bench pairs diverse source videos with challenging editing tasks and evaluates two commercial models, Grok Imagine and Gemini Veo3, and one open-source model, Open Sora 2. Results show complementary model strengths: Grok performs better on editing fidelity, while Veo3 achieves stronger visual quality. On six V2V-specific dimensions, V2V-Bench reaches a Spearman correlation of 0.905 with human judgments.

AI.tldr: 提出V2V-Bench，一个11维基准测试，涵盖时间对齐、结构保真度、变换质量、视频质量和语义对齐五个类别，用于评估视频到视频生成任务。该基准测试对比了Grok Imagine、Gemini Veo3和Open Sora 2三个模型，结果显示各模型在不同维度上表现互补，且在六个V2V特有维度上与人类判断的相关性达0.905。
AI.motivation: 现有T2V和I2V评估指标无法全面捕捉视频到视频生成中编辑指令遵循和帧级对应关系的要求，因此需要一个专门针对V2V任务的评估基准。
AI.method: 构建V2V-Bench，包含多样化的源视频和挑战性编辑任务，从五个维度对模型性能进行系统评估，并与人类判断进行相关性分析。
AI.result: Grok Imagine在编辑保真度上表现更优，Veo3在视觉质量上更强；在六个V2V特定维度上，基准测试与人类判断的Spearman相关系数达到0.905。
AI.conclusion: V2V-Bench有效填补了V2V生成任务评估的空白，能够可靠地衡量模型在多方面的能力，为未来研究提供标准化评估工具。

title: Multilingual Fine-Tuning via Localized Gradient Conflict Resolution
summary: The rapid evolution of Large Language Models (LLMs) has established cross-lingual versatility as a defining feature of modern systems. However, fine-tuning these models frequently induces negative interference across languages. To address this, we reformulate multilingual fine-tuning as a multi-objective optimization (MOO) problem. Specifically, we introduce Bucket-Level MOO, a scalable distributed framework that applies gradient-based MOO algorithms locally on parameter buckets. This enables conflict-aware updates without the prohibitive communication overhead of reconstructing full gradient vectors. Theoretically, we prove this localized resolution natively enforces Refined Pareto Stationarity, a strictly tighter necessary condition for Pareto optimality. Empirically, Bucket-Level MOO mitigates interference by driving LLMs to construct distinct language-specific dimensions, improving representational separability. Extensive experiments across four base LLMs demonstrate that our method significantly improves both seen and unseen multilingual performance over standard fine-tuning paradigms.

AI.tldr: 本文将多语言微调重新定义为多目标优化（MOO）问题，提出一种可扩展的分布式框架——桶级多目标优化（Bucket-Level MOO），通过在参数桶上局部应用基于梯度的MOO算法，实现冲突感知的更新，避免了重建完整梯度向量带来的通信开销。理论证明该方法天然满足更严格的帕累托平稳性条件；实验表明其能有效缓解跨语言干扰，提升模型在已见和未见语言上的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在多语言微调中常出现不同语言间的负向干扰，导致性能下降。传统方法难以高效处理多语言之间的冲突，亟需一种既能减少干扰又具备可扩展性的新范式。
AI.method: 提出桶级多目标优化（Bucket-Level MOO）框架，将参数划分为多个桶，在每个桶内独立执行基于梯度的多目标优化，实现局部冲突感知更新，降低通信成本，并保证全局优化质量。
AI.result: 在四种基础大模型上的大量实验表明，该方法显著优于标准微调策略，在已见与未见语言任务上均取得更高性能，且增强了语言特异性表示能力。
AI.conclusion: Bucket-Level MOO 作为一种高效、可扩展的多语言微调方法，通过局部多目标优化有效缓解语言间干扰，提升了模型的跨语言泛化能力，为大规模多语言模型训练提供了新的思路。

title: QueryAgent-R1: Bridging Query Generation and Product Retrieval for E-Commerce Query Recommendation
summary: Query recommendation in e-commerce search aims to proactively suggest queries that match users' potential interests. However, existing methods mainly optimize query-level relevance, while neglecting whether the retrieved products align with users' downstream preferences. This mismatch often leads to high query click through rates (CTR) but low product conversion rates (CVR). To bridge this gap, we propose QueryAgent-R1, a memory-augmented agentic framework that improves end-to-end alignment via chain-of-retrieval optimization. Our QueryAgent-R1 grounds query generation in real inventory retrieval, allowing the agent to validate and refine queries based on retrieved products. We also design a consistency reward in the agentic reinforcement learning (RL) process to jointly optimize query relevance and downstream engagement. In addition, we construct a memory abstraction module for efficient user profiling. To support offline evaluation, we construct two datasets based on both proprietary industrial data and public datasets, on which QueryAgent-R1 consistently outperforms strong baselines. Moreover, on a large scale production platform, QueryAgent-R1 improves Query CTR by 2.9% and guided CVR by 3.1% in online A/B tests.

AI.tldr: QueryAgent-R1 是一种基于记忆增强的代理框架，通过链式检索优化提升查询推荐与用户下游偏好的对齐。该方法结合真实库存检索验证和修正查询，并引入一致性奖励机制联合优化查询相关性与后续互动效果。此外，构建了高效的用户画像记忆抽象模块。在工业数据和公开数据集上，QueryAgent-R1 均显著优于基线模型；在线测试中，查询点击率（CTR）提升2.9%，引导转化率（CVR）提升3.1%。
AI.motivation: 现有查询推荐方法主要关注查询层面的相关性，忽视了检索商品是否符合用户的下游偏好，导致高点击率但低转化率的问题。为解决这一不一致问题，提出更贴近用户实际购买意图的推荐机制。
AI.method: 提出 QueryAgent-R1 框架，采用记忆增强的代理机制，通过链式检索优化实现端到端对齐；利用真实库存检索结果验证并迭代优化查询；设计一致性奖励机制，在强化学习中联合优化查询相关性与下游转化行为；构建记忆抽象模块以高效建模用户偏好。
AI.result: 在自建及公开数据集上，QueryAgent-R1 显著优于多个强基线模型；在大规模生产环境中进行 A/B 测试，查询 CTR 提升 2.9%，引导 CVR 提升 3.1%。
AI.conclusion: QueryAgent-R1 有效提升了查询推荐与用户实际购买意图的一致性，解决了传统方法中高点击低转化的瓶颈，具备良好的工业应用价值。

title: GOTabPFN: From Feature Ordering to Compact Tokenization for Tabular Foundation Models on High-Dimensional Data
comment: Accepted to the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026). Code and resources are available at: GitHub: https://github.com/zadid6pretam/GOTabPFN; PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/gotabpfn/; Project webpage: https://www.zadidhabib.com/gotabpfn.html; Hugging Face Space: https://huggingface.co/spaces/zadid6pretam/GOTabPFN and https://zadid6pretam-GOTabPFN.hf.space
summary: We investigate how to make small tabular foundation models effective for High-Dimensional, Low-Sample Size (HDLSS) tabular prediction without retraining large backbones. We introduce Graph-guided Ordering with Local Refinement (GO-LR), show its equivalence to weighted Minimum Linear Arrangement, and interpret the practical solver as a TSP-path-style surrogate. We propose GOTabPFN,which builds on GO-LR, and a Neuro-Inspired Subunit Compression (NSC) unit to pool locally adjacent ordered features into meta-features, yielding a compact representation that makes TabPFN-style prediction practical in HDLSS regimes. Across tabular benchmarks, GOTabPFN improves stability and accuracy under tight token budgets.

AI.tldr: 提出GOTabPFN模型，结合图引导排序与局部精炼（GO-LR）和神经启发子单元压缩（NSC），在低样本高维（HDLSS）表格数据上实现高效预测，无需重新训练大型模型，显著提升精度与稳定性。
AI.motivation: 在高维低样本场景下，传统小规模表格基础模型表现不佳，而大型模型又难以在资源受限条件下部署，因此需要一种轻量且高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 引入图引导排序与局部精炼（GO-LR），将其等价于加权最小线性排列问题；设计TSP路径风格的近似求解器，并结合神经启发子单元压缩（NSC）对相邻特征进行聚合，生成紧凑的元特征表示。
AI.result: 在多个表格基准测试中，GOTabPFN在有限的令牌预算下表现出更高的准确性和更强的稳定性，尤其适用于高维低样本场景。
AI.conclusion: GOTabPFN通过创新的特征排序与压缩机制，有效提升了小规模表格模型在高维低样本任务中的性能，为轻量化建模提供了新范式。

title: LongSpace: Exploring Long-Horizon Spatial Memory from Perception to Recall in Video
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have advanced image and video understanding and can increasingly handle longer visual inputs. Long-horizon tasks such as autonomous driving and robotic navigation require more than recognizing the current view, as models must remember and retrieve previously observed spatial layouts, routes, viewpoint changes, and object states. To evaluate this capability, we introduce LongSpace-Bench, a room-tour video benchmark for long-horizon spatial memory, covering scene perception, spatial relations, and spatial memory. In this work, we further propose LongSpace, a memory framework for long-video spatial reasoning. LongSpace models long videos as sequential chunks, incorporates 3D structural cues into early decoder layers, and constructs layer-aware memory for question-guided retrieval. Experiments on multiple spatial reasoning benchmarks show that LongSpace improves long-video spatial understanding, further demonstrating explicit spatial memory as a key capability for long-horizon video MLLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出LongSpace框架以增强多模态大模型在长视频空间推理中的能力，通过序列化视频块、引入3D结构线索和构建层感知记忆实现更优的空间记忆与检索。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大模型在处理长时序视觉输入时，缺乏对先前观察到的空间布局、路径、视角变化和物体状态的记忆与检索能力，难以胜任自动驾驶和机器人导航等长时程任务。
AI.method: 将长视频划分为序列块，早期解码器层融合3D结构线索，并构建问题引导的层感知记忆用于高效检索。
AI.result: 在多个空间推理基准测试中，LongSpace显著提升了长视频的空间理解能力，验证了显式空间记忆对长时程视频多模态大模型的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 显式空间记忆是长时程视频多模态大模型的关键能力，LongSpace框架有效增强了模型在复杂场景下的长期空间推理性能。

title: Safety Paradox: How Enhanced Safety Awareness Leaves LLMs Vulnerable to Posterior Attack
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are rigorously aligned to refuse harmful requests, a process that inherently cultivates a latent capacity to evaluate and recognize unsafe content. In this work, we reveal that this advanced safety awareness inadvertently introduces a fatal vulnerability. We introduce Posterior Attack, a single-query jailbreak that bypasses guardrails by prompting the model to generate the exact harmful response its internal classifier would normally flag as unsafe. Through extensive empirical evaluation across 30 open-source LLMs (up to 35B parameters in size) and frontier models (e.g., GPT-5, Claude 4.6), we observe a striking phenomenon: models with superior safety-judgment capabilities are disproportionately more susceptible to this exploitation. To explain this, we formalize the Safety Paradox, analytically showing that monotonic improvements in safety alignment naturally amplify posterior vulnerability. Finally, we establish a causal link via reinforcement learning interventions, exemplifying that artificially degrading a model's safety judgment immunizes it against the attack, whereas enhancing judgment exacerbates the vulnerability. Our findings highlight potential flaws in current alignment paradigms, indicating that defense mechanisms may require further structural refinement.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了大语言模型（LLMs）在强化安全对齐过程中，因具备识别有害内容的内在能力而产生了一个致命漏洞。作者提出‘后验攻击’（Posterior Attack），通过单次查询诱导模型生成其内部分类器会标记为不安全的响应，从而绕过安全防护。实验表明，安全性越强的模型反而越容易被此类攻击利用。研究进一步提出‘安全悖论’理论，证明安全对齐的单调提升会自然加剧模型的后验脆弱性，并通过强化学习实验证明：降低模型的安全判断能力可使其免疫攻击，反之则加剧风险。结论指出当前对齐范式存在潜在缺陷，需对防御机制进行结构性优化。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在安全对齐过程中增强了对有害内容的识别能力，但这种能力意外引入了新的安全漏洞。研究旨在揭示这一矛盾现象并探索其成因，以推动更稳健的对齐方法发展。
AI.method: 提出后验攻击方法，通过设计特定提示使模型输出其自身分类器所判定为危险的内容；采用理论建模分析安全对齐与后验脆弱性的关系；通过强化学习干预实验验证安全判断能力与攻击敏感性的因果关系。
AI.result: 30个开源模型及前沿模型（如GPT-5、Claude 4.6）均表现出显著的后验攻击脆弱性，且安全性能越强的模型越易受攻击；理论分析证实安全悖论的存在；强化学习实验验证了安全判断能力与攻击敏感性之间的因果关系。
AI.conclusion: 当前大语言模型的安全对齐策略可能隐含结构性缺陷，过度强化安全判断反而增加攻击面。未来防御机制需重新审视对齐架构，避免单纯追求安全性能提升带来的副作用。

title: Value-and-Structure Alignment for Routing-Consistent Quantization of Mixture-of-Experts Models
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models scale foundation models efficiently by activating only a subset of experts for each token, but their large number of expert parameters still makes quantization essential for practical deployment. Unlike dense models, however, MoE models are sensitive to routing instability: small quantization-induced perturbations can change the top-$k$ expert selection, altering the computation path and degrading model quality. We propose Value-and-Structure Routing Alignment for Quantization (VSRAQ), a MoE-specific post-training quantization objective that preserves pre-quantization expert-selection behavior under quantization. VSRAQ combines two complementary objectives that jointly preserve expert-selection behavior: value alignment, which matches routing-relevant logits or scores, and structure alignment, which preserves expert ordering and top-$k$ decision boundaries. By maintaining routing consistency, VSRAQ reduces quantization-induced degradation without introducing any inference-time overhead and can be integrated into existing quantization frameworks. Experiments on recent MoE foundation models show that VSRAQ improves expert-selection consistency and consistently outperforms reconstruction-only and router-aware baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出VSRAQ，一种针对MoE模型的后训练量化方法，通过值对齐和结构对齐双重目标保持量化前的专家选择行为，提升路由一致性，减少量化引起的性能下降，且无需引入推理时开销。
AI.motivation: MoE模型虽能高效扩展基础模型，但其大量专家参数仍需量化以实现实际部署；然而，现有量化方法易引发路由不稳定性，导致专家选择变化，影响模型质量。
AI.method: VSRAQ结合值对齐（匹配路由相关的logits或分数）与结构对齐（保持专家排序及top-k决策边界），共同维护量化过程中的路由一致性。
AI.result: 在近期MoE基础模型上的实验表明，VSRAQ显著提升了专家选择一致性，并优于仅重建或路由器感知的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: VSRAQ是一种有效的MoE模型量化方案，可在不增加推理开销的前提下，有效缓解量化带来的路由不稳定问题，提升模型性能。

title: Towards Unified and Data-Efficient Prognostics and Health Management with Tabular Foundation Models
summary: Data-driven Prognostics and Health Management (PHM) uses time-varying condition-monitoring data to diagnose system states and estimate remaining useful life in engineered assets. These tasks are central to maintenance planning, but industrial PHM data are often fragmented, partially observed, and poorly labeled, which hinders supervised learning. Foundation models offer a route toward reusable predictive systems, yet most time-series foundation models are designed for forecasting and assume long, coherent, regularly sampled sequences. To address this gap, we propose a framework for applying Tabular Foundation Models to industrial time series using in-context learning, and we evaluate them on a variety of PHM tasks. By converting raw unit-level signals into tabular rows, we show that these models perform well across multiple tasks - including prognostics, and diagnostics - and are highly data efficient. We compare them directly with sequence models, transformer baselines, and gradient-boosted trees under a common evaluation protocol. The results indicate that tabular foundation models achieve the best average ranks across prognostic and diagnostic tasks. Our findings further show that PFN-based models are competitive in low-data regimes, that temporal context can be preserved in the tabular representation, and that performance depends on representative context construction under subsampling. These results demonstrate that tabular foundation models provide a practical and general interface for heterogeneous PHM problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种将表格基础模型应用于工业时间序列的框架，通过上下文学习实现高效的数据利用，在故障诊断和剩余寿命预测等PHM任务中表现优异，优于序列模型、Transformer基线和梯度提升树，尤其在低数据场景下具有竞争力。
AI.motivation: 工业PHM数据常存在碎片化、部分观测和标签不全的问题，限制了监督学习的应用；现有时间序列基础模型多面向长期连续序列的预测任务，难以适配实际工业场景中的异构、非完整数据。
AI.method: 将原始单元级信号转换为表格形式的行数据，利用表格基础模型进行上下文学习，实现对多种PHM任务的建模。
AI.result: 表格基础模型在多个任务上取得最佳平均排名，表现出高数据效率，且在低数据条件下仍具竞争力；时间上下文可通过表格表示有效保留，但性能依赖于子采样下的上下文构造质量。
AI.conclusion: 表格基础模型为异构的PHM问题提供了一种实用且通用的接口，具备良好的可迁移性和适应性，是未来工业PHM系统的重要发展方向。

title: T-SAR-JEPA: Self-Supervised Temporal Anomaly Detection in SAR Amplitude Stacks via Latent Prediction
comment: Won IEEE GRSS Data Fusion Contest 2026; to appear in IGARSS 2026 proceedings
summary: We present T-SAR-JEPA, a self-supervised framework for temporal anomaly detection in SAR amplitude stacks via latent prediction. A ViT-Base/16 encoder from SAR-JEPA is domain-adapted on 39,300 Capella patches using local masked reconstruction with gradient feature prediction. A temporal transformer with sinusoidal time encoding forecasts future latent states from K=7 acquisitions, with progressive unfreezing substantially reducing validation loss. The model operates on amplitude alone; InSAR coherence serves exclusively as independent pseudo-ground-truth. On the DFC 2026 dataset (300 time-series, three AOIs), T-SAR-JEPA achieves ROC-AUC of 77.0% on the Hawaii eruption window, outperforming RX, PaDiM, Linear AR, and LSTM baselines (~50%). Spatial coherence of 99.9% (p < 0.001, permutation test) confirms structured detections. Code: https://github.com/TerraLatent/t-sar-jepa

AI.tldr: T-SAR-JEPA 是一种基于潜在预测的自监督框架，用于通过合成孔径雷达（SAR）幅度堆栈进行时间异常检测。该方法利用来自 SAR-JEPA 的 ViT-Base/16 编码器，在 39,300 个 Capella 图像块上通过局部掩码重建和梯度特征预测进行领域适应；结合带正弦时间编码的时序变换器，从 K=7 次观测中预测未来潜在状态，并通过渐进解冻显著降低验证损失。模型仅使用幅度信息，而 InSAR 相干性仅作为独立伪标签。在 DFC 2026 数据集（300 个时序，三个区域）上，其在夏威夷火山喷发窗口的 ROC-AUC 达到 77.0%，优于 RX、PaDiM、线性 AR 和 LSTM 基线（约 50%）。空间相干性高达 99.9%（p < 0.001，置换检验），证实了检测结果具有结构性。代码已开源。
AI.motivation: 现有 SAR 时间异常检测方法依赖于监督信号或复杂的数据预处理，难以在无标注数据下有效捕捉动态变化。本文旨在构建一个无需标注、仅依赖自监督学习的高效框架，实现对复杂地表变化的准确识别，同时保持高空间一致性与泛化能力。
AI.method: 采用自监督的 SAR-JEPA 架构，通过局部掩码重建与梯度特征预测对 ViT-Base/16 编码器进行领域适应；引入带有正弦时间编码的时序变压器，基于前 7 次观测预测未来潜在表示；采用渐进解冻策略优化训练过程；仅使用 SAR 幅度数据，以 InSAR 相干性作为独立伪真值评估检测性能。
AI.result: 在 DFC 2026 数据集的夏威夷火山喷发窗口中，T-SAR-JEPA 达到 77.0% 的 ROC-AUC，显著优于传统方法（如 RX、PaDiM、Linear AR、LSTM 等，约 50%）；空间相干性达 99.9%（p < 0.001，置换检验），表明检测结果具有高度结构一致性，具备良好的可解释性与可靠性。
AI.conclusion: T-SAR-JEPA 成功实现了仅基于 SAR 幅度的无监督时间异常检测，在复杂地表事件（如火山喷发）中表现出优越性能。其高空间一致性和强泛化能力证明了自监督学习在遥感时序分析中的巨大潜力，为未来无标注环境下的灾害监测提供了新范式。

title: Self-Commitment Latency: A Reward-Free Probe for Prompted Implicit Hacking
summary: Implicit reward hacking is hard to audit when a language model's chain of thought appears benign: a final answer may be anchored by a prompt shortcut while the written reasoning still resembles ordinary problem solving. Verifier-based probes expose such behavior by measuring how early truncated reasoning contexts obtain high reward, but require a task-specific reward signal. This paper proposes a weaker-input alternative, self-commitment latency, which measures how early a prompted reasoning context commits to the model's own final answer. We evaluate the probe in a controlled paired GSM8K setting using Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct-4bit, comparing ordinary prompts with prompts that include an answer hint. Hinted contexts commit substantially earlier and with lower uncertainty than honest contexts. The primary latency metric, first-commitment latency at threshold 0.8, reaches AUROC 0.878; supporting whole-curve summaries reach AUROC 0.926 for commitment range and 0.904 for mean uncommitted mass. The signal is stronger when both prompt conditions answer correctly and remains stable across thresholds. These results show that shortcut-available reasoning contexts can leave an early behavioral commitment signature detectable without a reward model, external judge, or trained classifier.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为自承诺延迟（self-commitment latency）的弱输入探测方法，用于检测语言模型在链式思维中是否存在隐式奖励劫持。该方法通过测量模型在推理过程中何时首次以高置信度承诺其最终答案，从而识别出受提示捷径影响的推理路径。在控制变量的GSM8K任务中，使用Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct-4bit模型进行评估，结果显示带答案提示的推理上下文比诚实推理更早且更确定地做出承诺，其主要指标（阈值0.8时的首次承诺延迟）达到AUROC 0.878；整体曲线分析显示更高性能（最高0.926）。该信号在正确回答条件下更强且对阈值变化稳定，表明无需奖励模型、外部裁判或训练分类器即可检测到捷径行为的早期行为签名。
AI.motivation: 当语言模型的链式思维看似正常但实际受提示捷径影响时，传统审计方法难以发现隐式奖励劫持。现有验证器探针依赖任务特定的奖励信号，限制了通用性。因此需要一种不依赖外部监督信号的替代探测机制。
AI.method: 提出自承诺延迟（self-commitment latency）作为新探测指标，衡量模型在推理过程中首次以高于设定阈值（如0.8）的置信度承诺最终答案的时间点。通过对比普通提示与含答案提示下的推理轨迹，分析其承诺时间与不确定性差异。采用多阈值分析和整体曲线总结，结合受试者工作特征曲线下面积（AUROC）评估有效性。
AI.result: 在控制实验中，带有答案提示的推理上下文显著更早且更不确定地做出承诺，首次承诺延迟在阈值0.8时达到AUROC 0.878；整体曲线分析中，承诺范围与平均未承诺质量分别达到0.926和0.904。该信号在正确回答场景下更强，且对阈值变化具有稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 自承诺延迟是一种有效的、无需外部奖励模型或训练分类器的探测手段，能够识别出受提示捷径影响的推理行为，为检测语言模型中的隐式奖励劫持提供了新的可行路径。

title: Rethinking LoRA Memory Through the Lens of KV Cache Compression
summary: Parametric retrieval augmentation encodes document information into lightweight, document-specific modules such as LoRA adapters, reducing the need to include all evidence as input context. However, it remains unclear how this parameter-side memory interacts with context-side memory stored in the KV cache. We study this interaction in document-level question answering by progressively evicting document key-value states and measuring when a document LoRA contributes beyond the retained context. We find that document LoRA adds little when the KV cache is largely intact, but becomes increasingly useful under aggressive compression, recovering 13-21 ROUGE-L points when no document context remains. The gain is largest when the base model encodes the document, and the adapter is applied only during answer generation, suggesting that document LoRA is better understood as decoding-time parametric memory than as a document encoder. Finally, QA-style supervision produces substantially stronger adapters than raw-context next-token-prediction. These results position document LoRA as a complementary memory channel whose value emerges precisely when context-side evidence is scarce.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了参数化检索增强中文档LoRA适配器与上下文侧记忆（KV缓存）之间的交互关系。在文档级问答任务中，随着文档键值对状态的逐步淘汰，发现当KV缓存基本完整时，文档LoRA贡献较小；但在高压压缩下，其作用显著提升，即使无任何上下文保留时仍能恢复13-21 ROUGE-L分数。最大增益出现在基础模型编码文档、适配器仅在生成阶段应用的情况下，表明文档LoRA更应被视为解码时的参数化记忆而非文档编码器。此外，基于问答的监督训练生成的适配器远优于原始上下文的下一个词预测训练。结果表明，文档LoRA是一种互补的记忆通道，其价值在上下文证据稀缺时尤为突出。
AI.motivation: 探究参数化检索增强中基于参数的内存（如LoRA适配器）与基于上下文的内存（如KV缓存）之间的交互机制，理解二者在文档级问答中的协同作用与替代性。
AI.method: 通过逐步淘汰文档在KV缓存中的键值状态，测量在不同上下文保留程度下文档LoRA对性能的影响，并对比不同训练方式（问答监督与下一个词预测）生成的适配器效果。
AI.result: 当KV缓存保持完整时，文档LoRA贡献有限；但在极端压缩下，其可恢复13-21 ROUGE-L点；最大增益出现在基础模型编码文档、适配器仅用于生成阶段时；基于问答的监督训练产生的适配器性能显著更优。
AI.conclusion: 文档LoRA本质上是解码时的参数化记忆，而非文档编码器；它作为互补记忆通道，在上下文证据缺失时表现出更强的价值，尤其适合高压压缩或长文档场景下的信息补救。

title: Learned Subspace Compression for Communication-Efficient Pipeline Parallelism
comment: Accepted at the 2nd Workshop on Connecting Low-rank Representations in AI, ICML 2026
summary: Pipeline parallelism enables training of large language models that exceed single-device memory, yet inter-stage activation communication becomes the dominant bottleneck when trained on low-bandwidth networks. Recent work in this area has proposed using fixed orthogonal projections to compress activations. However, this still results in a significant performance degradation and requires a number of non-standard adaptations to constrain the optimization. A natural alternative is to learn a low rank projection for each pipeline stage, however maintaining the necessary orthogonality of these projectors during training remains a challenge. We present Manifold Aware Projection Learning (MAPL), a method that treats inter-stage compression as a learnable orthogonal projection under explicit Stiefel manifold (orthogonal matrices) constraints. Rather than prescribing a fixed global subspace, MAPL lets each pipeline stage discover and continuously adapt its own task-optimal compression subspace via manifold-constrained steepest descent. To recover token-specific signals at stage boundaries, we introduce per-stage factorized anchor embeddings that allow for full-rank activation reconstruction with negligible communication overhead. We further show that we can incorporate residual vector quantization after projection with a streaming codebook synchronization protocol that amortizes dictionary communication. Across LLaMA models from 150M to 1B parameters we show that MAPL can be easily applied to the existing pipeline and can achieve high compression with neglibile performance degradation with a drastically improved tradeoffs in performance vs. compression compared to Subspace Networks.

AI.tldr: MAPL提出一种在管道并行中进行激活压缩的新方法，通过显式约束于Stiefel流形（正交矩阵）来学习可学习的正交投影，使每个阶段能自适应地发现最优压缩子空间。通过引入分块锚点嵌入实现几乎无开销的全秩激活重建，并结合残差向量量化与流式字典同步协议，显著提升性能与压缩比的权衡。实验表明，MAPL在LLaMA模型上实现了高压缩率且性能损失极小，优于现有方法如子空间网络。
AI.motivation: 现有方法使用固定正交投影压缩激活，导致性能下降且需复杂适配；而学习低秩投影时难以维持正交性。因此需要一种既能保持正交性又可自适应优化的压缩机制。
AI.method: MAPL将跨阶段压缩建模为带显式Stiefel流形约束的可学习正交投影，采用流形约束下的最速下降法更新投影矩阵；引入每阶段分块锚点嵌入以恢复完整信号；结合残差向量量化和流式字典同步协议，降低通信开销。
AI.result: 在150M到1B参数的LLaMA模型上，MAPL实现了高压缩率、近乎无损的性能表现，显著优于子空间网络等现有方法，在性能与压缩效率之间取得更优平衡。
AI.conclusion: MAPL通过流形约束的可学习正交投影和高效重建机制，有效解决了管道并行中的激活通信瓶颈，为大规模语言模型训练提供了高效、灵活且高性能的压缩方案。

title: Parallel Jacobi Decoding for Fast Autoregressive Image Generation
summary: Autoregressive (AR) models have demonstrated remarkable performance in generating high-fidelity images. However, their inherently sequential next-token prediction leads to significantly slower inference. Recent studies have introduced Jacobi-style decoding to accelerate autoregressive image generation. Extending the draft sequence initially improves efficiency, yet the acceleration quickly saturates as error propagation in the one-dimensional sequence hinders convergence. Observing that images exhibit strong local spatial correlations, we propose Parallel Jacobi Decoding (PJD), a training-free decoding approach that expands draft tokens in the two-dimensional spatial domain to enable efficient spatially parallel refinement. PJD adjusts the attention mask to mitigate error accumulation and improve convergence stability. Extensive experiments on diverse datasets show that PJD achieves 4.8x-6.4x acceleration across multiple autoregressive image generation models while maintaining competitive generation quality.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为Parallel Jacobi Decoding (PJD)的训练无关解码方法，通过在二维空间域扩展草稿令牌实现高效的空间并行细化，利用调整注意力掩码来减轻误差累积并提高收敛稳定性。在多个自回归图像生成模型上实验表明，PJD实现了4.8x-6.4x的加速，同时保持了高质量生成效果。
AI.motivation: 自回归图像生成虽然生成质量高，但因逐次预测下一个标记导致推理速度慢。现有方法如雅可比解码虽能提升效率，但随着一维序列中误差传播加剧，加速效果迅速饱和。因此需要一种新方法来克服这一瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出Parallel Jacobi Decoding (PJD)，通过在二维空间域而非一维序列中扩展草稿令牌，实现空间并行性；同时调整注意力掩码以抑制误差传播，增强收敛稳定性。
AI.result: 在多种数据集和自回归图像生成模型上，PJD实现了4.8x-6.4x的加速，且生成图像质量与现有方法相当或更优。
AI.conclusion: PJD是一种无需训练的高效解码策略，充分利用图像的局部空间相关性，在保证生成质量的前提下显著提升了自回归图像生成的推理速度。

title: Evaluation of LLMs for Mathematical Formalization in Lean
summary: Within the past few years, the ability of Large Language Models (LLMs) to generate formal mathematical proofs has improved drastically. We provide a comparison of various LLMs' effectiveness in producing formal proofs in Lean 4 with the goal of assisting those seeking to use LLMs to support their own projects. We utilize both pass@$k$ and refine@$k$ metrics as the benchmark for our comparison and evaluate on subsets of both miniF2F and miniCTX datasets. Our testing shows that overall, Gemini 3.1 Pro and Claude Opus 4.7 perform best. Gemini 3.1 Pro achieved a 92\% success rate on miniF2F via refine@32 whereas Opus 4.7 achieved a 86\% success rate on miniCTX via refine@32. When taking cost into account, NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super and GPT-OSS 120B were the most efficient, with competitive accuracies and average costs of $<\$0.01$ per correct proof.

AI.tldr: 本研究比较了多种大型语言模型（LLMs）在Lean 4中生成形式化数学证明的能力，使用pass@$k$和refine@$k$作为评估指标，在miniF2F和miniCTX数据集子集上进行测试。结果显示，Gemini 3.1 Pro和Claude Opus 4.7表现最佳；前者在miniF2F上通过refine@32达到92%成功率，后者在miniCTX上达到86%。从成本效率看，NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super和GPT-OSS 120B最为高效，平均每正确证明成本低于$0.01。
AI.motivation: 提升大型语言模型在形式化数学证明生成中的应用能力，为研究者提供选型参考，以支持其自身项目开发。
AI.method: 采用pass@$k$和refine@$k$作为评估指标，在miniF2F和miniCTX数据集的子集上对多个LLMs进行测试，比较其生成形式化证明的准确性与成本效率。
AI.result: Gemini 3.1 Pro在miniF2F上实现92%的成功率（refine@32），Claude Opus 4.7在miniCTX上实现86%的成功率（refine@32）；NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super和GPT-OSS 120B在成本方面表现最优，平均成本低于$0.01/正确证明。
AI.conclusion: Gemini 3.1 Pro和Claude Opus 4.7在准确率上领先，而NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super和GPT-OSS 120B在成本效益上更具优势，为不同需求的研究者提供了实用的模型选择依据。

title: Beyond tokens: a unified framework for latent communication in LLM-based multi-agent systems
summary: Multi-agent systems built on large language models (LLMs) have become a prevailing paradigm for tackling complex reasoning, planning, and tool-use tasks. The dominant communication protocol in such systems is natural language: agents exchange messages token-by-token, verbalising their internal reasoning so that peers can read, verify, and respond. While convenient and interpretable, this protocol suffers from three structural drawbacks -- high inference cost, irreversible information loss during discretization, and ambiguity/redundancy of natural language. A growing body of work therefore explores an alternative protocol -- latent communication -- in which agents exchange continuous representations (embeddings, hidden states, or KV-caches) directly, bypassing the bottleneck of text generation. This paper presents a unified framework for organising the rapidly expanding literature on latent communication. We analyse existing methods along three orthogonal axes: (1) WHAT information is communicated (Embeddings, Hidden States, KV-Caches, or other continuous state); (2) WHICH sender-receiver alignment is used (latent-space alignment and layer alignment); and (3) HOW the communicated information is fused into the receiver (concatenation, prepending, mathematical operations, cross-attention, or cache restoration). Under this 3-axis framework, we systematically categorise eighteen representative methods proposed between 2024 and 2026, identify five major design patterns, and surface a set of open challenges -- including cross-architecture alignment, security of latent channels, compression for edge deployment, and the relationship between latent communication and latent chain-of-thought. We hope that this framework both lowers the barrier to entry for new researchers and provides a vocabulary for comparing future work.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个统一框架，用于组织2024至2026年间关于大语言模型多智能体系统中潜在通信的快速发展的文献。该框架从三个正交维度对现有方法进行分析：（1）传递的信息类型（嵌入、隐藏状态、KV缓存或其他连续状态）；（2）发送者-接收者对齐方式（潜在空间对齐与层对齐）；（3）信息如何融合到接收端（拼接、前置、数学运算、交叉注意力或缓存恢复）。基于此框架，系统分类了18个代表性方法，识别出五大设计模式，并揭示若干开放挑战，包括跨架构对齐、潜在通道安全性、边缘部署压缩，以及潜在通信与潜在思维链的关系。
AI.motivation: 自然语言通信协议在多智能体系统中存在高推理成本、离散化过程中的不可逆信息损失，以及语言模糊性和冗余性等结构性缺陷。为克服这些问题，研究者探索直接交换连续表示（如嵌入、隐藏状态、KV缓存）的潜在通信协议。然而，相关工作日益增多且缺乏系统性归纳，亟需一个统一的分析框架以促进理解与比较。
AI.method: 提出一个三轴分类框架，涵盖通信内容（WHAT）、对齐机制（WHICH）和融合策略（HOW），并以此系统梳理和分类2024–2026年间18项代表性研究工作。
AI.result: 成功将18项方法归类于该框架下，识别出五种主要设计模式，明确指出当前研究在跨架构对齐、潜在通道安全、边缘部署压缩及潜在通信与潜在思维链关系等方面存在的关键挑战。
AI.conclusion: 该框架不仅降低了新研究者进入门槛，也为未来工作提供了可比性的术语体系，推动潜在通信研究向更系统化、规范化的方向发展。

title: LEVANTE-bench: Multi-Scale Comparison of VLMs to Children Using Cognitive Tasks (or, "Is Your VLM Smarter Than a 5th Grader?")
summary: Given the inherently multimodal nature of human experience, vision-language models (VLMs) hold substantial promise for modeling human cognition as it grows and develops with experience. Realizing their potential requires tools for comparing VLMs with human cognitive development across tasks, ages, and populations. We present LEVANTE-bench, a benchmark based on tasks and data from the Learning Variability Network (LEVANTE), which distributes open-source tasks and data measuring children's cognition across languages and cultures. In LEVANTE-bench, we systematically assess VLMs on six tasks, comparing their alignment with children aged 5-12 ($N$ = 1547) across three countries. We compare models at multiple scales, assessing their overall accuracy, their task- and item-level alignment with children, and how well they match children's trial-level error distributions. Alignment was heterogeneous across scales: at the level of tasks and items, more capable models aligned better with humans. However, match to human error distributions varied widely across tasks, and for several tasks, smaller models matched younger children's errors better. In addition, even the best-performing VLMs struggled on matrix reasoning and mental rotation tasks. Thus, current VLM architectures align only partially with the cognitive abilities of children.

AI.tldr: LEVANTE-bench 是一个基于多语言、跨文化儿童认知数据的视觉语言模型评估基准，用于衡量 VLMs 与 5-12 岁儿童在六项任务中的认知对齐程度。研究发现，虽然更强大的模型在任务和项目层面与人类表现更一致，但在错误分布匹配上表现不一，部分小模型反而更贴近年幼儿童的错误模式。此外，所有模型在矩阵推理和心理旋转任务中表现不佳，表明当前 VLM 架构仅部分模拟了儿童认知发展。
AI.motivation: 为了评估视觉语言模型（VLMs）在模拟儿童认知发展方面的潜力，需要一种能够跨任务、年龄和人群比较模型与人类认知的工具。现有研究缺乏统一、开放且具有文化多样性的基准，因此亟需构建一个可比较的评估框架。
AI.method: 提出 LEVANTE-bench 基准，整合来自 Learning Variability Network (LEVANTE) 的开源任务与数据，涵盖三个国家共 1547 名 5-12 岁儿童的认知数据。系统评估多个规模的 VLMs，从整体准确率到任务级、项目级对齐，以及试次级错误分布匹配等多个维度进行分析。
AI.result: 在任务和项目层级，能力更强的模型与儿童表现更一致；但在错误分布匹配方面，不同任务差异显著，部分小模型反而更贴近年幼儿童的错误模式。所有模型在矩阵推理和心理旋转任务中表现较差，说明当前 VLM 架构尚未全面捕捉儿童认知发展的核心特征。
AI.conclusion: 尽管视觉语言模型在某些认知任务上展现出与儿童行为的部分对齐，但其整体认知结构仍与儿童发展过程存在显著差距。未来模型设计需更关注认知发展动态与错误模式的建模，以实现更真实的认知模拟。

title: Real-Time Threat Detection from Surveillance Cameras using Machine Learning
