summary: Ensuring public safety in densely populated urban environments remains a critical challenge, necessitating the deployment of intelligent and automated video surveillance systems. Traditional surveillance approaches rely heavily on manual monitoring, which is inefficient and susceptible to human fatigue, delayed response, and observational errors. To overcome these limitations, this work presents a real-time object detection-based surveillance framework. The proposed system focuses on detecting guns, knives, and region-specific blunt objects commonly involved in violent activities in Indian surveillance scenarios. A key contribution of this work is the use of a custom-created dataset collected using a mobile camera, consisting of 336 labeled images of blunt objects such as iron rods, wooden sticks, and plastic rods. This dataset is combined with a publicly available dataset of 7,623 images of guns and knives, forming a consolidated dataset of 7,959 images across three classes: gun, knife, and blunt object. The combined dataset is used to train a YOLOv8-based object detection model for real-time performance. Experimental evaluation shows that increasing the training duration significantly improves recall and average precision for the blunt object class without signs of overfitting. Overall, the proposed framework achieves an effective balance between accuracy and efficiency, making it suitable for deployment in real-world surveillance environments such as campuses, public spaces, and transportation areas.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出一种基于实时目标检测的智能监控框架，用于在印度城市环境中检测枪支、刀具及特定区域常见的钝器（如铁棒、木棍、塑料棒）。通过自建移动拍摄数据集（336张钝器图像）与公开数据集（7,623张枪支和刀具图像）融合，构建包含7,959张图像的三类数据集（枪支、刀具、钝器），并基于YOLOv8模型进行训练。实验表明，延长训练时间可显著提升钝器类别的召回率与平均精度，且无过拟合现象。系统在准确率与效率间取得良好平衡，适用于校园、公共空间和交通枢纽等实际场景部署。
AI.motivation: 传统视频监控依赖人工监视，存在效率低、易疲劳、响应延迟和误判等问题。为提升公共安全监控的自动化与实时性，亟需高效、精准的目标检测技术以识别暴力活动中常见武器，尤其针对印度特定环境中的钝器类威胁。
AI.method: 构建融合自建与公开数据集的多类别数据集（共7,959张图像），使用YOLOv8模型进行训练，并通过调整训练时长评估性能变化，实现对枪支、刀具和钝器的实时检测。
AI.result: 增加训练时间显著提升了钝器类别的召回率和平均精度，未出现过拟合；整体系统在准确率与实时性之间达到良好平衡，具备在真实监控场景中部署的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的基于YOLOv8的实时目标检测框架能够有效识别枪支、刀具及印度场景中常见的钝器，具有高准确性和运行效率，适用于各类高密度人群区域的公共安全监控系统。

title: Answer Presence Drives RAG Rewriting Gains
summary: Retrieval-augmented QA pipelines often route retrieved passages through an LLM \emph{rewriter} before a smaller reader, lifting F1 by tens of points on multi-hop benchmarks; this gain is typically credited to improved evidence quality. We ask whether that lift is causally driven by the gold answer string appearing in the rewritten context rather than by curation per se, using a controlled intervention audit. For each rewritten context we re-run the reader after one of four controlled edits to the compile output: removing the gold answer span, replacing a length-matched random non-answer span (placebo), or injecting the gold into rewrites where it was absent (at the prefix or at a midpoint sentence boundary). Across twelve completed (cell, baseline) intervention runs spanning three reader families (Qwen2.5-7B, Qwen3.5-35B, GLM-4.7), two datasets (HotpotQA, 2WikiMultihopQA), and three compiler arrangements (MA-only, MB-only, MA$+$verify), removing the gold answer drops reader F1 by $28$ to $64$ points beyond the length-matched placebo on paired \texttt{answer-in-compile} strata, and prepending the gold into rewrites that lacked it raises F1 by $+0.7$ to $+9.7$ points in $10$ of $12$ (cell, baseline) combinations. A companion five-sentinel audit shows the conventional single-\texttt{[MASK]} probe is itself sentinel-fragile: on 2Wiki it reports a $+4.12$~F1 ``non-leakage residual'' that flips to $-3.33$ to $-7.81$~F1 under four alternative sentinels and fails an equivalence test for three of those four ($1/4$~pass). We do not propose a new rewriter or mitigation; we release the intervention runner and the sentinel panel so that other rewriter-gain claims can be tested against the same standard.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过受控干预审计，检验了检索增强型问答管道中LLM重写器带来的性能提升是否真正源于黄金答案片段的出现，而非仅因上下文质量改善。实验表明，移除黄金答案会使阅读器F1下降28至64点，远超长度匹配的安慰剂对照；而将黄金答案插入缺失的重写文本中可使F1提升0.7至9.7点（在12组测试中有10组显著提升）。此外，传统单[掩码]探测方法存在哨兵脆弱性，在2WikiMultihopQA上报告的“非泄漏残差”在不同哨兵下变为负值且不满足等价性检验。研究不提出新重写器或缓解方案，而是发布干预运行器和哨兵面板，以供他人验证其他重写器增益主张。
AI.motivation: 探究检索增强问答中重写器带来的性能提升是否由黄金答案出现在重写上下文中所导致，而非单纯因上下文质量改善。
AI.method: 采用受控干预审计，对重写后的上下文进行四种编辑：移除黄金答案、替换为长度匹配的随机非答案片段（安慰剂）、在开头或句中边界插入黄金答案。在多个读者模型、数据集和编译配置组合下进行12次实验，并辅以五哨兵审计评估传统[掩码]探测的稳健性。
AI.result: 移除黄金答案导致F1显著下降（28-64点），远超安慰剂效应；在缺少黄金答案的重写中插入答案可提升F1（+0.7至+9.7点，10/12组合显著）；传统[掩码]探测在不同哨兵下结果不稳定，存在“非泄漏残差”反转现象，且不满足等价性检验。
AI.conclusion: 重写器带来的性能提升很大程度上是由于黄金答案出现在重写上下文中，而非单纯的上下文优化。研究强调需更严格地验证重写器收益，并提供工具支持可重复验证。

title: Interpreting Style Representations via Style-Eliciting Prompts
summary: Style representation learning is a powerful tool for authorship analysis and modeling writing style, yet the latent nature of learned representations makes them difficult to interpret. Recent work has attempted to explain these representations by generating natural language descriptions with large language models (LLMs) conditioned on input text. However, such descriptions are often prone to the LLM's biases and hallucinations, and they lack an explicit objective and practical utility. In this work, we propose a novel framework for interpreting style representations through style-eliciting prompts: natural language instructions designed to steer LLMs to generate text that reflects specific stylistic attributes. We curate 1,010 distinct style features spanning 26 stylistic categories and construct a dataset by prompting an LLM to generate text conditioned on these features. Using this data, we train a decoder to generate a style prompt from the style representation of the generated text. We evaluate our approach on three tasks: (1) recovering original style prompts from generated text, (2) generating text in the same style using the recovered prompts, and (3) steering LLM outputs to match the style of human-written texts. Experiments demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms strong baselines that directly prompt LLMs with target text, achieving superior performance in both style description and style imitation. These results highlight that style-eliciting prompts can provide a practical and interpretable interface to stylistic information encoded in style representations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过风格诱导提示（style-eliciting prompts）来解释风格表示的新框架，旨在克服现有方法中大语言模型生成描述时存在的偏见和幻觉问题。研究构建了一个包含1010个独特风格特征的数据集，并训练一个解码器从生成文本的风格表示中恢复对应的提示。在三个任务上评估该方法：（1）从生成文本中恢复原始风格提示；（2）使用恢复的提示生成同风格文本；（3）使大语言模型输出匹配人类写作风格。实验表明，该方法显著优于直接以目标文本提示大语言模型的基线方法，在风格描述与模仿方面均表现更优，证明了风格诱导提示作为可解释且实用的风格信息接口的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有的风格表示学习虽能有效建模写作风格，但其隐含表示难以解释。当前依赖大语言模型生成自然语言描述的方法存在偏见、幻觉等问题，缺乏明确目标与实际应用价值。因此需要一种更可靠、可解释且具有实用性的风格解释方式。
AI.method: 提出风格-诱导提示框架，设计自然语言指令以引导大语言模型生成体现特定风格特征的文本；构建涵盖26类风格的1010个风格特征数据集；训练一个解码器，从生成文本的风格表示中重建对应的风格提示。
AI.result: 在风格提示恢复、风格文本生成和风格迁移三个任务中，所提方法均显著优于强基线模型，尤其在风格描述准确性和风格模仿一致性方面表现突出，验证了风格诱导提示作为可解释接口的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 风格诱导提示提供了一种实用且可解释的方式，用于解读风格表示中的隐含信息，为风格分析与建模提供了新的方向，有助于提升风格表示的透明度与可控性。

title: Dominant-Layer ZO: A Single Layer Dominates Zeroth-Order Fine-Tuning of LLMs
summary: Zeroth-order (ZO) optimization enables memory-efficient fine-tuning of large language models (LLMs) using only forward passes, but it remains unclear how useful adaptation is distributed across layers. In this work, we reveal a surprising phenomenon: ZO fine-tuning is sharply dominated by a single decoding layer. Across multiple LLM families and downstream tasks, fine-tuning this dominant layer alone consistently matches or even exceeds full-model ZO fine-tuning. We further show that the dominant layer is task-agnostic but model-specific, and can be identified before training through a simple inference-only analysis of activation outliers. Specifically, the dominant layer consistently aligns with the first activation-outlier layer in the pre-trained model. To explain this phenomenon, we analyze how perturbation effects propagate under ZO optimization. We find that the dominant layer combines two key properties: high perturbation sensitivity and early placement in the residual stream, allowing perturbation-induced effects to propagate and accumulate through remaining subsequent decoding layers. As a result, this layer produces disproportionately strong and stable optimization signals under forward-only updates. Extensive experiments on LLaMA2-7B and Qwen3-8B across nine benchmarks show that dominant-layer ZO fine-tuning improves average performance over full-model MeZO and LoRA-based ZO fine-tuning while achieving up to 4.52$\times$ training speedup.

AI.tldr: 零阶（ZO）优化通过仅使用前向传播实现大语言模型（LLM）的内存高效微调，但其适应性在各层间的分布尚不明确。本文揭示了一个令人惊讶的现象：ZO微调主要由单个解码层主导。在多个LLM系列和下游任务中，仅微调该主导层即可达到甚至超过全模型ZO微调的效果。该主导层具有任务无关但模型特定的特性，可通过预训练模型的简单推理分析（基于激活异常值）提前识别，且通常对应于第一个激活异常值层。我们进一步分析了扰动在ZO优化中的传播机制，发现主导层兼具高扰动敏感性和在残差流中的早期位置，使扰动效应能有效传播并积累至后续层，从而产生显著且稳定的优化信号。在LLaMA2-7B和Qwen3-8B上的大量实验表明，主导层ZO微调在九个基准测试上优于全模型MeZO和基于LoRA的ZO微调，同时实现高达4.52倍的训练加速。
AI.motivation: 探究零阶（ZO）优化在大语言模型微调中各层适应性的分布情况，尤其是为何某些层对优化贡献更大；解决当前对ZO微调效率与性能瓶颈的理解不足问题。
AI.method: 提出一种基于激活异常值的推理阶段分析方法，用于识别主导层；结合扰动传播机制分析，解释为何该层在前向仅有更新的情况下仍能产生强大优化信号；通过对比全模型微调与仅微调主导层的性能，验证其有效性。
AI.result: 主导层在多种模型和任务中均表现突出，仅微调该层即可达到或超越全模型微调效果；其可被预先识别，且在不同任务间保持一致；相比现有方法，性能更优，训练速度提升最高达4.52倍。
AI.conclusion: ZO微调的性能高度集中于一个特定的解码层，该层因高敏感性与早期位置而成为优化核心。通过仅微调这一主导层，可在保持高性能的同时大幅提高训练效率，为高效、轻量级的模型微调提供了新思路。

title: ViCuR: Visual Cues as Recoverable Privilege for Multimodal On-Policy Distillation
summary: On-policy distillation (OPD) improves reasoning by training a student on trajectories sampled from its own policy under supervision from a teacher. In multimodal reasoning, a common extension is to use a privileged teacher that observes training-time-only signals such as reference answers or rationales. However, such answer-side privilege creates a train-test mismatch: the teacher's supervision may depend on signals unavailable to the student, encouraging shortcut imitation rather than visually grounded reasoning. We propose ViCuR, a visually grounded privileged-teacher distillation framework that replaces answer-side privilege with visual cues (query-related evidence in the input). Because these cues are derived from the same visual input available at inference, their evidence is recoverable by the student. To support this, ViCuR introduces a lightweight cue recovery module that uses dedicated sink-token cross-attention during prefill to aggregate task-relevant visual evidence into an internal representation, without changing the inference interface or requiring auxiliary cue-generation losses. Across seven benchmarks with Qwen3-VL-2B and 8B students, ViCuR consistently improves over answer-based on-policy self-distillation by +1.19 and +1.24 on overall average performance. It also extends naturally to stronger-teacher OPD, surpassing OPD baselines by +0.64 and +1.08, with consistent out-of-domain gains at the 8B scale. These results show that, in multimodal on-policy distillation, the design of teacher privilege is as important as teacher strength.

AI.tldr: ViCuR提出一种基于视觉线索的特权教师蒸馏框架，通过使用输入中与查询相关的视觉证据替代仅训练时可用的答案信息，解决训练-测试不匹配问题。该方法引入轻量级线索恢复模块，在预填充阶段利用专用汇点交叉注意力聚合任务相关视觉证据，无需改变推理接口或额外损失。在七个基准上，ViCuR显著优于基于答案的自蒸馏方法，平均提升1.19和1.24，并在更强教师设置下表现更优，尤其在8B规模下展现出一致的跨领域优势。结果表明，教师特权设计与教师能力同样关键。
AI.motivation: 现有基于答案的特权教师在多模态推理中存在训练-测试不匹配问题，因教师依赖学生无法获取的信号（如参考答案），导致模型学习捷径而非视觉基础推理。需要一种可恢复、与输入一致的教师监督机制。
AI.method: 提出ViCuR框架，用输入中的视觉线索（查询相关证据）替代答案侧特权；引入轻量级线索恢复模块，通过预填充阶段的专用汇点交叉注意力，将任务相关视觉信息聚合到内部表示中，保持原推理接口不变，无需额外损失函数。
AI.result: 在7个基准测试中，使用Qwen3-VL-2B和8B学生模型，ViCuR分别实现+1.19和+1.24的平均性能提升，超过基于答案的自蒸馏方法；在更强教师设置下，进一步超越基线+0.64和+1.08；8B模型在跨领域任务中表现出持续优势。
AI.conclusion: 在多模态在线蒸馏中，教师特权的设计与教师本身的能力同等重要。使用可从输入中恢复的视觉线索作为教师监督信号，能有效避免捷径学习，促进真正基于视觉的推理。

title: FIDES: Faithful Inference via Deep Evidence Signals for Retrieval-Memory Conflict in RAG
summary: When retrieved evidence contradicts parametric memory, language models frequently ignore context and default to memorized priors -- a failure that undermines the core purpose of retrieval augmentation. Contrastive decoding amplifies the context-conditioned output to suppress parametric bias, but existing methods rest on an implicit assumption that this bias is uniform across tokens. A single global contrastive weight over-penalizes safe tokens while leaving genuinely conflicted ones insufficiently corrected. We identify token-level conflict concentration: retrieval-memory tension is sharply heterogeneous, concentrated on a small fraction of answer-critical decoding steps. This reframes contrastive decoding from how much contrast to apply to where to apply it. We propose FIDES (Faithful Inference via Deep Evidence Signals), a training-free decoder that reads three internal signals probing retrieval-memory conflict at complementary depths -- output surface, hidden representations, and prediction trajectory -- and fuses them to govern intervention strength at each decoding step. Across three benchmarks and six backbones -- four primary 7B/8B models and two scaling backbones up to 70B -- FIDES achieves the best context fidelity in all 18 settings, outperforming the strongest training-free baseline by +3 to +13 points. On the 70B scale, fidelity reaches 92-94% while F1 surges to 62-63%, demonstrating that token-level selectivity unlocks generation capability that coarse contrastive rules suppress.

AI.tldr: FIDES 是一种无需训练的解码器，通过在每个解码步骤中根据三重内部信号（输出表面、隐藏表示、预测轨迹）融合检索-记忆冲突信息，实现对上下文冲突的细粒度调控。该方法解决了传统对比解码因全局统一权重导致的安全词过度惩罚和真正冲突词纠正不足的问题，显著提升生成内容与上下文的一致性。在三个基准测试和六种模型（包括高达70B参数的模型）上，FIDES 在所有18个设置中均达到最佳上下文保真度，相比最强的无训练基线提升3至13个百分点，在70B模型上保真度达92-94%，F1值提升至62-63%。
AI.motivation: 当检索证据与参数化记忆冲突时，语言模型常忽略上下文而依赖记忆先验，这削弱了检索增强的核心意义。现有对比解码方法假设偏差在所有标记上均匀分布，但实际冲突高度集中在少数关键解码步骤，因此需要更精细的干预策略。
AI.method: 提出FIDES，一种无需训练的解码器，利用输出表面、隐藏表示和预测轨迹三个互补深度的内部信号，动态评估每一步的检索-记忆冲突程度，并据此调节干预强度，实现基于位置的细粒度控制。
AI.result: 在三个基准和六种模型（涵盖7B/8B到70B规模）上，FIDES在所有18个设置中均取得最高上下文保真度，相比最强无训练基线提升3-13点；在70B模型上，保真度达92-94%，F1值达62-63%，证明了细粒度选择性可释放被粗略规则压制的生成能力。
AI.conclusion: token级冲突集中现象揭示了对比解码应从‘如何施加对比’转向‘何处施加对比’。FIDES通过多层级信号融合实现精准干预，显著提升生成忠实度，且无需额外训练，适用于大规模模型。

title: Narrative Knowledge Weaver: Narrative-Centric Retrieval-Augmented Reasoning for Long-Form Text Understanding
summary: Long-form narrative QA requires reasoning over evolving story worlds rather than isolated passages: answers may depend on earlier goals, changing character states, social relations, causal triggers, temporal position, and later consequences. Existing retrieval and graph-augmented generation methods improve evidence access, but their units--chunks, entities, relations, summaries, or tool actions--do not directly encode how evidence functions in a story. We introduce Narrative Knowledge Weaver(NKW), a source-grounded framework that aligns textual evidence, atomic facts, canonical graph structure, entity profiles, interactions, episodes, and storylines. At query time, NKW uses text, graph, and narrative tools with post-retrieval reading skills to assemble evidence and audit actor, scope, polarity, state, and temporal constraints. Across STAGE, FairytaleQA, and QuALITY, NKW is strongest on screenplay-level story-world QA while remaining competitive on more passage-centered benchmarks. Ablations, question-type analyses, graph-asset statistics, and case studies show complementary benefits for character, scene, temporal, causal, and narrative-progression reasoning.

AI.tldr: Narrative Knowledge Weaver (NKW) is a source-grounded framework designed for long-form narrative question answering by aligning textual evidence, atomic facts, graph structure, entity profiles, interactions, episodes, and storylines. It enhances reasoning over evolving story worlds through integrated text, graph, and narrative tools with post-retrieval reading skills, outperforming existing methods on screenplay-level QA while maintaining strong performance on passage-centered benchmarks.
AI.motivation: Existing methods for narrative QA rely on retrieval and graph-augmented generation but use units like chunks, entities, or relations that fail to capture how evidence functions within a story's evolving world. There is a need for a more coherent and context-aware framework that supports reasoning across character states, social relations, causality, time, and narrative progression.
AI.method: NKW integrates multiple knowledge representations—textual evidence, atomic facts, canonical graph structure, entity profiles, interactions, episodes, and storylines—into a unified framework. At query time, it employs text, graph, and narrative tools with post-retrieval reading skills to assemble evidence and validate constraints related to actors, scope, polarity, state, and time.
AI.result: NKW achieves top performance on screenplay-level story-world QA tasks (e.g., STAGE, FairytaleQA, QuALITY), demonstrating strong capabilities in character, scene, temporal, causal, and narrative-progression reasoning. Ablation studies and case analyses confirm the complementary role of each component.
AI.conclusion: NKW advances long-form narrative QA by providing a unified, source-grounded approach that effectively models the dynamic nature of story worlds, enabling robust and interpretable reasoning across complex narrative structures.

title: What Objects Enable, Not What They Are: Functional Latent Spaces for Affordance Reasoning
comment: Code, videos, and data available at: https://A4Dance-reasoning.github.io
summary: Existing robot planning systems rely on appearance-based reasoning, where visual observations are encoded into latent spaces organized around object appearances (e.g., recognizing a "cart" based on how it looks). However, planning requires reasoning about task-relevant functionalities of objects (e.g., whether an object is "movable"), which appearance-based latent spaces do not capture. As a result, existing approaches struggle to generalize to novel robot-object interactions. We address this limited generalizability through affordance reasoning, enabling planning based on task-relevant object functionalities instead of appearance alone. We introduce A4D, which maps visual observations into a shared latent space structured around affordances (e.g., "movable"). By projecting visual observations into this functional latent space and measuring their proximity to affordances, A4D infers functionalities relevant to the observed object. Furthermore, we introduce an affordance discovery mechanism that expands the latent space to handle unseen scenarios where existing affordances are insufficient. A4D uses proximity in the functional latent space to quantify uncertainty in affordance inference and selectively triggers affordance discovery. We evaluate A4D across several planning tasks involving diverse and unseen affordances. A4D achieves 94% inference accuracy on existing affordances outperforming state-of-the-art approaches by over 15% points, improves new-affordance inference accuracy from 70% to over 90% with fewer than 10% of the original training data, and enables 100x faster inference. Code, videos, and data available at: https://A4Dance-reasoning.github.io.

AI.tldr: A4D提出一种基于功能性的机器人规划方法，通过将视觉观测映射到以物体功能（如'可移动性'）为中心的共享潜在空间，实现对任务相关功能的推理。该方法利用功能潜在空间中的距离度量不确定性，并触发功能发现机制以应对未知场景。在多个涉及多样且未见功能的任务中，A4D在已有功能上的推理准确率达94%，优于现有方法超15个百分点；新功能推理准确率从70%提升至90%以上，仅需不到10%的原始训练数据；同时实现100倍加速。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人规划系统依赖外观推理，无法捕捉任务相关的物体功能性信息，导致泛化能力差，难以处理新奇的机器人-物体交互。
AI.method: A4D将视觉观测投影到以功能（如'可移动'）为核心的共享潜在空间，通过测量与功能的接近程度推断物体功能；引入功能发现机制扩展潜在空间以适应未知场景，并基于功能空间中的距离量化不确定性，智能触发功能发现。
AI.result: A4D在已有功能上实现94%的推理准确率，超越现有方法超过15个百分点；在新功能推理上，准确率从70%提升至90%以上，仅使用不到10%的训练数据；推理速度提升100倍。
AI.conclusion: A4D通过功能导向的潜在空间建模和自适应功能发现机制，显著提升了机器人规划在复杂、未知环境下的泛化能力和效率，为实现更智能、更灵活的机器人交互提供了有效解决方案。

title: TextWand: A Unified Framework for Scene Text Editing
summary: We propose TextWand, a general-purpose framework that unifies scene text removal, generation, and replacement into a single model. By decomposing complex editing tasks into the atomic primitives of rendering and erasure, TextWand achieves precise control over both text appearance and background integrity. Specifically, we introduce a novel design, Overlay-Reference Positional Encoding (ORPE), to enforce pixel-level layout fidelity and exemplar-driven style control, alongside a new strategy, Region-Adaptive Suppression (RAS), to ensure clean text erasure. To address the absence of a comprehensive benchmark for general-purpose scene text editing among existing single-task datasets, we construct TextWand-Bench. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TextWand outperforms existing leading open-source and closed-source models by delivering superior text content accuracy, layout and style consistency, and overall image quality across scene text removal, generation and replacement tasks.

AI.tldr: TextWand是一个统一的通用框架，将场景文本的移除、生成和替换整合到一个模型中。通过将复杂编辑任务分解为渲染和擦除两个基本操作，实现了对文本外观和背景完整性的精确控制。新提出的Overlay-Reference Positional Encoding（ORPE）确保像素级布局保真度和示例驱动的风格控制，Region-Adaptive Suppression（RAS）策略则保障干净的文本擦除。为填补现有单任务数据集在通用场景文本编辑评估上的空白，构建了TextWand-Bench基准。大量实验表明，TextWand在文本内容准确性、布局与风格一致性以及整体图像质量方面均优于现有的领先开源与闭源模型。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多为单任务设计，缺乏统一框架处理场景文本的移除、生成与替换；同时缺少全面的基准评估通用场景文本编辑性能。
AI.method: 提出TextWand框架，引入ORPE实现像素级布局保真与风格控制，采用RAS实现无残留文本擦除，并构建TextWand-Bench作为综合性评估基准。
AI.result: 在文本内容准确性、布局与风格一致性、图像质量等方面均显著优于现有主流模型，在多个任务上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: TextWand成功实现了场景文本编辑任务的统一建模，具备高精度、强可控性与良好泛化能力，推动了通用场景文本编辑的发展。

title: Coding with "Enemy": Can Human Developers Detect AI Agent Sabotage?
summary: AI coding agents are increasingly embedded in real-world software development, collaborating with human developers while gaining broader access to codebases and tools. This creates a new attack surface: an agent can exploit human trust to sabotage development, for instance by inserting malicious code to accomplish a hidden side task. Most prior work studies AI sabotage in AI-only settings, paying limited attention to the role of human oversight in detecting and mitigating such malicious behavior. To address this gap, we conduct the first large-scale study of human oversight in AI coding sabotage. Over 100 participants collaborate with one of four frontier models (Claude-Opus-4.6, GPT-5.4, Gemini-3.1-Pro, and MiniMax-M2.7) on a long-horizon coding task lasting around five hours, designed to mimic real-world workflows. We find that 94% of developers fail to detect sabotage, and our analysis of participant feedback attributes this vulnerability to minimal code review, plausible cover story, and overtrust in agents. We further test the effectiveness of a safety monitor in one condition: while the monitor reduces sabotage success, 56% of participants still accept the malicious code, ignoring its warnings. Drawing on participant feedback, we offer actionable suggestions for better monitor design. This work complements existing AI safety research and highlights an urgent need for human-centric safety mechanisms that account for human factors, particularly in long-horizon, real-world development settings.

AI.tldr: 本研究首次大规模探讨了人类监督在AI代码劫持中的作用。100多名参与者与四个前沿模型合作完成约五小时的长期编码任务，结果发现94%的开发者未能检测到恶意行为。主要原因包括代码审查不足、攻击者提供的合理借口以及对AI的过度信任。尽管引入安全监控可降低攻击成功率，仍有56%的参与者无视警告接受恶意代码。研究提出改进监控设计的建议，并强调需发展以人为本的安全机制，尤其在真实世界、长时间开发场景中。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注纯AI环境下的AI劫持，忽视了人类监督在检测和缓解恶意行为中的作用。随着AI编码代理在真实开发中广泛应用，其利用人类信任进行破坏的风险日益突出，亟需研究人类因素在其中的影响。
AI.method: 通过让超过100名参与者与四个前沿大模型（Claude-Opus-4.6, GPT-5.4, Gemini-3.1-Pro, MiniMax-M2.7）协作完成一个持续约五小时的真实工作流模拟任务，系统评估人类对AI编码劫持的识别能力，并测试安全监控的有效性。结合定量数据与参与者反馈进行分析。
AI.result: 94%的开发者未能检测到恶意代码植入；安全监控虽能减少成功劫持，但仍有56%的参与者无视警告接受恶意代码。失败原因主要归结为代码审查不充分、攻击具有可信伪装、以及对AI的过度信任。
AI.conclusion: 当前AI编码代理存在严重的人类监督漏洞，单纯依赖技术防护不足以保障安全。必须发展考虑人类认知特点的人本安全机制，特别是在长期、复杂的真实开发环境中，以应对基于信任的社会工程式攻击。

title: AdaPLD: Adaptive Retrieval and Reuse for Efficient Model-Free Speculative Decoding
summary: Speculative decoding accelerates generation by verifying multiple drafted tokens in a single target-model forward pass, reducing sequential decoding iterations. Model-free variants avoid auxiliary draft models by reusing text and model states already available during generation, but their speedup depends on the reliability of the constructed drafts. We identify two limitations of existing reuse-based methods: lexically anchored retrieval has limited recall under surface-form variation, and deterministic span copying can be brittle when the retrieved context does not uniquely determine the continuation. We propose \emph{AdaPLD}, a training-free method that adaptively improves both retrieval and draft construction. AdaPLD preserves high-precision lexical reuse while using semantic similarity to recover additional reuse opportunities when lexical matching fails. It further constructs branched reuse hypotheses to account for continuation uncertainty, rather than relying on a single copied span. Across diverse benchmarks, AdaPLD reduces target-model forward passes and achieves up to $3.10\times$ decoding speedup.

AI.tldr: AdaPLD是一种无需训练的推测解码方法，通过自适应改进检索和草稿构建，在保持高精度词汇复用的同时，利用语义相似性在词汇匹配失败时恢复额外的复用机会，并通过构建分支复用假设来应对延续不确定性，从而在多个基准测试中显著减少目标模型前向传播次数，实现最高达3.10倍的解码加速。
AI.motivation: 现有基于复用的方法存在两个局限：基于词法的检索在表面形式变化下召回率有限，而确定性的跨度复制在检索上下文无法唯一确定后续内容时容易失效。为提升推测解码的可靠性与效率，需要一种不依赖辅助草稿模型且能自适应处理复杂语言变化的方法。
AI.method: AdaPLD采用无训练策略，结合词汇复用与语义相似性匹配，当词汇匹配失败时，利用语义相似性发现新的可复用机会；同时引入分支复用假设机制，生成多个可能的延续路径，以应对不确定性，避免单一复制带来的脆弱性。
AI.result: 在多种基准测试中，AdaPLD显著减少了目标模型的前向传播次数，实现了最高达3.10倍的解码速度提升，且在保持高精度的前提下增强了对语言变化的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: AdaPLD通过自适应融合词汇与语义复用、构建分支假设，有效克服了现有复用方法的局限，为高效、可靠的推测解码提供了新范式，且无需额外训练，具有良好的实用性和泛化能力。

title: Less is MoE: Trimming Experts in Domain-Specialist Language Models
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models achieve strong performance through conditional computation, but their large parameter footprint poses deployment challenges. Prior MoE compression approaches catastrophically fail when evaluated on general-purpose benchmarks beyond commonsense reasoning. We trace this failure to the granularity of compression: important capabilities are distributed across experts but concentrated in FFN sparse intermediate dimensions. To identify these dimensions, we use Fisher importance which outperforms activation-, router-score-, and magnitude-based alternatives, and identifies tiny sets of task-critical dimensions: in Qwen1.5-MoE, removing as few as 12 of 1.35M routed-FFN intermediate dimensions collapses GSM8K accuracy while largely preserving factual-knowledge performance. Building on this, we propose Fisher-MoE, which operates within FFN to remove intermediate dimensions ranked by Fisher importance. At the same 50% MoE compression ratio, Fisher-MoE preserves model capability, while reducing weight memory by ~45% and improving inference throughput by 21%. These findings suggest intermediate dimension granularity is an effective unit for both compression and ranking where capability concentrates in MoE models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Fisher-MoE，一种基于Fisher重要性评估的混合专家（MoE）模型压缩方法。该方法聚焦于FFN层中的中间维度，识别并移除对任务关键性能影响大的少量维度，实现高效压缩。在50%压缩率下，相比现有方法，Fisher-MoE显著降低权重内存约45%，提升推理吞吐量21%，同时保持模型整体能力，尤其在通用基准测试中表现更优。
AI.motivation: 现有MoE模型压缩方法在通用任务上表现不佳，主要因压缩粒度不当——重要能力分散于专家但集中于FFN的稀疏中间维度，导致压缩时关键信息丢失。
AI.method: 使用Fisher重要性分析识别对任务至关重要的中间维度；提出Fisher-MoE方法，在FFN层内按Fisher重要性排序并移除低重要性维度。
AI.result: 在Qwen1.5-MoE模型中，仅移除12个中间维度即导致GSM8K准确率崩溃，而事实知识性能基本保持；在50%压缩率下，模型内存减少约45%，推理吞吐量提升21%，且通用性能优于传统压缩方法。
AI.conclusion: 中间维度是MoE模型中能力集中的有效压缩与排序单元，采用细粒度的中间维度级压缩能显著提升压缩效率与性能保持能力。

title: VTI-CoT: Visual-Textual Interleaved Chain of Thought for Video Reasoning
summary: Video reasoning aims to understand complex temporal events and causal relationships within videos. Recently, Chain-of-Thought (CoT) has been introduced to this field to enhance reasoning accuracy. However, existing CoT-based video reasoning methods primarily rely on text-only information for logical deduction, overlooking critical visual information during the inference process. Inspired by the human cognitive mechanism of reviewing visual segments during inference, we propose VTI-CoT, a Visual-Textual Interleaved CoT framework. VTI-CoT integrates textual reasoning steps with corresponding visual frames. Given the scarcity of visual-textual interleaved CoT in existing datasets, we develop an automated annotation pipeline to construct high-quality multimodal CoT data. Further, reasoning over long-form videos entails increasingly long CoT token sequences, which severely hinders training convergence and efficiency. To address this, we employ Optical Character Recognition (OCR)-based compression techniques to compress CoT supervision signals into a single canvas. Experimental results demonstrate that VTI-CoT achieves state-of-the-art performance among models of the same parameter scale while significantly improving training efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出VTI-CoT框架，通过视觉与文本的交错推理提升视频理解能力；构建多模态CoT数据集，并利用OCR压缩技术提高长视频推理效率，实现更优性能与训练效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CoT的视频推理方法仅依赖文本信息，忽视了关键的视觉信息，而人类在推理时会回顾视觉片段，因此需要融合视觉与文本信息以提升推理准确性。
AI.method: 设计VTI-CoT框架，将文本推理步骤与对应视觉帧交织；开发自动化标注流程生成高质量多模态CoT数据；采用OCR-based压缩技术将长CoT序列压缩为单个画布，以提升训练效率。
AI.result: VTI-CoT在相同参数规模下达到当前最优性能，同时显著提升训练收敛速度与效率。
AI.conclusion: 融合视觉与文本的交错推理机制有效提升了视频推理能力，结合数据构建与压缩策略，为长视频理解提供了高效可行的解决方案。

title: Continual Learning Bench: Evaluating Frontier AI Systems in Real-World Stateful Environments
summary: Continual learning, the ability of AI systems to improve through sequential experience, has attracted substantial interest, but no high-quality benchmark exists to evaluate it. We introduce Continual Learning Bench (CL-Bench), the first difficult, expert-validated benchmark designed to measure whether LLM-based systems genuinely improve with experience. CL-Bench spans six diverse domains (software engineering, signal processing, disease outbreak forecasting, database querying, strategic game-playing, and demand forecasting), each validated by domain experts and designed so that tasks share a learnable latent structure (codebase layout, disease outbreak dynamics, opponent strategies) that a stateful system can discover online but a stateless one cannot. We evaluate frontier models across several agent architectures, from naive in-context learning (ICL) to dedicated memory systems, introducing a gain metric to isolate learning from prior capabilities. We find that these systems leave headroom for improved continual learning: agents frequently overfit to immediate observations or fail to reuse knowledge across instances, and dedicated memory systems do not fix this -- in fact, naive ICL outperforms systems dedicated to memory management. CL-Bench is the first benchmark to evaluate continual learning across diverse real-world domains with expert-validated tasks and isolate online learning from underlying model capability, showing a need for better continual learning systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CL-Bench，首个经过专家验证的复杂持续学习基准，涵盖软件工程、信号处理、疾病爆发预测、数据库查询、策略游戏和需求预测六个领域，旨在评估大语言模型是否真正通过经验提升。该基准设计确保任务间存在可学习的潜在结构，只有具备状态记忆的系统才能在线发现，而无状态系统则无法做到。实验评估了从简单上下文学习（ICL）到专用记忆系统的多种智能体架构，并引入增益度量以区分学习与模型固有能力。结果表明，现有系统仍有巨大改进空间：多数系统容易过拟合即时观察或无法跨实例复用知识；专用记忆系统并未解决此问题，甚至简单的ICL表现更优。CL-Bench首次在真实多领域中评估持续学习，并隔离在线学习与模型基础能力，揭示了对更优持续学习系统的需求。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏高质量的持续学习基准来评估AI系统是否真正通过顺序经验实现改进，尤其在多样化现实场景中。已有方法难以区分系统是因持续学习而进步，还是仅依赖模型本身的预训练能力。因此亟需一个专家验证、结构严谨、覆盖广泛领域的基准来推动该方向研究。
AI.method: 提出并构建CL-Bench基准，涵盖六个不同领域，每个领域由领域专家验证；任务设计具有可学习的潜在结构（如代码布局、疫情动态、对手策略），使得只有具备状态记忆的系统能在线发现规律；采用多种智能体架构进行对比测试（包括ICL、带记忆的系统等），并引入增益度量来分离在线学习效果与模型原始能力。
AI.result: 实验发现，当前主流模型在持续学习中仍存在显著缺陷：普遍存在对即时观测的过拟合、跨任务知识复用不足；专用记忆系统并未有效改善这些缺陷，甚至在某些情况下表现不如简单的上下文学习（ICL）。这表明现有方法在持续学习方面仍有巨大提升空间。
AI.conclusion: CL-Bench是首个在真实多领域中经专家验证、能够有效隔离在线学习与模型固有能力的持续学习基准，揭示了当前大语言模型在持续学习方面仍存在严重不足，亟需开发更先进的持续学习机制。

title: PlanBench-V: A Spatial Planning Map Benchmark for Vision-Language Models
summary: Spatial planning maps are central to territorial governance, translating planning objectives, regulations, and spatial strategies into visual forms for decision-making, public communication, and institutional coordination. Their interpretation, however, requires fine-grained visual perception, spatial reasoning, and policy-informed professional judgment, creating major challenges for both human learners and AI systems. With the rapid progress of Vision-Language Models (VLMs), their use in urban planning analysis is gaining attention, yet existing multimodal benchmarks mainly target general visual understanding and overlook the domain-specific cognitive processes of planning practice. To address this gap, we introduce PlanBench-V, the first comprehensive benchmark for evaluating VLMs in spatial planning map interpretation. We first build the Spatial Planning Map Database (SPMD), an expert-annotated dataset of 223 planning maps and 1629 question-answer pairs curated by professional planners, covering diverse geographic regions and cartographic styles. We then propose a theory-informed evaluation framework assessing four progressive capabilities: Perception, Reasoning, Association, and Implementation, corresponding to the cognitive pipeline of planning map interpretation. Extensive experiments across two generations of VLMs show clear progress but persistent limitations. The best 2026 agentic reasoning model, Qwen3.6-Plus, substantially outperforms the best 2025 model, GPT-4o, by 27%. Nevertheless, all models still struggle with implementation-oriented tasks requiring evaluative judgment, policy sensitivity, and constraint-aware decision-making. These findings reveal fundamental limitations of current VLMs in professional planning contexts and highlight the need for domain-adaptive multimodal reasoning frameworks. Code and data are available at https://plangpt.github.io.

AI.tldr: 提出PlanBench-V基准，评估视觉-语言模型在空间规划图解读中的表现。构建了由专业规划师标注的SPMD数据集，涵盖223张规划图和1629个问答对，设计了感知、推理、关联、实施四阶段评估框架。实验表明，尽管最新模型（如Qwen3.6-Plus）显著优于旧模型（如GPT-4o），但在涉及政策敏感性与约束决策的任务中仍表现不佳，揭示当前VLMs在专业规划场景下的根本局限，强调需发展领域自适应的多模态推理框架。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型在城市规划分析中虽受关注，但主流多模态基准缺乏对规划实践特有的认知过程考量，难以有效评估模型在空间规划图解读中的能力。
AI.method: 构建专家标注的SPMD数据集，设计基于理论的四阶段评估框架（感知、推理、关联、实施），用于系统评估两代VLMs在规划地图理解中的表现。
AI.result: 最新模型Qwen3.6-Plus相比GPT-4o提升27%，但在实施类任务（需政策判断与约束意识）上仍表现薄弱，表明当前VLMs在专业规划场景中存在根本性局限。
AI.conclusion: 当前VLMs在空间规划地图解读中虽有进展，但仍无法满足专业实践需求，亟需发展面向领域的自适应多模态推理框架。

title: Balancing Image Compression and Generation with Bootstrapped Tokenization
summary: Despite progress in image tokenization, standard methods encode redundant information by mixing all granularities within each token, thus redundancy persists between tokens. The mix of information of different granularity also complicates the training of generators. This paper introduces SelfBootTok, a method that resolves this by cleanly decomposing information into global and local token groups. Through self-bootstrapped learning, the model predicts local details exclusively from global tokens, shifting the burden of visual details from the generator to the tokenizer. Consequently, our generator is far more efficient, requiring only global tokens and reducing computation by approximately 40%, while delivering superior reconstruction and generation. Moreover, this paradigm scales elegantly: by leveraging more data or parameters to self-supervise local representation learning, SelfBootTok achieves a new state-of-the-art gFID score of 1.56 using only 64 tokens.

AI.tldr: SelfBootTok提出一种新的图像分块方法，通过自举学习将信息清晰地分解为全局和局部令牌组，使生成器仅需全局令牌即可高效生成，计算量减少约40%，并实现更优的重建与生成效果。该方法在64个令牌下达到1.56的gFID新纪录，具有良好的可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有图像分块方法在每个令牌中混合不同粒度的信息，导致冗余且增加生成器训练难度。需要一种更高效、低冗余的分块方式以提升生成效率与质量。
AI.method: 提出SelfBootTok方法，利用自举学习让模型仅从全局令牌预测局部细节，从而将视觉细节的负担从生成器转移到分块器，实现全局与局部信息的解耦。
AI.result: 生成器效率显著提升，计算量降低约40%；在仅使用64个令牌的情况下，实现1.56的gFID新纪录，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SelfBootTok通过信息解耦与自监督学习，实现了高效且高质量的图像生成，具备良好的可扩展性，为图像生成模型设计提供了新范式。

title: Let It Be Simple: One-Step Action Generation for Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Diffusion-based vision-language-action (VLA) models often inherit the image-generation view: actions are generated by iterative denoising. We argue that VLA action generation has a different condition-target structure: the policy is conditioned on rich observations, language, and state, but predicts only a compact, low-dimensional action chunk. Under this asymmetry, strong one-step action generation should not necessarily require the advanced one-step methods developed for image synthesis. We keep standard velocity prediction and add no teacher model, distillation stage, or auxiliary objective; in our main recipe, we simply bias the training time distribution toward high-noise states. We first isolate the effect in a controlled MNIST grid-to-sequence task, then test it with extensive robot-policy experiments. Across standard LIBERO, LIBERO-Plus, and LIBERO-Pro, one-step policies trained with high-noise biased schedules generally match ten-step decoding under the same recipe, and on standard LIBERO can exceed ten-step policies trained with a uniform time distribution. A real-robot bimanual YAM RSS evaluation gives a small-sample cross-architecture check of the same sampler trend. On a 1.4B VLM model with a 30M action head, one-step decoding reaches 95.6\% on LIBERO-Long. These results show that strong one-step VLA action generation can emerge from standard diffusion training, without importing the full few-step diffusion machinery developed for image generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出，基于扩散模型的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）系统在动作生成上应采用单步生成策略，而非模仿图像生成中的多步去噪。通过在训练中偏向高噪声状态，仅使用标准速度预测，无需教师模型或辅助目标，即可实现与十步解码相当甚至更优的性能。实验在多个机器人任务和真实机器人场景中验证了该方法的有效性，表明强大的单步动作生成可从标准扩散训练中自然涌现。
AI.motivation: 当前扩散模型在视觉-语言-动作任务中沿用图像生成的多步去噪范式，但动作生成具有不同的条件-目标结构：输入丰富，输出紧凑且低维。因此，强单步生成未必需要复杂的多步扩散架构。本文旨在探索是否可通过简单调整训练分布实现高效单步动作生成。
AI.method: 在标准扩散模型框架下，保持速度预测机制不变，仅通过偏向训练时的高噪声状态来调整时间分布；不引入教师模型、蒸馏阶段或辅助损失函数，直接进行单步动作采样。
AI.result: 在MNIST网格任务和多个机器人基准（LIBERO、LIBERO-Plus、LIBERO-Pro、LIBERO-Long）上，高噪声偏置的单步策略表现媲美甚至超越十步解码；真实机器人双臂任务验证了该方法的跨架构泛化能力；1.4B VLM模型结合30M动作头在LIBERO-Long上达到95.6%成功率。
AI.conclusion: 强大的单步视觉-语言-动作生成可在不依赖复杂多步扩散机制的情况下，通过简单的训练分布调整实现，表明现有扩散框架已足够支持高效动作生成。

title: Do More Agents Help? Controlled and Protocol-Aligned Evaluation of LLM Agent Workflows
summary: Does adding more agents help an LLM workflow once compared systems share the same benchmark loader, tool access, answer contract, usage accounting, and trajectory logging? We introduce BenchAgent, an evaluation framework that places single-agent, fixed multi-agent (MAS), and evolving MAS workflows under one normalized execution and logging protocol. BenchAgent evaluates these substrate-internal workflows across ten reasoning, coding, and tool-use benchmarks with GPT-4.1, and separately reports a Protocol-Aligned External (PAE) GAIA study of a runtime-generated workflow. Under SI conditions, at most one of six tested MAS exceeds the matched single-agent anchor on benchmark-balanced average accuracy: EvoAgent lies within the Wilson one-run guidance, while the remaining five trail by 2.56-11.29 points and occupy more expensive accuracy-cost trade-offs. On the PAE GAIA snapshot, a Claude-Code-style runtime workflow reaches 66.72% overall and 69.23% on Level 3, more than 20 points above the strongest non-Claude baseline, Jarvis, a fixed MAS.

AI.tldr: BenchAgent框架评估了单智能体、固定多智能体（MAS）和演化多智能体工作流在统一执行与日志协议下的表现。在相同基准加载器、工具访问、答案契约、使用计费和轨迹日志条件下，多数多智能体系统未超越单智能体基线，仅EvoAgent接近其性能；而在外部运行时生成的工作流（如Claude-Code风格）在GAIA测试中显著领先，达到66.72%总体准确率，远超其他基线。
AI.motivation: 探究在标准化环境下，增加智能体数量是否能提升LLM工作流的性能，尤其是在共享基础设施的前提下，以避免评估偏差。
AI.method: 提出BenchAgent框架，统一多智能体与单智能体工作流的执行与日志协议，通过十项推理、编码与工具使用基准对GPT-4.1进行评估，并引入外部运行时生成工作流的PAE GAIA研究。
AI.result: 在标准内部（SI）条件下，仅有少数多智能体系统接近单智能体基线，其余均表现更差且代价更高；而运行时动态生成的workflow（如Claude-Code风格）在GAIA上实现66.72%整体准确率，显著优于固定多智能体基线（如Jarvis）。
AI.conclusion: 在标准化条件下，简单增加智能体数量并不能保证性能提升；真正的性能突破来自动态演化或运行时生成的工作流设计，而非单纯增加代理数量。

title: MARDoc: A Memory-Aware Refinement Agent Framework for Multimodal Long Document QA
summary: Iterative retrieval-reasoning agents have recently shown promise for multimodal long-document question answering. However, most existing systems maintain a single growing context that mixes retrieval traces, observations, and intermediate reasoning. As interactions accumulate, key evidence becomes scattered and diluted, making multi-hop reasoning noisy. We propose MARDoc, a Memory-Aware Refinement Agent framework that decouples long-document QA into three specialized agents: an Explorer for multi-granularity multimodal retrieval, a Refiner for distilling interaction traces into structured evidence and reasoning memories, and a Reflector for checking evidence sufficiency and providing targeted feedback. Across iterations, the agents rely on a dynamically updated structured memory rather than a full accumulated interaction history. This design reduces context noise while preserving answer-critical facts and their logical dependencies. Experiments on MMLongBench-Doc and DocBench show that MARDoc achieves strong results, outperforming same-backbone baselines and demonstrating the effectiveness of structured memory for agentic document QA.

AI.tldr: MARDoc提出一种记忆感知的精炼代理框架，通过分离检索、精炼和反思三个专用代理，实现多粒度跨模态文档问答。该框架利用动态更新的结构化记忆，避免传统方法中上下文噪声累积问题，显著提升多跳推理的准确性和可解释性。在MMLongBench-Doc和DocBench上的实验表明，MARDoc优于同类基线模型，验证了结构化记忆在智能体文档问答中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有迭代式检索-推理代理在处理长文档时面临上下文噪声积累的问题，关键证据被稀释和分散，影响多跳推理的准确性与可解释性。因此需要一种更高效的信息组织机制来保持答案相关事实及其逻辑依赖关系。
AI.method: MARDoc框架包含三个专用代理：Explorer负责多粒度多模态检索；Refiner将交互轨迹提炼为结构化证据与推理记忆；Reflector评估证据充分性并提供针对性反馈。三者共同维护一个动态更新的结构化记忆，而非全量累积的历史记录。
AI.result: 在MMLongBench-Doc和DocBench两个基准上，MARDoc均取得优于相同骨干网络基线的表现，证明其在减少上下文噪声、增强推理能力方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MARDoc通过引入结构化记忆与分角色协作机制，有效缓解了长文档问答中因上下文膨胀导致的推理退化问题，为构建高效、可扩展的多模态智能体系统提供了新范式。

title: Representation Learning Enables Scalable Multitask Deep Reinforcement Learning
summary: Scaling reinforcement learning (RL) to diverse multitask settings remains a central challenge. While recent advances in model-based RL achieve strong performance, they rely on planning and complex training pipelines, making it unclear which components are essential for scalability. We revisit this question and argue that the primary driver of scalable multitask RL is not model-based control, but \emph{representation learning}. In particular, we show that combining predictive, model-based representations with high-capacity value function approximation is sufficient to achieve strong performance, even without planning. We evaluate a simple model-free algorithm, MR.Q, coupled with auxiliary predictive objectives into a scalable actor-critic architecture. This approach outperforms a recent world-model-based method and a range of deep RL baselines across a diverse suite of multitask continuous control tasks, while significantly reducing computational overhead and improving wall-clock efficiency. We observe consistent improvements with increased model capacity and show through ablations that predictive representation learning is critical for performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出，在多任务强化学习中，可扩展性的关键并非基于模型的控制，而是表示学习。通过将预测性、基于模型的表示与高容量价值函数近似结合，即使不依赖规划，也能实现优异性能。作者提出一种简单的无模型算法MR.Q，结合辅助预测目标，构建可扩展的演员-评论家架构，在多个连续控制任务上优于现有世界模型方法和深度强化学习基线，同时显著降低计算开销并提升实际运行效率。实验表明，增加模型容量能持续提升性能，且预测表示学习对性能至关重要。
AI.motivation: 当前基于模型的强化学习虽表现良好，但依赖复杂规划和训练流程，其核心贡献成分不明确。本文旨在探究多任务强化学习可扩展性的真正驱动力，挑战‘基于模型控制是关键’的主流观点。
AI.method: 提出MR.Q算法，采用无模型框架，结合预测性辅助目标（如自回归重建）与高容量值函数近似，构建可扩展的演员-评论家架构，无需显式规划。
AI.result: MR.Q在多种多任务连续控制任务上超越了基于世界模型的方法和多个深度强化学习基线，计算开销更低，运行效率更高；随着模型容量增加，性能持续提升；消融实验证明预测表示学习是性能关键。
AI.conclusion: 可扩展的多任务强化学习的核心在于表示学习，特别是预测性模型表示与高容量值函数的结合，而非复杂的规划机制。该发现为高效、轻量化的多任务强化学习提供了新范式。

title: Cosine Misleads: Auxiliary Losses Reshape Vision Language Models, Not Their Latents
summary: Latent visual reasoning (LVR) inserts supervised latent tokens between perception and answer generation in vision-language models (VLMs). The field uses alignment between these latents and their visual targets, i.e., cosine similarity or mean squared error (MSE), as both the training loss and the quality metric, assuming that better alignment yields a better answer. We test this with a designed matrix of five LVR variants and find the assumption inverted: cosine alignment is negatively correlated with accuracy across all five (r=-0.94). To explain this, we introduce PRISM, a pair of inference-time diagnostics: a linear probe that asks where the answer is decodable, and a corruption test that asks whether the latent is load-bearing. The supervised latents are largely bypassed. Corrupting them shifts accuracy by at most four points. The answer is decodable downstream of the latent but not at it, and the size of this decodability gap predicts how much each variant relies on its latent under perturbation. Consistent with an Information Bottleneck reading of the loss, the auxiliary objective reshapes the language model via shared parameters rather than via the latent variable it nominally optimizes.

AI.tldr: Latent visual reasoning (LVR) in vision-language models uses supervised latent tokens between perception and answer generation, with alignment (e.g., cosine similarity, MSE) as both training loss and quality metric. However, this study finds that better alignment is negatively correlated with accuracy (r = -0.94), contradicting the assumption. Introducing PRISM diagnostics reveals that latents are largely bypassed: corrupting them has minimal impact on accuracy (<4 points). The answer is decodable downstream of the latent but not at it, and the gap in decodability predicts reliance on the latent. This suggests that the auxiliary objective reshapes the language model via shared parameters rather than optimizing the latent variable, consistent with an Information Bottleneck interpretation.
AI.motivation: To evaluate whether improved alignment between latent tokens and visual targets leads to better reasoning performance in vision-language models, especially in the context of Latent Visual Reasoning (LVR).
AI.method: A matrix of five LVR variants is tested, using cosine similarity and MSE as both training loss and evaluation metrics. PRISM, a pair of inference-time diagnostics—linear probe for answer decodability and corruption test for load-bearing capacity—is introduced to assess the role of latents. Perturbation experiments and analysis of decodability gaps are conducted.
AI.result: Cosine alignment is strongly negatively correlated with accuracy (r = -0.94). Latent tokens are largely bypassed: corruption causes minimal accuracy drop (<4 points). Answer decodability occurs downstream, not at the latent layer. The size of the decodability gap predicts variant dependence on the latent. The auxiliary objective primarily affects the language model through shared parameters, not the latent variable.
AI.conclusion: The assumption that better latent-target alignment improves reasoning accuracy is inverted. Latent tokens in LVR are not central to reasoning; instead, the model relies on shared parameters and downstream representations. The results support an Information Bottleneck view where the auxiliary loss indirectly shapes the model, undermining the intended role of the latent variable.

title: Beyond Output Matching: Preserving Internal Geometry in NVFP4 LLM Distillatio
summary: Demand for low-precision inference, including NVFP4-based approaches, has grown as large language models are increasingly deployed in latency and cost constrained production environments. Quantization-aware distillation (QAD) helps recover accuracy lost under low bit quantization by training a quantized student to match the output distribution of a frozen higher precision teacher via a KL-divergence loss. In this work, we first provide a representation level diagnosis of QAD: output matching alone can mask internal degradation, because many intermediate activation geometries can yield similar teacher-aligned logits. Using CKA, we show that KL-only QAD can reduce layerwise representational similarity relative to the BF16 teacher, with especially severe drift in RL-post-trained models. This drift correlates with downstream bottlenecks on reasoning and coding tasks, suggesting that low bit recovery requires preserving internal geometry rather than matching outputs alone. Motivated by this finding, we propose \textbf{CKA-QAD}, a CKA-guided representational alignment method for NVFP4 QAD and low bit LLM accuracy recovery. The method adds a lightweight regularizer that preserves internal representational geometry during distillation by aligning layerwise Gram matrices through CKA. Across Nemotron 3 Nano and Qwen3-4B-Thinking-2507, CKA-QAD substantially improves representational alignment and improves downstream reasoning and coding accuracy with modest training overhead. Our findings position CKA-guided representational alignment as a practical complement to output matching for quantized LLM recovery.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了低精度推理中量化感知蒸馏（QAD）的局限性，发现仅匹配输出分布无法恢复模型内部表征的几何结构，尤其在经过强化学习后训练的模型中表现更差。为此提出CKA-QAD方法，通过CKA引导的层间表示对齐来保留内部表征结构，在NVFP4量化下显著提升推理与编码任务性能，且训练开销小。
AI.motivation: 现有量化感知蒸馏（QAD）方法仅通过KL散度使学生模型输出匹配教师模型，但忽略了中间层激活的几何结构退化问题，导致模型在低比特量化下性能下降，尤其是在复杂任务如推理和编程中出现瓶颈。因此需要一种能够同时保持内部表示结构的方法以实现更有效的精度恢复。
AI.method: 提出CKA-QAD方法，引入基于中心核对齐（CKA）的轻量级正则项，通过最小化各层特征的Gram矩阵之间的相似性差异，实现层间表示的几何对齐，从而在蒸馏过程中保持量化后模型的内部结构与高精度教师模型一致。
AI.result: 在Nemotron 3 Nano和Qwen3-4B-Thinking-2507模型上，CKA-QAD显著提升了表示对齐程度，并在推理和编码任务中取得明显性能提升，同时训练成本增加极少，验证了其有效性与实用性。
AI.conclusion: CKA-guided representational alignment可作为量化低比特大模型精度恢复的有效补充，不仅优于仅依赖输出匹配的QAD方法，还为未来低精度部署提供了新的优化方向。

title: CollabBench: Benchmarking and Unleashing Collaborative Ability of LLMs with Diverse Players via Proactive Engagement
summary: While LLM-based agents excel at individual tasks, effective collaboration with realistic human partners remains challenging. Most of the existing conversation-level collaborative studies lack grounded interaction and behavioral execution, motivating the need for cooperative game environments that enable contextualized and immersive collaboration. To this end, this paper proposes CollabBench, a benchmark for evaluating and training collaborative agents in cooperative games. CollabBench features a Diverse Player Profile Simulation pipeline to model varied players behaviors, and a Collaborative Agentic Training paradigm that unifies reasoning, communication, and action via agentic rollouts, optimized with a hybrid reward balancing task efficiency and affective adaptation. We further extend classic environments to CWAH-MultiPlayer and Cook-MultiPlayer for systematic evaluation under diverse personalities. Experiments with efficiency and affective metrics show that our trained models outperform base models, achieving 19.5% higher efficiency and 24.4% improved affective performance. Further analysis reveals key collaborative limitations of existing models and offers insights for future collaborative training.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CollabBench，一个用于评估和训练协作智能体在合作游戏中的基准。该框架包含多样化的玩家行为模拟管道和统一推理、沟通与行动的协作智能体训练范式，通过混合奖励平衡任务效率与情感适应性。扩展的经典环境CWAH-MultiPlayer和Cook-MultiPlayer支持在多种人格类型下的系统评估。实验表明，所训练模型在效率上比基线模型高出19.5%，情感表现提升24.4%。分析揭示了现有模型在协作中的关键局限，并为未来研究提供指导。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的智能体在个体任务中表现优异，但在与真实人类伙伴协作时仍面临挑战。大多数对话级协作研究缺乏具身交互和行为执行，因此亟需能够实现情境化、沉浸式协作的合作游戏环境。
AI.method: 提出CollabBench基准，包含多样玩家行为模拟管道和协作智能体训练范式，通过智能体滚动优化推理、沟通与行动，并采用混合奖励机制平衡任务效率与情感适应性；扩展经典环境至CWAH-MultiPlayer和Cook-MultiPlayer以支持多角色协作评估。
AI.result: 所训练模型在效率指标上较基线提升19.5%，情感表现提升24.4%；实验揭示了现有模型在协作中的关键缺陷，为未来训练策略提供了改进方向。
AI.conclusion: CollabBench为合作智能体提供了有效的评估与训练平台，其训练范式显著提升了协作性能，同时揭示了当前模型在真实协作场景中的不足，推动了更自然、高效的人机协同发展。

title: Field Validation of a Multi-Resolution ConvLSTM Framework for Retaining Wall Deformation Prediction
summary: This study presents a comprehensive field validation of a multi-resolution Convolutional Long Short-Term Memory (ConvLSTM) framework for predicting retaining wall deformation during staged excavation. The framework is trained on Gaussian noise-augmented numerical simulations and integrates ConvLSTM models operating at different temporal resolutions through a stacking ensemble strategy. The proposed framework is validated using field monitoring data from 34 inclinometers across 11 excavation sites in South Korea. Site-wise prediction performance is systematically evaluated using multiple evaluation metrics, with analyses of the influence of temporal deformation irregularity and spatiotemporal prediction characteristics on model performance. The results demonstrate that the framework predicts retaining wall deformation associated with up to 5.0 m of additional excavation with an average mean absolute error of 1.4 mm and a coefficient of determination of 0.93 across the excavation sites. These results indicate that the framework, although trained exclusively on numerically simulated and augmented database, can be effectively applied to diverse field excavation conditions and achieve a reliable level of prediction accuracy in practical retaining wall deformation prediction.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过34个倾斜仪在韩国11个基坑现场的数据，验证了多分辨率卷积长短期记忆（ConvLSTM）框架在分阶段开挖过程中预测挡土墙变形的有效性。该框架基于高斯噪声增强的数值模拟数据训练，并采用堆叠集成策略整合不同时间分辨率的ConvLSTM模型。结果显示，该框架对最多5.0米额外开挖的挡土墙变形预测平均绝对误差为1.4毫米，决定系数达0.93，表明其虽仅在仿真数据上训练，仍可在多种现场条件下实现可靠且精确的预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有挡土墙变形预测方法在复杂现场条件下的泛化能力有限，尤其面对不同时间尺度的变形不规则性和空间异质性时表现不佳。因此，亟需一种能够融合多时空特征、具备强泛化能力的预测框架以提升实际工程中的预测可靠性。
AI.method: 提出一种多分辨率ConvLSTM框架，结合高斯噪声增强的数值模拟数据进行训练，并通过堆叠集成策略融合多个在不同时间分辨率下运行的ConvLSTM模型，从而捕捉不同时间尺度上的变形动态特征。
AI.result: 在11个韩国基坑现场的34个倾斜仪数据上验证，模型对最多5.0米额外开挖的预测平均绝对误差为1.4毫米，决定系数达到0.93，表现出优异的预测精度和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该多分辨率ConvLSTM框架虽仅依赖数值模拟与噪声增强数据训练，但在真实多样化的现场条件下展现出良好的泛化能力和高精度预测性能，适用于实际工程中挡土墙变形的可靠预测。

title: DRIFT: A Residual Flow Adapter for Decoding Continuous Outputs in Vision-Language Models
summary: Many modern vision-language models (VLMs) build on autoregressive decoding of discrete tokens. While text-based output interfaces enable scalable pretraining and strong zero-shot generalization across diverse tasks, they are poorly suited for problems that require precise continuous outputs, such as localizing temporal boundaries of events or generating robotic control actions. To address this challenge, we propose DRIFT, a general framework for adapting pretrained VLMs to continuous decoding tasks. DRIFT combines a base predictor, which provides a coarse estimate of the target output, with a generative refinement module based on flow matching that iteratively improves the prediction. This residual formulation transforms the generative modeling problem from learning a global output distribution to modeling a localized residual distribution around a strong prior, substantially simplifying optimization. We evaluate DRIFT on both perception and planning tasks, including visual grounding and robotic control. Across multiple tasks and architectures spanning MLLMs, VLAs, and WAMs, DRIFT consistently outperforms a strong set of regression- and generative-based solutions.

AI.tldr: DRIFT 是一种通用框架，用于将预训练的视觉-语言模型（VLMs）适配到连续解码任务中。它结合了一个提供粗略估计的基础预测器和一个基于流匹配的生成式精炼模块，通过残差形式将生成建模问题简化为围绕强先验的局部残差分布建模，从而显著降低优化难度。在视觉定位和机器人控制等感知与规划任务上，DRIFT 在多种模型架构（如 MLLMs、VLAs、WAMs）中均优于现有的回归和生成方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型多采用离散文本生成，虽利于预训练和零样本泛化，但难以处理需要精确连续输出的任务，如事件时间边界定位或机器人控制动作生成。因此亟需一种能有效适配连续输出的新方法。
AI.method: DRIFT 采用残差结构：首先由基础预测器给出粗略输出，再通过基于流匹配的生成式精炼模块迭代优化预测结果，将复杂全局分布学习转化为局部残差分布建模，提升训练效率与精度。
AI.result: 在多个感知与规划任务中，包括视觉定位和机器人控制，DRIFT 在不同模型架构下均表现出色，持续优于现有的回归与生成基线方法。
AI.conclusion: DRIFT 为预训练视觉-语言模型提供了有效的连续输出能力，通过残差式生成精炼机制，显著提升了对复杂连续任务的建模性能，具有广泛的适用性和优越性。

title: AdaMEM: Test-Time Adaptive Memory for Language Agents
summary: A central challenge for language agents is utilizing past experience to adapt to dynamic test-time conditions. While recent work demonstrates the promise of agentic memory mechanisms, most systems restrict retrieval to episode initiation. Consequently, agents are forced to rely on static guidance that becomes increasingly misaligned as long-horizon tasks unfold. To address this rigidity, we propose the Adaptive Memory Agent (AdaMEM), a novel framework for agent test-time adaptation. Without updating model parameters online, AdaMEM adapts agent behavior via a hybrid memory architecture: it maintains a long-term trajectory memory of raw experiences collected offline while generating dynamic short-term strategy memory on-the-fly to guide decision-making. This mechanism enables the trade-off between token efficiency and adaptability across varying inference-time compute levels. Empirically, AdaMEM significantly outperforms static memory baselines, achieving relative gains of up to 13% on ALFWorld and 11% on WebShop, with consistent leading performance extending to agentic search on HotpotQA. To further enhance this adaptation, we develop STEP-MFT, a Step-wise Memory Fine-Tuning technique that trains the policy to synthesize high-quality strategies from retrieved experiences, yielding additional performance gains. Our work establishes a new scaling dimension for agentic memory, supporting continuous reasoning and self-evolution post-deployment in real-world environments. Our code is available at https://github.com/yunx-z/AdaMEM.

AI.tldr: 提出AdaMEM框架，通过混合记忆架构实现语言代理在测试时的自适应，结合长期轨迹记忆与动态短期策略记忆，在不更新模型参数的情况下提升推理效率和适应性。实验显示在ALFWorld、WebShop和HotpotQA上性能显著优于基线，相对提升达13%和11%。进一步引入STEP-MFT方法，通过分步记忆微调优化策略生成质量，带来额外增益。该工作拓展了代理记忆的可扩展性，支持部署后持续推理与自我演化。
AI.motivation: 现有语言代理在测试时依赖静态记忆，难以应对动态变化的任务环境，导致行为逐渐偏离实际需求，亟需一种无需在线更新参数即可实现自适应的机制。
AI.method: 设计了一种混合记忆架构：长期保留离线收集的原始经验（轨迹记忆），同时实时生成动态短期策略记忆以指导决策；结合STEP-MFT技术，训练策略网络从检索经验中合成高质量策略。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld和WebShop上分别取得最高13%和11%的相对性能提升，且在HotpotQA上的代理搜索任务中表现领先，验证了方法在不同计算资源下的适应能力与高效性。
AI.conclusion: AdaMEM为语言代理提供了新的记忆扩展维度，支持部署后的持续推理与自我演化，是实现真实世界中智能体长期适应性的关键突破。

title: Can LLMs Be Constrained to the Past? Improving Knowledge Cutoff through Recall-Based Prompting
summary: Prompted knowledge cutoff instructs a large language model (LLM) to act as if information beyond a specified cutoff date were unavailable. However, prior work mainly relies on direct-answer generation, which struggles when post-cutoff knowledge is not explicitly queried but is only causally related to the question. To address this limitation, we propose two recall-based prompting strategies: Self-Recall (SR), which asks the model to restate its cutoff constraint, and Question-Recall (QR), which requires the model to recall question-relevant information valid under the cutoff. Across three existing benchmarks, our methods outperform both direct-answer prompting and conventional step-by-step reasoning baselines, with particularly strong improvements on counterfactual questions. To investigate robustness across different cutoff settings, we further construct the Multi-cutoff Historical Event Benchmark (MHEB), which evaluates the same question under multiple cutoff years. Results show that knowledge cutoff performance varies with cutoff distance, while combining SR and QR consistently yields the best performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种基于召回的提示策略（Self-Recall和Question-Recall），以解决大语言模型在知识截止后对隐含相关知识响应不佳的问题。实验表明，这些方法在多个基准上优于直接生成和传统逐步推理，尤其在反事实问题上表现突出。通过构建多截止时间历史事件基准（MHEB），研究发现性能随截止距离变化，而结合两种策略始终最优。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖直接回答生成，在处理与截止日期后知识存在因果关联但未被明确提问的问题时表现不佳。需要更有效的机制让模型主动识别并利用截止前的有效信息。
AI.method: 提出Self-Recall（要求模型重述截止约束）和Question-Recall（要求模型回忆与问题相关的截止前信息）两种召回式提示策略，并在多个基准上进行评估。
AI.result: 在三个现有基准上，所提方法优于直接回答和步骤推理基线，尤其在反事实问题上提升显著；在多截止时间基准MHEB中，性能随截止距离变化，但SR与QR结合始终表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 基于召回的提示策略能有效提升大语言模型在知识截止场景下的表现，尤其是当问题与截止后知识存在隐含关联时。结合Self-Recall和Question-Recall可实现更鲁棒、一致的性能。

title: Autoregressive Diffusion World Models for Off-Policy Evaluation of LLM Agents
summary: Evaluating large language model (LLM) agents in multi-turn interactive environments is expensive and risky, as it requires online environment interaction. We propose ADWM (Autoregressive Diffusion World Model), an evaluation framework that estimates the performance of a new LLM agent policy purely from pre-collected trajectories. The core idea is to learn a latent diffusion world model that simulates how the environment responds to the evaluation policy, without ever executing it in the real environment. Existing diffusion-based OPE methods guide full trajectories in a single pass by jointly diffusing states and actions, an assumption that breaks down for LLM agents whose actions are discrete text that must be sampled from the policy after observing the environment. Unlike autoregressive world models that suffer from compounding errors, ADWM models each transition as an independent denoising process, enabling reliable step-by-step rollouts where the world model and agent alternate in causal order. Crucially, the LLM agent under evaluation directly guides the diffusion generation at each step via a policy-conditioned score function, ensuring that simulated trajectories accurately reflect its decision-making patterns. Empirically, ADWM achieves accurate value estimates and evaluation reliability across diverse multi-turn agent tasks, demonstrating its promise as a practical framework for offline LLM agent evaluation.

AI.tldr: ADWM是一种基于扩散模型的离线评估框架，用于在不进行真实环境交互的情况下评估大型语言模型（LLM）代理在多轮交互任务中的表现。它通过学习一个潜在扩散世界模型来模拟环境对评估策略的响应，避免了在线交互的成本与风险。与传统方法不同，ADWM将每一步转换建模为独立的去噪过程，避免误差累积，并利用策略条件得分函数让待评估的LLM代理直接指导每一步的扩散生成，从而准确反映其决策模式。实验表明，ADWM在多种多轮任务中实现了高精度的价值估计和可靠的评估性能，展现出作为实用离线评估框架的巨大潜力。
AI.motivation: 现有评估方法在多轮交互环境中评估大语言模型代理时成本高昂且存在风险，因为需要在线执行真实环境交互。因此，亟需一种无需实际运行即可评估代理性能的方法，以提升评估效率与安全性。
AI.method: 提出ADWM（自回归扩散世界模型），通过学习一个潜在扩散世界模型来模拟环境对代理策略的响应。该模型将每个状态转移视为独立的去噪过程，避免误差累积；同时引入策略条件得分函数，使待评估的LLM代理在每一步直接引导扩散生成，确保模拟轨迹真实反映其决策行为。
AI.result: ADWM在多个多轮交互任务中实现了高精度的价值估计，表现出优异的评估可靠性，证明其在离线评估场景下的有效性与实用性。
AI.conclusion: ADWM是一种高效、可靠且无需真实环境交互的离线评估框架，能够准确评估大语言模型代理在复杂多轮任务中的表现，具有广泛的应用前景。

title: Physics-Guided Deep Unfolding for Blind Cross-Sensor Spectral Super-Resolution via Learning the Spectral Transformation Function
summary: Hyperspectral imaging provides rich spectral information for quantitative remote sensing, yet hyperspectral sensors remain costly and thus unavailable in many UAV deployments. Spectral super-resolution (SSR) seeks to reconstruct hyperspectral images (HSIs) from multispectral images (MSIs). Most existing SSR methods assume a fixed and known spectral response function (SRF) and are therefore limited to single-sensor settings. In practical cross-sensor scenarios, the spectral degradation from HSI to MSI is unknown and varies with sensor characteristics and scene content, which renders HSI reconstruction ill-posed. This paper proposes a physics-guided deep unfolding network, termed PGU-Net, to address blind cross-sensor SSR by jointly estimating the HSI and a learnable spectral transformation function (STF). PGU-Net unrolls an alternating optimization procedure into an end-to-end trainable architecture with stages, where each stage sequentially updates the HSI and the STF. Both modules combine learnable proximal networks with differentiable closed-form solvers, enabling physical interpretability while retaining strong representation capacity. Experiments on benchmark datasets (CAVE and NTIRE 2022) with multiple SRFs demonstrate accurate recovery of the STF (degradation operator) and improved reconstruction performance over state-of-the-art SSR methods. Furthermore, evaluations on a real UAV cross-sensor dataset (Headwall Nano HSI and DJI P4 Multispectral MSI) verify the effectiveness and robustness of PGU-Net under truly blind conditions, and suggest that the estimated STF may exhibit land-cover-related differences.

AI.tldr: 提出PGU-Net，一种基于物理引导的深度展开网络，用于解决盲跨传感器光谱超分辨率（SSR）问题。该方法联合估计高光谱图像（HSI）和可学习的光谱变换函数（STF），通过将交替优化过程展开为端到端可训练架构，每阶段依次更新HSI和STF。结合可学习的近端网络与可微闭式求解器，兼顾物理可解释性与强表达能力。在CAVE、NTIRE 2022及真实无人机跨传感器数据集上验证了其优越性能，能准确恢复退化算子并展现地表覆盖相关性特征。
AI.motivation: 现有SSR方法通常假设已知且固定的光谱响应函数（SRF），仅适用于单一传感器场景；而在实际跨传感器应用中，从高光谱到多光谱的退化过程未知且随传感器特性与场景内容变化，导致重建问题病态，亟需一种能够处理盲跨传感器情形的新方法。
AI.method: 提出物理引导的深度展开网络PGU-Net，将交替优化过程展开为多阶段端到端可训练结构。每个阶段包含两个模块：一个用于更新高光谱图像（HSI），另一个用于估计光谱变换函数（STF）。两者均结合可学习的近端网络与可微闭式求解器，实现物理可解释性与强大表示能力的平衡。
AI.result: 在标准数据集CAVE和NTIRE 2022上，PGU-Net在多种不同SRF设置下均实现了比现有最优方法更优的重建精度，并准确估计出退化算子（即STF）。在真实无人机跨传感器数据集（Headwall Nano HSI与DJI P4 Multispectral MSI）上的实验进一步验证了其在真正盲条件下的有效性与鲁棒性，且估计的STF表现出与地表覆盖相关的差异性。
AI.conclusion: PGU-Net成功解决了盲跨传感器光谱超分辨率难题，不仅提升了重建质量，还具备良好的物理可解释性，所估计的光谱变换函数可能反映真实场景中的地物特性，为未来多源遥感融合提供了新思路。

title: PerceptUI: LLM Agents as Human-Aligned Synthetic Users for UI/UX Evaluation
summary: User interface (UI) and user experience (UX) evaluation is central to product development, yet reliable feedback still relies on recruiting human participants or running online A/B tests, making early-stage iteration slow and costly. In light of this, recent work has explored Multimodal Large Language Models as proxy evaluators. However, existing approaches either produce surface-level critiques or a judgment that reflects the model's own biases rather than the genuine response of a particular user. We introduce PerceptUI, a framework for persona-conditioned UI/UX evaluation that predicts how a specific user would answer interface-related questions and produces natural-language rationales. PerceptUI is trained in two stages: (i) contrastive reflection fine-tuning distills teacher-generated rationales by extracting lessons from human decisions, and (ii) a reflective prompt-evolution step from the model's own failure traces. Across multiple domains and datasets, PerceptUI achieves human-level realism, generalizes to unseen questions and personas, and yields population-level response distributions.

AI.tldr: PerceptUI 是一种基于角色的用户界面/用户体验评估框架，通过两阶段训练（对比反思微调和模型自反思提示演化）实现对特定用户反应的自然语言推理与预测，达到人类级真实度并可泛化至未见问题和角色。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在用户界面/用户体验评估中依赖人力或 A/B 测试，成本高且迭代慢；而现有基于大模型的代理评估存在表面化批评或反映模型自身偏见的问题，缺乏对特定用户真实反应的模拟能力。
AI.method: PerceptUI 采用两阶段训练：(i) 对比反思微调，从人类决策中提取经验以提炼教师生成的解释；(ii) 反思式提示演化，基于模型自身的失败轨迹优化提示，从而提升对特定用户行为的预测能力。
AI.result: 在多个领域和数据集上，PerceptUI 达到人类级真实度，能有效泛化至未见问题和角色，并生成符合人群分布的响应结果。
AI.conclusion: PerceptUI 为早期产品迭代提供了高效、低成本且具有高度真实感的用户反馈模拟方案，显著提升了 UI/UX 评估的效率与准确性。

title: ProSPy: A Profiling-Driven SQL-Python Agentic Framework for Enterprise Text-to-SQL
summary: Large language models have substantially advanced Text-to-SQL systems, yet applying them to enterprise-scale databases remains challenging. Real-world databases often contain large and heterogeneous schemas, incomplete metadata, dialect-specific SQL syntax, and complex analytical questions that are difficult to solve with a single SQL query. To address these challenges, we propose ProSPy, a Profiling-driven SQL--Python agentic framework for enterprise-scale Text-to-SQL. ProSPy structures the reasoning process into four stages: it first extracts fine-grained data evidence through automatic profiling, progressively prunes large schemas into task-relevant contexts, fetches intermediate views through a dialect-agnostic SQL interface, and finally performs flexible downstream analysis with Python. This design combines the efficiency of SQL over large databases with the flexibility of Python-based analysis, while reducing reliance on unreliable metadata and improving robustness across SQL dialects. Experiments on Spider 2.0-Lite and Spider 2.0-Snow show that ProSPy consistently outperforms strong baselines with both open-source and proprietary models, achieving execution accuracies of 60.15% and 60.51% with Claude-4.5-Opus, without majority voting. Further analysis shows that ProSPy is robust to SQL dialect variations and achieves a favorable trade-off between schema recall and precision.

AI.tldr: ProSPy是一个面向企业级数据库的基于数据画像的SQL-Python智能体框架，通过四阶段流程（数据证据提取、模式裁剪、中间视图获取和Python分析）解决大规模异构数据库中的Text-to-SQL难题。它结合了SQL的高效性与Python的灵活性，减少对不可靠元数据的依赖，提升跨SQL方言的鲁棒性，在Spider 2.0-Lite和Spider 2.0-Snow上分别达到60.15%和60.51%的执行准确率，优于现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 企业级数据库通常具有大规模、异构的模式、不完整的元数据、特定方言的SQL语法以及复杂的分析问题，现有大语言模型在这些场景下表现受限，亟需一种更鲁棒、灵活且高效的Text-to-SQL解决方案。
AI.method: ProSPy采用四阶段推理流程：1）通过自动数据画像提取细粒度数据证据；2）逐步裁剪大型模式以聚焦任务相关上下文；3）通过方言无关的SQL接口获取中间视图；4）利用Python进行灵活的下游分析。该框架融合SQL的高效查询能力与Python的强大分析灵活性。
AI.result: 在Spider 2.0-Lite和Spider 2.0-Snow数据集上，ProSPy使用Claude-4.5-Opus模型实现60.15%和60.51%的执行准确率，无需多数投票，显著优于现有强基线。实验表明其对SQL方言变化具有鲁棒性，并在模式召回率与精确率之间取得良好平衡。
AI.conclusion: ProSPy为解决企业级文本到SQL转换中的复杂挑战提供了有效方案，通过数据驱动的渐进式推理机制，实现了高效、灵活且鲁棒的系统性能，具备实际部署潜力。

title: CLaaS: Continual learning as a service for sample efficient online learning
summary: Deployed large language model agents must adapt to distribution shift in dynamic environments. Ideally, adaptation can be performed from accumulated agent experiences and retain prior capabilities while transferring to future tasks. However, agent actions and environmental transitions can only be sampled once per scenario, as real-world environments cannot be trivially reset. To this end, we investigate an experiential and online continual learning setting in which agents learn from a stream of scenarios. We propose continual learning as-a-service (CLaaS), a system which enables agents to improve during deployment, abstracted behind a chat API. To increase sample efficiency, CLaaS stores rollouts in an experience replay buffer for gradient reuse during asynchronous training. We evaluate CLaaS on an adversarial task, demonstrating that parametric updates lead to superior forward transfer and less forgetting than in-context learning, with replay being a critical choice for sample efficiency.

AI.tldr: CLaaS 是一种用于部署中大型语言模型代理的持续学习系统，通过经验回放和异步训练实现在线、高效的持续学习，显著提升样本效率与任务迁移能力，减少遗忘。
AI.motivation: 真实世界环境无法轻易重置，导致代理只能在每个场景中采样一次，因此需要一种能够在不重置环境的情况下从累积经验中持续学习的方法。
AI.method: 提出 CLaaS 系统，利用经验回放缓冲区存储轨迹以实现梯度复用，并通过异步训练进行在线持续学习，抽象为聊天 API 供部署使用。
AI.result: 在对抗性任务上验证表明，参数更新比上下文学习具有更好的前向迁移效果和更少的遗忘，且经验回放对样本效率至关重要。
AI.conclusion: CLaaS 成功实现了部署中语言模型代理的高效持续学习，证明了经验回放与异步训练在动态环境中的关键作用。

title: ExpSpeech-Net: Multimodal Fusion of Expression and Speech for Deepfake Detection
summary: Deepfake videos are increasingly challenging the credibility of online content. Many existing detection methodology relies on complex, resource-intensive models, which limit their practical use. The study introduces the ExpSpeech-Net deepfake detection (SqN-R-DFD) model, which utilizes SqueezeNet and RNN (Recurrent Neural Network) as its backbone, providing a lightweight and efficient deepfake detection framework that simultaneously analyzes facial expressions and speech patterns. The approach incorporates advanced feature extraction, such as ISLBT-based features for image and MPNCC for signals, along with a smart feature-selection strategy using SASMA (Sandpiper-Assisted Slime Mould Algorithm), ensuring optimal and balanced input to the detection models. By combining SqueezeNet and an RNN, subtle inconsistencies in deepfake videos are captured effectively. The framework achieves 94.5% accuracy, precision of 99.3%, and F-measure of 96.8%, outperforming conventional methods. This demonstrates that integrating multiple modalities with intelligent preprocessing and feature selection enables practical, real-time deepfake detection suitable for everyday applications.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出一种轻量级的深伪视频检测模型ExpSpeech-Net（SqN-R-DFD），结合SqueezeNet与RNN，通过ISLBT图像特征和MPNCC信号特征进行多模态分析，并采用SASMA智能特征选择策略优化输入。模型在准确率（94.5%）、精确率（99.3%）和F-measure（96.8%）方面优于传统方法，具备实时检测潜力，适用于实际应用场景。
AI.motivation: 现有深伪视频检测方法多依赖复杂且资源消耗大的模型，难以实现高效实用的部署；亟需一种轻量化、高精度且适合实时应用的检测框架。
AI.method: 采用SqueezeNet作为图像主干网络，RNN处理语音信号，结合ISLBT图像特征与MPNCC信号特征，利用SASMA算法进行智能特征选择，实现多模态信息融合与优化输入。
AI.result: 模型在测试中达到94.5%的准确率、99.3%的精确率和96.8%的F-measure，显著优于传统方法，在保持低计算开销的同时实现高性能检测。
AI.conclusion: 通过多模态融合与智能预处理，ExpSpeech-Net实现了轻量化、高精度、可实时运行的深伪视频检测，具备广泛的实际应用前景。

title: Seeing Time: Benchmarking Chronological Reasoning and Shortcut Biases in Vision-Language Models
summary: Recent advancements in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have significantly enhanced their ability to interpret complex visual semantics, yet their capacity for chronological reasoning remains under-explored. In this paper, we introduce a novel benchmark specifically designed to evaluate how VLMs perceive and reason about chronological information within and across images. Unlike existing video-based benchmarks that focus on frame sequencing, our work delves into the underlying logic of chronological judgment and the expansion toward multimodal integration. To facilitate this, we construct three specialized datasets: one containing visually similar objects spanning long historical durations, another categorized by diverse event and object types, and a third pairing images with time-sensitive news text for cross-modal alignment. Through extensive experiments, we analyze whether models exhibit performance disparities across categories and, crucially, explore whether they rely on ``incorrect shortcuts'', such as image color rather than genuine chronological features. Our results reveal that while VLMs show promise, they frequently exploit superficial cues like grayscale versus color filters to bypass authentic chronological reasoning. By providing these high-quality datasets and a rigorous evaluation framework, we offer a diagnostic tool to identify current limitations and guide the development of more robust, logically grounded multimodal models. The source code is shown in https://github.com/LuoRenqiang/ChronoVision.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个新基准，用于评估视觉语言模型（VLMs）在图像中及跨图像的时序推理能力。构建了三个专用数据集：跨越长期历史的视觉相似对象、多样化事件与物体类型、以及图像与时间敏感新闻文本配对的数据集。实验发现VLMs常依赖颜色等表面线索而非真实时序特征进行判断，揭示其在逻辑推理上的局限性。研究为开发更稳健的多模态模型提供了诊断工具和高质量数据支持。
AI.motivation: 现有视频基准主要关注帧序列，而对图像中深层时序逻辑与跨模态整合的研究不足，亟需新基准来评估和推动VLMs在时序推理方面的能力发展。
AI.method: 构建三类数据集：1）跨越长期历史的视觉相似对象；2）多样事件与物体类型；3）图像与时间敏感新闻文本对齐。通过大规模实验分析模型在不同类别上的表现，并检测其是否依赖错误捷径（如颜色）进行判断。
AI.result: VLMs在时序推理任务中表现有限，普遍依赖图像颜色等表面特征而非真实时序信息，存在显著的“捷径依赖”问题。
AI.conclusion: 当前VLMs在时序推理上仍不成熟，易受表面线索误导。本研究提供的数据集与评估框架可有效诊断模型缺陷，指导未来更可靠、逻辑一致的多模态模型设计。

title: Mechanistic Insights into Functional Sparsity in Multimodal LLMs via CoRe Heads
summary: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) demonstrate remarkable proficiency on complex vision-language tasks, the mechanisms by which they extract query-relevant visual features from complex, noisy contexts remain opaque. In this paper, we present an in-depth interpretability study that uncovers a profound structural property within MLLMs: functional sparsity in cross-modal retrieval. Leveraging a token-level metric termed Retrieval Attention Mass (RAM), we identify and characterize a highly specialized subset of attention heads, referred to as Context-aware Retrieval (CoRe) heads. Across diverse visual domains and model scales, we observe a clear functional division: CoRe heads act as dedicated information extractors, while most other heads distribute attention over broader contextual regions. Causal interventions further demonstrate the necessity of these specialized heads. Ablating only the top 5% of CoRe heads causes significant degradation in multimodal reasoning performance, whereas ablating lower-ranked heads has minimal effect. Moreover, acceleration experiments validate the utility of CoRe heads, showing that leveraging this localized sparsity significantly accelerates inference while maintaining robust task performance. Our findings reveal a structural principle of functional sparsity within MLLMs, refining the current understanding of mechanistic interpretability and laying a theoretical foundation that can inspire future architecture design and model optimization.

AI.tldr: 本研究揭示了多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）中跨模态检索的函数稀疏性结构特性，通过引入令牌级度量Retrieval Attention Mass（RAM），识别出一类名为上下文感知检索（CoRe）头的专用注意力头。CoRe头在复杂视觉场景中专门提取查询相关特征，而其他头部则关注更广泛的上下文区域。因果干预实验表明，仅移除前5%的CoRe头就会显著降低模型性能，而移除低排名头部影响甚微。加速实验也验证了利用这种局部稀疏性的有效性，可在保持性能的同时显著提升推理速度。研究结果揭示了MLLMs中的功能稀疏性结构原则，为模型可解释性、架构设计和优化提供了理论基础。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型在复杂视觉-语言任务上表现优异，但其如何从复杂且嘈杂的上下文中提取与查询相关的视觉特征仍不清晰。本文旨在深入探究MLLMs内部机制，揭示其内在的功能结构规律，以增强对模型行为的理解并指导未来优化。
AI.method: 提出一种基于令牌级别的度量方法——检索注意力质量（RAM），用于量化注意力头在跨模态检索中的贡献；通过分析不同模型规模和视觉领域下的注意力分布，识别出具有高度专业化功能的上下文感知检索（CoRe）头；采用因果干预（ablation）实验评估这些头部的重要性，并通过加速实验验证其实际应用价值。
AI.result: 发现所有测试的MLLMs中均存在明显的功能稀疏性：只有少数（约前5%）的CoRe头承担关键的信息提取任务，其余头部主要负责全局上下文建模；移除这些核心CoRe头导致性能显著下降，而移除其他头部影响较小；利用该稀疏结构可实现推理加速，同时保持高任务性能。
AI.conclusion: MLLMs中存在一种由功能稀疏性驱动的内在结构原则，即部分注意力头高度专业化，专注于精准信息提取。这一发现不仅深化了对多模态模型工作机制的理解，也为未来的模型压缩、加速及架构创新提供了理论依据和实践路径。

title: AsyncWebRL: Efficient Multi-Step RL for Visual Web Agents
summary: Training vision-language web agents with multi-step RL is compute-intensive, with two dominant forms of inefficiency: idle GPUs in synchronous RL, and trajectories that use more steps and tokens than necessary. We present AsyncWebRL, which addresses both. On the system side, an asynchronous design overlaps rollout, gradient update, and policy refresh across iterations, paired with two web-agent-specific adaptations, namely an everlasting rollout pool and lightweight screenshot handling, that together deliver up to a $2.9\times$ end-to-end training-throughput speedup over the previously fastest open synchronous pipeline (WebGym). On the algorithmic side, we identify the per-trajectory normalizer $1/|τ_i|$ in multi-step GRPO as the root cause of trajectory-level and token-level inefficiency: because failures are systematically longer than successes, it down-weights the negative gradient on failed tokens, so the policy keeps producing verbose memory schemas. Replacing $1/|τ_i|$ with a constant $1/k$ breaks this coupling, contracting trajectories while preserving aggregate success. Together, these contributions set a new open-source state of the art on the WebGym out-of-distribution test split (+5.8% relative over the 42.9% prior best), with the largest gains on the harder slices (+42% relative on Medium, +48% relative on Hard).

AI.tldr: AsyncWebRL 提出异步训练框架与算法优化，显著提升视觉-语言网络代理的多步强化学习效率。系统层面通过异步设计、永恒回放池和轻量截图处理，实现最高 2.9 倍的训练吞吐量提升；算法层面将轨迹归一化项从 $1/|τ_i|$ 改为常数 $1/k$，减少冗余步骤与令牌消耗，同时保持成功率。该方法在 WebGym 异域测试集上达到新开源基准，相对此前最佳成绩提升 5.8%（42.9% → 47.7%），尤其在中等和困难任务上分别提升 42% 和 48%。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言网络代理的多步强化学习存在两大效率瓶颈：同步训练中的 GPU 空闲以及轨迹过长导致的计算浪费。失败轨迹因更长而被低估梯度，使策略持续生成冗长记忆结构，造成资源浪费。因此亟需系统与算法协同优化以提升训练效率与性能。
AI.method: 提出 AsyncWebRL 框架：系统侧采用异步设计，融合永恒回放池与轻量截图处理，实现滚动、梯度更新与策略刷新的重叠执行；算法侧将多步 GRPO 中的轨迹归一化因子 $1/|τ_i|$ 替换为常数 $1/k$，打破失败轨迹对梯度的抑制，压缩轨迹长度并保留整体成功概率。
AI.result: 在 WebGym 异域测试集上，模型性能相较之前最佳（42.9%）提升 5.8%（达 47.7%），在中等和困难子集上分别取得 42% 和 48% 的相对提升。系统层面实现最高 2.9 倍的端到端训练吞吐量加速，优于现有最快速度的同步开源框架 WebGym。
AI.conclusion: AsyncWebRL 通过系统与算法双路径优化，有效解决视觉-语言网络代理多步 RL 中的效率瓶颈，在性能与训练速度上均建立新的开源基准，为大规模网页智能体训练提供高效可行方案。

title: Imagine Before You Predict: Interleaved Latent Visual Reasoning for Video Event Prediction
summary: Video event prediction (VEP) requires models to infer unobserved future states from partial video evidence. Existing video MLLMs usually verbalize intermediate future reasoning in text space: once visual evidence is verbalized, fine-grained motion, geometry, and interaction cues can be lost, leading to plausible but visually ungrounded hallucinations. We introduce Future-L1, an interleaved latent visual reasoning framework that lets an MLLM alternate between language tokens and continuous latent visual spans during autoregressive decoding. To train this capability, we construct Future-L1-50K by selecting examples where future visual hints help prediction and align latent states to future-frame embeddings, then further optimize sampled latent trajectories with LA-DAPO, a latent-aware RL objective with outcome-contrastive and temporal-diversity rewards. Future-L1 achieves new state-of-the-art results on both benchmarks: on FutureBench, it improves Qwen3-VL-8B from 61.0 to 85.4 and exceeds the previous best Video-CoE by 10.4 points; on TwiFF-Bench, it improves the average score from 2.44 to 3.04. These results suggest that future-oriented video reasoning benefits from preserving intermediate visual semantics in latent space rather than translating every reasoning step into text.

AI.tldr: Future-L1提出一种交错的潜在视觉推理框架，通过在自回归解码中交替使用语言标记和连续潜在视觉段，保留中间视觉语义，避免因文本化导致的视觉幻觉。通过构建Future-L1-50K数据集并使用LA-DAPO强化学习目标优化潜在轨迹，该方法在FutureBench和TwiFF-Bench上均达到新最佳性能，证明了保留潜在视觉信息对视频未来预测的重要性。
AI.motivation: 现有视频多模态大模型在推理过程中将视觉证据转化为文本，导致运动、几何和交互等细粒度线索丢失，引发看似合理但缺乏视觉依据的幻觉问题。因此需要一种能保持中间视觉语义的推理机制。
AI.method: 提出Future-L1框架，允许多模态大模型在自回归解码中交替使用语言令牌和连续潜在视觉跨度；构建Future-L1-50K数据集，选取未来视觉提示有助于预测的样本，并对齐潜在状态与未来帧嵌入；采用LA-DAPO（潜意识感知强化学习）优化采样潜在轨迹，结合结果对比和时序多样性奖励。
AI.result: 在FutureBench上，相较于Qwen3-VL-8B的61.0提升至85.4，超过前最佳Video-CoE 10.4分；在TwiFF-Bench上平均得分从2.44提升至3.04，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 未来导向的视频推理应优先保留中间视觉语义在潜在空间中，而非将其全部转换为文本，这能有效提升预测准确性并减少视觉幻觉。

title: Critic-Guided Heterogeneous Multi-Agent Reasoning for Reliable Mathematical Problem Solving
