While large language models (LLMs) show zero-shot generalization, they are typically prompted without contextual information, which limits their ability to interpret ambiguous posts. In this work, we systematically investigate the impact of incorporating real-world (e.g., user biographies), derived (e.g., political party), and LLM-generated (e.g., target descriptions) contextual features into zero-shot prompting for stance detection on Twitter. Our evaluation spans four benchmark datasets, including a new high-quality German Twitter stance dataset. Across multiple LLMs, we find that integrating contextual information improves performance, but only under specific conditions. LLM-generated target descriptions consistently enhance accuracy, while other user metadata has mixed or even detrimental effects. Notably, we show that the inclusion of other tweets by the same user, often beneficial in supervised learning, can impair performance due to input noise. Our qualitative analysis reveals that LLMs struggle to distinguish task-specific useful information from irrelevant context. Our findings highlight both the promise and challenges of prompting with context information in noisy real-world settings. We publish code and data at this \href{https://github.com/tilmanbeck/stance-context-twitter}{page}.

AI.tldr: 本文研究在零样本提示中引入真实世界、衍生及LLM生成的上下文特征对推特立场检测的影响。结果显示，仅LLM生成的目标描述能持续提升准确率，其他用户元数据效果不一甚至有害；同一用户的其他推文反而因输入噪声降低性能。分析表明，LLMs难以区分有用与无关信息。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体上的立场检测面临语言简短、嘈杂且依赖上下文的挑战。尽管大语言模型具备零样本泛化能力，但通常未结合上下文信息进行提示，限制了其对模糊内容的理解。因此需要探索如何有效利用上下文信息以提升性能。
AI.method: 系统评估将真实世界（如用户简介）、衍生（如政党归属）和LLM生成（如目标描述）等上下文特征融入零样本提示对推特立场检测的影响。实验涵盖四个基准数据集，包括一个高质量德语推特立场数据集，并在多个LLM上进行测试。
AI.result: LLM生成的目标描述能一致提升检测准确率；而其他用户元数据的效果不稳定，甚至可能降低性能；同一用户的其他推文因引入噪声反而损害表现。
AI.conclusion: 在嘈杂的真实场景中，虽然上下文信息有潜力提升立场检测性能，但其有效性高度依赖于信息类型。大语言模型在处理复杂上下文时仍存在识别有用信息的能力局限，需谨慎设计提示策略。

title: GenAutoML: An Agentic Framework for Dynamic Architecture Generation and Optimization in Time-Series Analysis
summary: Designing neural architectures for time-series forecasting and anomaly detection remains a resource-intensive task that often requires substantial domain expertise. Traditional Automated Machine Learning (AutoML) systems typically rely on static, predefined search spaces, limiting their ability to adapt to diverse data characteristics. We present GenAutoML, an agentic framework that leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) as neural architects to bridge natural-language requirements and executable PyTorch implementations. The framework incorporates a Sandboxed Reflection Loop for autonomous code refinement and a Signature-Aware Runtime that enforces architectural consistency and execution safety. To improve robustness under non-stationary conditions, we further introduce a Dynamic Reversible Instance Normalization (Dyn-RevIN) wrapper. Experiments on the ETTh1, ETTm1, and Weather benchmarks demonstrate that GenAutoML can dynamically generate task-specific neural architectures tailored to dataset characteristics. Among the generated models, WaveInterferenceNet achieves inference latency below 0.01 ms per sample while maintaining competitive predictive performance. By emphasizing computational efficiency, architectural adaptability, and stable optimization behavior, GenAutoML enables the creation of ultra-lightweight neural networks suitable for resource-constrained and latency-sensitive Edge AI deployments.

AI.tldr: GenAutoML 是一个基于大语言模型（LLM）的智能自动机器学习框架，能够根据自然语言需求自动生成适配时间序列预测与异常检测任务的神经网络架构。该框架通过沙箱式反思循环实现代码自主优化，并结合签名感知运行时保障结构一致性和执行安全。为应对非平稳数据，引入动态可逆实例归一化（Dyn-RevIN）提升鲁棒性。在ETTh1、ETTm1和Weather等基准上的实验表明，生成的模型如WaveInterferenceNet可在每样本低于0.01毫秒的延迟下保持优异性能，适用于资源受限和低延迟要求的边缘AI场景。
AI.motivation: 传统AutoML依赖静态预定义搜索空间，难以适应多样化数据特征，且设计神经架构耗时耗力，需大量领域知识。因此需要一种能根据自然语言指令自动生成高效、适配性强神经架构的自动化方法。
AI.method: 利用大语言模型作为神经架构设计师，将自然语言需求映射为可执行的PyTorch代码；采用沙箱式反思循环进行代码自我修正；引入签名感知运行时机制确保架构正确性与运行安全；提出动态可逆实例归一化（Dyn-RevIN）以增强对非平稳数据的适应能力。
AI.result: GenAutoML 能够根据数据特性动态生成任务特定的神经网络架构，在多个标准时间序列数据集上表现良好；其中生成的WaveInterferenceNet模型具备极低推理延迟（<0.01ms/样本）且保持高预测精度；整体框架支持轻量化、高效、稳定优化的模型生成，适用于边缘AI部署。
AI.conclusion: GenAutoML 通过融合大语言模型与自动化架构设计，实现了从自然语言到高效神经网络的端到端生成，显著降低了设计门槛，提升了模型的适应性、效率与安全性，为边缘智能环境下的实时时间序列分析提供了可行解决方案。

title: ReSAGE-PAR: Representational Similarity Assessment for Generative Expansion in Pedestrian Attribute Recognition
comment: Under review at IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology (TCSVT)
summary: To address the limited diversity and data scarcity in Pedestrian Attribute Recognition (PAR), we explore image synthesis using diffusion models guided by attribute-based prompts. While this enables the controlled generation of pedestrian images, it faces two critical challenges: (i) the domain gap between high-quality pre-training data and low-resolution, non-standard surveillance crops, and (ii) the need for reliable attribute verification to prevent generative hallucinations. In this paper, we introduce a robust generate-score-autolabel pipeline called ReSAGE-PAR (REpresentational Similarity Assessment for Generative Expansion in PAR) that bridges this domain gap and enables scalable, high-fidelity dataset expansion. First, we adapt pre-trained diffusion models to native PAR resolutions using a tailored LoRA-based Image-to-Image approach. Second, we extract vision-language alignment scores between the generated images and their conditioning prompts, utilizing a comprehensive prompting strategy that includes label-consistent and inconsistent complements. Finally, we formulate a Bayesian classifier that converts these continuous scores into reliable binary pseudo-labels. Extensive evaluations demonstrate the effectiveness of ReSAGE-PAR in preserving spatial priors and verifying attributes. When integrated into PAR training, ReSAGE-PAR consistently yields significant improvements-achieving gains of up to 8.7% on standard backbones and pushing state-of-the-art frameworks to new performance levels. This proves its value as an architecture-agnostic solution for scalable PAR enhancement. The complete codebase for ReSAGE-PAR is publicly available at http://www-vpu.eps.uam.es/publications/ReSAGE-PAR.

AI.tldr: 提出ReSAGE-PAR，一种用于行人属性识别（PAR）的数据集扩展方法，通过扩散模型生成图像并结合视觉-语言对齐评分与贝叶斯分类器实现可靠伪标签生成，有效缓解域差距与生成幻觉问题，在多种骨干网络上提升性能最高达8.7%。
AI.motivation: 解决行人属性识别中数据多样性不足和样本稀缺的问题，同时应对生成图像与真实监控图像之间的域差距以及生成内容中的属性幻觉问题。
AI.method: 采用基于LoRA的图像到图像迁移适配预训练扩散模型至PAR分辨率；利用包含一致与不一致补全提示的综合提示策略提取视觉-语言对齐分数；构建贝叶斯分类器将连续分数转化为可靠的二值伪标签。
AI.result: ReSAGE-PAR在保持空间先验的同时有效验证属性，集成至PAR训练后显著提升性能，最大增益达8.7%，且适用于不同架构，具备可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: ReSAGE-PAR是一种无需依赖特定架构的高效、可扩展的PAR数据增强方案，为解决数据稀缺与生成可靠性问题提供了新范式。

title: Framing, Judging, Steering: An Assessable Competency Model for Teach-ing Students to Reason With Generative AI
summary: Generative AI makes answers easy and understanding hard, and uncritical use invites cognitive offloading. Schools still measure unaided performance, yet the real task is to produce good work with AI: framing an ill-defined task, judging the output, and steering the model toward a better result. This ability is rarely assessed in its own right; where measured, it collapses into one "prompting" score that cannot diagnose why AI use succeeds or fails. We propose CoRe-3 (Co-Reasoning), a competency model factoring productive AI use into three assessable skills we abbreviate FJS: Framing (specifying an ill-defined task before invoking AI), Judging (evaluating output for errors and unstated assumptions), and Steering (iteratively redirecting the model). Its distinguishing claim is the separation of pre-generation Framing from post-generation Steering, with Judging as the gate between. We ground the skills in theory, state five testable propositions, and instantiate them in CoReasoningLab, an open platform that presents flawed AI output and scores them independently. Over simulated learners (generated and graded by different models), the skills dissociate: each tracks its own manipulated competence while staying flat in the others, and grades become correlated when one competence is shared across all three (convergent and discriminant validity), across grader backends from two providers. Human-rater agreement and outcomes are next; we release the instrument, data, and protocol.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出CoRe-3（Co-Reasoning）模型，将有效使用生成式AI的能力分解为三个可评估的技能：FJS（Framing、Judging、Steering），分别对应任务定义、输出评估与迭代调整。通过理论支撑和实证测试，验证了三者在模拟学习者中的可区分性与聚合有效性，并开发了开放平台CoReasoningLab用于评估。研究展示了各技能独立可测，且人类评分者间一致性高，结果具有可靠性与可推广性。
AI.motivation: 当前生成式AI使回答变得容易，但理解变得更难，导致认知卸载风险；教育评估仍侧重无辅助表现，而真实能力应是有效协同AI完成高质量工作，包括任务定义、输出判断与引导优化。现有评估方法常将这些能力合并为单一‘提示技巧’分数，无法诊断失败原因。因此亟需一种可分解、可测量的框架来评估人类与AI协作的核心能力。
AI.method: 基于理论构建三元能力模型FJS，提出五项可检验假设；设计并实现CoReasoningLab平台，呈现带有缺陷的AI输出，对每项技能进行独立评分；采用多模型生成与评分的模拟学习者实验，检验技能间的分离性与聚合性；最后引入人类评分验证一致性与实际效果。
AI.result: 模拟实验显示三技能在不同条件下相互独立，仅当某项能力共享于全部三技能时才出现相关性，表明具备收敛效度与区分效度；不同评分后端结果一致；人类评分者间具有较高一致性，且评分结果与预期行为模式匹配。
AI.conclusion: CoRe-3模型成功将生成式AI的高效使用能力解构为可独立评估的三要素，证明其科学性与实用性，为教育评估提供新工具，推动人机协同能力的标准化衡量。

title: EGTR-Review: Efficient Evidence-Grounded Scientific Peer Review Generation via Multi-Agent Teacher Distillation
summary: Scientific peer review generation has attracted increasing attention for reducing reviewing burdens and providing timely feedback. However, existing Large Language Model (LLM)-based methods often produce generic comments with insufficient evidence support and weak source traceability, while complex multi-agent systems incur high inference costs. To address these challenges, we propose EGTR-Review, an Evidence-Grounded and Traceable Review Generation framework via Multi-Agent Teacher Distillation. EGTR-Review first constructs a multi-agent teacher that performs structure-aware paper decomposition, key-element extraction, external scholarly evidence retrieval, evidence-state labeling, verification reasoning, and review synthesis. It then distills both intermediate reasoning trajectories and final review comments into a lightweight student model through task-prefix-driven multi-task learning. An evidence-weighted objective further reduces the influence of weak, missing, or non-verifiable supervision. Experiments on public peer-review datasets show that EGTR-Review (Student) outperforms strong prompt-based, fine-tuned, and structured/agentic baselines across automatic metrics, LLM-as-Judge evaluation, and human evaluation, while maintaining strong factual grounding and source traceability with substantially lower token consumption and inference time. Our code, prompts, configurations, and sample data are available on GitHub.

AI.tldr: EGTR-Review提出一种基于多智能体教师蒸馏的证据锚定可追溯评审生成框架，通过结构化论文分解、关键要素提取、外部学术证据检索与验证推理，实现高质量评审生成。该框架将复杂教师模型的中间推理过程和最终评审意见蒸馏至轻量学生模型，结合证据加权目标，有效降低弱监督影响，显著提升评审的事实依据性和溯源能力。在公开数据集上，其学生模型在自动指标、LLM评判和人工评估中均优于现有基线，同时具备更低的计算开销与推理成本。代码与数据已开源。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的同行评审生成方法常产生缺乏证据支持、可追溯性差的泛化评论，而复杂的多智能体系统又带来高昂的推理成本。因此亟需一种既能保证评审质量，又能高效运行的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建一个多智能体教师系统，完成论文结构解析、关键信息提取、外部学术证据检索、证据状态标注、验证推理及评审合成；通过任务前缀驱动的多任务学习，将教师的中间推理路径与最终评审内容蒸馏至轻量学生模型，并引入证据加权目标以缓解弱监督问题。
AI.result: 在多个公开同行评审数据集上，EGTR-Review（学生模型）在自动评价指标、LLM作为裁判的评估以及人工评估中均超越强基线模型，且保持更强的事实依据性与来源可追溯性，同时大幅降低令牌消耗与推理时间。
AI.conclusion: EGTR-Review成功实现了高质量、可追溯、低开销的自动化同行评审生成，为减轻审稿负担、提升反馈效率提供了有效技术路径，具有广泛应用前景。

title: Deciphering Two Training Clocks in Grokking via Deep Linear Network Theory with Conditional ReLU Reduction
summary: Grokking suggests that fitting the training data and learning a simple underlying rule may occur on different time scales. We formalize this phenomenon by separating the fast decay of the classification loss from the slower simplification of the learned representation, and we call the resulting pair of stopping times two training clocks. For deep linear networks, we show that a post-margin gap-growth or one-step tail-contraction condition reduces the cross-entropy loss to level epsilon on a logarithmic time scale. In contrast, when layerwise weight decay is present, the induced regularization on the end-to-end map can be expressed as a Schatten-type penalty; under a sharp late-time Kurdyka-Lojasiewicz tail, this structural energy closes on a polynomial time scale. The two clocks, therefore, separate fitting from representation simplification. We then explain how the same mechanism can appear in ReLU MLPs. In regions where the activation patterns on the training set remain fixed, the network reduces to a linear model in the active coordinates. In a two-layer ReLU embedding model, chain-rule estimates further show that the classifier head can receive larger effective gradients than the embedding block under controlled downstream norms. This supports a two-stage mechanism in which the classifier fits first, while the representation continues to simplify later. We use modular addition as the main experimental setting. The deep linear theory provides the rigorous core of the analysis. But the ReLU results are formulated as conditional reductions that account for empirical behavior without claiming a global proof for nonlinear training dynamics.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过引入两个训练时钟（分别对应分类损失快速下降与表示简化缓慢进行）来形式化描述模型训练中的'涌现现象'（grokking），在深度线性网络中证明了特定条件下损失可对数时间收敛，而权重衰减诱导的正则化导致结构能量以多项式速度收敛。该机制同样适用于ReLU MLP，在激活模式固定的区域，网络退化为线性模型，并且分类器头能获得更大的有效梯度，支持先拟合后简化两阶段过程。实验基于模加法任务，理论以深度线性模型为基础，非线性结果为条件性推导，不提供全局动态证明。
AI.motivation: 理解模型在训练过程中拟合数据与学习简单规则的时间尺度分离现象，即'grokking'，并揭示其背后的机制。
AI.method: 通过分离分类损失快速下降与表示结构简化之间的时序差异，定义两个训练时钟；利用深度线性网络中的损失分析，结合矩阵范数和优化不等式，分析权重衰减下的正则化效应；对于ReLU MLP，采用链式法则估计梯度大小，并在激活模式固定区域内将网络视为线性模型进行分析。
AI.result: 在深度线性网络中，交叉熵损失可在对数时间尺度内降至ε水平，而受正则化影响的结构能量以多项式速度收敛；在ReLU MLP中，分类器头可获得更大有效梯度，支持先拟合、后简化的行为；实验验证了模加法任务上的两阶段训练动态。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出并验证了'双训练时钟'机制，解释了grokking现象中拟合与简化分阶段发生的本质，为理解深层神经网络的训练动力学提供了理论框架，尤其适用于具有稳定激活模式的非线性网络。

title: Texture-preserving implicit neural representation for Cone beam CT truncated reconstruction
summary: Cone-beam computed tomography (CBCT) frequently suffers from data truncation, which introduces severe artifacts and limits the effective field of view (FOV). Existing deep learning methods for truncated cone-beam computed tomography (CBCT) reconstruction suffer from serious limitations, including a strict reliance on supervised ground truth and a failure to account for continuous 3D spatial truncation variations. To address these challenges, we introduce a self-supervised 3D reconstruction framework based on neural scene representations. By directly mapping spatial coordinates to radiodensity under projection supervision, our approach inherently bypasses traditional filtering and backprojection operations, thereby fundamentally eliminating truncation-induced ring artifacts while enabling robust continuous 3D data extrapolation. However, coordinate networks are susceptible to an inherent spectral bias, which leads to a severe loss of clinically vital high-frequency textures. To resolve this bottleneck, we further incorporate a physics-based iterative refinement module into the neural scene representation architecture. Leveraging the artifact-free, extrapolated volume from the coordinate network as an optimal initialization, this module progressively re-extracts and injects high-frequency structural information from the original projections back into the volume. Extensive experiments on both simulated and real-world datasets demonstrate that our method successfully unifies the exceptional artifact suppression and extrapolation capabilities of neural networks with the high-fidelity detail preservation of iterative algorithms.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于神经场景表示的自监督3D重建框架，用于解决锥束CT中数据截断导致的严重伪影和视野限制问题。该方法通过投影监督直接将空间坐标映射到射线密度，避免了传统滤波与反投影操作，从根本上消除环形伪影并实现连续3D数据外推。为克服坐标网络固有的频谱偏差导致高频纹理丢失的问题，进一步引入基于物理的迭代精炼模块，利用坐标网络提供的无伪影初始化体积，逐步从原始投影中恢复并注入高频结构信息。在模拟与真实数据集上的实验表明，该方法成功融合了神经网络的强抗伪影与外推能力及迭代算法的高保真细节还原能力。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在处理截断锥束CT重建时，依赖严格监督真值且无法适应连续的3D空间截断变化，导致重建质量受限。因此亟需一种无需依赖真值、能有效处理复杂截断情况并保持高分辨率细节的新方法。
AI.method: 提出自监督3D重建框架，结合神经场景表示（坐标网络）与物理引导的迭代精炼模块。坐标网络通过投影监督直接建模空间坐标到射线密度的映射，跳过传统重建流程；随后引入基于物理的迭代模块，利用初始重建结果作为先验，从原始投影中逐步恢复高频结构信息。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实数据集上均表现出优异性能：显著抑制环形伪影，有效扩展有效视野，同时保留临床关键的高频纹理细节，重建质量优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的自监督神经-物理联合框架实现了对截断锥束CT重建中伪影抑制与细节保持的统一，在无需监督真值的前提下，兼具强大的外推能力和高保真度，具有重要的临床应用潜力。

title: Beyond Vector Similarity: A Structural Analysis of Graph-Augmented Retrieval for Industrial Knowledge Graphs
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) fails systematically on queries requiring structural reasoning over interconnected entities. We compare eight retrieval architectures for aerospace supply chain intelligence, progressing from text retrieval through graph traversal to graph computation. Using a 46-node knowledge graph with 64 typed edges, we evaluate 23 queries across 10 intent categories and demonstrate that five query classes are structurally unreachable for vector retrieval. Our central finding is the operator vocabulary thesis: the barrier to LLM-based graph reasoning is not model intelligence but the computational operators available as tools. An LLM Query Planner with 9 typed traversal primitives outperforms bespoke handlers (F1 = 0.632 vs. 0.472) while generalizing to unseen queries. Adding 6 graph computation tools, the LLM selectively adopts them for exactly the query categories where traversal fails. We also identify a measurement gap: entity-level F1 systematically underscores structural queries where comprehensive answers are correct.

AI.tldr: RAG fails on queries needing structural reasoning over interconnected entities. The study compares retrieval methods from text to graph computation, showing vector retrieval cannot handle 5 out of 23 queries due to structural limitations. Key finding: the LLM's ability to reason over graphs depends not on intelligence but on available computational operators. An LLM Query Planner with 9 traversal primitives outperforms custom handlers (F1=0.632 vs. 0.472), and adding 6 graph computation tools enables selective use where traversal fails. A measurement gap is identified: entity-level F1 underestimates performance on structurally complex queries.
AI.motivation: Existing RAG systems struggle with queries requiring structural reasoning over interconnected entities, especially in complex domains like aerospace supply chains. This study aims to understand why and how to improve retrieval and reasoning capabilities.
AI.method: The study evaluates eight retrieval architectures—from text retrieval to graph traversal and computation—using a 46-node knowledge graph with 64 typed edges. It assesses 23 queries across 10 intent categories, comparing performance using F1 scores and analyzing structural reachability.
AI.result: Five query classes are structurally unreachable for vector retrieval. An LLM Query Planner with 9 traversal primitives achieves higher F1 (0.632) than bespoke handlers (0.472). Adding 6 graph computation tools allows the LLM to selectively apply them where traversal fails. Entity-level F1 systematically underestimates correct answers for structural queries.
AI.conclusion: The key barrier to LLM-based graph reasoning is not model intelligence but the availability of appropriate computational operators. Extending the operator vocabulary enables more robust and generalizable reasoning, while current evaluation metrics may misrepresent performance on structurally complex queries.

title: NAVIRA: Decoupled Stochastic Remasking for Masked Diffusion Language Models
summary: Masked diffusion language models generate text by iteratively unmasking many tokens in parallel, but this speed comes with a correction problem: tokens generated in the same step are predicted from marginal distributions, and early local dependency errors can later contaminate the context. PRISM addresses this by learning token-level quality scores and remasking unreliable tokens, but its inference rule is coupled: the same forward pass both detects low-quality tokens and computes logits for their replacements, so the erroneous tokens still condition regeneration. We propose NAVIRA, an inference-time decoding policy that separates these two operations and samples remasking positions stochastically. A first forward pass scores tokens; selected tokens are masked; a second forward pass regenerates from the cleaned context. Temperature-controlled remasking reduces repeated correction of the same positions and balances fluency against diversity. In controlled experiments with a 170M masked diffusion language model, decoupling improves fluency, while scheduled stochastic remasking preserves entropy and achieves stronger LLM-judge scores under larger forward-pass budgets. These results show that remasking policy, not only the learned quality signal, is central to reliable masked-diffusion text generation.

AI.tldr: NAVIRA提出一种解码策略，通过分离质量评分与重掩码操作，实现更可靠的文本生成。它采用两步前向传播：先评分并随机选择低质量词进行重掩码，再在清理后的上下文中重新生成。温度控制的随机重掩码减少重复修正，平衡流畅性与多样性，在170M模型上提升流畅性和LLM评分。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如PRISM因推理规则耦合导致错误上下文影响再生，需解耦以提高生成可靠性。
AI.method: 提出NAVIRA，分两步执行：第一步评分并随机选择低质量词重掩码；第二步基于清洁上下文再生。引入温度控制调节重掩码概率，平衡流畅性与多样性。
AI.result: 在170M模型上，解耦策略提升流畅性；调度式随机重掩码在更大前向传播预算下保持熵并获得更强的LLM-judge评分。
AI.conclusion: 重掩码策略本身比学习的质量信号更为关键，是实现可靠掩码扩散文本生成的核心。

title: TS-ICL: A Flexible Time-Indexed Foundation Model for Time Series via In-Context Learning
summary: Foundation models mark a profound paradigm shift in time series modeling, with task-specific models being superseded by general-purpose zero-shot models. Yet, current approaches primarily focus on forecasting, while real-world time series are often irregularly and partially observed, requiring models that can jointly forecast, impute missing values, and handle degraded sampling conditions. To address these challenges, we introduce TS-ICL, a novel probabilistic In-Context Learning encoder--regressor Transformer that unifies forecasting and imputation. TS-ICL formulates time series tasks as timestamp-aligned regression and naturally incorporates covariates by training on synthetic dependency structures generated from a novel causal data prior. Empirically, TS-ICL achieves a new state-of-the-art in imputation, while remaining competitive with leading forecasting foundation models across both univariate and covariate-aware benchmarks. It shows particularly strong performance in forecasting with partially observed look-back windows.

AI.tldr: TS-ICL 是一种新型的基于上下文学习的概率编码器-回归器 Transformer，统一了时间序列的预测与填补缺失值任务，通过合成依赖结构训练，能有效处理不规则、部分观测的时间序列数据，在填补和预测方面均达到新水平。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的时间序列数据常为不规则和部分观测，现有模型多集中于预测任务，缺乏对缺失值填补和降采样条件下的综合处理能力，因此需要一种能够联合完成预测与填补的新方法。
AI.method: TS-ICL 将时间序列任务建模为时间戳对齐的回归问题，利用新颖的因果数据先验生成合成依赖结构进行训练，并通过上下文学习机制实现对协变量的自然融合。
AI.result: TS-ICL 在填补任务上达到新的最佳性能，同时在单变量和带协变量的基准测试中保持与领先预测基础模型相当的表现，尤其在部分观测历史窗口下的预测任务中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: TS-ICL 成功实现了预测与填补任务的统一，是应对复杂真实时间序列挑战的有效框架，为通用时间序列建模提供了新范式。

title: LoomVideo: Unifying Multimodal Inputs into Video Generation and Editing
summary: Developing unified video generation and editing models capable of interpreting interleaved multimodal inputs is a promising yet challenging frontier field. Existing unified frameworks predominantly rely on massive models (typically 13B parameters or more) and incorporate source video conditions for editing by concatenating sequence tokens. This concatenation inevitably doubles the sequence length, quadrupling the computational complexity of the self-attention mechanism and introducing prohibitive overhead. To address these bottlenecks, we present LoomVideo, a highly efficient 5B-parameter unified architecture for both video generation and editing. LoomVideo replaces the standard text encoder with a Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) and employs Deepstack injection mechanism to align multi-layer MLLM features with the Diffusion Transformer (DiT). Crucially, we introduce a zero-overhead Scale-and-Add conditioning approach for video editing. By scaling and directly adding the clean source video latent to the noised target latent, this elegant design eliminates the need for token concatenation, drastically reducing computational cost while maintaining robust capabilities for complex, non-rigid edits. Furthermore, a Negative Temporal RoPE strategy is seamlessly integrated to handle multiple reference images. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our compact 5B model achieves state-of-the-art or highly competitive performance across comprehensive benchmarks, exhibiting exceptional superiority in e-commerce and fashion generation scenarios. Benefiting from the zero-overhead conditioning mechanism, LoomVideo achieves at least a 5.41x acceleration in inference speed compared to models of similar capabilities, paving the way for highly practical and efficient video foundation models.

AI.tldr: LoomVideo 是一个50亿参数的高效统一视频生成与编辑模型，通过引入多模态大语言模型（MLLM）和Deepstack注入机制，实现对多层MLLM特征与扩散变换器（DiT）的对齐。其核心创新在于零开销的缩放-加法条件机制，通过直接缩放并添加干净源视频潜在表示到噪声目标潜在表示中，避免了传统方法中因拼接序列导致的计算复杂度翻倍问题，显著降低计算开销。同时结合负时间RoPE策略处理多参考图像。实验表明，该模型在电商与时尚生成任务中表现卓越，推理速度相比同类模型提升至少5.41倍，具备极强的实际应用潜力。
AI.motivation: 现有统一视频生成与编辑框架依赖大规模模型（如130亿参数以上），且采用序列拼接方式引入源视频条件，导致序列长度翻倍、自注意力计算复杂度四倍增长，带来巨大计算开销，限制实际部署。因此亟需更高效、轻量化的统一架构。
AI.method: 采用50亿参数的紧凑架构；以多模态大语言模型（MLLM）替代标准文本编码器；使用Deepstack注入机制将多层MLLM特征对齐至扩散变换器（DiT）；提出零开销的缩放-加法条件机制，直接在潜在空间操作源视频与目标视频的潜在表示，避免序列拼接；引入负时间RoPE策略以支持多参考图像输入。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中达到或超越当前最优性能，尤其在电商与时尚视频生成任务中表现突出；相比同级别模型，推理速度提升至少5.41倍，验证了其高效率与实用性。
AI.conclusion: LoomVideo 通过创新的零开销条件机制与高效的模型设计，在保持强大生成与编辑能力的同时极大降低了计算成本，为轻量化、实用化视频基础模型的发展提供了新路径。

title: PLAN-S: Bridging Planning with Latent Style Dynamics for Autonomous Driving World Models
summary: Latent world models (LWMs) have strengthened end-to-end autonomous driving by forecasting compact scene dynamics for downstream planning. However, existing LWM-based planners usually generate trajectories directly from entangled latent representations. This compact latent-to-planner pathway lacks explicit modeling of risk, drivability, and diverse style preferences, making driving-style dynamics difficult to supervise, inspect, or modulate before a final trajectory is selected. We propose PLAN-S (PLANning with latent Style dynamics), a planner-facing bridge that addresses this compactness-controllability dilemma by decoding a style-conditioned, four-channel semantic cost map from the latent representation. The cost map is conditioned on ego state and driving style and is consumed up-stream of the planning decision through two host-side interfaces: attention-level fusion for regression planners and reward-level fusion for anchor-score planners. We validate PLAN-S on two architecturally distinct hosts, ResWorld on nuScenes and WoTE on NAVSIM, while keeping the host backbones frozen to isolate the contribution of the proposed bridge. On nuScenes, PLAN-S reduces L2 at every horizon over the baseline, with 0.55 m average L2 and a 42% relative reduction in the 3 s collision rate. On NAVSIM, the rule-cost variant reaches 89.4 Predictive Driver Model Score (PDMS), while the learned cost variant provides complementary gains on baseline-challenging scenes. Ablations show that the cost pathway contributes most directly to safer trajectory selection. Qualitative results further show that PLAN-S can produce diverse cost maps, with spatially consistent variations aligned to different driving styles.

AI.tldr: PLAN-S 提出了一种基于潜在风格动态的规划框架，通过从潜在表示中解码风格条件化的四通道语义代价图，解决了现有隐式世界模型在驾驶风格控制与可解释性方面的不足。该代价图结合自车状态与驾驶风格，在回归与锚点-评分类规划器中分别以注意力融合和奖励融合方式集成，显著提升轨迹安全性与多样性。在nuScenes和NAVSIM数据集上均表现出更优性能，尤其在降低碰撞率和提升预测驾驶模型得分方面效果显著。
AI.motivation: 现有基于潜在世界模型的规划方法直接从纠缠的潜在表示生成轨迹，缺乏对风险、可行驶性及驾驶风格等关键因素的显式建模，导致难以监督、检查或调节驾驶风格，影响规划的可控性与安全性。
AI.method: 提出PLAN-S，通过解码风格条件化的四通道语义代价图，作为规划前的中间桥梁；代价图融合自车状态与驾驶风格信息，支持两种规划接口：注意力级融合（用于回归型规划器）与奖励级融合（用于锚点-评分型规划器），实现对驾驶风格的灵活调控。
AI.result: 在nuScenes上，PLAN-S平均L2误差降低至0.55米，3秒内碰撞率相对减少42%；在NAVSIM上，规则代价变体达89.4 PDMS得分，学习代价变体在挑战性场景中表现更优；消融实验表明代价路径对安全轨迹选择贡献最大。
AI.conclusion: PLAN-S有效缓解了潜在世界模型中紧凑性与可控性之间的矛盾，通过引入风格感知的语义代价图，实现了更安全、可解释且多样化的自动驾驶规划。

title: English-to-Prakrit Machine Translation via Multilingual Transfer Learning
summary: We study English-to-Prakrit machine translation in a low-resource setting where the target language is unsupported by IndicTrans2. We adapt the multilingual model by mapping Prakrit to the Hindi language tag (hin_Deva) without modifying the tokenizer, vocabulary, or architecture. Using a 1,474-pair Maharashtri Prakrit parallel corpus and evaluation on a 20-sample Ardhamagadhi test set, we report corpus BLEU improvements over an untuned baseline. The results indicate that script-compatible language routing can enable feasible transfer to unsupported classical languages, while highlighting limitations due to data scarcity and dialect mismatch. Our code and trained models are released to the public for further exploration https://github.com/D3v1s0m/indictrans2-prakrit-mt.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨在低资源环境下将英语翻译为普拉克里特语的机器翻译问题，针对IndicTrans2不支持该目标语言的情况，通过将普拉克里特语映射到印地语语言标签（hin_Deva）实现模型适配，未修改分词器、词汇表或架构。使用1,474对马哈拉施特拉普拉克里特平行语料库，并在20个样本的阿德拉玛加德希测试集上评估，报告了相对于未调优基线的语料库BLEU提升。结果表明，脚本兼容的语言路由可实现对不支持古典语言的有效迁移，但受限于数据稀缺和方言差异。代码与训练模型已公开。
AI.motivation: 解决低资源环境下英语到普拉克里特语机器翻译的问题，特别是当目标语言未被现有模型如IndicTrans2支持时，探索利用已有多语言模型进行有效迁移的可能性。
AI.method: 将普拉克里特语映射至现有的印地语语言标签（hin_Deva），在不改变分词器、词汇表或模型架构的前提下，利用多语言模型进行翻译任务。
AI.result: 在1,474对马哈拉施特拉普拉克里特平行语料库上训练，并在20样本的阿德拉玛加德希测试集上评估，实现了相对于未调优基线的语料库BLEU提升，验证了脚本兼容语言路由在迁移中的可行性，同时揭示了数据稀缺和方言差异带来的限制。
AI.conclusion: 脚本兼容的语言路由可在不修改模型结构的情况下实现对不支持古典语言的可行迁移，但其性能受限于可用数据量和方言差异，未来工作需关注数据扩充与方言适应性优化。

title: When Denser Credit Is Not Enough: Evidence-Calibrated Policy Optimization for Long-Horizon LLM Agent Training
summary: Long-horizon LLM agents require reinforcement learning methods that can assign credit to intermediate decisions under sparse and delayed rewards. Recent group-based methods such as GiGPO improve over GRPO by constructing step-level advantages at repeated anchor states. However, we show that such dense credit can be statistically unreliable: under limited rollouts, rare but lucky actions may receive overly large advantages, producing divergent anchor bias and late-stage training oscillation. We propose Evidence-Calibrated Policy Optimization (ECPO), a critic-free policy optimization algorithm that calibrates step-level credit before policy updates. ECPO combines Evidence-Calibrated Action Advantage, which groups rollouts by canonical actions and shrinks low-count estimates, with Variance-Gated Credit Weighting, which suppresses anchor states dominated by within-action noise. Experiments on ALFWorld and WebShop with Qwen2.5-1.5B/7B show that ECPO consistently outperforms strong baselines, improving GiGPO by +5.2/+7.3 success points on ALFWorld/WebShop with Qwen2.5-1.5B while adding only 0.1% additional advantage-computation overhead.

AI.tldr: ECPO是一种无需价值函数的策略优化算法，通过校准步骤级信用来解决长时域大语言模型代理在稀疏奖励下的信用分配问题。它结合了证据校准动作优势和方差门控信用加权机制，有效缓解了因样本不足导致的低频动作高估问题，显著提升训练稳定性与性能，在ALFWorld和WebShop任务中相比GiGPO分别提升5.2和7.3的成功率点，且计算开销仅增加0.1%。
AI.motivation: 现有基于群体的方法（如GiGPO）在稀疏延迟奖励下通过重复锚点状态构造步骤级优势，但其密集信用分配在有限采样情况下易受罕见幸运动作影响，导致锚点偏差和后期训练震荡，因此需要更可靠的信用校准机制。
AI.method: 提出Evidence-Calibrated Policy Optimization (ECPO)，采用证据校准动作优势（按标准动作分组并缩小低频估计值）与方差门控信用加权（抑制由动作内噪声主导的锚点状态），实现无评价值函数的策略优化。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld和WebShop上使用Qwen2.5-1.5B/7B模型进行实验，ECPO显著优于多个强基线方法，相较于GiGPO在两个任务上分别提升5.2和7.3的成功率点，同时仅增加0.1%的额外优势计算开销。
AI.conclusion: ECPO通过引入证据校准与方差控制机制，有效提升了长时域大模型代理在稀疏奖励环境中的信用分配可靠性，增强了训练稳定性与最终性能，为高效、鲁棒的强化学习提供了新范式。

title: LLM-Conditioned Synthesis of Pathological Gaits via Structured Gait-Language Representations
comment: Accepted at CVPR MOMA Workshop 2026 and selected for spotlight presentation at the workshop
summary: Pathological gait datasets remain scarce due to privacy, recruitment, cost, and movement variability. Our work presents a multimodal LLM-guided framework for pathology-aware 3D gait data synthesis from structured textual descriptions. The proposed method generates fixed-length synthetic skeleton-based gait sequences for pathological gait classification tasks. The framework combines motion tokenisation, pathology-aware language conditioning, LLM-based semantic augmentation, and language-to-gait generation. A key contribution is the proposed pathological tokeniser, which is designed to preserve pathology-specific motion characteristics during discrete representation learning. Experiments suggest that the proposed synthetic sequences improve downstream classification for recurrent classifiers when combined with real data. The best result is obtained using a GRU classifier trained with real and synthetic samples, achieving 92.77\% accuracy under a leave-one-subject-out protocol.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态大语言模型（LLM）引导的框架，用于从结构化文本描述中合成病理步态的3D数据。该方法通过运动分词、病理感知语言条件化、LLM语义增强和语言到步态生成，生成固定长度的基于骨架的合成步态序列，以支持病理步态分类任务。关键贡献是设计了病理分词器，能保留病理特异性运动特征。实验表明，合成数据与真实数据结合可提升下游分类性能，最佳结果为使用GRU分类器在留一被试者排除协议下达到92.77%准确率。
AI.motivation: 由于隐私、招募、成本和运动变异性等问题，病理步态数据集仍然稀缺，亟需有效的方法生成高质量合成数据以支持分类任务。
AI.method: 提出一种多模态LLM引导的框架，包含运动分词、病理感知语言条件化、LLM语义增强和语言到步态生成；引入病理分词器以保留病理特异性运动特征。
AI.result: 合成数据与真实数据结合显著提升分类性能，最佳结果为GRU分类器在留一被试者排除协议下达到92.77%准确率。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的框架能够有效生成具有病理特异性的合成步态数据，显著提升下游分类任务的性能，为解决病理步态数据稀缺问题提供了可行方案。

title: RedditPersona: A Modular Framework for Community-Conditioned LLM Adaptation from Reddit
summary: Community-conditioned language model adaptation requires choices about data collection, community definition, and evaluation that are currently made independently in each study, making it hard to compare assumptions or reuse artifacts. We present RedditPersona, a modular framework that standardizes these choices: it collects Reddit posts and comments, profiles active users, partitions them under five grouping strategies (subreddit-based, graph-structural, semantic, hybrid, and interaction-based), trains a parameter-efficient adapter per strategy via QLoRA, and evaluates them under a shared metric suite spanning fluency, fidelity, distributional alignment, and community identifiability. Applied to 112 subreddits in the urban well-being domain (301,429 user profiles, 16M+ comments), we find that adapters' behavioral identifiability tracks each strategy's intrinsic agreement with the subreddit baseline, and that a consistent trade-off between identifiability and distributional similarity to real text holds across all five strategies. The code and configuration files are available at: https://github.com/Ahghaffari/redditpersona.

AI.tldr: 提出RedditPersona框架，标准化社区条件语言模型适应中的数据收集、社区定义和评估，通过五种分组策略（子版块、图结构、语义、混合、互动）训练参数高效适配器，并在城市福祉领域112个子版块上验证，发现行为可识别性与策略内在一致性相关，且所有策略均存在可识别性与分布相似性之间的权衡。
AI.motivation: 当前社区条件语言模型适应研究中，数据收集、社区定义和评估等决策独立进行，导致难以比较假设或复用成果，亟需一个标准化框架。
AI.method: 构建RedditPersona框架，收集Reddit帖子和评论，分析用户活跃度，采用五种分组策略划分社区，使用QLoRA训练参数高效适配器，并在统一指标体系下评估模型表现。
AI.result: 适配器的行为可识别性与各策略对子版块基线的一致性正相关；所有五种策略均表现出可识别性与真实文本分布相似性之间的稳定权衡。
AI.conclusion: RedditPersona提供了一套可复用、可比较的标准化流程，有助于推动社区条件语言模型适应研究的系统化发展。

title: IA-RAG: Interval-Algebra-Driven Temporal Reasoning for Dynamic Knowledge Retrieval
comment: 22 pages, 10 figures, 13 tables. Code available at https://github.com/xiaoAugenstern/LogicalRAG_TemporalQA
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has shown strong effectiveness in grounding Large Language Models (LLMs) with external knowledge. However, existing RAG and Graph RAG frameworks largely treat knowledge as static or associate time with coarse-grained timestamps or metadata, failing to capture rich temporal structures such as duration, overlap, and containment. We propose IA-RAG, a hierarchical temporal RAG framework that models knowledge as time intervals and performs retrieval under formal temporal constraints. IA-RAG represents facts as Interval Event Units (IEUs) and organizes them into a hierarchical Thematic Forest, where temporal dependencies are governed by Allen's Interval Algebra. To handle incomplete or uncertain temporal boundaries, IA-RAG further introduces a Sub-graph Time Tightening mechanism that refines fuzzy intervals through logical constraints within connected event subgraphs. In addition, IA-RAG supports implicit temporal semantic retrieval through interval-algebra-guided traversal. Experiments on multiple temporal question answering benchmarks, including TimeQA, TempReason, and ComplexTR, demonstrate that IA-RAG achieves strong temporal retrieval and reasoning performance, particularly on complex compositional temporal reasoning tasks. Our code is released at https://github.com/xiaoAugenstern/LogicalRAG_TemporalQA.

AI.tldr: IA-RAG 是一种层次化的时间 RAG 框架，将知识建模为时间区间，并在形式化的时序约束下进行检索。它通过 Interval Event Units (IEUs) 和基于 Allen 时序代数的层级主题森林来组织事实，支持隐式时序语义检索，并引入子图时间紧化机制处理不确定的时间边界。在多个时间问答基准测试中表现出色，尤其在复杂组合时序推理任务上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有 RAG 框架将知识视为静态或仅用粗粒度时间戳/元数据表示，无法捕捉如持续时间、重叠和包含等丰富的时序结构，因此需要更精细的时间建模方法以提升时序推理能力。
AI.method: IA-RAG 将事实表示为时间区间（IEU），构建基于 Allen 时序代数的层级主题森林；通过子图时间紧化机制优化模糊时间边界；利用时序代数指导遍历实现隐式时序语义检索。
AI.result: 在 TimeQA、TempReason 和 ComplexTR 等多个时间问答基准上，IA-RAG 显著提升了时序检索与推理性能，尤其在复杂组合时序推理任务中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: IA-RAG 通过形式化时序建模与逻辑约束优化，有效增强了 LLM 在复杂时间推理任务中的表现，为 RAG 框架的时序理解能力提供了新范式。

title: High-Dimensional Theory of LoRA Fine-Tuning in a Solvable Attention Model
summary: We develop a high-dimensional statistical theory of low-rank adaptation (LoRA) in attention models, capturing the interplay between pre-training and fine-tuning. We introduce a solvable framework in which a single-head attention layer is first pre-trained on a data-abundant task and subsequently adapted via a rank-one LoRA update on limited data. In the high-dimensional limit, both stages admit a sharp asymptotic characterization in terms of a finite set of order parameters, yielding explicit predictions for test errors and representation alignment. Our analysis shows that the impact of pre-training on LoRA is summarized by an effective noise term, from which we derive prescriptions for the optimal pre-training procedure. We also demonstrate a regime with a mismatch between the value of the test error and representation quality, and propose an application of our theory to active fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了低秩适配（LoRA）在注意力模型中的高维统计理论，分析了预训练与微调之间的相互作用。通过一个可解框架，研究单头注意力层在数据丰富的任务上预训练后，再通过低秩（秩一）LoRA更新在有限数据上微调的过程。在高维极限下，两个阶段均可由一组有限的序参数精确刻画，从而预测测试误差和表示对齐情况。分析表明，预训练的影响可归结为一个有效噪声项，并据此提出最优预训练方案。此外，揭示了一种测试误差与表示质量不匹配的范式，并将理论应用于主动微调。
AI.motivation: 理解预训练如何影响低秩微调方法（如LoRA）在高维设置下的性能，特别是在数据有限的情况下，以指导更优的训练策略。
AI.method: 构建一个可解的高维统计框架，分析单头注意力层在预训练和低秩微调两个阶段的行为，利用序参数进行渐近分析，推导出测试误差和表示对齐的显式表达式。
AI.result: 发现预训练的影响可被建模为有效噪声项；揭示了测试误差与表示质量可能不一致的区域；提出了优化预训练的指导原则，并应用于主动微调场景。
AI.conclusion: 该理论为理解并优化基于LoRA的微调提供了坚实的统计基础，尤其在高维、小样本条件下具有重要意义。

title: ReCache: Learning Budget-Aware Caching Schedules for Diffusion Models via REINFORCE
summary: Modern diffusion models generate high-quality images and videos, but their iterative denoising process makes inference expensive. Feature caching accelerates sampling by reusing or predicting intermediate activations across neighboring denoising steps, exploiting the redundancy of computations along the reverse trajectory. In this work, we focus on the caching schedule: selecting which denoising steps should be fully recomputed. Existing schedules are either fixed (e.g. uniform) or chosen adaptively from per-step error heuristics; in both cases, the actual compute cost is a side-effect of hand-tuned thresholds rather than a quantity the user can specify. We propose ReCache, which inverts this: given a target budget k, it learns the recomputation schedule that maximizes generation quality, turning compute into a directly controllable input. ReCache trains via policy gradients, sidestepping backpropagation through full diffusion inference, and uses no labelled data. Generations from uncached inference serve as matching targets, paired with a reward for generation quality. ReCache is compatible with any caching mechanism, including feature reuse and feature forecasting; for each mechanism, a single trained policy adapts across computational budgets at inference time. ReCache consistently outperforms scheduling baselines: under a $\times5.04$ FLOPs reduction on FLUX, it reduces LPIPS by 31% (from 0.456 to 0.316) compared to DiCache; on Wan 2.1 at a $\sim \times2.6$ speedup, it drops LPIPS by 65% (from 0.480 to 0.169) and boosts the VBench score by 7% (5.6 points, from 70.4 to 76.0) over uniform HiCache. Code is available at https://github.com/thecrazymage/ReCache.

AI.tldr: ReCache proposes a novel caching schedule for diffusion models that directly controls compute budget to maximize generation quality, using policy gradients without labeled data. It outperforms existing methods in both FLOPs reduction and image quality.
AI.motivation: Existing caching schedules either use fixed patterns or adaptive heuristics based on error estimates, but neither allows users to directly specify compute budgets. This limits control over the trade-off between speed and quality.
AI.method: ReCache uses policy gradient training to learn a recomputation schedule that maximizes generation quality under a given compute budget k. It leverages uncached inference outputs as targets and rewards high-quality generations, enabling adaptation across different computational constraints without retraining.
AI.result: ReCache achieves up to 5.04× FLOPs reduction on FLUX with 31% lower LPIPS (0.456 to 0.316) compared to DiCache; on Wan 2.1, it delivers 2.6× speedup, 65% lower LPIPS (0.480 to 0.169), and a 7% improvement in VBench score (from 70.4 to 76.0) over uniform HiCache.
AI.conclusion: ReCache enables direct control of compute budget while maximizing generation quality, offering superior performance across various caching mechanisms and computational settings, with strong compatibility and no need for labeled data.

title: Memory is Reconstructed, Not Retrieved: Graph Memory for LLM Agents
summary: Despite recent progress, LLM agents still struggle with reasoning over long interaction histories. While current memory-augmented agents rely on a static retrieve-then-reason paradigm, this rigid pipeline design prevents them from dynamically adapting memory access to intermediate evidence discovered during inference. To bridge this gap, we propose MRAgent, a framework that combines an associative memory graph with an active reconstruction mechanism. We represent memory as a Cue-Tag-Content graph, where associative tags serve as semantic bridges connecting fine-grained cues to memory contents. Operating on this structure, our active reconstruction mechanism integrates LLM reasoning directly into memory access, allowing the agent to iteratively explore and prune retrieval paths based on accumulated evidence. This ensures that memory retrieval is dynamically adapted to the reasoning context while avoiding combinatorial explosion caused by unconstrained expansion. Experiments on the LoCoMo benchmark and LongMemEval benchmark demonstrate significant improvements over strong baselines (up to 23%), while substantially reducing token and runtime cost, highlighting the effectiveness of active and associative reconstruction for long-horizon memory reasoning.

AI.tldr: MRAgent提出一种结合关联记忆图与主动重构机制的框架，通过将记忆表示为带语义桥接标签的Cue-Tag-Content图，使大语言模型在推理过程中动态调整记忆访问。该方法在长交互历史任务中显著提升性能（最高达23%），同时降低计算开销，有效解决传统静态检索-推理范式带来的适应性不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有记忆增强型LLM代理依赖静态的‘检索-然后推理’流程，无法根据推理过程中发现的中间证据动态调整记忆访问，限制了其在长交互历史任务中的表现。
AI.method: 构建一个基于关联标签的Cue-Tag-Content记忆图结构，并引入主动重构机制，将大语言模型的推理能力融入记忆访问过程，实现基于累积证据的迭代探索与路径剪枝。
AI.result: 在LoCoMo和LongMemEval基准上，MRAgent相比强基线显著提升性能（最高23%），同时大幅减少令牌消耗和运行时间，验证了主动与关联重构在长时记忆推理中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MRAgent通过动态、可适应的记忆访问机制，有效提升了大语言模型在长时交互任务中的推理能力，为未来智能体的记忆系统设计提供了新方向。

title: Automatic Labelling of Speech Translation Errors
summary: Errors in speech translations reduce trustworthiness of Speech Translation (ST) systems and can have serious consequences. Yet currently there is no established methodology for evaluating confidence and quality estimation of speech translations. To initiate progress in this direction, we propose Speech Translation Error Labelling (STEL). We create an annotation protocol, a small authentic end-to-end evaluation dataset, and we analyse how existing text-only and speech-processing systems perform the STEL task. Our results show that text-only XCOMET and multimodal LLM Qwen2.5-Omni are able to perform the STEL task in roughly half the precision of humans. We also find that direct speech processing is necessary for the STEL task, and that the current text-only and speech-processing systems are complementary in labelling translation-only vs. speech-processing errors in ST.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为语音翻译错误标注（STEL）的新方法，旨在评估语音翻译系统的置信度和质量。研究构建了标注协议、小型真实端到端评估数据集，并分析了现有文本和语音处理系统在该任务上的表现。结果表明，仅依赖文本的XCOMET与多模态大模型Qwen2.5-Omni在精度上约为人类的一半；同时发现直接处理语音对STEL任务至关重要，且文本与语音处理系统在识别不同类型的错误方面具有互补性。
AI.motivation: 当前语音翻译系统中的错误会影响其可信度，且缺乏统一的置信度与质量评估方法，亟需建立有效的评估体系以提升系统可靠性。
AI.method: 提出STEL框架，包括设计标注协议、构建小型真实端到端评估数据集，并测试多种文本与语音处理模型在错误标注任务上的表现。
AI.result: 文本模型如XCOMET和多模态模型Qwen2.5-Omni可在STEL任务中达到约人类一半的精度；直接语音处理对任务成功至关重要；现有系统在识别翻译错误与语音处理错误方面表现出互补性。
AI.conclusion: STEL为语音翻译的质量与置信度评估提供了初步但重要的方向，未来需要更完善的标注标准与模型融合策略以进一步提升性能。

title: Addressing Imbalance in Multi-Label Data via Label-Specific Distance-based Oversampling
summary: The complex imbalanced label distribution poses a crucial challenge to multi-label classification, as most classifiers are biased towards the majority class and high-frequent labels. Oversampling is an efficient and flexible solution that augments instances to provide a more balanced training dataset for multi-label classifiers. Most existing oversampling methods create synthetic instances in a heuristic way that essentially relies on neighborhood information retrieved using Euclidean distance within the entire feature space. However, they fail to consider the varying semantic relevance of features to different labels, leading to label inconsistency among proximate neighbors and further introducing label confusion and overfitting to synthetic instances. To overcome the above issue, we propose a novel sampling approach called Label-Specific Distance-based Multi-Label Oversampling (LSDMLO) that creates more useful and well-labeled synthetic instances to address the imbalance in multi-label datasets. LSDMLO derives the label-specific distance to identify label-consistent neighbors based on the weighted pertinent feature space, which facilitates selecting seed instances that express more label correlations in boundary areas and generating synthetic instances aligned with the label distribution of original data. The comprehensive experiments verify that the proposed LSDMLO outperforms the state-of-the-art multi-label sampling approaches under various base classifiers.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为标签特定距离多标签过采样（LSDMLO）的新方法，通过在标签特定的特征空间中计算距离，选择具有标签一致性的邻居，生成更符合原始数据标签分布的合成实例，从而解决多标签分类中的不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有过采样方法依赖于整个特征空间的欧几里得距离，忽略了不同特征对不同标签的语义相关性差异，导致邻近样本间标签不一致，引入标签混淆和过拟合问题。
AI.method: LSDMLO通过构建标签特定的距离度量，在加权的相关特征空间中识别标签一致的邻居，选择边界区域中体现更强标签相关性的种子实例，并生成与原始数据标签分布一致的合成实例。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，LSDMLO在多种基分类器下均优于现有的先进多标签采样方法。
AI.conclusion: LSDMLO能够有效缓解多标签数据集中的不平衡问题，生成更高质量的合成样本，提升多标签分类性能。

title: FontFusion: Enhancing Generative Text in Diffusion Models with Typographic Conditioning
summary: Typography generation in diffusion models faces a persistent trade-off: enabling precise font control typically degrades text legibility, while maintaining readability often sacrifices typographic fidelity. We present FontFusion, a plug-and-play conditioning framework for Diffusion Transformer (DiT) architectures that resolves this dilemma through three core innovations: (1) a hierarchical token representation establishing explicit text-font relationships at multiple granularities, (2) position-aware embeddings creating spatial bindings between typography and image content, and (3) a multi-level token dropping strategy improving both computational efficiency and generalization to unseen fonts. Our systematic evaluation of font embedding spaces reveals that a dual encoder combining DeepFont and DINOv2 outperforms any single encoder for typography tasks. FontFusion demonstrates 76% relative improvement on challenging decorative fonts over single-encoder baselines and font consistency gains exceeding approximately 68-76% over unconditioned models, while integrating into existing DiT architectures without retraining.

AI.tldr: FontFusion 是一种用于扩散模型的即插即用条件框架，通过层次化标记表示、位置感知嵌入和多级标记丢弃策略，在保持文本可读性的同时显著提升字体控制精度。它在装饰性字体上相比单编码器基线提升76%，字体一致性提高68-76%，且无需重新训练即可集成到现有DiT架构中。
AI.motivation: 解决扩散模型中字体控制与文本可读性之间的固有矛盾，实现高保真度排版与良好可读性的统一。
AI.method: 提出层次化标记表示以建立多粒度文本-字体关系；引入位置感知嵌入实现排版与图像内容的空间绑定；采用多级标记丢弃策略提升计算效率与对未见字体的泛化能力；结合DeepFont与DINOv2双编码器优化字体嵌入空间。
AI.result: 在复杂装饰性字体上相对基线提升76%；字体一致性提升68%-76%；无需重训练即可适配现有DiT架构，兼具高效性与强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: FontFusion成功实现了字体控制与文本可读性的平衡，为扩散模型中的高质量排版生成提供了有效解决方案。

title: Beyond Similarity: Trustworthy Memory Search for Personal AI Agents
summary:
Personal AI agents increasingly rely on long-term memory to provide persistent personalization across sessions. However, existing memory pipelines are largely driven by semantic similarity: memory data close to the current query is retrieved and injected into the model context. This creates a critical trustworthiness gap, since a semantically related memory may still be contextually inappropriate, leading to threats such as cross-domain leakage, sycophancy, tool-call drift, or memory-induced jailbreaks.
  In this paper, we study memory search as a trust boundary in personal AI agents. We evaluate representative agentic memory frameworks, including A-Mem, Mem0, and MemOS, together with OpenClaw, a real-world personal-agent environment with persistent state and tool-use capability. Our results show that long-term memory is not merely a utility layer, but a durable control channel that can reshape how agents interpret tasks and execute actions, leaving them highly susceptible to the aforementioned threats. To mitigate these vulnerabilities, we propose MemGate, a lightweight and deployable memory plug-in for trustworthy memory search, with only 9M parameters and a 35.1MB footprint. MemGate is inserted between the vector memory store and the backbone LLM, requiring no LLM modification, memory-database rewriting, or inference-time LLM judge. It applies a query-conditioned neural gate to candidate memory representations, turning raw similarity search into task-conditioned memory admission. Across multiple mainstream memory frameworks, real-world agent settings, and diverse LLM backbones, MemGate reduces memory-induced threats while preserving long-term memory utility.

AI.tldr: 本文研究个人AI代理中长期记忆作为信任边界的挑战，指出现有基于语义相似性的记忆检索方法存在上下文不匹配风险，可能导致跨域泄露、谄媚行为、工具调用漂移或记忆诱导越狱等问题。为此提出MemGate，一个轻量级、无需修改LLM或数据库的内存插件（仅9M参数，35.1MB大小），通过查询条件神经门实现任务感知的记忆准入机制，有效缓解威胁并保持记忆实用性。
AI.motivation: 现有个人AI代理依赖长期记忆进行个性化，但基于语义相似性的记忆检索方式存在上下文不匹配问题，可能引发安全与信任风险，亟需一种可信赖的记忆搜索机制。
AI.method: 提出MemGate，一个插入在向量记忆库与主干LLM之间的轻量级插件，利用查询条件神经门对候选记忆表示进行筛选，将原始相似性搜索转化为任务条件下的记忆准入机制，无需修改LLM、重写数据库或使用推理时判断器。
AI.result: 在多个主流记忆框架、真实代理环境和不同LLM骨干网络下，MemGate显著降低了记忆诱导的安全威胁，同时保持了长期记忆的实用价值。
AI.conclusion: 长期记忆不仅是功能组件，更是可被操纵的持久控制通道；MemGate通过任务条件化的记忆准入机制，为个人AI代理提供了可信且高效的内存管理方案。

title: Multi-task Learning is Not Enough: Representational Entanglement in Dual-output Second Language Speech Recognition
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures, Accepted to the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning Workshop on Machine Learning for Audio
summary: Second-language (L2) speech recognition often requires transcriptions of pronunciations and intended meanings. Multi-task learning (MTL) is a natural approach because it assumes that shared representations benefit both outputs. However, this paper shows that this assumption does not hold across Korean and English. MTL improves meaning but degrades surface transcription, especially in English, where the degradation scales with surface-meaning divergence measured by Levenshtein edit distance.Encoder analysis links these patterns to encoder-level entanglement, with Korean preserving distinct task representations while English produces nearly identical ones. Cross-task decoder analysis shows that the meaning dual-output decoder adapts with a unique representation, while the surface dual-output decoder remains constrained by the encoder. These findings motivate the design of MTL frameworks that mitigate encoder-level entanglement to reduce surface degradation in dual-output L2 automatic speech recognition.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了多任务学习（MTL）在第二语言（L2）语音识别中的应用，发现尽管MTL有助于提升语义识别，但在韩语和英语的表面转写上反而导致性能下降，尤其在英语中，这种退化程度与表面与语义之间的差异（以莱文斯坦编辑距离衡量）成正比。编码器分析显示，韩语能保持任务间的独立表示，而英语则出现高度纠缠的表示。解码器分析表明，语义双输出解码器能自适应调整，而表面双输出解码器受制于编码器的纠缠表示。研究建议设计新框架以缓解编码器层面的纠缠，从而减少双输出L2语音识别中的表面转写退化。
AI.motivation: 多任务学习（MTL）在第二语言（L2）语音识别中被广泛采用，假设共享表示可同时提升转写和语义理解。然而，现有方法未充分考虑不同语言间表面形式与语义之间的差异，可能导致性能下降，尤其是表面转写质量受损。本研究旨在揭示这一现象背后的机制，并提出改进方向。
AI.method: 通过对比韩语与英语在双输出（表面转写+语义理解）语音识别任务中的多任务学习表现，使用编码器分析和跨任务解码器分析，结合莱文斯坦编辑距离量化表面与语义间的差异，探究编码器表示的纠缠程度及其对解码器性能的影响。
AI.result: MTL在语义识别上表现良好，但在英语表面转写上显著退化，且退化程度随表面-语义差异增大而上升；编码器分析显示英语任务表示高度纠缠，而韩语保持分离；解码器分析表明语义解码器可自适应，但表面解码器受限于编码器的纠缠表示。
AI.conclusion: 多任务学习在跨语言L2语音识别中并非普适有效，其性能依赖于语言间的表面-语义一致性。为避免表面转写退化，应设计能减轻编码器级任务纠缠的新型多任务学习框架。

title: Short paper: Models in the dark -- Rectification and erasure under GDPR in ML supply chains
comment: accepted for presentation at Annual Privacy Forum 2026
summary: The rights to rectification and erasure, as established under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), are central to protecting individuals' privacy. However, their effective enforcement in machine learning (ML) systems remains challenging. Existing work has largely addressed these rights from either a legal or a technical perspective in isolation and disregards the fact that models are produced in complex supply chains involving multiple actors across development, distribution, and deployment. This paper presents a holistic survey of challenges in implementing the rights to rectification and erasure in ML models. Drawing on academic literature and guidance from data protection authorities, we find that many GDPR requirements cannot yet be technically met in practice. Our findings further suggest that issues arising in ML supply chains are insufficiently addressed in research. To tackle this gap, we introduce the notion of models in the dark -- derived models created further downstream in an ML chain without sufficient transparency or traceability -- and analyse the urgent challenges posed by this phenomenon. By adopting an interdisciplinary perspective, this work contributes to bridging the gap between legal requirements and the technical implementation of data subject rights in ML, ultimately supporting the development of trustworthy artificial intelligence.

AI.tldr: 本文全面调查了在机器学习系统中实现数据主体的更正权和被遗忘权所面临的挑战，指出当前技术尚无法满足GDPR的许多要求，并提出‘模型之暗’（models in the dark）的概念，强调下游模型生成过程中缺乏透明度与可追溯性的问题。通过跨学科视角，弥合法律要求与技术实现之间的鸿沟，推动可信人工智能的发展。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多从法律或技术单一角度探讨数据主体权利，忽视了机器学习模型在复杂供应链中涉及多方协作的现实，导致实际执行困难。
AI.method: 综合学术文献与数据保护机构指南，分析法律要求与技术实践之间的差距，引入‘模型之暗’概念以揭示下游模型生成中的透明度缺失问题。
AI.result: 发现当前技术难以满足多数GDPR关于更正与删除的要求；ML供应链中的透明性与可追溯性问题未被充分研究，且‘模型之暗’带来严峻挑战。
AI.conclusion: 需加强跨学科合作，推动技术与法律协同，以实现机器学习系统中数据主体权利的有效保障，促进可信AI发展。

title: VZCrash: A Large-Scale IMU Dataset of Ego-Vehicle Crashes
comment: Accepted at the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC 2026). VZCrash is publicly available at this URL: https://huggingface.co/datasets/vzc-research-chapter/VZCrash
summary: We introduce VZCrash, the largest publicly available dataset of real-world vehicle collision data featuring Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) telemetry. The dataset contains more than 31,000 validated crashes and 158,000 negative samples, including hard cases and distractors. Each sample includes acceleration and angular velocity at 100 Hz, and GPS speed at 1 Hz. Events in VZCrash were captured by devices installed on a fleet of 73,010 commercial vehicles of different sizes driving in the United States over the span of several years. We also present an extensive experimental study enabled by the volume of the dataset. We first benchmark several different approaches, from a simple threshold-based heuristic to state-of-the-art deep learning models. Then, we present an experiment demonstrating the importance of scaling data to train high-quality crash detection models, and we show that scale is especially important when these models need to be deployed into a real-world environment.

AI.tldr: VZCrash is a large-scale, real-world vehicle collision dataset with over 31,000 validated crashes and 158,000 negative samples, collected from 73,010 commercial vehicles in the U.S. It includes high-frequency IMU data (acceleration and angular velocity at 100 Hz) and GPS speed (1 Hz). The study benchmarks various crash detection methods—from simple heuristics to deep learning models—and demonstrates that model performance improves significantly with larger-scale training data, especially for real-world deployment.
AI.motivation: To improve crash detection systems by providing a large, diverse, real-world dataset with high-quality sensor data, enabling better model training and evaluation under realistic conditions.
AI.method: Collecting IMU and GPS data from a fleet of 73,010 commercial vehicles over several years; validating crash events; benchmarking multiple detection approaches including threshold-based rules and deep learning models; analyzing the impact of data scale on model performance.
AI.result: The VZCrash dataset enables more robust and accurate crash detection models. Experiments show that scaling up training data significantly enhances model generalization and performance in real-world settings, highlighting the importance of large-scale data for practical deployment.
AI.conclusion: Large-scale, real-world datasets like VZCrash are essential for developing reliable crash detection systems. Model quality strongly depends on data volume, particularly when deploying into complex, real-world environments.

title: When Should Memory Stay Silent: Measuring Memory-Use Boundaries in Memory-Augmented Conversational Agents
summary: Long-term memory enables language model agents to support personalized interactions, but it remains unclear when available memories warrant integration into responses. Existing memory evaluations emphasize retrieval accuracy and downstream task utility, while overlooking whether retrieved sensitive memory content is warranted in the current turn. We introduce RBI-Eval, a controlled measurement study built around a probe set that compares model behavior with and without access to sensitive memory under identical benign prompts. We evaluate four base LLMs against a matched no-memory reference across four memory-access settings: full-context exposure and three retrieval systems. Our results reveal substantial behavioral divergence. With memory available, the separation score for sensitive-memory integration decreases by 8.9\%--26.6\% relative to the matched no-memory reference for GPT-5.4-mini, but by 51.1\%--82.9\% for Claude-Sonnet-4.6, DeepSeek-V4-Flash, and Qwen3.5-9B. Control experiments on DeepSeek and GPT-5.4-mini show this effect is specific to sensitive content, rather than general personalization. Retrieval systems reduce exposure but do not eliminate integration once sensitive memory reaches the generator. These findings suggest safe personalization requires memory-aware decisions at both retrieval and generation time.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出RBI-Eval，一种用于评估语言模型在不同记忆访问设置下是否适当整合敏感记忆内容的控制实验方法。通过对比有无敏感记忆时模型在相同良性提示下的行为差异，发现多个主流大模型（如Claude-Sonnet-4.6、DeepSeek-V4-Flash、Qwen3.5-9B）在有记忆时显著更倾向于引入敏感内容，而仅靠检索系统无法完全避免此类风险。结果表明，安全个性化需在检索和生成阶段均进行记忆意识决策。
AI.motivation: 现有记忆评估主要关注检索准确性和下游任务效用，但忽视了敏感记忆内容在当前对话中是否应被纳入回应。为填补这一空白，本文旨在探究何时应将敏感记忆整合进响应，以提升个性化交互的安全性。
AI.method: 提出RBI-Eval框架，构建探测集，在相同良性提示下比较模型在有/无敏感记忆情况下的行为表现；评估四种基础大模型在四种记忆访问设置下的表现，包括全上下文暴露和三种检索系统，并通过控制实验验证敏感内容特异性。
AI.result: 结果显示，当有记忆可用时，敏感记忆整合的分离分数相较于无记忆参考组下降8.9%–26.6%（GPT-5.4-mini），而其他三模型下降51.1%–82.9%；控制实验表明该效应由敏感内容引起，非一般个性化所致；检索系统虽可减少暴露，但无法消除生成阶段的敏感内容整合。
AI.conclusion: 安全的个性化必须在记忆检索与生成两个阶段都具备记忆意识，仅依赖检索机制不足以防止敏感信息不当泄露。

title: SkillComposer: Learning to Evolve Agent Skills for Specification and Generalization
summary: Agent skills, which consist of reusable strategies that guide agent reasoning and action, have shown strong potential for improving model capability at inference time. However, current skill construction methods treat the problem as one-shot extraction, overlooking a fundamental tension: a skill tailored to the specific task fails to transfer, while the abstracted skill often provides insufficient guidance. We attribute this fragility to the absence of explicit mechanisms for skill specification and generalization. To address this gap, we introduce SkillComposer, a framework that decomposes skill construction into three learnable operations: create, improve, and merge. Trained via systematic rejection sampling recipe, SkillComposer enables language models to self-evolve skills at inference time and supports three deployment modes: offline for building generalized libraries, online for task-specific refinement, and hybrid for combining both. Comprehensive experiments on $τ^2$-Bench, LiveCodeBench v6, and AppWorld show that SkillComposer consistently outperforms baselines. Our SkillComposer-4B improves a 27B executor by up to +4.5 on agent tasks and +3.4 on code tasks, while generalizing across domains and task types unseen during training. Analysis reveals that merge and improve address orthogonal quality dimensions and that skill composition is a transferable meta-ability, providing a practical recipe for skill-augmented inference.

AI.tldr: SkillComposer 是一种用于构建可迁移代理技能的框架，通过创建、改进和合并三个可学习操作实现技能的自演化。它支持离线、在线及混合部署模式，在多个基准测试中显著优于基线方法，提升了模型在任务和代码生成上的表现，并展示了技能组合作为可迁移元能力的潜力。
AI.motivation: 当前技能构建方法存在一击式提取的局限性，导致技能要么过于具体无法迁移，要么过于抽象缺乏指导性，根源在于缺乏显式的技能规范与泛化机制。
AI.method: 提出 SkillComposer 框架，将技能构建分解为创建、改进、合并三种可学习操作，并采用系统化的拒绝采样训练策略，使语言模型能在推理时自我演化技能。
AI.result: 在 τ²-Bench、LiveCodeBench v6 和 AppWorld 上的实验表明，SkillComposer-4B 能使 27B 执行器在代理任务上提升最多 +4.5，在代码任务上提升 +3.4，且具备跨领域和任务类型的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 技能组合是一种可迁移的元能力，SkillComposer 提供了一种实用的增强推理方法，有效解决了技能构建中的泛化与指导性之间的矛盾。

title: Dead Directions: Geometric Singular Learning
summary: Singular learning theory and information geometry have studied the same parameter spaces in mostly separate vocabularies: the former computes Bayesian invariants in resolved coordinates, the latter works in original coordinates under a non-degeneracy assumption that overparameterised models routinely violate. We bridge them through one primitive, the dead direction: a unit vector along which the Fisher metric degenerates, equivalently a tangent to the analytic singular set with a definite KL order, set by how fast the KL divergence vanishes. The two readings name the same vector; our central move shows its KL order is recoverable as the decay rate of the directional Fisher curvature approaching the singularity, in original parameter coordinates and without a Hironaka resolution. A selection rule on smooth fibres translates this rate into Watanabe's single-direction contribution to the real log canonical threshold, and we extend the recovery to multi-component crossings, multiplicity $m$, the singular fluctuation $ν$ (universal in the KL order for 1D directions), prior-RLCT shifts, and tempered posteriors. We then lift this rate to a deep network: a multi-layer K-FAC factorisation writes each Fisher block as a product of activation- and gradient-side rates with a duality between them, instantiated at modern-network primitives (residual streams, layer normalisation, attention). A quotient theorem carries the rate to the gauge quotient $Θ/G$ under gradient flow on a $G$-invariant metric; SGD qualifies, standard Adam does not, and we construct a $G$-equivariant Adam-family preconditioner (DDCAdam) that does. The bridge yields a parameter-coordinate handle on singular geometry, closed-form per-architecture predictions, and a trajectory-rate readout of Watanabe's triple $(λ, m, ν)$ from one checkpoint's forward and backward passes, without posterior sampling.

AI.tldr: 本文通过引入'死方向'（dead direction）这一基本概念，统一了奇异学习理论与信息几何在参数空间分析中的不同表述。死方向是导致Fisher度量退化的方向，其KL阶数决定了KL散度消失的速度。研究发现，该阶数可通过原始参数坐标下方向性Fisher曲率的衰减速率直接恢复，无需进行Hironaka消解。进一步地，通过光滑纤维的选择规则，将此速率转化为Watanabe的单方向贡献，并推广至多分量交叉、多重性 $m$、奇异波动 $ν$、先验-RLCT偏移及温度后验等情形。在深度网络中，利用多层K-FAC分解，将每个Fisher块表示为激活侧与梯度侧速率的乘积，并揭示二者间的对偶性，适用于现代网络结构（如残差流、层归一化、注意力机制）。此外，通过商定理将速率提升至梯度流下的规范商空间 $\Theta/G$，证明SGD满足条件而标准Adam不满足，进而提出一种$G$-等变的Adam族预条件器（DDCAdam）以实现兼容。该桥梁提供了对奇异几何的参数坐标操控能力，实现了按架构的闭式预测，并能仅从一次检查点的前向与反向传播中读取Watanabe三元组 $(\lambda, m, \nu)$，无需后验采样。
AI.motivation: 现有奇异学习理论与信息几何分别使用不同语言描述同一类参数空间，前者依赖解析坐标系计算贝叶斯不变量，后者依赖原始坐标但通常假设非退化，而过参数化模型常违反该假设。因此需要一个统一框架，使两者可在原始参数空间中直接对接。
AI.method: 引入'死方向'作为核心概念，定义其为导致Fisher度量退化的单位向量，对应于解析奇点集的切线，并由KL散度的消失速率决定其阶数。通过分析方向性Fisher曲率在奇点附近的衰减行为，在不进行Hironaka消解的前提下，直接从原始参数坐标中恢复该阶数。结合选择规则与商定理，扩展至多组件、多重性、奇异波动、先验偏移和温度后验等复杂情形。在深度网络中，采用多层K-FAC因子分解，揭示激活与梯度侧速率的对偶结构，并构造$G$-等变预条件器（DDCAdam）以匹配梯度流下的规范商空间。
AI.result: 成功建立奇异学习理论与信息几何之间的桥梁，实现了在原始参数空间中无须消解即可读取死方向的KL阶数；提出了可应用于现代神经网络结构的多层K-FAC因子化方法；设计出满足$G$-等变性的新型优化器DDCAdam；实现了对Watanabe三元组$(\lambda, m, \nu)$的单次检查点读取，且无需后验采样，具备闭式预测能力。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提供了一个统一的参数坐标视角，打通了奇异学习理论与信息几何的壁垒，不仅深化了对过参数化模型奇异几何的理解，还为深度学习模型的泛化性能预测和优化器设计提供了新工具与新范式。

title: Knowledge Distillation for Visual Autoregressive Models
summary: Autoregressive (AR) image generation models are highly expressive but computationally intensive, motivating effective model compression. Knowledge distillation (KD) is a natural approach for model compression and has been widely studied in language modeling, yet its behavior in visual AR generation remains underexplored. In this work, we present the first systematic study of distillation strategies for AR image models. Our analysis shows that while standard distillation can yield meaningful gains, recent methods developed for language do not directly transfer to images: long decoding horizons and visual token ambiguity make teacher supervision unreliable especially under student-conditioned contexts. To address this, we propose VarKD, a distillation framework for visual autoregressive models that distills on student samples while selectively applying teacher supervision and reducing token-level ambiguity. Experiments on ImageNet across multiple AR backbones show that VarKD consistently outperforms prior distillation baselines, narrowing the gap to large-scale models.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统研究了自回归图像生成模型的知识蒸馏策略。发现尽管标准蒸馏可带来显著提升，但语言模型中流行的蒸馏方法在视觉领域不直接适用，因长生成序列和视觉标记歧义导致教师监督不可靠。为此，提出VarKD框架，通过在学生样本上蒸馏、选择性应用教师监督并降低标记级歧义，有效提升性能。在ImageNet上多个AR骨干网络上的实验表明，VarKD consistently 超越现有基线，缩小与大规模模型的差距。
AI.motivation: 自回归图像生成模型表达能力强但计算开销大，亟需高效压缩。知识蒸馏是自然的压缩手段，但在视觉自回归生成中的应用尚不充分，且现有语言模型蒸馏方法难以直接迁移至图像领域，因图像生成存在长序列和视觉标记模糊性问题。
AI.method: 提出VarKD框架，核心思想是在学生模型生成的样本上进行蒸馏，通过选择性地施加教师模型监督，并设计机制减少视觉标记的歧义，从而提升蒸馏效果。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，多种自回归生成骨干网络的实验验证了VarKD的有效性，其性能持续优于已有蒸馏方法，显著缩小了小型模型与大型模型之间的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: VarKD为视觉自回归生成模型提供了有效的知识蒸馏方案，克服了传统方法在长序列和标记歧义下的局限性，推动了高效自回归图像生成模型的发展。

title: Learning Visual Spatial Planning from Symbolic State via Modality-Gap-Aware Self-Distillation
summary: While vision-language models excel at general multimodal understanding, they still struggle with visual spatial planning. We attribute this to a perception-reasoning modality gap: visual planning requires models to infer latent state structures from pixels and then reason over the recovered structure to produce valid actions, whereas symbolic planning directly leverages explicit objects and constraints. This creates dual bottlenecks in visual state recovery and multi-step planning. To address this, we propose MGSD, a two-stage modality-gap-aware self-distillation framework. First, a cold-start grounding stage equips the visual student with reliable state representations, minimizing early perception noise. Second, a privileged teacher transfers planning capabilities via on-policy distillation, using explicit symbolic states to supervise the student's own visual rollout prefixes. Crucially, symbolic data is used strictly during training, leaving inference purely visual. Experiments on visual planning benchmarks show that MGSD consistently improves visual planning across both 4B and 8B backbones, raising the macro average by 19.3% and 18.4%, respectively. The resulting models narrow the gap to symbolic-input upper bounds, while ablations and diagnostics confirm that the improvement comes from both visual state recovery and optimal-path reasoning. These results suggest that modality-gap-aware self-distillation improves not only how models perceive actionable states, but also how they plan over the inferred structure. Code is available at https://github.com/Oranger-l/MGSD.

AI.tldr: 提出MGSD框架，通过两阶段自蒸馏解决视觉-语言模型在视觉空间规划中的模态差距问题。第一阶段冷启动接地阶段提升视觉学生对状态的表示能力，减少早期感知噪声；第二阶段利用特权教师通过策略内蒸馏，将符号化规划能力传递给学生，仅在训练中使用符号数据，推理时完全依赖视觉输入。实验表明，MGSD在多个视觉规划基准上显著提升性能，4B和8B模型的宏平均分别提高19.3%和18.4%，缩小了与符号输入上限的差距。消融实验确认改进源于视觉状态恢复和最优路径推理双重提升。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型在视觉空间规划任务中表现不佳，主要因感知-推理模态差距：模型需从像素中推断潜在状态结构并进行多步推理，而符号规划直接使用显式对象与约束。该差距导致视觉状态恢复与多步规划双重瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出两阶段模态差距感知自蒸馏框架MGSD。第一阶段为冷启动接地阶段，使视觉学生获得可靠的初始状态表示；第二阶段采用特权教师通过策略内蒸馏，以符号化状态监督学生自身的视觉回溯前缀，实现规划能力迁移。训练中使用符号数据，推理时保持纯视觉输入。
AI.result: MGSD在多个视觉规划基准上显著提升性能，4B和8B模型的宏平均分别提升19.3%和18.4%。模型性能更接近符号输入的理论上限，且消融实验验证了视觉状态恢复与最优路径推理均得到改善。
AI.conclusion: 模态差距感知的自蒸馏方法不仅提升了模型对可行动态状态的感知能力，也增强了其在推断结构上的规划能力，为视觉空间规划提供了有效解决方案。代码已开源。

title: LatentSkill: From In-Context Textual Skills to In-Weight Latent Skills for LLM Agents
summary: Agent systems increasingly use textual skills to encode reusable task procedures, but injecting these skills into the prompt at every step incurs substantial context overhead and exposes skill content as plaintext. We present LatentSkill, a framework that converts textual skills into plug-and-play LoRA adapters through a pretrained hypernetwork. LatentSkill stores skill knowledge in weight space rather than context space, removing per-step skill tokens while preserving modular loading, scaling, and composition. On ALFWorld and Search-QA, LatentSkill outperforms the corresponding in-context skill baseline while using substantially fewer prefill tokens: it improves ALFWorld success by 21.4 and 13.4 points on the seen and unseen splits with 64.1% fewer prefill tokens, and improves Search-QA exact match by 3.0 points with 72.2% lower skill-token overhead. Further analysis shows that generated skill LoRAs form a structured semantic geometry, can be precisely controlled via the LoRA scaling coefficient, and can be composed through parameter-space arithmetic when skill components are aligned. These findings suggest that weight-space skills provide an efficient, modular, and less exposed substrate for extending LLM agents.

AI.tldr: LatentSkill converts textual skills into LoRA adapters via a pretrained hypernetwork, storing skill knowledge in weight space instead of context space. This reduces context overhead and avoids exposing skill content as plaintext. It improves performance on ALFWorld and Search-QA while using far fewer prefill tokens and enables modular, composable, and controllable skill execution.
AI.motivation: Existing agent systems face high context overhead and security risks when injecting textual skills into prompts at every step. The goal is to reduce context usage and protect skill content by encoding skills in weight space.
AI.method: LatentSkill uses a pretrained hypernetwork to convert textual skills into plug-and-play LoRA adapters, enabling storage and retrieval of skills in weight space rather than context space.
AI.result: LatentSkill improves ALFWorld success by 21.4 and 13.4 points on seen and unseen splits, respectively, with 64.1% fewer prefill tokens; it boosts Search-QA exact match by 3.0 points with 72.2% lower skill-token overhead. Generated LoRAs exhibit structured semantic geometry and can be controlled and composed via scaling and parameter-space arithmetic.
AI.conclusion: Weight-space skills via LatentSkill offer an efficient, modular, secure, and composable way to extend LLM agents without the drawbacks of context-based skill injection.

title: Steering Vectors are an Adversarial Attack Surface
summary: Activation steering has become a popular way to control Large Language Model (LLM) behavior without fine-tuning. Since the technique is plug-and-play, users share datasets and precomputed vectors to steer model activations. However, we show that a \emph{stealth data poisoning attack} silently compromises this pipeline. By substituting $4{-}6\%$ of tokens in the steering dataset, an attacker can silently align the resulting vector with an anti-refusal direction. This jailbreaks the target model while preserving the intended steering effect on benign prompts. Under this threat model, a malicious actor can distribute an apparently safe bundle containing texts, vectors, and weights, alongside an equivalence certificate that the end-user can verify. We test the attack on two open-weight model families and eight model-attribute combinations, observing that poisoned vectors reach an absolute attack success rate (ASR) of $20{-}55\%$, $+19\%$ to $+51\%$ over a clean reference. Finally, we find that a refusal-direction orthogonalization defense can recover ${\approx}82\%$ of the ASR gap without harming benign behavior.

AI.tldr: 通过替换4-6%的steering数据中的令牌，攻击者可无声地将向量对齐至反拒绝方向，从而在不破坏正常指令效果的前提下实现模型越狱。该攻击在两个开源模型家族和八种模型属性组合上实现了20-55%的绝对攻击成功率（ASR），较干净基准提升19%-51%。同时，一种正交化防御策略可恢复约82%的性能损失，且不影响良性行为。
AI.motivation: 现有激活引导技术虽无需微调且便于共享，但其依赖预计算向量与数据集，存在隐蔽的数据投毒风险，可能导致模型被恶意操控而不被察觉。
AI.method: 通过少量替换训练数据中的令牌，使生成的激活向量隐式对齐至特定反拒绝方向，实现越狱；利用等价证书确保攻击包的可信性。
AI.result: 在多个模型配置下，攻击成功率达20-55%，显著高于未中毒情况；使用正交化防御后，可恢复约82%的性能差距，同时保持正常功能。
AI.conclusion: 激活引导的共享机制存在严重的隐蔽安全威胁，需引入防御机制以保障模型控制的安全性。

title: HyperVis: Continuous Latent Visual Relational Graphs on the Lorentz Hyperboloid for Compositional Reasoning
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) struggle with compositional reasoning that requires understanding inter-object relationships. A natural remedy is to inject explicit scene graph triplets $\langle s, p, o \rangle$ from an off-the-shelf scene graph generator (SGG), but we show this backfires: discrete text labels collide with the continuous visual modality, degrading GQA accuracy from 60.38\% to 58.86\%. We propose \textbf{HyperVis}, which bypasses the SGG semantic bottleneck entirely. From $N$ class-agnostic region proposals, we compute a dense $O(N^2)$ visual relation tensor via spatially-biased cross-attention, project it onto a Lorentz hyperboloid, and enforce hierarchy through spatial physics, namely IoA-driven entailment cones and exterior-angle repulsion. We discover that HyperVis contributes in two complementary ways: (1) as a \emph{training-time regularizer}, the hyperbolic relational losses shape LoRA representations that improve generative VQA (GQA 61.03\% vs.\ 57.21\% for LoRA fine-tuning without relational losses, recovering and surpassing the baseline); and (2) as an \emph{inference-time relational encoder}, hyperbolic prefix tokens boost discriminative compositional scoring (SugarCrepe 79.94\%, $+$6.25pp over baseline). The learned curvature stabilises at $κ{=}4.0$, an order of magnitude above prior hyperbolic VLMs where $κ$ typically collapses toward zero, indicating that continuous visual features genuinely require the exponential volume of strongly curved space. A controlled Euclidean ablation confirms this decomposition: the relational pipeline regularises LoRA comparably in flat space (GQA 60.81\%), but the compositionality gain is specifically hyperbolic (SugarCrepe $+$4.58pp over Euclidean), with entailment loss ${\sim}6{\times}$ higher in Euclidean training. Codes are available at TBA.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出HyperVis，一种基于双曲空间的视觉关系建模方法，以解决视觉语言模型在组合推理上的不足。传统使用离散文本标签的场景图生成器会因模态冲突导致性能下降。HyperVis通过类无关区域提议计算密集的视觉关系张量，利用空间偏置交叉注意力，并将其投影到洛伦兹双曲面，通过IoA驱动的蕴含锥和外角排斥来建模层次结构。该方法在训练时作为正则化器，提升LoRA表示能力（GQA从57.21%提升至61.03%）；在推理时作为关系编码器，显著增强组合评分能力（SugarCrepe达79.94%，较基线+6.25个百分点）。学习到的曲率κ=4.0，远高于以往双曲模型，表明连续视觉特征需要强曲率空间。欧氏空间对比实验显示，关系模块在平坦空间中仍具正则化作用，但组合性增益仅存在于双曲空间，且蕴含损失高出约6倍。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在处理需要理解对象间关系的组合推理任务时表现不佳。虽然引入外部场景图生成器（SGG）的三元组可视为解决方案，但其离散文本标签与连续视觉模态存在语义冲突，反而降低性能。因此亟需一种能无缝融合视觉关系信息、避免模态不匹配的新方法。
AI.method: 提出HyperVis：从N个类无关区域提案出发，构建O(N²)的视觉关系张量，采用空间偏置交叉注意力；将该张量投影至洛伦兹双曲面，利用IoA驱动的蕴含锥和外角排斥实现空间物理引导的层次结构建模；结合双曲空间中的关系损失，在训练阶段正则化LoRA参数，在推理阶段生成双曲前缀令牌以增强组合推理能力。
AI.result: 在GQA任务上，引入超球正则化使准确率从57.21%提升至61.03%；在SugarCrepe组合推理基准上，达到79.94%准确率，比基线提升6.25个百分点。学习到的曲率κ=4.0，显著高于以往模型（通常趋近于零），验证了强曲率空间对连续视觉特征的重要性。欧氏空间对照实验表明，组合性增益主要来自双曲结构，且蕴含损失在双曲训练中高出约6倍。
AI.conclusion: HyperVis通过双曲几何建模视觉关系，有效克服了传统场景图方法的模态不匹配问题。其在训练中作为正则化器，在推理中作为关系编码器，共同提升了视觉语言模型的组合推理能力。所学曲率高达4.0，说明连续视觉特征确实需要高度弯曲的空间表达，为未来多模态模型设计提供了新的几何范式。

title: A Framework for Measuring Appropriate Reliance on Set-Valued AI Advice
summary: Appropriate reliance on AI advice has become a central research theme in human-AI collaboration. Existing frameworks have focused exclusively on point predictions as AI advice. However, set-valued AI advice (e.g., discrete sets or continuous intervals) is increasingly being used to communicate uncertainty and improve human decision making. In this paper, we develop the first formal framework for measuring appropriate reliance on set-valued AI advice within the sequential judge-advisor paradigm, spanning both classification and regression tasks. For classification, we first introduce the dimensions that are necessary for evaluating set-valued AI advice. We then define two metrics: correct reliance rate on AI and correct reliance rate on self, which jointly characterize appropriate reliance in this setting. For regression, we introduce quantity of AI reliance and quality of AI reliance, which respectively measure whether a decision maker utilized the AI advice and whether their reliance helped them get closer to the ground truth relative to their initial estimate. Through the application of our framework, we demonstrate how these metrics capture important nuances in human-AI collaboration that existing measures overlook.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个用于衡量在序列判断-建议范式中对集合值人工智能建议的适当依赖性的正式框架，涵盖分类和回归任务。针对分类任务，引入了评估集合值AI建议的维度，并定义了两个指标：对AI的正确依赖率和对自我的正确依赖率，共同刻画该情境下的适当依赖。针对回归任务，引入了AI依赖量和AI依赖质量，分别衡量决策者是否使用了AI建议以及其依赖是否使其更接近真实值相对于初始估计。通过应用该框架，展示了这些指标如何捕捉现有度量所忽略的人机协作中的重要细微差别。
AI.motivation: 现有研究框架仅关注点预测作为AI建议，但集合值AI建议（如离散集或连续区间）在表达不确定性、提升人类决策方面日益重要。因此需要一个正式框架来衡量对这类建议的适当依赖。
AI.method: 提出一套新的评估框架，包括分类任务中的正确依赖率指标和回归任务中的依赖量与依赖质量指标，以系统化地分析人类对集合值AI建议的依赖行为。
AI.result: 新框架能够有效捕捉人类与AI协作中被现有度量忽视的关键细节，为理解适当依赖提供了更全面的视角。
AI.conclusion: 本研究首次建立了针对集合值AI建议的适当依赖性测量框架，显著提升了对人机协同中依赖行为的理解，具有重要的理论与实践意义。

title: CHALIS: A Challenge Dataset for Language Identification in Difficult Scenarios
summary: We present CHALIS (Challenging Language Identification Samples), a new benchmark dataset explicitly designed to address difficult cases in language identification: cousin languages and orthographic noise. Our dataset has two parts: First, we collected sentences shared across mutually intelligible language pairs (Czech/Slovak, Spanish/Catalan, Portuguese/Galician, Danish/Norwegian). The second part tests for orthography noise: we transliterate text across multiple scripts, remove diacritics, simulate homoglyph attacks, and use Internet slang. We evaluate four widely used language identification systems on CHALIS and demonstrate that all struggle substantially in these scenarios, especially on lower-resource languages within cousin pairs and on transliterated input. The resource is publicly available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/michal-tichy/CHALIS.

AI.tldr: CHALIS 是一个专门针对语言识别中困难案例（如亲属语言和拼写噪声）的新基准数据集。它包含两部分：一是收集互为可理解语言对（如捷克语/斯洛伐克语、西班牙语/加泰罗尼亚语等）共享的句子；二是测试拼写噪声，包括跨文字系统转写、去除变音符号、模拟同形异义攻击和使用网络俚语。在 CHALIS 上评估四种主流语言识别系统，发现它们在这些场景下表现均显著下降，尤其在低资源语言和转写输入上。该数据集已公开发布。
AI.motivation: 现有语言识别系统在处理亲属语言（如捷克语与斯洛伐克语）以及存在拼写噪声（如转写、去重音、同形异义攻击、网络用语）的文本时表现不佳，亟需一个专门针对这些挑战设计的基准数据集来推动技术改进。
AI.method: 构建 CHALIS 数据集，包含两部分：1）从互为可理解的语言对中提取共享句子；2）通过跨文字转写、移除变音符号、模拟同形异义攻击、引入网络俚语等方式生成拼写噪声样本。随后在该数据集上评估四种主流语言识别系统。
AI.result: 所有评估的语言识别系统在 CHALIS 基准上表现均显著下降，特别是在处理亲属语言中的低资源语言和转写输入时问题尤为严重。
AI.conclusion: CHALIS 有效揭示了当前语言识别系统的局限性，尤其是在面对亲属语言和拼写噪声时。该数据集为未来研究提供了重要基准，有助于提升模型在复杂真实场景下的鲁棒性。

title: LLM Explainability with Counterfactual Chains and Causal Graphs
