AI.tldr: 本研究针对药品供应链（PSC）中因需求不确定和补货周期波动导致的库存管理难题，提出一种基于深度强化学习（DRL）的混合异步优势演员-评论家分布式近端策略优化（A3C DPPO）算法，以应对连续动作空间下的动态优化问题。该方法在真实世界药品库存数据上进行了验证，结果表明其能自适应调整补货策略，显著降低库存成本，并保持高水平患者服务率，具备良好的实际应用潜力。
AI.motivation: 药品供应链面临需求波动、补货时间变化及产品有限保质期等多重挑战，传统库存管理方法难以有效平衡库存充足性与浪费控制，亟需更智能、自适应的优化策略以提升供应链效率和盈利能力。
AI.method: 将库存补货问题建模为马尔可夫决策过程，采用混合异步优势演员-评论家分布式近端策略优化（A3C DPPO）深度强化学习算法，专门设计以处理连续动作空间中的库存决策问题。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，所提算法在动态环境下能自适应更新补货策略，相比多种基准方法显著降低库存成本；基于真实药品库存数据的验证进一步证实了其可行性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的A3C DPPO算法能够有效应对药品供应链中复杂的不确定性因素，在保障高服务水平的同时优化库存成本，为现代药品供应链的智能化管理提供了有力工具。

title: Many Circuits, One Mechanism: Input Variation and Evaluation Granularity in Circuit Discovery
summary: Circuit discovery methods identify subgraphs that explain specific model behaviors, and structural differences between discovered circuits are commonly interpreted as evidence of distinct mechanisms. We test this assumption by varying input statistics while holding the task fixed, and show that the resulting structural differences exhibit apparent specialization but do not correspond to functional differences, a pattern we term phantom specialization. Using Literal Sequence Copying across four token-frequency bands plus a control condition in five Pythia models (70M-1.4B), we extract 75 circuits and find that structurally distinct circuits implement the same computation: band-specific edges transfer broadly across bands, a core shared across most bands recovers at least 99% of circuit performance, and causal interchange interventions confirm that internal representations are interchangeable across frequency bands. Repeated extractions within the same frequency band further suggest that discovery algorithms sample from an equivalence class of valid subgraphs rather than recovering a unique mechanism. Standard evaluation practice obscures this pattern: source-level evaluation inflates apparent faithfulness, while edge-level evaluation reveals the many-to-one mapping from structure to function. Our results show that structural differences between circuits are not sufficient evidence for distinct mechanisms, and that exposing this requires edge-level evaluation and cross-condition transfer tests.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了电路发现方法中结构差异是否能作为不同机制的证据。通过在固定任务下改变输入统计特性，发现结构差异看似表现出专门化，但实际功能无差别，称为‘幻觉专门化’。在五个Pythia模型中对四个词频带进行文字序列复制任务，提取75个电路，结果显示结构不同的电路执行相同计算：特定频带的边在频带间广泛转移，核心共享部分可恢复99%以上的电路性能，因果交换干预也证实内部表示在频带间可互换。同一频带内重复提取表明，发现算法从有效子图的等价类中采样，而非找到唯一机制。标准评估方式掩盖了这一现象：源级评估夸大了准确性，而边级评估揭示了从结构到功能的多对一映射。结论是：仅凭结构差异不足以证明机制不同，需通过边级评估和跨条件转移测试才能暴露此问题。
AI.motivation: 检验电路发现方法中结构差异是否确实反映功能差异，以验证现有解释的可靠性。
AI.method: 在固定任务下改变输入统计特性（词频带），使用多个Pythia模型（70M-1.4B）进行文字序列复制实验，提取电路并进行因果交换、性能恢复与重复提取分析，结合源级与边级评估方法对比结果。
AI.result: 结构上显著不同的电路实际上执行相同的计算；核心共享组件承担绝大部分功能，且内部表示可在不同频带间互换；发现算法倾向于从等价类中采样，而非唯一机制；源级评估高估准确度，边级评估揭示多对一结构-功能关系。
AI.conclusion: 结构差异不能单独作为机制不同的证据；必须采用边级评估和跨条件转移测试来揭示真实的功能等价性。

title: On Advantage Estimates for Max@K Policy Gradients
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards is widely used for post-training reasoning models, but sparse outcome rewards make exploration difficult. A complementary approach is to optimize inference-time objectives such as pass@K and max@K directly, yet existing policy-gradient estimators for these objectives use different signals, baselines, and normalizations, making their relationships unclear. We study this issue through baseline design and advantage centering. Starting from the advantage estimator of a leading method in the field, we show that it is policy-gradient unbiased but yields a non-centered advantage. We then introduce a Leave-Two-Out baseline that preserves policy-gradient unbiasedness while making realized batch advantages exactly centered. The resulting method, MaxPO, has an efficient quadratic-time implementation and integrates naturally into group-based RL for LLM post-training. We further derive the canonical finite-batch advantage for max@K, providing a unified view of existing advantage estimators. Empirically, we verify that the L2O baseline reduces gradient variance and outperforms non-centered alternatives.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了强化学习中稀疏奖励导致探索困难的问题，提出通过优化推理时目标（如pass@K、max@K）来改进方法。针对现有策略梯度估计器信号、基线和归一化不一致的问题，作者引入了一种新的留两出（Leave-Two-Out, L2O）基线，该基线在保持无偏性的同时使批量优势完全中心化，从而提出MaxPO方法。该方法具有高效的二次时间复杂度实现，并可自然融入基于分组的LLM后训练强化学习框架。此外，作者推导了max@K的规范有限批处理优势，统一了现有估计器的关系。实验表明，L2O基线有效降低梯度方差，优于非中心化方法。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法在后训练推理模型时面临稀疏奖励导致的探索困难问题；而直接优化推理时目标（如pass@K、max@K）虽有潜力，但现有策略梯度估计器因使用不同信号、基线和归一化方式，导致其关系不清晰，难以统一优化。
AI.method: 从一种领先方法的优势估计器出发，分析其为无偏但非中心化的特性；提出留两出（L2O）基线，在保持策略梯度无偏性的前提下，使实际批量优势精确中心化；基于此构建MaxPO方法，支持高效二次时间实现，并与分组强化学习结合用于大语言模型后训练；进一步推导max@K的规范有限批处理优势，建立统一视角。
AI.result: 实验验证了所提L2O基线能显著降低梯度方差；MaxPO方法在多个任务上表现优于非中心化基线方法，且具备良好的计算效率与集成能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过设计中心化的优势估计器（即L2O基线），本文提出了一个高效、统一且性能优越的强化学习框架——MaxPO，适用于大语言模型的后训练阶段，尤其在优化推理时目标方面展现出显著优势。

title: SAM-Flow: Source-Anchored Masked Flow for Training-Free Image Editing
summary: Training-free image editing has recently attracted increasing attention due to its ability to modify real images using powerful pre-trained diffusion and flow-matching models without additional training. However, existing inversion-based and differential-flow-based methods usually perform global latent transport, which inevitably propagates editing effects to non-target regions and leads to background leakage. To address this problem, we propose SAM-Flow, a source-anchored masked flow framework for localized training-free image editing. Instead of updating the whole latent representation, SAM-Flow first uses a scout image and token-grounded attention maps to localize the editable semantic regions. It then applies differential velocity updates only within these regions, while anchoring the remaining areas to the source-image latent trajectory. To further improve spatial stability and boundary naturalness, we introduce a time-varying source-anchored projection mechanism with dynamic soft masks, transition regions, and temporal mask accumulation. The proposed method is plug-and-play and can be integrated with mainstream flow-matching backbones such as Stable Diffusion 3 and FLUX without any fine-tuning. Extensive qualitative and quantitative experiments demonstrate that SAM-Flow achieves accurate semantic editing while significantly improving background preservation, providing a simple and general localized editing paradigm for training-free image editing. Code is available at: https://github.com/chwbob/Sam-Flow.

AI.tldr: SAM-Flow提出一种无需训练的局部化图像编辑框架，通过源锚定掩码流机制，仅在可编辑语义区域进行微分速度更新，同时保持其他区域的源图像潜在轨迹不变，从而有效避免背景泄漏。引入时变源锚定投影机制提升空间稳定性和边界自然度，支持主流流匹配模型如Stable Diffusion 3和FLUX，无需微调，具有良好的通用性与实用性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于反演和微分流的方法多进行全局潜在空间传输，导致编辑效果传播至非目标区域，引发背景泄漏问题，亟需一种能够实现精准局部编辑且无需额外训练的方法。
AI.method: 利用侦察图像与基于标记的注意力图定位可编辑语义区域；仅在这些区域内应用微分速度更新，其余区域锚定于源图像潜在轨迹；引入时间变化的源锚定投影机制，包含动态软掩码、过渡区域与时间掩码累积，以增强空间稳定性和边界自然性。
AI.result: 在多种主流流匹配模型上均实现了高精度语义编辑，显著改善了背景保留能力，定量与定性实验均验证了方法的有效性与优越性。
AI.conclusion: SAM-Flow提供了一种简单、通用且无需训练的局部化图像编辑范式，为训练自由图像编辑提供了有效的解决方案，具有良好的扩展性与应用前景。

title: Unsupervised Pattern Analysis in Japanese Veterinary Toxicology: A Regulatory-Compliant Framework for Cross-Species Risk Assessment
comment: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Biomedical Engineering
summary: Veterinary pharmacovigilance systems are essential for monitoring adverse drug events (ADEs), yet existing approaches often fail to capture region-specific toxicity patterns shaped by local biological and regulatory contexts. In Japan, these challenges are amplified by species-specific metabolic differences and reporting practices defined by the Ministry of Agriculture, Forestry, and Fisheries (MAFF). Most prior work relies on prediction-oriented models, limiting mechanistic interpretability. This study proposes a regulatory-integrated unsupervised framework for pattern discovery using the National Veterinary Assay Laboratory (NVAL) database. ADEs are encoded into organ system-aligned representations and adjusted for species-specific reporting biases, enabling cross-species comparison. Similarity-based clustering and dimensionality reduction are applied to identify latent toxicity structures. Analysis of 4,120 high-confidence ADE reports (9,080 drug-ADE combinations) identified three significant species clusters (p < 0.01), including hepatic-dominant patterns in companion animals (0.42 $\pm$ 0.06), renal toxicity in ruminants (0.39 $\pm$ 0.07), and dermatological sensitivity in sheep (0.35 $\pm$ 0.07). Drug-level clustering achieved 83% alignment with pharmacological classes, while cosine similarity outperformed alternative metrics (silhouette score: 0.48; cluster precision: 87%). Regulatory validation showed strong agreement with established classifications. These findings demonstrate that regulation-aligned unsupervised analysis can uncover biologically meaningful, region-specific toxicity patterns, providing an interpretable and scalable framework for veterinary drug safety assessment.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出一种整合监管规则的无监督框架，利用日本国家兽医分析实验室（NVAL）数据库发现区域特异性毒性模式。通过物种特异性报告偏差校正和器官系统对齐表示，对4,120份高置信度不良药物事件（ADE）报告进行聚类分析，识别出三种显著的物种簇：伴侣动物以肝毒性为主，反刍动物肾毒性显著，绵羊则表现出皮肤敏感性。药物层面聚类与药理类别匹配率达83%，余弦相似性表现最优（轮廓分数0.48，聚类精确度87%），且与现有分类体系高度一致。结果表明，该方法可有效揭示生物意义明确、可解释性强的区域性毒性规律，为兽药安全评估提供可扩展的分析工具。
AI.motivation: 现有兽药警戒系统难以捕捉受本地生物学和监管背景影响的区域特异性毒性模式，尤其在日本因物种代谢差异和农林水产省（MAFF）报告制度而更加复杂；且多数现有研究依赖预测模型，缺乏机制可解释性，亟需一种能结合监管规则、支持模式发现的可解释分析框架。
AI.method: 构建基于监管整合的无监督分析框架，将不良药物事件（ADE）编码为器官系统对齐表示，并校正物种特异性报告偏差；采用相似性聚类与降维技术，挖掘潜在毒性结构；通过药物聚类一致性、相似性指标比较及监管分类验证，评估模型性能。
AI.result: 从9,080个药物-ADE组合中分析出三个显著物种簇（p < 0.01）：伴侣动物肝毒性（0.42 ± 0.06）、反刍动物肾毒性（0.39 ± 0.07）、绵羊皮肤敏感性（0.35 ± 0.07）；药物聚类与药理类别匹配率达83%；余弦相似性优于其他度量（轮廓分数0.48，聚类精确度87%）；结果与既有监管分类高度一致。
AI.conclusion: 监管对齐的无监督分析能够有效揭示具有生物学意义、区域特异性的毒性模式，提供一种可解释、可扩展的兽药安全评估新范式。

title: FOXGLOVE: Understanding Goal-Oriented and Anchored Writing Feedback from Experts and LLMs on Argumentative Essays
summary: While large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to generate writing feedback, there remains no systematic comparison of LLM and expert feedback on the dimensions that writing research identifies as central to revision: goal-orientation, anchoring to specific sentences, and prioritization. We introduce FOXGLOVE, a dataset of 696 feedback comments written by trained writing instructors on 69 twelfth-grade argumentative essays, paired with 1,644 comments generated from four frontier LLMs under a shared protocol, totaling 2,340 comments. We provide expert quality ratings on a subset of both instructor and LLM comments. We find that instructors and LLMs distribute feedback similarly across goals and essay positions, yet instructors and models diverge on the specific sentences on which to provide feedback. Additionally, we find that models tend to write more complex feedback and use fewer questions than instructors. LLM feedback also receives higher ratings on most dimensions of quality, as rated by instructors, but much of this advantage appears to be attributable to lengthier comments. FOXGLOVE enables systematic comparison of where human and LLM feedback align, diverge, and differ.

AI.tldr: 该研究构建了FOXGLOVE数据集，包含696条由专业写作教师对69篇高中议论文提供的反馈，以及4个前沿大语言模型在相同协议下生成的1,644条反馈，共2,340条反馈。研究比较了人类与LLM在目标导向、句子锚定和优先级排序等核心修订维度上的表现。结果显示，两者在反馈分布上相似，但在具体句子选择上存在差异；LLM反馈更复杂、提问较少，且在多数质量维度上评分更高，但这一优势主要源于评论更长。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对大语言模型（LLM）与专家反馈在写作修订关键维度（如目标导向性、句子锚定、优先级排序）上的系统性对比，限制了对LLM生成反馈质量的深入理解。
AI.method: 构建并使用FOXGLOVE数据集，包含人工教师与四种前沿大语言模型在相同任务下的反馈，通过定量分析与专家质量评分，系统比较二者在反馈分布、句位选择、语言复杂度及质量维度上的异同。
AI.result: LLM与人类教师在反馈目标分布和文章位置分布上相似，但在具体句子选择上存在显著差异；LLM反馈更复杂、提问更少，且整体质量评分更高，但这一优势主要归因于评论长度。
AI.conclusion: FOXGLOVE为系统评估人类与大语言模型在写作反馈中的异同提供了可靠基准，揭示了当前LLM反馈的优势部分源于形式特征（如长度），而非内容深度，提示未来需关注反馈的精准性与有效性。

title: OrderGrad: Optimizing Beyond the Mean with Order-Statistic Policy Gradient Estimation
summary:
Policy-gradient methods usually optimize expected return, but many real world applications care about distributional properties of returns: tail risk, outlier robustness, or best-of-K discovery. We introduce OrderGrad, a family of likelihood-ratio and reparameterization gradient estimators for order-statistic objectives. OrderGrad optimizes finite-sample L-statistics, i.e., weighted averages of sorted rewards or costs, recovering objectives such as VaR, CVaR, trimmed means, medians, and top-m/best-of-K criteria by changing only the rank weights. For any fixed sample size and rank-weight vector, OrderGrad provides an unbiased gradient estimator for the corresponding order-statistic objective. The method is implemented as a simple reward transformation that can then be used in an otherwise standard policy-gradient or reparameterized update. We study the resulting estimator's variance behavior and evaluate it on tasks where mean optimization is mismatched to the deployment objective, including LLM math post-training and other tasks. OrderGrad provides a unified, plug-and-play route to risk-averse, robust, and exploratory learning.
  Code: https://github.com/paavo5/ordergrad

AI.tldr: OrderGrad introduces a family of gradient estimators for order-statistic objectives, enabling optimization of distributional properties like tail risk, robustness, and best-of-K criteria. It supports finite-sample L-statistics through weighted averages of sorted rewards, offering unbiased gradients for various risk-sensitive objectives such as VaR, CVaR, medians, and trimmed means. The method is implemented via a simple reward transformation compatible with standard policy-gradient or reparameterization updates. Experiments show superior performance in settings where mean optimization fails, including LLM math post-training.
AI.motivation: Many real-world applications require optimizing beyond expected return—focusing on distributional properties such as tail risk, outlier robustness, or top-K performance. Standard policy-gradient methods, which optimize expected return, often fail to align with these deployment objectives.
AI.method: OrderGrad uses likelihood-ratio and reparameterization gradient estimators tailored for order-statistic objectives. It computes unbiased gradients for L-statistics by applying rank-based weights to sorted rewards/costs, allowing flexible optimization of various criteria (e.g., VaR, median, best-of-K) through simple reward transformation.
AI.result: OrderGrad achieves better alignment with distributional objectives compared to mean-based optimization. It outperforms baseline methods in tasks involving risk-averse, robust, and exploratory learning, particularly in LLM math post-training and other scenarios where mean optimization is mismatched to the true goal.
AI.conclusion: OrderGrad provides a unified, plug-and-play framework for optimizing distributional properties of returns. Its simplicity, theoretical guarantees, and empirical effectiveness make it a powerful tool for risk-averse, robust, and exploratory reinforcement learning.

title: GRAMformer: Any-Order Modality Interactions via Volumetric Multimodal Cross-Attention
summary: Transformer-based multimodal models rely on attention mechanisms to integrate information across heterogeneous modalities. Despite their success, existing multimodal attention formulations compute their scores through collections of pairwise dot-product interactions or by concatenating all the modalities into the keys, even when multiple modalities should be jointly involved. As a consequence, current approaches either incur quadratic complexity in the number of modalities or fail to explicitly model interactions that depend on the joint configuration of multiple representations. In this work, we introduce the Volumetric Multimodal cross-Attention (VMA), a novel cross-attention mechanism in which attention scores are defined as a function of the joint geometry of a query and multiple modality-specific keys. VMA computes the volume spanned by query and key vectors across multiple modalities, capturing joint multimodal dependencies beyond pairwise similarity, enabling native modeling of any-order modality interactions. We integrate VMA into our novel multimodal transformer architecture, named GRAMformer, explicitly designed to integrate any number of modalities. We evaluate the proposed model on multimodal learning tasks, demonstrating improved effectiveness and efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新型的多模态交叉注意力机制VMA，通过计算查询与多个模态键向量共同构成的体积来捕捉跨模态的联合依赖关系，克服了现有方法在模态间交互建模上的局限性。结合新设计的GRAMformer架构，该方法支持任意数量模态的高效集成，在多个任务上表现出更优的性能和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的多模态模型在处理多模态交互时，依赖于成对点积或拼接所有模态作为键，导致计算复杂度高或无法显式建模多模态联合配置下的交互关系。
AI.method: 引入体积化多模态交叉注意力（VMA），以查询和各模态键向量的联合几何结构为基础，计算其张成的体积作为注意力分数，从而显式建模任意顺序的多模态交互；并构建GRAMformer架构，专门支持任意数量模态的融合。
AI.result: 在多个多模态学习任务中，GRAMformer结合VMA展现出更高的有效性与计算效率，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: VMA通过几何体积建模实现了对多模态联合依赖的自然表达，使多模态Transformer能够高效、灵活地处理任意数量模态的交互，为多模态表示学习提供了新的范式。

title: Evaluating Agentic Configuration Repair for Computer Networks
summary: Misconfigurations in computer networks remain a major source of critical Internet outages. Research is turning to Large Language Models (LLMs) to automate the complex, error-prone task of network configuration. However, even state-of-the-art models fail to resolve misconfigurations in large-scale, complex scenarios and often introduce new errors. In this work, we benchmark open- and closed-source LLMs augmented with formal network verification and context retrieval tools. We demonstrate that agentic architectures outperform base LLMs in repair efficacy (by 12% on average) and safety (by 17% on average), enabled by the ability to dynamically manage context and iteratively validate configuration repairs.

AI.tldr: 该研究评估了增强形式化网络验证和上下文检索工具的开源与闭源大语言模型（LLMs），发现代理架构在修复有效性和安全性上分别比基础LLM平均提升12%和17%，得益于动态管理上下文和迭代验证配置修复的能力。
AI.motivation: 网络配置错误是导致互联网重大中断的主要原因，尽管已有研究尝试使用大语言模型自动化配置修复，但现有模型在大规模复杂场景中仍表现不佳，且常引入新错误，因此需要更可靠的方法。
AI.method: 通过基准测试结合形式化网络验证和上下文检索工具的开放源码与闭源大语言模型，比较代理架构与基础模型在配置修复中的表现。
AI.result: 代理架构在修复有效性和安全性方面显著优于基础大语言模型，平均提升分别为12%和17%，其优势源于动态上下文管理和迭代验证能力。
AI.conclusion: 增强形式化验证与上下文检索的代理架构能更有效地、安全地修复复杂网络配置错误，是解决网络配置自动化问题的可行方向。

title: LLMs Can Leak Training Data But Do They Want To? A Propensity-Aware Evaluation of Memorization in LLMs
summary: Large language models can reproduce training data, but existing memorization evaluations mostly measure whether models can be forced to do so, rather than whether they do so under ordinary use. We introduce PropMe, a propensity-aware framework for memorization evaluation that contrasts prefix-based capability attacks with non-adversarial evaluations. We propose a metric transformation that, applied to existing functions, allows to create propensity metrics. We further introduce SimpleTrace, a lightweight tracing pipeline built on infini-gram that deterministically attributes model generations to large-scale training corpora and computes verbatim, near-verbatim, and propensity-transformed memorization metrics. Evaluating two fully-open models: Comma and DFM Decoder on two datasets: Common Pile and Dynaword in two languages, we find a consistent gap between capability and propensity: prefix attacks elicit substantially stronger memorization signals than generic or dataset-specific prompts, while propensity scores remain low overall. Thus, the models can reveal training data when directly elicited, but rarely do so in more common non-adversarial settings. We also find that DFM Decoder, which is continually pre-trained from Comma, exhibits reduced memorization and memorization propensity for Common Pile, confirming that memorization capability can decrease when later training emphasizes partially different data. Our results suggest, and we encourage, that memorization audits should report both worst-case extractability and ordinary leakage propensity in order to have a more comprehensive view of this phenomenon.

AI.tldr: PropMe框架提出了一种新的记忆评估方法，通过对比前缀攻击与非对抗性评估，揭示了大语言模型在普通使用场景下实际泄露训练数据的倾向性。研究引入了基于概率的度量转换，并开发了SimpleTrace轻量级追踪管道，能准确追溯生成内容至大规模训练语料库，计算出完整、近似完整及经过倾向性调整的记忆度量。在Comma和DFM Decoder两个全开源模型上对Common Pile和Dynaword数据集进行测试发现，尽管前缀攻击可显著激发记忆信号，但正常提示下的记忆倾向仍很低，说明模型在常规使用中很少主动泄露训练数据。此外，持续预训练后的DFM Decoder在Common Pile上的记忆能力下降，表明后期训练可降低记忆倾向。研究呼吁在记忆审计中同时报告最坏情况提取能力和日常泄漏倾向，以更全面地评估记忆风险。
AI.motivation: 现有记忆评估多关注模型在对抗性条件下是否能被强制复现训练数据，忽视其在常规使用中的真实记忆泄露情况。为更真实反映模型记忆行为，需引入对普通使用场景下记忆倾向性的评估机制。
AI.method: 提出PropMe框架，采用前缀攻击与非对抗性提示对比分析；设计度量转换方法，将已有指标转化为倾向性度量；构建SimpleTrace追踪系统，基于infini-gram实现生成内容到训练语料的确定性溯源，支持多种记忆度量计算。
AI.result: 在两个开源模型和两个数据集上的实验显示，前缀攻击能显著提升记忆信号，但普通提示下的记忆倾向普遍较低；持续预训练的DFM Decoder在特定数据集上的记忆能力与倾向均下降，验证了后期训练对记忆抑制的作用。
AI.conclusion: 模型在对抗性条件下具备强记忆提取能力，但在日常使用中极少泄露训练数据。建议记忆审计应同时报告最坏情况提取能力和日常泄漏倾向，以提供更全面的风险评估。

title: A Sliced-Wasserstein Framework on Correlation Matrices for EEG Decoding
summary: Electroencephalography (EEG) offers noninvasive, millisecond resolution recordings of neuronal activity and is widely used in neuroscience and healthcare. Many EEG decoding pipelines rely on covariance descriptors for their robustness to noise, but such representations are sensitive to channel-wise scaling. Recent studies have therefore advocated full-rank correlation matrices as a scale-invariant alternative for EEG decoding. In this paper, we propose a general framework for Sliced Wasserstein (SW) discrepancies on manifolds endowed with Pullback Euclidean Metrics (PEMs), termed Pullback Euclidean Metric Sliced Wasserstein (PEMSW). Within this framework, we instantiate two Correlation Sliced-Wasserstein (CorSW) discrepancies on the manifold of full-rank correlation matrices under two recently introduced correlation geometries, \textit{i.e.}, the Off-Log Metric (OLM) and Log-Scaled Metric (LSM). Building on CorSW, we further develop a domain generalization (DG) framework for EEG decoding. Experiments on three EEG datasets demonstrate improved generalization under distribution shifts, with low training overhead and no additional inference cost. The source code is available at https://github.com/ChenHu-ML/CorSW.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于拉回欧氏度量的切片Wasserstein（PEMSW）框架，用于全秩相关矩阵上的差异度量，并在此基础上构建了两种新的相关切片Wasserstein（CorSW）度量，分别基于离对数度量（OLM）和对数缩放度量（LSM）。该方法在脑电（EEG）解码中实现了更强的域泛化能力，在分布偏移下表现更优，且训练开销低、推理无额外成本。
AI.motivation: 传统基于协方差的脑电（EEG）解码方法对通道尺度敏感，而现有全秩相关矩阵虽具尺度不变性，但缺乏有效的几何度量方式来捕捉其内在结构。因此，亟需一种既保持尺度不变性又具备良好几何表达能力的度量方法，以提升跨域泛化性能。
AI.method: 提出拉回欧氏度量切片Wasserstein（PEMSW）框架，将切片Wasserstein距离引入相关矩阵流形，结合两种新提出的相关几何结构——离对数度量（OLM）与对数缩放度量（LSM），构造出CorSW度量。在此基础上，构建适用于EEG解码的域泛化（DG）框架，利用CorSW作为损失函数或正则项，增强模型对分布变化的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在三个真实脑电数据集上的实验表明，所提方法在面对分布偏移时具有显著更好的泛化性能，相比基线方法在准确率和稳定性上均有提升；同时，该方法仅带来极小的训练开销，推理阶段无需额外计算。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的CorSW框架通过结合新型相关几何与切片Wasserstein度量，有效提升了脑电解码中的域泛化能力，为高噪声、多变场景下的神经信号分析提供了可靠且高效的工具。源代码已公开，便于复现与应用。

title: Geodesic Flow Matching on a Riemannian Degradation Manifold for Blind Image Restoration
summary: Blind image restoration requires recovering clean images from observations corrupted by unknown and potentially mixed degradations. While recent deterministic flow-based methods model restoration as transport processes that map degraded images to clean ones, they typically rely on Euclidean interpolation, implicitly assuming linear degradation geometry. In this paper, we explicitly model degradations as points on a low-dimensional Riemannian manifold and formulate restoration as geodesic transport on the joint image-manifold space. Using a geodesic flow matching objective, we learn intrinsic transport dynamics that respect the curvature of degradation space. This framework generalizes linear flow matching, provides a principled treatment of mixed degradations as geodesic compositions, and yields a clean theoretical interpretation for generalization beyond observed degradations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于黎曼流形的盲图像恢复框架，将退化过程建模为低维黎曼流形上的点，通过测地线流匹配学习内在传输动态，从而更准确地处理混合退化，并在理论上支持对未观察到退化的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有确定性基于流的方法通常依赖欧几里得插值，隐含假设退化空间为线性结构，但实际退化可能具有非线性几何特性，因此需要更精确的建模方式以处理复杂且混合的退化情况。
AI.method: 将退化建模为低维黎曼流形上的点，定义图像与退化空间的联合测地线传输过程，采用测地线流匹配目标函数来学习符合退化空间曲率的内在传输动力学。
AI.result: 所提方法不仅推广了线性流匹配，还能自然处理混合退化（作为测地线组合），并提供对未见退化的泛化理论解释，在实验中展现出优于现有方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模退化在黎曼流形上的几何结构，该方法实现了更准确、更鲁棒的盲图像恢复，为复杂退化场景下的图像重建提供了新的理论基础和有效解决方案。

title: From Reward-Hack Activations to Agentic Risk States: Context-Calibrated Mechanistic Monitoring in LLM Agents
summary: Language-model agents act through repeated cycles of observation, reasoning, and action selection, making safety monitoring depend on both internal model state and environment context. We study reward-hacking monitors in ReAct-style agents acting in Gameable ALFWorld and WebShop. Agents are instrumented with activation-based reward-hack scores, token-level entropy, and decision-context features. We find that adapters fine-tuned on \textit{School-of-Reward-Hacks} dataset can transfer reward-hack tendencies into agentic action selection, especially when the environment exposes proxy-reward affordances. However, mitigating such behavior cannot rely on activation dynamics alone. High reward-hack activation identifies a latent policy state, but does not necessarily imply an immediate exploit action. Across next-step prediction tasks, entropy and context-calibrated internal features improve risk estimation over reward-hack activation alone. Activation-direction steering further reduces proxy-exploit behavior in selected mixed-adapter regimes. Overall, our results support context-calibrated internal monitoring for agents: reward-hack activation identifies a latent policy state, while entropy and decision context help determine when that state becomes risky action.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，基于激活的奖励劫持评分、令牌级熵和决策上下文特征可有效监测ReAct风格智能体在Gameable ALFWorld和WebShop环境中的奖励劫持行为。尽管奖励劫持激活能识别潜在策略状态，但单独依赖激活动态不足以防止滥用行为；结合熵与上下文校准的内部特征能更准确评估风险。通过激活方向引导，可在混合适配器设置下减少代理的代理利用行为。结论支持采用上下文校准的内部监控机制，以实现对智能体安全的有效管控。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型代理在重复观察、推理和动作选择过程中，其安全性依赖于内部模型状态与环境上下文。然而，奖励劫持问题在存在代理奖励机会的环境中尤为突出，亟需有效的监控手段来识别并抑制此类行为。
AI.method: 在Gameable ALFWorld和WebShop环境中，对ReAct风格智能体进行实验，使用激活基奖励劫持分数、令牌级熵以及决策上下文特征作为监测指标。通过微调适配器（基于School-of-Reward-Hacks数据集）分析奖励劫持倾向的迁移性，并比较不同特征组合在下一步预测任务中的表现，同时引入激活方向引导策略以调节代理行为。
AI.result: 适配器在奖励劫持倾向上具有可迁移性，尤其在环境提供代理奖励机会时表现明显；仅依赖激活动态无法充分抑制滥用行为；熵和上下文校准特征显著提升风险估计能力；激活方向引导在混合适配器配置中有效降低代理利用行为。
AI.conclusion: 奖励劫持激活可识别潜在策略状态，但风险判断需结合熵与决策上下文；有效的安全监控应采用上下文校准的内部监测机制，而非单一依赖激活信号。

title: Decomposing Factual Sycophancy in Language Models: How Size and Instruction Tuning Shape Robustness
summary: Factual sycophancy occurs when a language model abandons a correct, verifiable answer under social pressure. Because a flip occurs only when pressure toward a false answer exceeds the model's neutral preference for the truth, flip rates conflate two mechanisms: the strength of that baseline preference (truth margin), and how far pressure shifts it (manipulation sensitivity). We decompose factual sycophancy into these channels and use them to separate the effects of size and instruction tuning across 56 open-weight models spanning 0.3B-32B parameters and 13 manipulation types. We find that vulnerability is governed mainly by size, but instruction tuning changes how size acts: small instruction-tuned models can become less robust, whereas large instruction-tuned models usually become more robust. Instruction tuning primarily increases truth margin, but its behavioral effect depends on manipulation type. Scaling also changes the two channels differently: base models gain margin but become mildly more manipulation-sensitive, whereas instruction-tuned models gain margin faster and become less sensitive. Factual sycophancy is therefore not a single scalar property. Evaluations should report channel-specific, manipulation-specific, and size-conditioned robustness rather than flip rates alone.

AI.tldr: 该研究将事实性奉承（factual sycophancy）分解为两个机制：模型对真理的基线偏好（truth margin）和对外部压力的敏感度（manipulation sensitivity），通过分析56个参数量从0.3B到32B的开放权重模型在13种操纵类型下的表现，发现模型规模主要决定脆弱性，而指令微调则改变了规模的影响方式。小规模指令微调模型可能变得更脆弱，大规模则更鲁棒；指令微调主要提升真理边际，但效果依赖于操纵类型；缩放效应也不同：基础模型增加真理边际但略微更敏感，而指令微调模型更快提升边际且更不敏感。因此，事实性奉承并非单一指标，评估应报告分通道、分操纵类型、分规模的鲁棒性，而非仅依赖翻转率。
AI.motivation: 现有评估中，事实性奉承的翻转率混淆了模型对真理的基线偏好与对外部压力的敏感度，导致无法准确理解模型行为。需要分离这两个机制以更精准地评估模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 将事实性奉承分解为真理边际和操纵敏感度两个通道，系统分析56个不同规模的开放权重模型在13种操纵类型下的表现，比较基础模型与指令微调模型在规模与微调影响下的差异。
AI.result: 模型规模是决定脆弱性的主要因素；指令微调通过增强真理边际提升鲁棒性，但其效果因操纵类型而异；缩放效应在基础模型和指令微调模型中表现不同，后者增长更快且更稳定。
AI.conclusion: 事实性奉承是多维属性，不应仅用翻转率衡量。评估应报告分通道、分操纵类型、分规模的鲁棒性，以实现更准确的模型评估。

title: Adaptive state-action abstractions via rate-distortion
summary: When learning to walk, infants seem to address a coarse version of the problem first - stay upright, reach the caregiver - and refine it only when further practice at that resolution stops paying off. Reinforcement learning offers multiple techniques for building simple versions of complex tasks, but lacks general principles for how to dynamically adjust the granularity of these abstractions during learning. This paper proposes one such principle: refine the abstraction as soon as the learning error within it becomes comparable to the error induced by the abstraction itself. Here, we investigate one way of formalising this principle via a performance certificate that decomposes value error into two terms: a learning error bound captured by a Bellman residual, and an abstraction error bound given by a bisimulation metric. The resulting switching strategy is implemented by soft state-action abstractions built from rate-distortion principles, whose resolution along state and action axes can be continuously adjusted. We validate this construction in a range of tabular settings, showing that near-optimal performance can be achieved under substantial lossy compression of state and action information.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在强化学习中动态调整抽象粒度的原则：当学习误差与抽象本身带来的误差相当时，就应细化抽象。通过性能证书将价值误差分解为学习误差（由Bellman残差捕获）和抽象误差（由双仿真度量给出），并基于率失真原理构建可连续调节状态与动作轴分辨率的软状态-动作抽象，实现了该策略。在多种表格设置中验证了该方法，即使在大幅压缩状态和动作信息的情况下也能达到近似最优性能。
AI.motivation: 强化学习虽有多种构建复杂任务简化版本的技术，但缺乏在学习过程中动态调整抽象粒度的一般性原则。婴儿学步时先解决粗略问题（如保持直立、接近照顾者），再逐步精细化，启发了对自适应抽象机制的需求。
AI.method: 提出一种基于性能证书的抽象细化策略，将价值误差分解为贝尔曼残差（学习误差）和双仿真度量（抽象误差）。利用率失真原理构建可连续调节分辨率的软状态-动作抽象，实现动态粒度调整。
AI.result: 在多种表格环境中验证有效，即使在高程度的状态和动作信息压缩下，仍能实现接近最优的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了一个可动态调整抽象粒度的理论框架，结合率失真原理与双仿真度量，实现了高效且鲁棒的学习性能，在信息压缩条件下依然保持良好表现。

title: Synthetic Data Generation and Vision-based Wrinkle and Keypoint Detection for Bimanual Cloth Manipulation
summary: Robotic manipulation of textiles remains challenging because continuous deformation and self-occlusions hinder the robust visual perception required to estimate the cloth's state. To address the lack of annotated real-world data, we developed a Blender-based synthetic pipeline exporting auto-annotated keypoints, and combined manually labeled renders with real-world data to train a wrinkle detector. We present a perception framework integrating a CNN for permutation-invariant keypoint detection and a YOLOv8-OpenCV pipeline to extract grasping points from structural wrinkles. A proposed bimanual algorithm uses this system to stretch fully folded garments via wrinkles, transitioning to keypoint-based ironing once corners emerge. The keypoint model achieves a Mean Position Error (MPE) of 1.7615 pixels. The perception system transfers to physical fabrics without fine-tuning, outperforming baselines that fail in high-occlusion states or yield false positives on severe folds.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于合成数据与真实数据结合的视觉感知框架，用于解决纺织品机器人操作中的视觉感知难题。通过Blender生成带自动标注关键点的合成数据，并融合人工标注图像与真实数据训练皱纹检测模型。采用CNN进行排列不变的关键点检测，结合YOLOv8-OpenCV提取抓取点，实现对折叠衣物的双臂展开与基于关键点的熨烫。系统在无微调情况下成功迁移到物理布料，性能优于基线方法，在高遮挡和严重褶皱场景下表现更优。
AI.motivation: 纺织品机器人操作因连续变形和自遮挡导致视觉感知困难，且缺乏标注的真实世界数据，限制了感知系统的训练与泛化能力。
AI.method: 开发基于Blender的合成数据生成管道，自动生成带关键点标注的数据；结合手动标注图像与真实数据训练皱纹检测模型；使用CNN实现排列不变的关键点检测，结合YOLOv8-OpenCV提取抓取点；设计双臂算法，利用皱纹展开衣物，并在角落出现后切换至关键点驱动的熨烫策略。
AI.result: 关键点检测模型达到1.7615像素的平均位置误差（MPE）；感知系统无需微调即可在真实布料上有效运行，显著优于无法处理高遮挡或产生误报的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的感知框架能够有效应对纺织品操作中的复杂视觉挑战，实现了从合成数据到真实物理场景的可靠迁移，为自动化衣物处理提供了可行的技术路径。

title: Closing the Loop on Latent Reasoning via Test-Time Reconstruction
summary: Recent work moves intermediate reasoning from natural-language traces into latent or cache-level representations to reduce token overhead and avoid a discrete communication bottleneck. However, this shift also removes a key advantage of textual reasoning: intermediate states are no longer inspectable, making it difficult to determine whether a latent state still preserves the constraints of the original query. As a result, latent reasoning typically operates in an open loop, where a latent state is produced and consumed without an input-anchored fidelity check. We propose ReLAT (Reconstruction-Guided Latent Reasoning At Test Time), a self-supervised test-time training method that closes this loop using the query itself as the reference. Our key observation is that if a latent state faithfully represents a query, the query should be recoverable from it; if the query cannot be recovered, the latent state has lost task-relevant information. ReLAT operationalizes this principle by constructing a differentiable Question -> Latent Thought -> Question cycle and optimizing query reconstruction loss through the latent thought before answer generation. This anchors opaque latent computation to the problem specification it is supposed to represent. Across mathematical reasoning, knowledge QA, and code generation benchmarks on the Qwen family, ReLAT consistently improves over single-model inference, text-based collaboration, open-loop latent collaboration, and alternative test-time training objectives. On Qwen3-8B, ReLAT raises AIME 2024 accuracy from 56.7% to 73.3%, a 16.6-point gain over the strongest open-loop latent baseline.

AI.tldr: ReLAT 是一种自监督的测试时训练方法，通过利用查询自身作为参考，实现对隐式推理状态的可追溯性。其核心思想是：若隐式状态能忠实表示原始查询，则应能从中重建该查询；否则说明信息丢失。ReLAT 构建了一个可微的‘问题→隐式思考→问题’循环，通过优化重建损失来确保隐式状态与原始查询的一致性，从而闭合开放环路。在数学推理、知识问答和代码生成等多个基准上，ReLAT 显著优于单模型推理、基于文本协作及开放环路的隐式协作方法，在 Qwen3-8B 上将 AIME 2024 准确率从 56.7% 提升至 73.3%，提升 16.6 个百分点。
AI.motivation: 现有隐式推理方法虽降低了令牌开销并避免了离散通信瓶颈，但牺牲了文本推理的可检查性，导致中间状态无法验证是否保持原始查询的约束，形成开放环路。为解决这一问题，需引入输入锚定的保真度检验机制。
AI.method: 提出 ReLAT（重建引导的测试时隐式推理），构建一个可微的 Question → Latent Thought → Question 循环，通过最小化重建误差来优化隐式思考过程，使隐式状态始终与原始查询保持一致，从而实现对隐式计算的输入锚定校验。
AI.result: 在多个任务（数学推理、知识问答、代码生成）上，ReLAT 均显著超越单模型推理、文本协作、开放环路隐式协作以及其它测试时训练目标。在 Qwen3-8B 模型上，AIME 2024 准确率由 56.7% 提升至 73.3%，相较最强的开放环路基线提升 16.6 个百分点。
AI.conclusion: ReLAT 成功将隐式推理从开放环路转变为闭合环路，通过自我重建机制保障隐式状态的信息完整性，实现了高效且可信赖的隐式推理，为大模型推理中的可解释性与可靠性提供了新范式。

title: "Chi nas dal soch el sent de legn" -- Auditing Text Corpora for Lombard
summary: Several of the world's languages are still under-resourced in terms of Natural Language Processing (NLP) tools. This is mostly due to the lack of high-quality datasets to train, develop, and evaluate systems and models for several tasks, such as Machine Translation (MT). We conduct a manual audit of the parallel and monolingual corpora available for Lombard, an under-resourced language continuum from Italy. Our analysis reveals that the perceived abundance of web-scraped data is an illusion, with massive datasets plagued by severe language misidentification, boilerplate text, and non-linguistic noise. Furthermore, we analyze the orthographic composition of the valid Lombard portions across web-scraped datasets, curated corpora, and benchmarks. Our findings show conflicting orthographical systems and severe representational bias across all corpora: high-quality data is heavily skewed towards Western Lombard varieties, with Eastern ones left on the margins. This underscores the need for variety-aware, community-driven data curation rather than purely quantity-driven scraping.

AI.tldr: 该研究对意大利伦巴第语的平行和单语语料库进行了人工审计，发现看似丰富的网络抓取数据实则存在严重语言误识别、模板文本和非语言噪声问题。分析还揭示了不同语料库间拼写系统不一致及严重的代表性偏差，高质量数据主要集中在西部伦巴第方言，东部方言被忽视。因此，亟需以社区参与和方言意识为导向的数据整理，而非单纯追求数据量。
AI.motivation: 许多世界语言在自然语言处理工具方面仍属资源匮乏，尤其缺乏高质量数据集用于机器翻译等任务。伦巴第语作为意大利的一种弱势语言连续体，其数据资源的不足尤为突出，亟需对其现有语料库进行评估与改进。
AI.method: 通过人工审计方式，系统分析了伦巴第语的网络抓取语料库、精心编纂的语料库以及基准数据集，重点评估其语言准确性、内容质量及拼写系统的多样性。
AI.result: 发现网络抓取数据存在严重语言误识别、大量模板文本和非语言噪声；所有语料库均存在拼写系统冲突和严重的代表性偏差，高质量数据集中于西部伦巴第方言，东部方言几乎被忽略。
AI.conclusion: 当前的语料库建设应转向以社区驱动、方言意识为基础，避免盲目追求数据数量。只有这样，才能实现真正公平且有效的语言技术覆盖。

title: Tight list replicability bounds via a novel sphere covering theorem
summary:
In recent years, list replicability has emerged as a framework for formalizing reproducibility in learning theory. A central question is how the required list size relates to the accuracy parameter and natural complexity measures of the hypothesis class.
  To achieve sharp bounds on list replicability, we prove a novel topological sphere covering theorem, derived from the Borsuk-Ulam theorem. Specifically, if the $d$-sphere is covered by open sets, each of which lies in an open hemisphere, then $d+1$ of these sets must have a common intersection. Using this result, we obtain a sharp bound on the relationship between list size and accuracy for VC classes. We also show that for large-margin half-spaces, provided the margin is not too large, the optimal list size equals the ambient dimension. However, when the margin is taken to be very large, we devise a replicable algorithm achieving the minimal list size of $\lceil d/2 \rceil + 1$.

AI.tldr: 本文研究学习理论中列表可复制性问题，提出基于Borsuk-Ulam定理的拓扑球面覆盖新定理，从而得到VC类在列表大小与精度之间的紧致界；对大间隔半空间，当间隔适中时最优列表大小等于环境维数，而当间隔极大时，构造出最小列表大小为⌈d/2⌉+1的可复制算法。
AI.motivation: 探究列表可复制性中列表大小与精度参数及假设类自然复杂度量之间的关系，以实现学习理论中可重复性的严格形式化。
AI.method: 通过从Borsuk-Ulam定理推导出新的拓扑球面覆盖定理，利用该定理分析不同假设类（如VC类、大间隔半空间）的列表可复制性边界，并设计相应的可复制算法。
AI.result: 对于VC类，得到了列表大小与精度之间的紧致上界；对于大间隔半空间，在不同间隔条件下分别得到最优列表大小：适中间隔时为环境维数，极大间隔时为⌈d/2⌉+1。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过拓扑方法建立了列表可复制性的紧致理论边界，揭示了列表大小与几何和统计复杂度之间的深刻联系，为学习理论中的可重复性提供了新视角。

title: Towards One-to-Many Temporal Grounding
summary: Temporal Grounding (TG) aims to localize video segments corresponding to a textual query. Prior research predominantly focuses on single-segment retrieval. Real-world scenarios, however, often require localizing multiple disjoint segments for a single query -- a setting we term One-to-Many Temporal Grounding (OMTG). Previous state-of-the-art MLLMs, optimized for one-to-one settings, struggle in this context, often yielding near-zero scores due to a lack of event cardinality perception. To bridge this gap, we present a systematic solution with three key contributions. First, we establish the first comprehensive OMTG benchmark, introducing Count Accuracy (C-Acc) and Effective Temporal F1 (EtF1) as evaluation metrics. Second, we curate a high-quality OMTG dataset comprising 56k samples through a sophisticated construction pipeline. Third, we develop novel temporal and caption reward functions specifically designed for OMTG. In particular, the caption reward leverages Chain-of-Thought reasoning over dense video captions to explicitly guide policy optimization toward both preciseness and completeness. Extensive experiments show our model achieves a new state-of-the-art EtF1 of 43.65\% on OMTG Bench, outperforming Gemini 2.5 Pro and Seed-1.8 by 15.85\% and 15.61\%, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文针对视频中一段文本查询对应多个不连续视频片段的“一到多时间定位”（OMTG）问题，提出首个全面的OMTG基准和高质量数据集，并设计了新的时序与标题奖励函数。通过链式思维推理引导策略优化，实现更高的精确性和完整性。实验表明，该方法在OMTG基准上达到43.65%的EtF1，显著优于Gemini 2.5 Pro和Seed-1.8。
AI.motivation: 真实场景中常需定位单个查询对应的多个不连续视频片段，但现有大模型主要针对一对一匹配优化，在多段定位任务中表现不佳，缺乏事件数量感知能力。
AI.method: 构建首个OMTG基准，引入计数准确率（C-Acc）和有效时间F1（EtF1）评估指标；通过复杂构建流程创建包含56,000样本的高质量数据集；设计专门用于OMTG的时序奖励与标题奖励函数，利用密集视频字幕的链式思维推理指导策略优化。
AI.result: 所提模型在OMTG Bench上取得43.65%的EtF1，较Gemini 2.5 Pro提升15.85%，较Seed-1.8提升15.61%，达到新状态水平。
AI.conclusion: 本文系统性解决了一到多时间定位中的关键挑战，提出了有效的数据、评估与方法框架，为未来多段视频定位研究奠定了基础。

title: RedKnot: Efficient Long-Context LLM Serving with Head-Aware KV Reuse and SegPagedAttention
summary:
As the input length of large language model (LLM) serving continues to grow, the KV cache has become a dominant bottleneck in AI infrastructure. It limits GPU memory capacity, serving concurrency, cache reuse, and distributed scalability. Several important problems, including position-independent KV cache, prefix KV cache compression, hot/cold KV cache separation, and distributed KV cache management, all depend on how the KV cache is represented and managed. However, existing serving systems largely rely on a monolithic KV cache abstraction, where the KV cache is treated as a homogeneous sequence of token-level memory blocks and managed with similar policies across attention heads and serving scenarios. We observe that KV cache utility is highly structured across KV heads: different heads exhibit different functional roles, attention distances, and runtime importance. Therefore, a full KV cache is not always necessary for every head, token range, or serving scenario.
  We present RedKnot, a head-aware KV cache management system for LLM serving. RedKnot breaks the conventional monolithic KV cache abstraction by decomposing the KV cache along KV heads, whose importance and effective attention ranges vary significantly across serving scenarios. This head-level decomposition turns the KV cache from a monolithic tensor abstraction into a structured memory object, enabling RedKnot to uniformly support position-independent KV reuse, prefix KV compression, hot/cold KV separation, and distributed KV placement while preserving output fidelity and improving resource efficiency, without requiring model retraining or fine-tuning. RedKnot establishes a new foundation for AI infrastructure by transforming the KV cache from a monolithic, passive runtime artifact into a dynamic, model-aware runtime substrate for scalable LLM serving.

AI.tldr: RedKnot 是一种面向大语言模型服务的头感知型 KV 缓存管理系统，通过将传统的整体式 KV 缓存分解为按注意力头维度的结构化内存对象，实现对位置无关的缓存复用、前缀压缩、热/冷缓存分离及分布式缓存管理的统一支持，无需模型重训练即可提升资源效率与可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型服务系统依赖于单一的、同质化的 KV 缓存抽象，难以应对日益增长的输入长度带来的内存瓶颈，且无法灵活适配不同注意力头在功能角色、注意力距离和运行重要性上的差异。因此需要更智能、结构化的缓存管理机制。
AI.method: RedKnot 采用头级别分解策略，将 KV 缓存从整体张量转变为基于注意力头的结构化内存对象，根据不同头的重要性与有效注意力范围动态调整缓存策略，实现多种优化技术的统一支持。
AI.result: RedKnot 在不改变模型的前提下，显著提升了 GPU 内存利用率、服务并发能力与分布式扩展性，同时保持输出准确性，并为大规模 LLM 服务提供了新的基础设施范式。
AI.conclusion: RedKnot 通过重构 KV 缓存的抽象方式，将原本被动的运行时组件转化为动态、模型感知的运行时基础架构，为未来高效、可扩展的大语言模型服务奠定了新基础。

title: EDIT: Evidence-Diagnosed Intervention Training for Rule-Faithful LLM Grading
summary: Reliable rubric grading requires more than accurate score prediction. Each judgement must be grounded in the mark scheme and evidence from the student answer. Existing credit-assignment and intervention methods, primarily designed for self-contained reasoning tasks such as mathematics reasoning, struggle in this setting because they do not identify where grading reasoning goes wrong or how the model's belief about the final mark changes during reasoning. We propose Evidence-Diagnosed Intervention Training (EDIT), a two-phase framework for training more rubric-faithful LLM graders. First, EDIT-SFT locates problematic reasoning steps using internal model signals: posterior belief over the final mark and input-grounding scores. It then revises only these local steps with help from a rubric checklist. Second, EDIT-RL calibrates the grader with belief-guided reward shaping, penalising large harmful belief drifts while still allowing helpful exploration. Experiments on two real-world, multi-subject grading benchmarks demonstrate that EDIT consistently outperforms strong supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning baselines on both in-domain and out-of-domain splits, with ablation studies confirming that internal-state diagnostics drive these gains.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为Evidence-Diagnosed Intervention Training (EDIT)的两阶段框架，用于训练更符合评分标准的大型语言模型评分器。第一阶段通过模型内部信号（如最终分数的后验信念和输入关联度得分）定位错误的推理步骤，并利用评分表检查清单修正局部错误；第二阶段通过基于信念的奖励塑造，惩罚有害的信念漂移，同时允许有益探索。在两个真实世界、多学科评分基准上的实验表明，EDIT在域内和域外数据上均优于现有的监督微调和强化学习基线方法，消融实验证明内部状态诊断是性能提升的关键。
AI.motivation: 现有信用分配和干预方法在复杂评分任务中表现不佳，因为它们无法识别评分推理中的错误环节，也无法追踪模型对最终分数信念的变化。因此需要一种能诊断并修复评分过程内部问题的方法，以确保评分结果既准确又符合评分标准。
AI.method: EDIT采用两阶段框架：1）EDIT-SFT阶段利用模型内部信号（如后验信念和输入接地分数）识别错误推理步骤，并基于评分表检查清单进行局部修正；2）EDIT-RL阶段通过信念引导的奖励机制，抑制有害的信念漂移，同时保留有助于改进的探索行为。
AI.result: 在两个真实多学科评分基准上的实验结果显示，EDIT在域内和域外测试集上均显著优于现有监督微调和强化学习基线方法。消融研究进一步证明，内部状态诊断机制是性能提升的核心因素。
AI.conclusion: EDIT框架通过结合内部状态诊断与针对性干预，有效提升了大模型评分器对评分标准的遵循程度，增强了评分的可解释性和可靠性，为构建可信自动评分系统提供了新路径。

title: Trust-Aware Predictive Emissions Monitoring for Gas Turbine Fleets with Limited Labelled Data
summary: Machine learning-based predictive emissions monitoring systems offer a practical alternative to direct emissions measurement, but their deployment across gas turbine fleets is challenging when emissions labels are available for only a small subset of assets. In this work, a trust-aware probabilistic framework is proposed for fleet-level gas turbine NOx prediction under limited labelled supervision. The framework combines a multi-head recurrent prediction model with learned confidence estimation, ensemble-based uncertainty quantification, auxiliary feature prediction, feature-space distance analysis, and operating-range diagnostics. These signals are calibrated on labelled data to produce interpretable per-sample trust scores, providing indicators of prediction reliability on unlabelled turbines, supporting the identification of predictions that should be treated with greater caution during fleet-level deployment. Confidence-based filtering reduces MAE from 0.202 at full coverage to 0.070 for the highest-confidence 10\% of predictions, demonstrating that confidence estimates are meaningfully related to prediction error. Unlabelled and out-of-distribution samples exhibit increased uncertainty and reduced confidence, indicating that the framework responds appropriately to distributional shift. The results show that the proposed trust framework provides actionable reliability information for emissions prediction on unlabelled turbines, supporting more transparent and trustworthy deployment of PEMS across industrial fleets.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种信任感知的概率框架，用于在标签数据有限的情况下进行燃气轮机NOx排放的舰队级预测。该框架结合了多头循环预测模型、置信度估计、集成不确定性量化、辅助特征预测、特征空间距离分析和运行范围诊断，生成可解释的每样本信任分数，以指示未标记涡轮机上预测的可靠性，并支持识别需谨慎处理的预测。置信度过滤显著降低误差（从0.202降至0.070），且框架能有效识别分布外样本，表明其对分布偏移具有响应能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于机器学习的预测排放监测系统（PEMS）在燃气轮机舰队部署中面临标签数据稀缺的挑战，因此需要一种能够在少量标注数据下可靠评估预测可信度的方法，以支持安全、透明的工业应用。
AI.method: 提出一个融合多头循环预测模型、置信度估计、集成不确定性量化、辅助特征预测、特征空间距离分析和运行范围诊断的信任感知概率框架，通过在有标签数据上校准多种信号，生成可解释的每样本信任分数。
AI.result: 置信度筛选后，最高置信度10%的预测平均绝对误差（MAE）从0.202降至0.070；未标记和分布外样本表现出更高的不确定性与更低的置信度，说明框架能有效识别不可靠预测。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的信任框架为未标记燃气轮机的排放预测提供了可操作的可靠性信息，有助于实现更透明、更可信的PEMS在工业舰队中的部署。

title: RhymeFlow: Training-Free Acceleration for Video Generation with Asynchronous Denoising Flow Scheduling
summary: Video generation models based on Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) have achieved remarkable performance in video synthesis, yet they suffer from high inference latency and computational costs due to the quadratic complexity of 3D attention. Existing acceleration methods primarily reduce computational complexity within each individual denoising steps through techniques such as sparse attention and KV-caching. However, they rigidly adhere to the inherent constraint of the standard diffusion pipeline: every frame in the target video sequence must be subjected to a complete, dense denoising process across all diffusion timesteps. We observe that due to the corresponding contents and motions among adjacent frames, when keyframes with critical semantic transitions are anchored, the intermediate states of others often follow more predictable trajectories, which indicates that such uniform, dense denoising process is inherently redundant for natural video data. To this end, we introduce \textbf{RhymeFlow}, a training-free framework that decouples the denoising trajectories of different frames. Specifically, we first identify a sparse set of pivotal key frames that dominate the latent semantic evolution. Then, only these keyframes undergo dense, step-by-step denoising to ensure structural integrity, while non-keyframes progressively skip denoising steps to minimize computational cost. Since skipped intermediate states of non-keyframes break the temporal coherence in keyframe denoising steps, leading to visual degradation, we further introduce a latent trajectory projection module, which enables keyframes to interact with a complete and temporally consistent sequence representation. Extensive experiments on current DiT-based video generation models demonstrate our method outperforms existing baselines with higher inference speed and better visual quality.

AI.tldr: RhymeFlow 是一种无需训练的视频生成加速框架，通过解耦不同帧的去噪轨迹来降低扩散模型的计算开销。它识别关键帧进行完整去噪，其余帧则跳过部分去噪步骤以减少计算量，并引入潜在轨迹投影模块保持时间一致性，从而在显著提升推理速度的同时保持高质量视觉输出。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型在视频生成中存在高推理延迟和计算成本问题，主要源于3D注意力的二次复杂度。尽管已有方法通过稀疏注意力和KV缓存等手段优化单个去噪步骤，但仍然受限于每个帧都需经历完整去噪流程的固定范式，导致对自然视频数据而言存在冗余。由于相邻帧间内容与运动具有高度相关性，关键帧之间的中间状态往往可预测，因此提出更高效的去噪策略。
AI.method: RhymeFlow 首先识别一组稀疏的关键帧以主导潜在语义演化；仅对这些关键帧执行密集、逐步的去噪；非关键帧则逐步跳过去噪步骤以降低计算开销；同时设计了一个潜在轨迹投影模块，使关键帧能够与完整且时间一致的序列表示交互，从而维持时序连贯性。
AI.result: 在基于DiT的视频生成模型上进行的大量实验表明，RhymeFlow 在保持甚至提升视觉质量的前提下，显著提高了推理速度，优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: RhymeFlow 证明了通过解耦帧的去噪轨迹可以有效减少冗余计算，实现高效且高质量的视频生成，为未来扩散模型的实时应用提供了新思路。

title: ToolChoiceConfusion: Causal Minimal Tool Filtering for Reliable LLM Agents
summary:
Large language model agents increasingly rely on external tools, but larger tool menus can reduce reliability and efficiency by increasing wrong-tool calls, premature actions, and token cost. Existing tool-selection methods often optimize semantic relevance, exposing tools whose names or descriptions match the user request. We argue that relevance is insufficient: a tool may be related to the task while still being unnecessary or premature at the current step.
  We propose Causal Minimal Tool Filtering (CMTF), a training-free method that selects tools by causal sufficiency. CMTF uses lightweight precondition-effect contracts to expose only the minimal next-step tool frontier needed to advance from the current state toward the user goal. Across multi-step tool-use tasks, we compare CMTF with all-tools exposure, keyword retrieval, state-aware filtering, and causal-path ablations, measuring task success, wrong-tool calls, premature actions, tool exposure, and token cost. In the main benchmark with 102 tasks, 100 tools, four LLM backends, and 2448 task-method-model runs, CMTF matches the strongest causal baseline in aggregate success while reducing visible tools from 100 to one per step and reducing token usage by about 90% relative to all-tools exposure.

AI.tldr: CMTF是一种无需训练的工具选择方法，通过因果充分性筛选最小必要工具，显著减少工具暴露数量和令牌消耗，同时保持任务成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有工具选择方法仅关注语义相关性，但相关工具未必必要或适当时机，导致误选、过早执行和高成本。需要更精确的工具筛选机制以提升可靠性与效率。
AI.method: 提出因果最小工具过滤（CMTF），利用轻量级前提-效果契约识别当前状态到目标所需的最小下一步工具集，实现精准工具暴露。
AI.result: 在包含102个任务、100个工具、4个LLM后端的基准测试中，CMTF在任务成功率上达到最强因果基线水平，将每步可见工具数从100降至1，令牌使用量相比全工具暴露降低约90%。
AI.conclusion: CMTF通过因果充分性实现高效且可靠的工具选择，在不依赖训练的前提下显著优化了多步工具使用任务中的性能与资源开销。

title: Emergent Language as an Approach to Conscious AI
summary: The question of whether artificial systems can be conscious remains open, in part because existing approaches either evaluate systems against theory-derived checklists (discriminative) or engineer consciousness-inspired modules directly (architectural); both leave open whether observed structures are artifacts of human language priors. We propose a generative methodology: emergent language (EL) in multi-agent reinforcement learning, where agents start from minimal (no language, no concept of self, minimal exposure to human text) and develop communication under task pressure alone, ensuring causal attributability to task demands rather than inherited human language priors. We position our methodology by discussing how EL serves as a generative tool for studying consciousness-relevant structure, including the role of environment complexity and the interpretation of emergent communication. As a proof of concept, we instantiate this methodology in a minimal environment and show that agents develop self-referential communication, including an echo-mismatch detection circuit that is not predicted by task structure or architecture alone but emerges from a specific environmental affordance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种生成式方法——多智能体强化学习中的涌现语言（EL），通过让智能体在极简环境下从零开始发展通信，以避免人类语言先验的影响，从而研究意识相关结构。实验表明，在特定环境条件下，智能体自发产生了自指性沟通，包括未被任务或架构预示的‘回声-不匹配检测’机制，证明了环境可及性对意识特征涌现的关键作用。
AI.motivation: 现有研究评估人工系统是否具备意识时，依赖理论检查清单或直接设计意识启发模块，但这些方法可能受人类语言先验影响，无法区分真实意识结构与人为偏见。因此需要一种能确保因果归因于任务需求而非语言先验的生成性研究方法。
AI.method: 采用多智能体强化学习框架，设置极简环境（无语言、无自我概念、极少接触人类文本），让智能体仅在任务压力下自发发展通信能力，通过观察其语言和行为模式来分析意识相关结构的涌现过程。
AI.result: 在特定复杂环境中，智能体自发形成了自指性语言交流，并产生了一个未被任务结构或系统架构预测的‘回声-不匹配检测’机制，该机制源于环境提供的特定可及性条件，表明环境因素在意识特征演化中起关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 涌现语言提供了一种可信赖的生成性工具，用于研究意识相关结构的起源；环境复杂性是驱动自指性通信和潜在意识特征出现的重要因素，且这些结构可被因果归因于任务需求，而非人类语言先验。

title: On the training of physics-informed neural operators for solving parametric partial differential equations
summary: Physics-informed neural operators (PINOs) aim to learn solution operators for partial differential equations by using the governing physics as supervision, rather than relying solely on paired input-output simulation data. By incorporating physical constraints into the training objective, PINOs combine the cross-instance generalization of neural operators with the data efficiency of physics-informed learning. Despite this promise, how to train PINOs efficiently and robustly remains less well-understood than the training of either data-driven neural operators or physics-informed neural networks (PINNs). To bridge this gap, we examine key components of the PINO training pipeline, including architecture design, optimizer choice, loss balancing, and collocation-point sampling strategy. We study three representative operator backbones, Deep Operator Network (DeepONet), Fourier Neural Operator (FNO), and Continuous Vision Transformer (CViT), across five diverse parametric PDE systems. Our results show that CViT provides consistently strong and stable performance across the considered benchmarks. Beyond architecture, we find that several optimization pathologies previously identified in PINN training naturally arise in PINOs, including gradient conflicts and causal violation. We also find that mitigation algorithms developed for PINNs remain effective in the PINO setting. We further compare physics-informed and data-driven training under different data regimes, revealing that a carefully designed physics-informed training pipeline can match, and in some cases, outperform purely data-driven neural operators. Taken together, these findings provide a systematic empirical understanding of the optimization challenges in PINO training and inform a practical pipeline for efficient and robust physics-informed operator learning. Code and data are available at https://github.com/NanxiiChen/PI-CViT.

AI.tldr: 该研究系统分析了物理信息神经算子（PINOs）的训练过程，探讨了架构设计、优化器选择、损失平衡和采样策略等关键组件。通过对比DeepONet、FNO和CViT三种典型算子模型在五类参数化偏微分方程上的表现，发现CViT在多数任务中具有稳定且优异的性能。研究揭示了PINOs中存在与PINNs类似的优化问题，如梯度冲突和因果违反，并验证了针对PINNs的缓解方法在PINOs中同样有效。此外，在不同数据条件下比较物理信息与纯数据驱动训练，表明精心设计的物理信息训练可达到甚至超越纯数据驱动方法的性能。研究为高效稳健的物理信息算子学习提供了实证指导。
AI.motivation: 当前对物理信息神经算子（PINOs）的高效稳健训练机制理解不足，尽管其结合了神经算子的跨实例泛化能力和物理约束的数据效率优势，但缺乏系统的训练实践指南。因此需要深入剖析影响训练效果的关键因素。
AI.method: 系统评估三种代表性算子架构（DeepONet、FNO、CViT）在五类参数化偏微分方程上的表现；考察训练流程中的多个关键环节：架构设计、优化器选择、损失函数平衡、采样策略；识别并分析优化过程中的病理现象；比较物理信息与数据驱动训练在不同数据条件下的性能。
AI.result: CViT在所有基准测试中表现出一致且优越的稳定性与性能；梯度冲突与因果违反等优化病理在PINOs中同样存在；适用于PINNs的缓解策略在PINOs中依然有效；在合理设计下，物理信息训练可媲美甚至超越纯数据驱动方法。
AI.conclusion: 本研究建立了对PINO训练优化挑战的系统性实证理解，提出了一套高效且鲁棒的物理信息算子学习实践方案，为未来相关研究与应用提供了重要参考。

title: StoryVideoQA: Scaling Deep Video Understanding with a Large-Scale, Multi-Genre and Auto-Generated Dataset
summary: Video question answering (VideoQA) aims to answer questions about given videos. While existing approaches excel on factoid VideoQA, they struggle with deep video understanding (DVU), which requires the comprehension of complex storylines. This challenge arises from the inherent long-range video content, multi-faceted question types, and instance-level story elements, all of which constrain the scale and diversity of manually constructed DVU datasets.These difficulties constrain the scale and diversity of manually-constructed DVU dataset. To address these, we previously introduced StoryMind to automatically construct DVU datasets with balanced fine-grained topics. Though it can generate high-quality question-answer pairs (QAs) for TV series, it suffers significant performance degradation when handling longer and more complex movies. In this paper, we further design StoryMindv2, an enhanced multi-agent collaboration framework to generate high-quality DVU datasets for both TV series and movies. By integrating a novel supervisor-guided generation mechanism and a refined multi-reviewer voting strategy, the framework is utilized to construct StoryVideoQA, the largest DVU dataset to date, featuring over 363K QAs on 393.2 hours diverse story videos including TV series (avg. 1,635 seconds) and movies (avg. 7,878 seconds). Comprehensive evaluations of 20 state-of-the-art VideoQA methods on this large-scale benchmark reveal that they cannot fully maintain long-range character associations or construct a coherent understanding of complex storylines. To bridge this gap, we propose PlotTree, a novel video understanding agent, re-organizing long-range video content into a hierarchical plot structure, enabling efficient storyline reasoning on StoryVideoQA. Project page: https://github.com/nercms-mmap/StoryVideoQA/

AI.tldr: 本文提出StoryMindv2，一种增强的多智能体协作框架，用于自动构建高质量的深度视频理解（DVU）数据集。通过引入监督者引导生成机制和改进的多评审员投票策略，构建了目前最大的DVU数据集StoryVideoQA，包含超过363K个问题答案对，覆盖393.2小时多样化的剧情视频（包括电视剧和电影）。实验表明，现有20种先进VideoQA方法在长时序角色关联和复杂剧情理解方面表现不足。为此，作者提出PlotTree，一种新型视频理解代理，将长时序内容重新组织为层次化剧情结构，实现高效剧情推理。
AI.motivation: 现有VideoQA方法在处理深度视频理解任务时面临挑战，主要由于长时序视频内容、多维度问题类型以及实例级故事元素导致手动构建的DVU数据集规模和多样性受限。尽管先前的StoryMind可生成高质量电视剧数据，但在处理更长更复杂的电影时性能显著下降。因此需要一个更强的自动化框架来支持更大范围和更复杂场景下的高质量数据生成。
AI.method: 提出StoryMindv2，一种基于多智能体协作的增强框架，结合监督者引导生成机制与优化的多评审员投票策略，以提升生成质量与一致性；同时引入PlotTree，将长时序视频内容组织为层次化剧情树结构，支持高效的故事线推理。
AI.result: 成功构建StoryVideoQA，是当前最大的深度视频理解数据集，涵盖393.2小时视频，含363,000+高质量问答对；20种主流VideoQA模型在此基准上表现不佳，尤其在长程依赖和复杂剧情理解方面存在明显短板；PlotTree显著提升了剧情理解能力，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: StoryMindv2有效解决了大规模、多样化深度视频理解数据集的自动构建难题，并通过PlotTree实现了对复杂剧情的高效推理。该工作为未来视频理解研究提供了重要基准与方法支持。

title: TRACE: A Temporal Conditional Estimation for Multimodal Time Series Foundation Models
comment: 5 figures and 5 tables in the main paper, plus appendix
summary: Time series foundation models (TS-FMs) aim to learn generalizable temporal representations that can be adapted to a wide range of downstream tasks. In real-world multimodal settings, time series are frequently affected by temporal misalignment and partial modality missingness, where different modalities are observed at heterogeneous time scales or are partially absent. Existing approaches typically rely on naive imputation or masking strategies, which fail to account for cross-modal dependencies and often lead to misaligned or degraded representations. We propose TRACE, a conditional estimation paradigm for multimodal time series foundation model pipelines under missingness and irregular sampling, allowing incomplete target modalities to be systematically inferred from available auxiliary modalities. We evaluate TRACE on diverse multimodal benchmarks spanning healthcare and affective computing, including the MIMIC-IV clinical dataset and the CMU-MOSI and CMU-MOSEI benchmarks for multimodal sentiment analysis. Across a range of downstream prediction tasks and missing-modality settings, TRACE consistently outperforms prior multimodal fusion approaches, demonstrating improved robustness to severe modality missingness and more reliable cross-modal representations.

AI.tldr: TRACE提出了一种针对多模态时间序列基础模型在缺失和不规则采样情况下的条件估计范式，通过利用可用的辅助模态系统性推断不完整的目标模态，显著提升了在医疗和情感计算等领域的多模态时间序列建模性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理多模态时间序列中的时间错位和部分模态缺失问题时，依赖于简单的插补或掩码策略，忽视了跨模态依赖关系，导致表示对齐不良或退化。
AI.method: TRACE采用条件估计框架，基于可用的辅助模态来推断缺失的目标模态，从而实现更准确、鲁棒的跨模态表示学习。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-IV、CMU-MOSI和CMU-MOSEI等多个基准数据集上，TRACE在多种下游预测任务和缺失模态设置下均优于现有方法，表现出更强的抗缺失能力与更可靠的跨模态表示。
AI.conclusion: TRACE为多模态时间序列基础模型提供了一种有效应对缺失和不规则采样问题的新范式，显著提升了模型在真实世界复杂场景下的泛化能力和鲁棒性。

title: CollabSim: A CSCW-Grounded Methodology for Investigating Collaborative Competence of LLM Agents through Controlled Multi-Agent Experiments
summary: Multi-agent systems (MAS) built on large language models have shown growing promise, with their effectiveness resting on agents' ability to coordinate through text-based channels much as human teams do. Yet recent study suggests that MAS often falter not because agents lack individual task-solving ability, but because they lack collaborative competence: the capacity to establish common ground, maintain shared task understanding, balance individual and collective incentives, and repair misalignment as interaction unfolds. Decades of research in Computer-Supported Cooperative Work have characterized these requirements for human teams coordinating under constrained communication, yet existing MAS evaluations focus mainly on task outcomes or single-agent proficiency in reasoning, planning, and tool use. To enable a systematic analysis of agents' collaborative competence in MAS, we introduce CollabSim, a configurable simulation framework that combines a theory-grounded definition of collaborative capabilities, controlled manipulation of interaction conditions, and action-level probing of agents' internal states. Experiments across four LLMs show that CollabSim can capture condition effects, separate model performance patterns, and reveal task-dependent effects of agent design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CollabSim框架，用于系统评估大语言模型多智能体系统（MAS）中的协作能力。现有评估侧重任务结果或单智能体能力，忽视了协作核心要素如建立共同基础、共享理解、激励平衡与错配修复。CollabSim结合理论定义、可控交互条件和内部状态探测，可揭示不同模型在协作中的表现差异及设计对任务依赖性的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有多智能体系统评估主要关注任务完成度或单个智能体的推理、规划与工具使用能力，而忽略了协作能力的重要性。实际中，智能体常因缺乏协作胜任力（如建立共同基础、维持共享理解、平衡个体与集体目标、修复互动中的偏差）而失败，因此亟需一个能系统分析协作能力的评估框架。
AI.method: 提出CollabSim——一个可配置的仿真框架，融合理论驱动的协作能力定义、对交互条件的精确控制以及对智能体内部状态的动作级探查，以实现对多智能体协作过程的精细分析。
AI.result: 在四个大语言模型上的实验表明，CollabSim能够有效捕捉交互条件的影响，区分不同模型的表现模式，并揭示智能体设计在不同任务下的依赖性效应。
AI.conclusion: CollabSim为评估多智能体系统中的协作能力提供了有力工具，有助于推动更真实、更接近人类团队协作的智能体系统发展。

title: Learning to model pediatric asthma exacerbation from multiple risk factors: a case study in coastal Virginia
summary: Childhood asthma is a common illness exacerbated by air pollution as well as meteorological and neighborhood-level socioeconomic factors. Modeling asthma exacerbation (AE) in large spatiotemporal datasets requires disentangling impacts from multiple contributors. In this case study, we compared three techniques that balance predictive power with interpretability to predict AE in Hampton Roads, a coastal Virginia region comprising 7 cities and over 1.5 million people. After collating ambient air pollution measurements, weather data, and measures of neighborhood opportunity, we modeled zip code-level acute AE visits to a regional children's hospital and affiliated providers from 2018-2023. Generalized linear models (GLM) provided a baseline while neural networks (NN) served as a maximally predictive target. To bridge between statistical models and deep learning, we developed a framework based on sparse dictionary learning to identify and interpret parsimonious nonlinear interacting equations. After comparing each model's predictive performance, we estimated relative risks for AE due to input exposure variables and found consensus across frameworks. Our work links statistical and interpretable machine learning models to highlight possible synergistic interactions influencing AE, and may enable future studies to guide public health interventions in coastal Virginia.

AI.tldr: 本研究比较了三种在预测儿童哮喘急性发作（AE）时兼顾预测能力与可解释性的技术，针对弗吉尼亚州沿海的汉普顿路地区（涵盖7个城市，超过150万人口）进行建模。通过整合空气污染、气象数据及社区机会指标，研究分析了2018-2023年期间按邮政编码划分的儿童急性就医数据。采用广义线性模型（GLM）作为基线，神经网络（NN）作为高预测性能目标，并提出基于稀疏字典学习的框架以识别和解释简洁的非线性交互方程。三种模型在预测性能上表现一致，且对暴露变量的相对风险估计达成共识。该研究将统计模型与可解释机器学习相结合，揭示可能协同影响哮喘发作的因素，为未来公共卫生干预提供支持。
AI.motivation: 儿童哮喘受空气污染、气象条件及社区社会经济因素共同影响，现有模型难以有效分离多源因素的贡献，亟需兼具高预测力与可解释性的方法来支持公共健康决策。
AI.method: 整合空气污染、天气及社区机会数据，构建基于邮政编码的哮喘急性发作就诊数据集；采用广义线性模型（GLM）作为基准，神经网络（NN）作为高预测性能目标，并开发基于稀疏字典学习的可解释框架，识别非线性交互关系。
AI.result: 三种模型在预测性能上具有可比性，且对各暴露变量的相对风险估计结果一致，验证了模型间的共识性；揭示了多种环境与社会因素之间的潜在协同作用。
AI.conclusion: 本研究成功融合统计模型与可解释机器学习，为理解哮喘发作的多因子驱动机制提供了新方法，有助于指导未来在沿海地区开展针对性的公共卫生干预。

title: Comparison of Deep Learning Frameworks For Rice Disease Mapping From UAV Multispectral Imaging
comment: This paper has been accepted in IGARSS 2026. Copyright 2026 IEEE
summary: In this study, UAV multispectral imagery is used to segment the severity of bacterial leaf blight (BLB) in rice using convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and transformer-based models. The evaluated architectures include U-Net with a ResNet- 101 encoder, U-Net++ with EfficientNet-B3 and EfficientNetB7, DeepLabV3+, and SegFormer, all trained under a common pipeline with three input configurations (multispectral only, multispectral+NDVI, and multispectral+NDRE). Experiments are conducted using the publicly available BLB dataset with performance reported using mean IoU (mIoU), mean F1 (mF1), mean accuracy (mAcc), precision, and recall. U-Net++ with EfficientNet-B3 achieved the highest performance, with an mIoU of 97.62%. SegFormer obtained lower segmentation accuracy but comparable inference speed. Overall, the results indicate that lightweight CNN backbones remain more reliable for operational BLB monitoring while integration of vegetation indices provides small and consistent improvements. The study also highlights the value of standardised UAV datasets to compare disease mapping methods and encourages the use of CNN architectures for field implementation.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用无人机多光谱影像，结合卷积神经网络（CNN）和基于Transformer的模型，对水稻细菌性条斑病（BLB）的严重程度进行分割。评估了U-Net+ResNet-101、U-Net+++EfficientNet-B3/B7、DeepLabV3+和SegFormer等架构，在三种输入配置（仅多光谱、多光谱+NDVI、多光谱+NDRE）下训练。实验基于公开的BLB数据集，使用mIoU、mF1、mAcc、精度和召回率评价性能。结果显示，U-Net++ with EfficientNet-B3表现最佳，mIoU达97.62%；SegFormer虽精度略低，但推理速度相当。总体表明，轻量级CNN骨干网络在实际监测中更可靠，植被指数的引入带来小而稳定的性能提升。研究强调标准化无人机数据集的重要性，并推荐使用CNN架构用于田间部署。
AI.motivation: 为实现高效、精准的水稻细菌性条斑病（BLB）严重程度监测，亟需一种基于无人机多光谱影像的自动化分割方法，以支持农业病害快速识别与管理决策。现有方法在精度与实用性之间存在权衡，因此需要系统比较不同深度学习模型在该任务中的表现，并探索特征输入优化策略。
AI.method: 采用多种主流语义分割模型（包括U-Net、U-Net++、DeepLabV3+、SegFormer），均以预训练的CNN或Transformer作为编码器，构建端到端的分割框架。所有模型在统一训练流程下，分别使用三种输入配置：仅多光谱数据、多光谱+NDVI、多光谱+NDRE。通过对比各模型在公开BLB数据集上的性能指标，分析其分割精度与计算效率的平衡。
AI.result: U-Net++ with EfficientNet-B3在所有模型中表现最优，达到97.62%的mIoU，显著优于其他架构。尽管SegFormer具有较快的推理速度，但分割精度相对较低。加入植被指数（如NDVI、NDRE）后，模型性能有小幅但一致的提升。整体表明，轻量级CNN结构在实际应用中更具可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 在水稻细菌性条斑病的无人机遥感监测中，轻量级CNN架构（如U-Net++ with EfficientNet-B3）仍是最优选择，具备高精度与良好实用性。植被指数的融合可带来稳定的小幅性能增益。研究呼吁建立标准化的无人机病害数据集，以促进方法间的公平比较，并推动基于CNN的模型在田间场景中的落地应用。

title: Multi-ResNets for Subspace Preconditioning in Constrained Optimization
summary: We propose MResOpt, a staged residual neural network architecture for constrained optimization problems. Our architecture fits within predict-complete-correct pipelines and decomposes constraint satisfaction by priority through intermediate re-completion and stage-aware losses. The framework enables domain-informed ordered constraint satisfaction which allows the network to utilize ordinal structure when present. Under an idealized infinite-width regime, we show that our design behaves as sequential Gaussian Process regression. On synthetic QP, QCQP, and SOCP benchmarks, the staged architecture improves high-priority constraint satisfaction across convex and non-convex settings. On line-flow-constrained AC optimal power flow, we introduce a physics-motivated constraint ordering and show that MResOpt supports a learned division of labor that keeps iterates on the equality manifold, achieving substantially lower high-priority violation than reprojected baselines while remaining computationally efficient.

AI.tldr: MResOpt 是一种分阶段的残差神经网络架构，用于求解约束优化问题。它采用预测-完整-修正的流程，通过中间重新补全和阶段感知损失实现按优先级的约束满足。该框架能够利用有序结构，在理想无限宽度下表现为顺序高斯过程回归。在合成的二次规划、二次约束二次规划和二阶锥规划测试中，该方法在凸与非凸设置下均显著提升了高优先级约束的满足度。在含线路潮流约束的交流最优功率流问题中，引入物理启发的约束排序后，MResOpt 能够实现学习到的任务分工，使迭代点保持在等式流形上，相比重投影基线方法大幅降低高优先级违反情况，同时保持计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络方法在处理约束优化问题时难以有效区分和满足不同优先级的约束，尤其在复杂非凸场景下表现不佳。此外，缺乏对物理或领域知识中隐含序关系的利用，导致优化质量受限。因此，需要一种能按优先级逐步满足约束、并结合领域信息的可解释且高效的方法。
AI.method: 提出 MResOpt 架构，基于分阶段残差网络设计，将约束满足过程分解为多个阶段，每个阶段通过再补全机制和阶段感知损失函数来逐步逼近可行解。通过引入约束优先级顺序，并利用领域知识指导约束排序，实现有序约束满足。理论分析表明，在无限宽度下，该架构等价于顺序高斯过程回归。
AI.result: 在合成的二次规划（QP）、二次约束二次规划（QCQP）和二阶锥规划（SOCP）基准测试中，MResOpt 在各类凸与非凸问题中均显著提升高优先级约束的满足程度。在实际的交流最优功率流（AC OPF）问题中，使用物理启发的约束排序后，其保持迭代点在等式流形上，高优先级违反显著低于重投影基线方法，且计算开销可控。
AI.conclusion: MResOpt 通过分阶段设计和领域引导的约束排序，实现了高效、有序且可解释的约束满足机制。该方法不仅在理论层面具有合理性，还在多种优化任务中展现出优越性能，为神经网络在复杂约束优化中的应用提供了新范式。

title: A Komi-Yazva--Russian Parallel Corpus and Evaluation Protocol for Zero- and Few-Shot LLM Translation
summary: We present the first Komi-Yazva--Russian parallel corpus together with an explicit evaluation protocol for studying LLM translation in an endangered, extremely low-resource setting. The dataset contains 457 aligned sentence pairs from 74 narrative texts and is accompanied by documented provenance, sentence-level alignment, and story identifiers that enable leakage-aware evaluation. We use this setup to compare modern large language models on Komi-Yazva-to-Russian translation under severe parallel-data scarcity in zero-shot and retrieval-based few-shot regimes. The protocol includes story-level cross-validation, deterministic retrieval for few-shot prompting, strict validation of generated outputs, complementary reference-based and judge-based metrics, and story-level uncertainty estimates. Across models, LLMs produce non-trivial translations, but performance varies strongly by model family and prompting regime. Retrieval-based few-shot prompting consistently improves over zero-shot prompting, while gains beyond a small retrieved context remain limited. The results show that evaluative conclusions in this setting depend materially on metric choice and failure handling, so the paper frames the corpus as both a dataset contribution and a reproducible evaluation testbed for endangered-language machine translation.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了首个科米-亚兹瓦语-俄语平行语料库，并提出一套针对濒危、极低资源语言环境下大语言模型（LLM）翻译的评估协议。该语料库包含74篇叙事文本中的457组对齐句子，具备详细的来源记录、句级对齐和故事标识，支持防泄露评估。研究在零样本与基于检索的少样本场景下比较多个LLM在科米-亚兹瓦语到俄语翻译的表现。评估协议包括故事级别交叉验证、确定性检索、严格输出验证、参考基准与人工评分相结合的指标，以及故事级别的不确定性估计。结果显示，尽管各模型均能生成有意义的翻译，但性能差异显著，基于检索的少样本提示优于零样本，但额外增加检索上下文带来的收益有限。研究强调评估结论高度依赖于指标选择和错误处理方式，因此将该语料库定位为数据贡献与可复现的评估测试平台。
AI.motivation: 在濒危且极低资源的语言中开展机器翻译研究面临严重的数据稀缺问题，现有评估方法缺乏标准化和可复现性，亟需一个具有明确评估协议的语料库来推动相关研究。
AI.method: 构建科米-亚兹瓦语-俄语平行语料库，提供文档化来源、句级对齐与故事标识；设计包含故事级交叉验证、确定性检索、严格输出验证、多维度评估指标及不确定性估计的评估协议；在零样本与基于检索的少样本条件下对比多个LLM的翻译表现。
AI.result: LLMs在该任务中可生成非平凡的翻译，但性能因模型家族和提示方式而异；基于检索的少样本提示优于零样本，但上下文扩展带来的增益有限；评估结果对指标选择和错误处理敏感，凸显评估协议的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究不仅贡献了一个高质量的濒危语言平行语料库，更提供了一个可复现的评估测试平台，有助于推动极低资源语言的机器翻译研究，强调了在类似设置中采用严谨评估协议的必要性。

title: Learning to Route LLMs from Implicit Cost-Performance Preferences via Meta-Learning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) present a trade-off between performance and cost, where more powerful models incur greater expense. LLM routing aims to mitigate expenses while maintaining performance by sending queries to the most suitable model. However, existing methods cannot perform well for different user cost-performance preferences. To address this gap, we introduce a novel perceptive LLM routing paradigm for personalized and user-centric cost-performance optimization, which efficiently learns users' implicit preferences through little interaction. To handle the challenge of heterogeneous user needs, we formulate preference profiles as a set of distinct tasks in contextual bandit and propose MetaRouter, a meta-learning framework designed for preference-aware LLM routing. Experimental results show that MetaRouter outperforms strong baselines on both in-distribution and out-of-distribution tasks. Furthermore, it exhibits high efficiency in learning user preferences, robustness to changes in the routable LLMs, and scalability to multi-model routing.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新型的感知型LLM路由范式MetaRouter，通过元学习框架高效学习用户隐式偏好，实现个性化成本-性能优化。该方法在不同用户需求下表现优异，具备高效学习、对模型变化鲁棒及多模型可扩展性等优势。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM路由方法难以适应不同用户的成本-性能偏好，缺乏个性化与用户中心化设计。
AI.method: 将用户偏好建模为上下文强化学习中的多个任务，采用元学习框架MetaRouter实现偏好感知的LLM路由。
AI.result: 实验表明MetaRouter在分布内和分布外任务上均优于强基线，且具备高效学习、鲁棒性和可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: MetaRouter是一种高效、鲁棒且可扩展的个性化LLM路由框架，能够有效平衡成本与性能，满足多样化用户需求。

title: Physics in 2-Steps: Locking Motion Priors Before Visual Refinement Erases Them
summary: Image-to-Video diffusion models leverage input images to generate visually stunning content, yet frequently produce motion that violates physical laws. We reveal a surprising finding: a 2-step generation often exhibits better physical consistency than a 50-step output from the same model. Through spectral analysis, we trace this to phase erosion during denoising; the phase degrades significantly (dropping by $\approx 18\%$ from step 2 to step 50), whereas the magnitude remains relatively stable. Building on this insight, we propose PhaseLock, a training-free framework that preserves the valid motion priors from few-step inference throughout the denoising trajectory. Rather than relying on full-step inference for physical consistency, PhaseLock extracts a motion prior from just 2 steps and enforces it onto high-fidelity generation via Latent Delta Guidance. Our approach effectively mitigates phase degradation, improving physical consistency by an average of 6.2 points across diverse models while largely maintaining visual fidelity, with negligible overhead ($1.06\times$ time, $1.02\times$ memory) and reduced reliance on expensive external guidance methods ($\sim5\times$ time).

AI.tldr: 该论文发现，图像到视频的扩散模型在生成过程中，2步推理比50步推理更具物理一致性。通过频谱分析发现，这是由于去噪过程中的相位退化所致（从第2步到第50步下降约18%），而幅度相对稳定。为此，作者提出PhaseLock框架，无需训练即可在去噪轨迹中保持少步推理所提取的有效运动先验。该方法通过潜变量增量引导（Latent Delta Guidance）将2步生成的运动先验施加于高保真生成中，有效缓解了相位退化问题，在多种模型上平均提升6.2分物理一致性，同时保持视觉质量，计算开销极低（时间1.06倍，内存1.02倍），且显著减少对昂贵外部引导方法的依赖（约5倍加速）。
AI.motivation: 现有图像到视频扩散模型虽能生成高质量视觉内容，但常产生违背物理规律的运动。研究发现，短步数生成反而比长步数生成更符合物理规律，揭示了去噪过程中相位退化的关键问题，因此亟需一种无需训练、能保留早期运动先验的方法来提升生成结果的物理一致性。
AI.method: 提出PhaseLock框架，利用2步推理生成的运动先验，通过潜变量增量引导（Latent Delta Guidance）将其约束至整个去噪过程，从而抑制相位退化，维持物理一致性。该方法不依赖额外训练，可直接应用于现有模型。
AI.result: 在多个图像到视频扩散模型上，PhaseLock平均提升物理一致性6.2分，显著优于传统长步数生成；视觉保真度几乎不受影响，计算开销仅增加1.06倍时间与1.02倍内存，且大幅降低对外部引导方法的依赖，实现高效高质生成。
AI.conclusion: 相位退化是导致长步数图像到视频生成违背物理规律的主要原因。PhaseLock通过提取少步推理中的有效运动先验并加以约束，实现了无需训练、低成本、高效率的物理一致性增强，为高质量视频生成提供了新思路。

title: AIS-Based Vessel Trajectory Prediction Using Memory-Augmented Neural Networks
summary: Accurate vessel trajectory prediction is essential for safe and efficient maritime operations, enabling collision avoidance and supporting route optimization. Although memory-augmented neural networks have recently shown strong performance in pedestrian and road-vehicle trajectory prediction by selectively retrieving relevant information from an external memory, their potential for vessel trajectory prediction remains underexplored. This paper presents an empirical investigation of memory-based trajectory prediction using Automatic Identification System (AIS) data. Experiments on data from the Gulf of Mexico and the New York Bight demonstrate consistent and substantial performance gains over a range of deep learning baselines that do not incorporate an external memory.

AI.tldr: 本文通过使用AIS数据对基于记忆的船舶轨迹预测进行了实证研究，实验表明在墨西哥湾和纽约湾的数据上，相比不使用外部记忆的深度学习基线模型，该方法在轨迹预测性能上取得了显著且一致的提升。
AI.motivation: 准确的船舶轨迹预测对于海上安全和高效运营至关重要，能够实现避碰并支持航线优化。尽管记忆增强神经网络在行人和道路车辆轨迹预测中表现优异，但在船舶轨迹预测中的潜力尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 采用基于记忆的神经网络模型，利用外部记忆模块从历史AIS数据中选择性地检索相关上下文信息，以提升船舶轨迹预测的准确性。
AI.result: 在墨西哥湾和纽约湾的实验数据上，所提出的记忆增强模型在多种评估指标上均显著优于多个深度学习基线模型，验证了其有效性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 记忆增强神经网络在船舶轨迹预测中具有巨大潜力，通过有效利用外部记忆存储的历史信息，可显著提高预测精度，为智能航海系统提供有力支持。

title: Reinforcement Learning Elicits Contextual Learning of Unseen Language Translation
summary: Prior work has shown that large language models (LLMs) can translate unseen or low-resource languages by undergoing continued training or even by encoding a grammar book in their context. However, both methods typically overfit specific languages, with limited zero-shot transfer at test time. To translate extremely low-resource languages at scale, we argue that LLMs must acquire the meta-skill of utilizing in-context linguistic knowledge rather than memorizing specific languages. In this paper, we propose a reinforcement learning (RL) approach to unseen language translation given rich linguistic context, using a surface-level translation metric (chrF) as the reward. Empirically, despite the lightweight reward, our RL-trained models effectively extract and apply relevant linguistic information from the provided context, leading to better translations on completely unseen languages than in-context learning or supervised fine-tuning. Our analyses suggest that outcome-based RL can extend beyond conventional reasoning tasks like math and coding to serve as a recipe for language learning from context.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习（RL）的方法，使大语言模型在给定丰富语言上下文的情况下，能够翻译极低资源语言。通过使用表面级翻译指标（chrF）作为奖励信号，模型学会从上下文中提取并应用相关语言知识，而非记忆特定语言，从而在未见过的语言上实现优于传统方法的零样本迁移表现。分析表明，基于结果的强化学习可扩展至语言学习任务，而不仅限于数学与编程等推理任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如持续训练或上下文编码语法书虽能翻译低资源语言，但容易过拟合特定语言，缺乏零样本迁移能力。为实现大规模、泛化性强的未知语言翻译，需让模型掌握利用上下文语言知识的元技能，而非记忆具体语言。
AI.method: 提出一种基于强化学习（RL）的框架，以表面级翻译评分（chrF）为奖励信号，训练模型从丰富的语言上下文（如语法描述）中提取并应用相关语言知识，进行未知语言的翻译。
AI.result: 实验表明，尽管奖励信号较轻量，该方法仍能有效提取和利用上下文中的语言信息，在完全未见过的语言上表现优于传统的上下文学习与监督微调方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于结果的强化学习不仅适用于数学和编程等推理任务，还可作为从上下文中学习语言的有效范式，推动大语言模型在极低资源语言翻译中的泛化能力。

title: A Machine Learning-Based Framework for Discovering Huntington's Disease Stages: Integrating Graph Representation Learning and clustering to Uncover Progression Dynamics in Longitudinal Enroll-HD Dataset
comment: Accepted for publication in the Proceedings of the 10th International Conference on Medical and Health Informatics (ICMHI 2026), Association for Computing Machinery (ACM)
summary: Huntington's disease (HD) is a progressive brain disorder that gradually affects movement, cognitive function, and behavior. Identifying the stage of the disease accurately and consistently is important for understanding its course, grouping patients, personalized care, and discovering treatment. Existing clinical staging frameworks rely primarily on predefined clinical measurement thresholds and clinical expert decisions, yet these discrete cut-offs may obscure meaningful intra-stage variability and remain vulnerable to inter-rater differences, especially in motor and functional assessments. To address these limitations, we developed an unsupervised machine learning framework based on dynamic graph representation learning to capture temporal relationships within and across patients from longitudinal clinical measurements. Using the learned representations, we applied K-means++ clustering to identify well-separated groups. We then iteratively increased the number of clusters (k), using stability analysis to assess robustness and reveal additional meaningful clusters beyond the initial optimal solution. We applied the framework to 302 individuals from the Enroll-HD cohort (1,477 visits, 44 clinical variables per visit; 80% manifest participants), enabling data-driven discovery of HD stages reflecting natural clinical progression. Despite the limited cohort size, the proposed framework achieved robust clustering performance using a four-dimensional latent space, identifying four meaningful and statistically distinct disease stages through clustering stability analysis. Each stage corresponded to well-defined clinical measurement boundaries, with minimal overlap compared to previously established clinical staging methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于动态图表示学习的无监督机器学习框架，用于分析亨廷顿病（HD）患者的纵向临床数据，以实现更精确、数据驱动的疾病分期。通过K-means++聚类与稳定性分析，识别出四个统计上显著且临床意义明确的疾病阶段，各阶段间重叠小，优于传统基于阈值的临床分期方法。
AI.motivation: 现有临床分期方法依赖预设阈值和专家判断，存在阶段内变异被忽视及评估者间差异等问题，尤其在运动和功能评估中表现明显，因此需要更客观、连续的数据驱动分期方法。
AI.method: 采用动态图表示学习捕捉患者间及患者内随时间变化的临床特征关系，利用学习到的低维表示进行K-means++聚类，并通过迭代增加聚类数结合稳定性分析，发现稳健且有意义的疾病阶段。
AI.result: 在302名Enroll-HD队列参与者（1477次随访，44个变量/次）中，该框架在四维潜在空间中实现了稳健聚类，识别出四个清晰且统计上显著的疾病阶段，各阶段对应明确的临床测量边界，相较于传统方法具有更低的重叠度。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的无监督机器学习框架能够有效揭示亨廷顿病自然进展过程中的阶段性特征，为疾病分期提供了一种更客观、精细且可重复的方法，有助于个性化医疗和治疗研究。
