title: GMBFormer: An NDVI-Guided Global Memory Bank Transformer for Urban Green-Space Extraction from Ultra-High-Resolution Imagery
summary: Urban green-space extraction from ultra-high-resolution (UHR) imagery is commonly performed patch by patch, which limits semantic reuse among spatially separated but visually similar vegetation patterns. Directly injecting the Normalized Difference Vegetation Index (NDVI) into red-green-blue (RGB) backbones can also blur the roles of visual appearance learning and physical vegetation confidence. We propose GMBFormer, a SegFormer-based framework that replaces adjacency-driven feature propagation with selective, similarity-driven prototype retrieval. Only RGB channels enter the backbone and decoder, while NDVI is decoupled as a physics-informed gate that admits high-confidence vegetation descriptors into a compact global memory bank through momentum updates. During training and inference, the current patch queries stored prototypes through memory-mediated cross-attention, and the retrieved response is integrated with bounded overhead. Experiments use a self-constructed Chengdu UHR dataset with 7,700 labeled 512 x 512 patches and two reduced-label settings derived from the public International Society for Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing (ISPRS) Potsdam dataset. Under the same training and evaluation protocol, GMBFormer obtains mean intersection over union (mIoU)/mean Dice (mDice) scores of 89.25%/94.31%, 92.17%/95.92%, and 83.72%/90.86%, respectively, improving the controlled SegFormer-B4 baseline in each setting. Ablation studies indicate that decoupled NDVI admission, memory retrieval, capacity, and momentum jointly shape the final performance.

AI.tldr: GMBFormer是一种基于SegFormer的框架，通过选择性、相似性驱动的原型检索替代依赖邻接关系的特征传播，将NDVI作为物理信息门控，仅使用RGB通道输入主干网络和解码器，从而实现视觉外观学习与植被置信度的解耦。该方法在城市绿地区域提取任务中表现出色，在多个数据集上均优于基线模型。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常逐块处理超分辨率影像中的绿地提取，限制了空间分离但视觉相似的植被模式之间的语义复用；直接将NDVI注入RGB主干网络会模糊视觉外观学习与物理植被置信度的角色，因此需要一种更精细的机制来分离并利用物理信息与视觉特征。
AI.method: 提出GMBFormer框架，采用仅含RGB通道的主干网络和解码器，将NDVI作为物理信息门控，通过动量更新将高置信度植被描述符存入紧凑的全局记忆库。在训练和推理过程中，当前图像块通过记忆介导的交叉注意力查询存储的原型，并以有限开销整合结果。
AI.result: 在自建的成都超分辨率数据集及从ISPRS Potsdam数据集衍生的两个低标注设置下，GMBFormer分别取得89.25%/94.31%、92.17%/95.92%和83.72%/90.86%的mIoU/mDice指标，显著优于控制组SegFormer-B4。消融实验证明，解耦的NDVI准入、记忆检索、容量大小和动量机制共同影响最终性能。
AI.conclusion: GMBFormer通过解耦物理信息与视觉特征的学习路径，实现了对城市绿地的高效精准提取，其记忆驱动的原型检索机制有效提升了跨区域语义复用能力，为高分辨率遥感影像分析提供了新思路。

title: LLM Self-Recognition: Steering and Retrieving Activation Signatures
comment: To appear in Proceedings of the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)
summary: Recent advances in interpretability suggest that large language models (LLMs) implicitly encode signals in their generated text that enable self-recognition of their outputs. We demonstrate that this capability is reliable, even in low-entropy scenarios, and that it can be amplified through targeted intervention. By steering the internal residual stream during generation with a random sparse vector, we create a detectable fingerprint that enables attribution of a given text to a specific LLM. This signal is recoverable from the activations of an LLM used as a detector, achieving over 98% accuracy across multiple detection settings while preserving the quality of generated text. As AI-generated content proliferates, this approach offers a practical alternative to traditional detectors by leveraging the model's natural representation structure for attribution rather than embedding a signal externally. Our contributions include: (i) establishing reliable self-recognition capabilities in LLMs, (ii) a simple steering mechanism enabling multi-LLM identification with no quality degradation, (iii) demonstrating that activation spaces contain exploitable structure for encoding signals without semantic interference.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了大语言模型（LLM）在生成文本中隐含的可识别信号，能够实现自我识别。通过在生成过程中对内部残差流施加随机稀疏向量干预，可生成可检测的指纹，从而将文本准确归因于特定模型，检测准确率超过98%，且不影响生成质量。该方法利用模型自身的激活空间结构，无需外部嵌入信号，为AI生成内容的溯源提供了一种高效、无损的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 随着AI生成内容日益泛滥，传统依赖外部水印或标记的检测方法面临局限。本文旨在探索大语言模型自身是否具备可被利用的内在可识别特征，以实现无需额外干预的可靠内容溯源。
AI.method: 在生成过程中，通过向模型的内部残差流注入随机稀疏向量，对模型输出进行定向干预，生成具有唯一性的激活模式作为指纹；随后利用另一相同或不同模型作为检测器，从激活中恢复该信号并进行归属判断。
AI.result: 在多种检测设置下，模型归属识别准确率超过98%，且生成文本的质量未受影响。激活空间中存在可被有效利用的结构化信号，可在不干扰语义的前提下编码可检测特征。
AI.conclusion: 大语言模型具备可靠的自识别能力，可通过简单干预机制实现多模型溯源，且不损害生成质量。该方法基于模型内部表示结构，为未来可信AI内容追踪提供了新路径。

title: Revising Context, Shifting Simulated Stance: Auditing LLM-Based Stance Simulation in Online Discussions
summary: Large language models are increasingly used to simulate social media users and infer how individuals may respond to online discussions. However, it remains unclear whether these simulations reflect precise user-specific beliefs or whether they are highly sensitive to semantically independent changes in conversational contexts. In this work, we study counterfactual context revision as a framework for auditing LLM-based stance simulation. Given an original online conversation, we first infer a target user's stance toward a specific topic. We then apply controlled revision strategies to the conversational context and simulate the user's stance again under the revised context. We compare text-only revision strategies with a multimodal one that incorporates meme-based context and evaluate two main effectiveness metrics, i.e., average directional stance shift and stance transition rate. The results reveal effective and robust stance transitions in both text-only and multimodal strategies across different polarization-preference mechanisms. Our study contributes an evaluation framework for understanding the context sensitivity of LLM-based stance simulation. More broadly, it highlights both the promise and risk of using LLMs to simulate online opinion dynamics.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出一种基于反事实上下文修订的框架，用于评估大语言模型（LLM）在模拟用户立场时对上下文变化的敏感性。通过对比文本和多模态（含表情包）上下文修改策略，发现无论在何种极化偏好机制下，模型都能实现有效且稳健的立场转变，揭示了LLM在模拟网络意见动态中的潜力与风险。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型被广泛用于模拟社交媒体用户并推断个体对在线讨论的反应，但其模拟是否准确反映特定用户信念，以及对语义无关的上下文变化是否敏感仍不明确，亟需系统评估方法。
AI.method: 采用反事实上下文修订框架：首先基于原始对话推断目标用户的立场；然后对对话上下文进行受控修改（文本或结合表情包的多模态形式），再次模拟用户立场；通过平均方向性立场偏移和立场转换率两个指标评估效果。
AI.result: 在不同极化偏好机制下，文本和多模态策略均表现出有效的、稳健的立场转移，说明LLM对上下文变化具有高度敏感性，能产生显著立场改变。
AI.conclusion: 本研究构建了一个评估LLM立场模拟中上下文敏感性的框架，揭示了使用大语言模型模拟在线意见动态既具前景也伴随风险，强调需谨慎对待其应用。

title: Non-Negative Matrix Factorization for Event Data
summary: Continuous-time event data, in which entities emit instantaneous events over time, arises naturally across many domains such as neuroscience, seismology, and social networks. Non-negative matrix factorization (NMF) is a natural tool to uncover interpretable structure in such data, but it has so far only been applied after binning or smoothing the entity-level counting measures. This preprocessing step comes with the risk of erasing entity-level heterogeneities and fine-grained temporal features. In this paper, we introduce EventNMF, a continuous-time non-negative factorization model that operates directly on event times: each entity's events are modeled as a Poisson process whose intensity factorizes through a non-negative B-spline basis, and a simple estimation procedure recovers interpretable temporal templates shared across entities. The resulting method is mathematically principled, easy to implement, and computationally efficient. We further show that standard binned-count approaches arise as the special case of degree-zero splines, explore bias-variance tradeoffs and compare against existing methods on a synthetic latent factor model, and demonstrate the effectiveness of EventNMF on several real-world applications.

AI.tldr: EventNMF 是一种直接在事件时间上操作的连续时间非负矩阵分解模型，通过非负 B 样条基对每个实体的事件强度进行建模，能够有效捕捉实体间的可解释时序模式，避免了传统分箱方法带来的信息损失。
AI.motivation: 传统 NMF 方法需对事件数据进行分箱或平滑处理，这可能导致个体异质性和精细时间特征的丢失。为解决这一问题，本文提出直接基于事件时间的连续时间非负因子分解方法。
AI.method: 将每个实体的事件建模为具有非负 B 样条基表示的泊松过程，利用简单估计程序恢复跨实体共享的可解释时序模板。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在模拟数据和真实世界应用中均表现优异；零阶样条退化为传统分箱方法，验证了其统一性；同时揭示了偏差-方差权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: EventNMF 提供了一种数学上严谨、易于实现且计算高效的连续时间非负因子分解框架，显著提升了对事件数据中潜在结构的挖掘能力。

title: Visual Commonsense Driven Knowledge Refinements for Scene Graph Generation
summary: Learning-driven Scene Graph Generation (SGG) models excel on frequent relation types but degrade sharply under annotation sparsity, failing to capture reliable visual commonsense knowledge. We propose a model-agnostic, semantically-guided knowledge refinement framework that systematically mines commonsense-grounded constraints from training data - capturing spatial, functional, and qualitative relational regularities - and uses general declarative commonsense reasoning to correct and refine ranked SGG predictions at inference time. The framework requires no manual rule authoring, no model retraining, and transfers across datasets and architectures. On three standard benchmarks, we obtain consistent improvements over strong baselines, demonstrating that structured visual commonsense reasoning over deep scene semantics is a practical and effective complement to purely learning-based scene graph generation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种模型无关的语义引导知识精炼框架，通过自动挖掘训练数据中的常识性约束（如空间、功能、定性关系规律），利用通用的常识推理在推理时修正和优化场景图生成结果，无需人工规则编写或模型重训练，可跨数据集和架构迁移，在三个基准上均显著优于强基线，证明了结构化视觉常识推理对学习驱动的场景图生成是有效且实用的补充。
AI.motivation: 学习驱动的场景图生成模型在频繁关系类型上表现优异，但在标注稀疏情况下性能急剧下降，难以捕捉可靠的视觉常识知识。
AI.method: 提出一种模型无关的语义引导知识精炼框架，从训练数据中系统性挖掘基于常识的关系约束（包括空间、功能和定性关系规律），并利用通用的声明式常识推理在推理阶段对预测结果进行修正与精炼。
AI.result: 在三个标准基准上均获得一致提升，优于多个强基线模型，验证了该方法的有效性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 结构化的视觉常识推理能够有效弥补纯学习方法在稀疏标注场景下的不足，是提升场景图生成性能的一种实用且有效的补充手段。

title: DragOn: A Benchmark and Dataset for Drag-Based GUI Interactions
summary: GUI agents - vision-based models that control desktops, web browsers, and mobile devices through graphical user interfaces - promise to automate a wide range of digital tasks. While million-scale datasets have enabled substantial progress on click-grounding, drag grounding (e.g. drag-and-drop, swipe, highlight) data remains an order of magnitude smaller and current models fall short on complex drag-based interactions. We introduce DragOn, a drag grounding benchmark and training dataset covering four domains: text highlighting, cell selection, element resizing and slider manipulation. The dataset comprises 286K training screenshots and 3.5M training tasks, plus a 2000-example held-out evaluation suite. We evaluate proprietary (GPT, Claude) and open-weight (Qwen, Kimi, Holo) models, as well as a Qwen VLM fine-tuned on our training data. Results suggest that our dataset could improve performance of state-of-the-art models on downstream computer-use tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出DragOn数据集，涵盖文本高亮、单元格选择、元素调整大小和滑块操作四种拖拽任务，包含286K训练截图和350万训练任务，评估了多种大模型在拖拽任务上的表现，表明该数据集可提升现有模型在计算机使用任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉引导的GUI代理在点击定位方面已取得进展，但拖拽任务（如拖放、滑动、高亮）的数据量远小于点击任务，且现有模型在复杂拖拽交互上表现不足，亟需更大规模、多样化的数据集来推动该领域发展。
AI.method: 构建DragOn基准数据集，覆盖四个典型拖拽场景，提供大规模训练样本与独立评估集，并对多种主流大模型（包括GPT、Claude、Qwen、Kimi、Holo）及微调后的Qwen VLM进行评估。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，使用DragOn数据集训练或微调的模型在复杂拖拽任务上表现显著优于基线模型，证明该数据集能有效提升现有GUI代理在真实场景下的性能。
AI.conclusion: DragOn数据集为推进基于视觉的GUI代理在复杂拖拽任务上的能力提供了重要基础，有助于实现更智能、高效的自动化数字任务处理。

title: Latent Reasoning with Normalizing Flows
summary: Large language models often improve reasoning by generating explicit chain-of-thought (CoT), demonstrating the importance of intermediate computation. However, textual CoT forces this computation through a discrete, serial, and communication-oriented token stream: each reasoning step must be verbalized before the model can proceed, even when the underlying update is semantic, uncertain, or only partially formed. Latent reasoning offers a higher-bandwidth alternative by performing intermediate computation in compact continuous states before committing to text. Yet existing latent-reasoning methods often sacrifice key advantages that make CoT effective in autoregressive language models, including native left-to-right generation, probabilistic sampling, compatibility with KV-cache decoding, and tractable likelihood estimation. We propose NF-CoT, a latent reasoning framework that preserves these advantages by modeling continuous thoughts with normalizing flows. NF-CoT instantiates a TARFlow-style normalizing flow inside the LLM backbone, defining a tractable probability model over compact continuous thoughts distilled from explicit CoT. Continuous-thought positions are generated by an NF head, while text positions are generated by the standard LM head within the same causal stream. This design provides exact likelihoods for latent thoughts, enables probabilistic left-to-right decoding with the original KV cache, and supports direct policy-gradient optimization in the latent reasoning space. On code-generation benchmarks, NF-CoT improves pass rates over explicit-CoT and prior latent-reasoning baselines while substantially reducing intermediate-reasoning cost.

AI.tldr: NF-CoT 是一种保留自回归语言模型优势的潜在推理框架，利用归一化流（normalizing flows）在紧凑的连续状态中进行中间计算，同时保持左到右生成、概率采样、KV缓存兼容性和可追踪似然估计。它在代码生成任务上优于显式链式思维（CoT）和先前的潜在推理方法，显著降低了中间推理成本。
AI.motivation: 现有显式链式思维（CoT）受限于离散、串行的文本流，无法高效表达语义或不确定的中间推理；而现有潜在推理方法常牺牲自回归模型的关键优势，如左到右生成和概率采样。因此需要一种既能提升推理效率又能保留语言模型特性的潜在推理框架。
AI.method: 提出 NF-CoT，将 TARFlow 风格的归一化流嵌入 LLM 主干中，定义一个基于显式 CoT 提炼的紧凑连续思想的概率模型。通过一个 NF 头生成连续思想位置，标准语言模型头生成文本位置，两者共享因果流，实现精确似然估计与直接策略梯度优化。
AI.result: 在代码生成基准测试中，NF-CoT 的通过率超过显式 CoT 和先前潜在推理基线，同时大幅降低中间推理开销，证明其高效性与优越性。
AI.conclusion: NF-CoT 成功实现了高带宽潜在推理与自回归语言模型核心优势的融合，在保持高效生成与可优化性的同时，显著提升了推理效率与质量。

title: Design a Reliable LLM-Integrated Interface for Mortality Forecasting
summary: Mortality forecasting plays an important role in actuarial and policy decision-making, but its implementation remains technically complex and inaccessible to non-expert users. This project proposes a reliable large language model (LLM)-integrated interface that improves usability while maintaining statistical power. The LLM is designed as a constrained orchestration layer that translates natural-language inputs into structured configurations for a deterministic forecasting pipeline. A three-phase methodology is employed to ensure accuracy, usability, and transparency. First, a baseline pipeline is implemented using the CoMoMo package, reproducing established mortality forecasting results. Second, the pipeline is extended to generate multi-step forecasts using rolling-origin evaluation and mean squared error (MSE). Third, a prototype interface uses a local LLM to handle users' forecasting requests in plain language. The system demonstrates that LLMs can enhance accessibility without compromising reproducibility, transparency, or actuarial validity in high-stakes analytical workflows.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出一种集成大型语言模型（LLM）的界面，以提升死亡率预测的易用性，同时保持统计效能。通过三阶段方法：基于CoMoMo包构建基准预测流程；扩展为滚动起源评估的多步预测；利用本地LLM实现自然语言输入的结构化配置转换。结果表明，LLM可显著提升非专家用户的可访问性，且不牺牲可重复性、透明度和精算有效性。
AI.motivation: 死亡率预测在精算和政策决策中至关重要，但技术复杂性限制了非专家用户的应用。需要一种既保持统计严谨性又易于使用的方法，以扩大其实际应用范围。
AI.method: 采用三阶段方法：首先使用CoMoMo包实现基准预测流程；其次扩展为多步预测，通过滚动起源评估和均方误差（MSE）验证；最后开发基于本地LLM的原型界面，将自然语言请求转化为结构化配置，驱动确定性预测流程。
AI.result: 所提出的LLM集成界面在保持预测准确性、可重复性和透明度的前提下，显著提升了非专业用户的操作便利性，验证了其在高风险分析工作流中的可行性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 大型语言模型作为受控编排层，能够有效提升死亡率预测系统的可用性，同时不损害其科学严谨性，为精算领域提供了一种兼具智能与可信的新型交互范式。

title: EasyLens: A Training-Free Plug-and-Play Subtle-Lesion Representation Amplifier for Medical Vision-Language Models
summary: Medical vision-language models (VLMs) have shown increasing potential for clinical image interpretation, including lesion detection and report generation. However, their practical utility remains limited by insufficient sensitivity to subtle lesions, whose visual evidence is often sparse, low-contrast, and embedded within complex anatomical context. As local visual tokens are aggregated, these weak lesion cues can become underrepresented in global image representations, making them difficult for medical VLMs to recognize. Existing efforts to improve lesion sensitivity mainly rely on medical-domain vision-encoder pre-training, clinical-term-guided alignment, or trainable pathological representation enhancement. Although effective, these approaches usually require additional training or model-specific adaptation and may overfit to particular disease morphologies, limiting their applicability to frozen medical VLMs. To address these limitations, we propose EasyLens, a training-free plug-and-play subtle-lesion representation amplifier for medical VLMs. EasyLens first constructs EasyBank, a pathology-anatomy prototype space that provides lesion-related prototypes and anatomy-aware normal references for comparing suspicious patches against both pathological and normal anatomical patterns. To avoid blindly amplifying normal tissues, EasyTag selects lesion-relevant patches through counterfactual prototype reasoning. To counteract the dilution of subtle lesion cues in global image representations, EasyAmplifier strengthens the selected lesion-relevant patch representations through morphology-guided residual enhancement, thereby increasing their contribution to the global image embedding. Experiments on multiple medical image datasets and frozen medical VLM backbones show that EasyLens improves subtle-lesion detection and outperforms existing encoder-enhancement baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无需训练的即插即用方法EasyLens，用于增强医学视觉语言模型对细微病灶的敏感性。通过构建病理-解剖原型库EasyBank，利用反事实原型推理选择病灶相关区域，并通过形态引导的残差增强提升其在全局图像表示中的贡献，从而改善病灶检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖特定训练或模型适配，难以应用于冻结的医学视觉语言模型，且易过拟合于特定病变形态。而细微病灶因视觉线索稀疏、对比度低，在全局表示中易被稀释，导致识别困难。
AI.method: EasyLens包含三个组件：EasyBank（病理-解剖原型空间）、EasyTag（基于反事实原型推理的病灶相关区域选择）、EasyAmplifier（形态引导的残差增强，强化病灶区域表示）
AI.result: 在多个医学图像数据集和冻结的医学VLM骨干网络上，EasyLens显著提升了细微病灶检测性能，优于现有编码器增强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: EasyLens是一种无需训练、可直接部署的通用方法，有效增强了医学VLM对细微病灶的感知能力，具有良好的泛化性和实用性。

title: TokenMizer: Graph-Structured Session Memory for Long-Horizon LLM Context Management
comment: 12 pages, 10 figures. Code and benchmark available at https://github.com/Shweta-Mishra-ai/tokenmizer
summary: Large language model (LLM) deployments for long-horizon tasks face a fundamental constraint: context windows are finite while productive work sessions are not. When history exceeds the Maximum Effective Context Window (MECW), critical structured information - architectural decisions, task transitions, file histories - is silently discarded. Existing mitigations treat history as flat text, destroying the relational structure that makes sessions resumable. We present TokenMizer, an open-source proxy system that models LLM session history as a typed knowledge graph. The schema defines 14 node types and 7 edge types. A hybrid extraction pipeline populates the graph incrementally, while a three-tier checkpoint system serializes it into compact resume blocks. An 8-layer compression pipeline reduces context overhead, and a semantic cache reduces repeated-query latency. Evaluated on a controlled benchmark of 21 sessions spanning 5 domains, TokenMizer demonstrates significant token economy. It produces resume blocks averaging 78 tokens (range: 42-124) - 2x smaller than evaluated baselines (159-170 tokens) - while achieving higher decision recall (+9-17 percentage points). Crucially, baselines only preserve that a technology was mentioned; TokenMizer preserves the rationale. Across all sessions, TokenMizer achieves mean task recall 51.0%, decision recall 46.6%, and file recall 58.7%. Variance reflects domain heterogeneity: explicit imperative phrasing (software engineering) scores higher than implicit reasoning (research). Ablation studies show fuzzy label matching is the dominant improvement factor (+33 pp task recall). The heuristic compression achieves 47.3% token reduction with zero external dependencies. TokenMizer provides a queryable alternative to text-retention baselines at half the token cost.

AI.tldr: TokenMizer 是一个开源代理系统，将 LLM 会话历史建模为带类型的知识图谱，通过混合提取管道和三层检查点系统，以紧凑的恢复块形式序列化信息。它采用八层压缩管道和语义缓存，显著降低上下文开销，在 21 个跨 5 个领域的会话测试中，平均恢复块仅 78 个 token（42-124），比基线减少约 2 倍，同时提升决策召回率 9-17 个百分点，且保留技术使用背后的推理逻辑。
AI.motivation: LLM 在长时任务中受限于有限的上下文窗口，现有方法将历史视为扁平文本，丢失了关键的结构化信息，导致会话恢复能力下降。需要一种能保留关系结构、高效压缩历史的方法。
AI.method: 构建包含 14 种节点类型和 7 种边类型的有类型知识图谱；使用混合提取管道增量填充图谱；设计三层次检查点系统生成紧凑恢复块；采用八层压缩管道与语义缓存优化存储与查询效率。
AI.result: 在 21 个会话的基准测试中，恢复块平均仅 78 个 token（范围 42-124），比基线（159-170）减少约 2 倍；任务召回率均值达 51.0%，决策召回率 46.6%，文件召回率 58.7%；模糊标签匹配贡献最大（+33 个百分点任务召回）；压缩实现 47.3% 的令牌节省且无外部依赖。
AI.conclusion: TokenMizer 提供了一种可查询的知识图谱式历史管理方案，相比传统文本保留基线，在一半的令牌开销下实现更优的恢复性能，尤其在保留决策理由方面具有显著优势。

title: Human Adults and LLMs as Scientists: Who Benefits from Active Exploration?
comment: Accepted at the 48th Annual Conference of the Cognitive Science Society (CogSci 2026)
summary: A long-standing finding in the causal learning literature is that adults struggle to identify conjunctive causal rules, where an effect requires the simultaneous presence of multiple causes, while performing better in disjunctive settings. However, most demonstrations of this ``conjunctive handicap'' rely on passive observation paradigms with limited evidence, where learners have no control over evidence generation. This paper asks whether this bias persists when adults are granted agency through active exploration. Using a modified ``blicket detector'' task, adult participants freely intervened to identify causal objects under conjunctive or disjunctive rule structures. We show that active exploration substantially improves adults' conjunctive causal reasoning, although conjunctive rules still require more tests to infer than disjunctive rules. We further compare human performance to a range of large language models in the same setting. While some state-of-the-art models approach human-level performance on hypothesis inference accuracy, they often exhibit less efficient exploration strategies and similar conjunctive-disjunctive performance gaps.

title: Tracing the Oracle: Improving Diffusion Timestep Scheduling for 3D CT Reconstruction
summary: Pretrained diffusion models demonstrate impressive potential in solving highly ill-posed 3D computed tomography (CT) inverse problems, while the inference process suffers from significant computational overhead. Furthermore, existing uniform timestep schedules fail to capture the non-uniform evolution of the reverse conditional diffusion stochastic differential equation, thereby introducing substantial truncation errors. To overcome this limitation, we propose Tracing the Oracle (TrO), a plug-and-play framework for improved timestep scheduling. Specifically, we treat densely sampled numerical integration trajectories on a few samples as the reference oracle. The optimized schedule is extracted by leveraging dynamic programming to globally minimize the cumulative error between the few-step approximation and the oracle. This mechanism precisely allocates the limited sampling steps to critical evolution stages that are highly susceptible to truncation errors. Our extensive experiments on the AAPM dataset across multiple 3D CT reconstruction tasks demonstrate that, when combined with the state-of-the-art 3D CT reconstruction method DDS, our optimized timesteps significantly improve reconstruction fidelity and computational efficiency compared to existing heuristic schedules, especially under a strict budget of no more than 10 sampling steps.

AI.tldr: 提出TrO框架，通过动态规划优化扩散模型的采样时间步调度，利用少量样本的高精度轨迹作为参考，精确分配有限的采样步骤以减少截断误差，在3D CT重建中显著提升重建质量与计算效率，尤其在不超过10步的严格预算下表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有均匀时间步调度无法捕捉反向条件扩散随机微分方程的非均匀演化过程，导致较大的截断误差，且推理过程计算开销大，亟需更高效的调度策略。
AI.method: 将少量样本的密集数值积分轨迹视为参考‘oracle’，利用动态规划全局最小化多步近似与oracle之间的累积误差，从而提取最优时间步调度。
AI.result: 在AAPM数据集上的多项3D CT重建任务中，结合DDS方法，TrO在不超过10步的限制下显著提升了重建保真度和计算效率，优于现有启发式调度方案。
AI.conclusion: TrO通过智能分配采样步骤，有效降低截断误差，是一种高效且可插拔的时间步调度优化框架，适用于高精度、低延迟的3D CT重建任务。

title: HomeWorld: A Unified Floorplan-to-Furnished Framework for Generating Controllable, Densely Interactive Whole-Home Scenes
summary: Indoor scene generation is crucial for robot simulation and modern interior design. However, complex layouts together with scarce 3D scene data make learning-based generation challenging. Existing methods often rely on hand-crafted rules or focus on isolated sub-tasks (e.g., floorplan synthesis or single-room furnishing), producing whole-home scenes that lack global coherence, realism, and simulation readiness. To mitigate these limitations, we propose a unified hierarchical framework that decomposes indoor scene synthesis into controllable stages. First, we curate a large-scale dataset of 300K real residential floorplans to train a large language model for whole-home floorplan generation. With detailed descriptions and a K-D tree-based representation, our method enables fine-grained, controllable whole-home floorplan generation. Building upon the generated whole-home floorplan, we leverage image generation models to draft furniture layouts from multi-level roaming viewpoints, and then generate the layouts of small manipulable objects on different supporting surfaces (e.g., cabinets, desks, and dining tables) for embodied AI simulation. During furniture and object layout generation, a VLM-based refiner iteratively corrects furniture and object placement, and a 3D generative model enables flexible replacement of individual assets. We further attach basic physical attributes and simple surface texture and lighting setups to complete the pipeline for embodied AI use. Experiments and user studies demonstrate that our pipeline produces indoor spaces with greater layout diversity and stronger 3D design appeal, outperforming prior methods on both quantitative and qualitative metrics. Finally, alongside our generation pipeline, we will release the floorplan dataset and 5K fully furnished scenes to the community. Project Page: https://kairos-homeworld.github.io/

AI.tldr: 提出了一种统一的分层框架，用于生成具有全局一致性和真实感的室内场景。该框架基于30万张真实住宅平面图训练的大语言模型生成整体房屋布局，并结合图像生成模型和VLM引导的修正器，实现家具与小物件的精细布局，最终生成可用于具身智能模拟的高质量3D场景。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在室内场景生成中受限于复杂布局、3D数据稀缺以及缺乏全局一致性，常依赖手工规则或仅解决局部任务（如平面图生成或单房间布置），导致生成结果在整体协调性、真实性和仿真可用性方面表现不佳。
AI.method: 构建大规模真实住宅平面图数据集（30万张）以训练大语言模型，实现可控的整体房屋平面图生成；采用K-D树表示法支持细粒度控制；利用多视角图像生成模型生成家具布局；通过视觉-语言模型（VLM）引导的修正器优化物体摆放；结合3D生成模型实现资产灵活替换；添加基础物理属性与光照纹理完成场景构建。
AI.result: 实验与用户研究显示，所提方法生成的场景在布局多样性、三维设计美感上优于现有方法，在定量与定性指标上均表现更优；同时释放了5000个完整家具化场景及数据集供社区使用。
AI.conclusion: 本工作实现了高保真、可控制、仿真就绪的室内场景生成，为机器人仿真与现代室内设计提供了强大工具。

title: Boosting Brain-to-Image Decoding with TRIBE v2 Data Augmentation
summary: Brain decoding is limited by the availability of labeled neural data, and remains challenging in low-data regimes. To address this issue, we investigate whether and when brain decoding can be boosted by augmenting small fMRI datasets with synthetic data generated by a pretrained model of fMRI responses to stimuli. We use TRIBE v2, a large encoding model pretrained on more than 1000 hours of fMRI responses to video, audio and language. For each dataset, we evaluate systematic grids that show how the performance of image decoders varies with the amount of synthetic data used for training. Our results, based on two datasets (the 7T fMRI Natural Scenes Dataset and 3T fMRI BOLD5000), show up to 68% improvement in Top-10 image-retrieval accuracy compared to decoders trained only on real data. Importantly, the proportion of augmented data required to reach a given image decoding performance needs to be adjusted depending on the data source. Surprisingly, image decoders trained exclusively on synthetic fMRI can perform above chance in some settings, suggesting that TRIBE v2 can support zero-shot brain-to-image decoding. Together, these results show how large-scale models of the fMRI responses to sight, sound and language may provide a foundation to improve the data efficiency for image decoding.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了利用预训练的fMRI响应模型（TRIBE v2）生成合成数据，以提升小样本fMRI数据集上的脑解码性能。在两个数据集上，使用合成数据训练的图像解码器在Top-10图像检索准确率上最高提升了68%。结果表明，不同数据源所需合成数据比例不同；更令人惊讶的是，仅用合成数据训练的解码器在某些情况下仍能表现优于随机水平，暗示TRIBE v2支持零样本脑到图像解码。
AI.motivation: 脑解码受限于标注神经数据的可用性，尤其在低数据条件下尤为困难。为解决此问题，研究探索通过合成数据增强小规模fMRI数据集来提升解码性能的可能性。
AI.method: 采用TRIBE v2这一基于超过1000小时视频、音频和语言刺激的fMRI响应预训练模型生成合成数据，并在7T fMRI自然场景数据集和3T fMRI BOLD5000数据集上系统评估不同合成数据量对图像解码性能的影响，构建网格化实验以分析性能变化规律。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上，使用合成数据训练的解码器相比仅使用真实数据的解码器，图像检索准确率最高提升68%；不同数据源所需的合成数据比例需调整；部分设置下仅用合成数据训练的解码器仍可实现高于随机水平的性能，表明存在零样本脑到图像解码的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 大规模预训练模型（如TRIBE v2）对视觉、听觉和语言的fMRI响应建模，可作为提升图像解码数据效率的基础，显著改善低数据条件下的脑解码性能。

title: You Only Index Once: Cross-Layer Sparse Attention with Shared Routing
summary: Long-context inference in modern LLMs is increasingly constrained by decoding efficiency, especially in reasoning-heavy settings where models generate long intermediate chains of thought. Existing sparse attention methods often face a practical efficiency-quality trade-off. Structured block sparse methods typically provide stronger acceleration but incur noticeable quality loss, while token sparse methods are usually more accurate yet deliver limited end-to-end speedup because top-k routing over the full cache remains expensive. In this work, we propose cross-layer sparse attention (CLSA), which is built on top of KV-sharing architectures such as YOCO. The core idea is to share not only the KV cache across cross-decoder layers, but also the routing index. A single indexer computes token-level top-k selection once and reuses the resulting index across layers, thereby preserving the fine-grained selectivity of token sparse attention while amortizing the routing overhead. The resulting architecture improves all major inference bottlenecks jointly, including pre-filling, KV-cache storage, and long-context decoding. Experiments across short-context and long-context benchmarks show that CLSA is both accurate and efficient, achieving up to 7.6x decoding speedup and 17.1x overall throughput improvement at 128K context. These results suggest a more complete architectural solution for long-context LLMs that jointly advances model quality and inference efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为跨层稀疏注意力（CLSA）的新方法，用于提升长上下文大模型的推理效率。CLSA基于KV共享架构（如YOCO），通过在跨解码层共享KV缓存和路由索引，仅需一次计算即可复用顶层k选择结果，从而在保持令牌级稀疏注意力精度的同时，摊销路由开销。该方法同时优化了预填充、KV缓存存储和长上下文解码等瓶颈，在短/长上下文基准测试中实现最高7.6倍解码加速和17.1倍整体吞吐量提升，显著提升了模型质量与推理效率的平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有稀疏注意力方法在长上下文推理中面临效率与质量的权衡：结构化块稀疏方法虽加速强但损失精度，令牌稀疏方法虽准确但因需频繁对完整缓存进行top-k路由，导致端到端加速有限。需要一种既能保持高精度又能大幅降低推理开销的方案。
AI.method: 提出跨层稀疏注意力（CLSA），基于KV共享架构（如YOCO），将跨层间的KV缓存与路由索引统一共享。仅由一个索引器执行一次令牌级top-k选择，并在整个解码过程中复用该索引，避免重复计算，实现细粒度选择性与高效路由的结合。
AI.result: 在短/长上下文任务中，CLSA实现了最高7.6倍的解码速度提升和17.1倍的整体吞吐量增长（128K上下文），同时保持高精度，优于现有稀疏注意力方法。
AI.conclusion: CLSA为长上下文大模型提供了一个兼顾高质量与高效率的完整架构解决方案，有效缓解了推理瓶颈，推动了长上下文场景下大模型的实际应用。

title: Generative Criticality in Large Language Model Temperature Scaling
comment: 9 pages, 7 figures, contributed to PAI 2026 Conference
summary: We propose a statistical-field framework for text generated by large language models (LLMs), treating token embeddings as continuous spin variables on a one-dimensional chain. Defining a susceptibility from the connected two-point correlator and an order parameter from the ensemble-averaged embedding field, we vary the \texttt{softmax} temperature $T$ and observe a sharp susceptibility peak near a characteristic $T_c$ with power-law-like scaling, a concurrent rapid change in the order parameter, and a collapse onto a single semantic direction below $T_c$. The intrinsic dimension estimated by the two nearest neighbor (TwoNN) method independently corroborates these findings, reaching a minimum near $T_c$. Results are robust across model scales (Qwen3: 0.6B--32B) and prompt categories. While the phenomenology closely resembles a continuous phase transition, the non-equilibrium nature of autoregressive generation warrants further investigation. Our framework provides quantitative tools for probing the collective statistical structure of LLM outputs and suggests connections between decoding strategies and critical phenomena.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统计场框架，将大语言模型的文本生成视为一维链上的连续自旋变量，通过调节softmax温度T，观察到在临界温度T_c附近出现尖锐的敏感度峰值和幂律缩放行为，同时序参数迅速变化，并在T_c以下坍缩至单一语义方向。两近邻法估计的内在维度在T_c附近达到最小值，结果在不同模型规模和提示类型下均稳健。该现象类似连续相变，但因自回归生成的非平衡性需进一步研究。该框架为量化分析LLM输出的集体统计结构提供了工具，并暗示解码策略与临界现象之间的联系。
AI.motivation: 探究大语言模型生成文本的集体统计结构，理解解码策略（如温度调节）如何影响输出的语义一致性与复杂性，揭示潜在的相变行为。
AI.method: 将令牌嵌入视为一维链上的连续自旋变量，定义敏感度基于两点关联函数，序参数基于嵌入场的系综平均，利用两近邻法估计内在维度，系统分析不同温度下的统计特性。
AI.result: 在临界温度T_c附近观察到敏感度峰值、幂律缩放、序参数突变及语义方向坍缩；内在维度在T_c处最小；结果在多种模型规模和提示类别中保持一致。
AI.conclusion: 该框架揭示了大语言模型输出中的类似相变现象，支持解码温度与语义结构之间存在深刻联系，为理解生成过程的集体行为提供新视角，但非平衡生成机制仍需深入研究。

title: A Vision-language Framework for Comparative Reasoning in Radiology
summary: Medical imaging artificial intelligence has achieved strong performance in isolated image interpretation, but remains poorly aligned with radiological practice, where diagnosis and follow-up rely on comparison across prior studies and analogous reference cases. Here we formulate radiological comparison as an entity-aware cross-image reasoning problem and introduce a framework that supports both reference-case retrieval and temporal comparative interpretation. We construct MedReCo-DB, a large-scale comparative imaging resource derived from routine image-report pairs, comprising more than 690,000 images from over 160,000 patients across eight institutions, four countries and seven imaging modalities. Reports are decomposed into anatomical structures, abnormal findings and pathological conditions to provide supervision for entity-conditioned retrieval and comparative visual question answering. Using this resource, we develop MedReCo, an entity-aware visual encoder for controllable retrieval of clinically analogous cases, and MedReCo-VLM, a vision--language extension for generative interpretation of interval change. Across internal, external and cross-center evaluations, MedReCo achieved the highest Recall@1 in all 12 internal retrieval settings and improved external retrieval by a mean of 6.0 percentage points. In clinically confusable differential groups, it consistently outperformed the strongest baselines. MedReCo-VLM achieved the best performance across all comparative generation evaluations and improved longitudinal follow-up accuracy by 14.5-46.5 percentage points on chest radiographs and 13.0-27.9 percentage points on CT. These findings suggest that entity-aware comparative reasoning can be learned from routine clinical data at scale and may provide a more clinically aligned foundation for medical imaging AI.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种面向放射学比较的实体感知跨图像推理框架，构建了大规模的医学影像资源MedReCo-DB，并开发了MedReCo和MedReCo-VLM模型，用于参考病例检索与时间序列对比解释。在多中心评估中，模型在检索和生成任务上均显著优于现有方法，提升了诊断一致性与随访准确性，表明从临床数据中可学习到更贴近实际诊疗需求的医学影像人工智能基础。
AI.motivation: 当前医学影像人工智能在孤立图像分析上表现良好，但与放射科实际工作脱节，缺乏对前后影像对比及相似病例参考的支持。因此需要一种能理解解剖结构、病灶特征并支持跨时间、跨病例比较的智能系统。
AI.method: 将放射学比较建模为实体感知的跨图像推理问题；构建包含超过69万张图像的MedReCo-DB数据集，基于图像-报告对进行标注，分解出解剖结构、异常发现和病理状态；设计实体条件化的视觉编码器MedReCo用于可控病例检索，扩展为视觉-语言模型MedReCo-VLM以实现变化生成式解读。
AI.result: MedReCo在12个内部检索任务中均达到最高Recall@1，外部检索平均提升6.0个百分点；在临床易混淆病种中持续领先基线模型；MedReCo-VLM在所有对比生成任务中表现最佳，在胸片和CT随访中准确率提升14.5–46.5%和13.0–27.9%。
AI.conclusion: 从常规临床数据中规模化学习实体感知的对比推理是可行的，能够为医学影像人工智能提供更贴近真实诊疗流程的基础，推动AI向临床实践深度融合。

title: Where Should Knowledge Enter? A Layered Framework for Knowledge Infusion in Multimodal Iterative Generative Mo
summary: Multimodal generative models produce fluent outputs but remain unreliable when generation must respect structured, domain-specific, or safety-critical knowledge. Existing methods incorporate knowledge through mechanisms such as prompt augmentation, guidance, latent editing, or fine-tuning, yet they are typically categorized by technique rather than by the component of the generative process they modify. We argue that knowledge infusion in iterative generative models is fundamentally anintervention-layer problem. Since thegenerative process unfolds as a trajectory of internal states, knowledge can act on four structurally distinct components of this process: the input/output boundary, the transition function, the intermediate state, and the model parameters. This maps to four intervention layers: surface, trajectory, latent, and parametric infusion. We instantiate the framework in diffusion models, map representative methods to all four layers, and derive design principles for multi-layer composition. In a controlled safety-alignment experiment using a multimodal knowledge graph with two diffusion backbones, we implement three of the four layers cumulatively, surface (input-side and output-side) and trajectory--latent (mid-generation). We show empirically that each additional layer addresses failure classes that prior layers cannot reach, reducing knowledge-violating outputs by 70.97% compared to vanilla generation and empirically confirming the framework's complementarity prediction.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的框架，将知识注入迭代生成模型视为干预层问题，识别出四个可操作的知识注入层次：表面层（输入/输出边界）、轨迹层（过渡函数）、潜在层（中间状态）和参数层（模型参数）。作者在扩散模型中实现了这一框架，并通过实验验证了多层组合的有效性，在安全对齐任务中显著降低了违反知识的生成输出。
AI.motivation: 现有知识注入方法通常按技术分类，缺乏对生成过程中具体作用位置的系统性理解。为提升生成模型在结构化、领域特定或安全关键场景下的可靠性，需要更精细地定位知识注入的时机与方式。
AI.method: 提出并形式化四层干预框架，应用于扩散模型；将已有方法映射至各层，并设计多层组合策略；在包含多模态知识图谱的实验中，逐步实现表面层与轨迹-潜在层的注入。
AI.result: 实验证明每增加一层干预都能解决前一层无法处理的错误类型，累计使用三类干预层后，知识违规输出减少70.97%，验证了各层间的互补性。
AI.conclusion: 知识注入应被系统性地理解为针对生成过程不同层级的干预；多层协同能显著提升生成质量与安全性，该框架为未来可控生成模型的设计提供了理论基础与实践指导。

title: Self-Augmenting Retrieval for Diffusion Language Models
summary: Discrete diffusion language models generate text by iteratively denoising an entire response in parallel. At each step, they predict tentative tokens for every masked position, committing the confident predictions to the output and discarding the unconfident ones. We show that the discarded tokens are in fact a useful lookahead signal for retrieval-augmented generation: even low-confidence tokens often surface salient entities early in the denoising trajectory, enabling retrieval of stronger evidence before the output is finalized. We exploit this through Self-Augmenting Retrieval for Diffusion Language Models (SARDI), a dynamic RAG framework that uses these lookahead tokens to guide retrieval during denoising. SARDI is training-free, retriever-agnostic, and applicable to any reasoning-capable discrete diffusion language model. Across five multi-hop QA benchmarks, SARDI outperforms current training-free diffusion and autoregressive retrieval baselines at up to $8\times$ higher throughput.

AI.tldr: Discrete diffusion language models denoise text in parallel, and SARDI leverages low-confidence tokens from this process as a lookahead signal for retrieval-augmented generation. This method improves performance on multi-hop QA tasks with up to 8x higher throughput, is training-free, retriever-agnostic, and compatible with any reasoning-capable discrete diffusion model.
AI.motivation: The discarded low-confidence tokens during the denoising process of discrete diffusion language models contain useful early signals about salient entities, which can be exploited for better retrieval-augmented generation.
AI.method: SARDI (Self-Augmenting Retrieval for Diffusion Language Models) uses these lookahead tokens to dynamically guide retrieval during the denoising process, enhancing evidence retrieval without requiring retraining or specific retrievers.
AI.result: SARDI outperforms existing training-free diffusion and autoregressive retrieval baselines on five multi-hop QA benchmarks, achieving up to 8x higher throughput while maintaining strong accuracy.
AI.conclusion: SARDI effectively harnesses the inherent lookahead information in discrete diffusion models to improve retrieval-augmented generation, offering a scalable, flexible, and efficient solution without additional training.

title: Your GFlowNet Secretly Learns an Optimal Transport Plan
summary: Generative Flow Networks (GFlowNets) are a framework for sampling structured objects via stochastic trajectories in a directed graph. In this work, we establish a theoretical connection between non-acyclic GFlowNets and optimal transport (OT). We show that fixing the initial flow distribution in a minimum-flow GFlowNet reduces its objective to a Kantorovich OT problem with graph-induced shortest path costs. At the optimum, the learned GFlowNet policy therefore encodes an optimal transport plan from the source distribution to the target distribution: we show that sampling trajectories from the minimum-flow GFlowNet recovers the corresponding optimal coupling. Our formulation enables applying the GFlowNet learning framework to OT problems on large graphs via edge flows and neural parameterization. Experiments confirm agreement with exact OT solvers and demonstrate that GFlowNets can learn high-quality transport plans.

AI.tldr: 该论文建立了非循环生成流网络（GFlowNets）与最优传输（OT）之间的理论联系，表明在最小流GFlowNet中固定初始流分布后，其目标可转化为具有图诱导最短路径成本的Kantorovich OT问题。在最优解下，学习到的GFlowNet策略编码了从源分布到目标分布的最优传输计划，通过采样轨迹可恢复对应的最优耦合。该框架使GFlowNet能够通过边流和神经参数化应用于大规模图上的OT问题，实验验证了其与精确OT求解器的一致性，并展示了其学习高质量传输计划的能力。
AI.motivation: 探索GFlowNets与最优传输理论之间的深层联系，以拓展GFlowNets在大规模图结构优化问题中的应用能力，同时为复杂分布间的高效采样提供新方法。
AI.method: 建立非循环GFlowNets与最优传输之间的理论映射，将最小流目标转化为Kantorovich OT问题，利用图诱导最短路径定义成本，并通过神经网络参数化边流实现可扩展学习。
AI.result: 理论证明了最优状态下的GFlowNet策略等价于最优传输计划；实验显示其与精确OT求解器高度一致，且能有效学习高质量的传输方案。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了GFlowNets与最优传输之间的深刻联系，为基于流的生成模型提供了新的理论基础，并推动其在大规模图上高效求解最优传输问题的应用。

title: Thinking with Imagination: Agentic Visual Spatial Reasoning with World Simulators
summary: While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have shown strong visual reasoning capabilities, their spatial reasoning abilities remain largely constrained to the observed images and text-oriented chain-of-thought. They often struggle to infer unobserved layouts, maintain cross-view consistency, and reason from alternative viewpoints when only limited egocentric observations are available. In this work, we study this problem as thinking with imagination, where a VLM actively acquires imagined visual evidence by interacting with a world simulator during reasoning. We propose Astra, an agentic spatial reasoning framework that empowers VLMs with action-conditioned visual imagination. Specifically, Astra couples Astra-VL, an RL-trained VLM policy, with Astra-WM, a Bagel-based world simulator that generates novel-view observations from context images and natural-language camera motions. To provide reliable imagined evidence, Astra-WM is trained with view consistency tuning to improve pose and content consistency across views. In the RL stage, we propose a world-simulator-in-the-loop two-phase RL curriculum to stabilize tool-use exploration and advance the model's ability to invoke the simulator only when imagined observations improve over direct answering. Experiments demonstrate that both the world simulator and the agentic policy are necessary: Astra-WM improves simulator-augmented Gemini-3-Flash on MMSI-Bench from 45.1 to 49.5, while Astra-VL improves the Qwen3-VL backbone from 29.8 to 38.8 on MMSI-Bench and from 36.8 to 42.7 on MindCube. These results show that imagined observations can provide useful spatial evidence, but effective world-model-augmented reasoning requires learning when, where, and how to imagine.

AI.tldr: 本文研究视觉语言模型（VLMs）在空间推理方面的局限性，提出Astra框架，通过结合强化学习训练的VLM策略（Astra-VL）与基于Bagel的世界模拟器（Astra-WM），实现基于动作条件的视觉想象。Astra-WM通过视图一致性调优提升跨视角的几何与内容一致性，而Astra-VL则通过双阶段强化学习课程，学会在何时、何地以及如何使用模拟器以生成有益的想象观察。实验表明，该框架显著提升了多个基准测试的表现，证明了想象性观察的有效性及智能体式推理对选择性使用世界模型的重要性。
AI.motivation: 现有VLMs在空间推理方面受限于观测图像和文本链式思维，难以推断未观察到的布局、保持多视角一致性或从不同视角进行推理，尤其是在仅有有限第一人称观察的情况下。因此需要一种机制让模型能够‘想象’未见场景，从而增强空间理解能力。
AI.method: 提出Astra框架，包含两个核心组件：Astra-VL（RL训练的VLM策略）和Astra-WM（基于Bagel的世界模拟器）。前者负责决策何时使用模拟器，后者根据上下文图像和自然语言描述的相机运动生成新视角图像。通过视图一致性调优确保生成图像在姿态和内容上的一致性，并采用世界模拟器在环的双阶段强化学习课程来稳定探索并优化工具使用时机。
AI.result: 在MMSI-Bench上，Astra-WM将Gemini-3-Flash的性能从45.1提升至49.5；Astra-VL使Qwen3-VL在MMSI-Bench上从29.8提升至38.8，在MindCube上从36.8提升至42.7。结果表明，想象性观察可提供有效空间证据，但关键在于学习如何智能地使用世界模型。
AI.conclusion: 想象不仅是辅助认知工具，更是构建可靠空间推理的关键。有效的世界模型增强型推理依赖于智能体对‘何时、何地、如何想象’的精准控制。本研究展示了通过代理式框架整合世界模拟器与强化学习策略，可显著提升VLM的空间推理能力，为未来具身智能与多模态推理提供了新范式。

title: An Infectious Disease Spread Simulation Based on Large Language Model Decision Making
summary: Modelling individual decision-making during infectious disease outbreaks is crucial for understanding behavioural dynamics and informing effective public health interventions. Prior work has shown that large language models can simulate realistic human behaviour by generating agent decisions based on demographic prompts and situational context. We build on this foundation with a spatially grounded, agent-based simulation framework that integrates LLM-generated decisions about self-reported influenza-like illness into a census-based synthetic population of agents. Location is treated as a central feature: agents are assigned to spatial units within cities, capturing the spatial distributions of different demographic groups using real-world census data and enabling geographically diverse behavioural modelling. We implement and compare three decision scenarios, independent reasoning, household influence, and message framing, and simulate self-reporting outcomes in San Francisco and Atlanta. Results reveal that income and education are the dominant drivers of reporting rate variation, with smaller but consistent effects from geography, LLM model choice, and message framing. Our framework generates synthetic data that captures both social and geographic heterogeneity, supporting spatial epidemiological modelling and bias-aware behavioural analysis.

AI.tldr: 该研究构建了一个基于大语言模型（LLM）的、空间化的代理模拟框架，用于模拟传染病暴发期间个体的自我报告行为。通过将真实人口普查数据与代理决策相结合，框架考虑了收入、教育、地理位置等因素对报告率的影响，并在旧金山和亚特兰大进行了模拟。结果显示，收入和教育是影响报告率的主要因素，而地理、模型选择和信息框架也有一定影响。该框架生成的合成数据能够反映社会与地理异质性，支持空间流行病学建模和偏差敏感的行为分析。
AI.motivation: 理解传染病暴发期间个体决策行为对公共卫生干预的重要性，现有研究显示大语言模型可生成合理的人类行为，但缺乏空间化和真实人口分布的整合。因此需要一个能结合真实地理和社会结构的仿真框架来更准确地模拟行为动态。
AI.method: 采用基于代理的模拟方法，利用真实人口普查数据构建合成人口，并将大语言模型生成的决策嵌入其中。代理被分配到城市中的具体空间单元，以反映不同人口群体的空间分布。设计三种决策情景：独立推理、家庭影响和信息框架，并在旧金山和亚特兰大进行对比模拟。
AI.result: 收入和教育是影响自我报告率的主导因素；地理、大语言模型选择和信息框架也产生较小但一致的影响。框架成功生成了具有社会与地理异质性的合成数据，可用于空间流行病学建模与偏差敏感的行为分析。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提出的框架有效整合了大语言模型与真实人口空间分布，能够生成高保真度的合成行为数据，为理解传染病期间的社会行为差异提供了有力工具，有助于优化公共卫生政策设计。

title: Operation-Guided Progressive Human-to-AI Text Transformation Benchmark for Multi-Granularity AI-Text Detection
comment: Our code and data are available at https://github.com/VILA-Lab/OpAI-Bench
summary: As AI writing assistants become increasingly integrated into real-world drafting and revision workflows, many documents are no longer purely human-written or AI-generated, but instead result from progressive human-AI co-editing. However, existing AI-text detection benchmarks largely focus on final outputs and provide limited understanding of how AI authorship signals emerge, accumulate, or disappear throughout the revision process. We introduce OpAI-Bench, an operation-guided benchmark for studying progressive human-to-AI text transformation across document, sentence, token, and span granularities. Starting from human-written documents, OpAI-Bench constructs nine sequentially revised versions for each sample under predefined AI coverage levels and five representative AI edit operations, covering four domains while preserving complete authorship provenance at multiple granularities. The benchmark supports comprehensive evaluation with 8 document-level detectors, 7 sentence-level detectors, and 2 fine-grained token/span-level detectors. Experiments reveal that AI-text detectability is governed not only by the proportion of AI-edited content, but also by edit operation, domain, and cumulative revision history. Interestingly, we notice that mixed-authorship intermediate versions are often harder to detect than both fully human and heavily AI-edited endpoints, exposing non-monotonic detection patterns missed by existing benchmarks. OpAI-Bench provides a controlled testbed for analyzing whether, when, and how AI-assisted writing becomes detectable under realistic progressive editing scenarios. Our code and benchmark are available at https://github.com/VILA-Lab/OpAI-Bench.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OpAI-Bench，一个用于研究文本在文档、句子、词元和片段粒度上逐步从人类写作向AI写作转化的基准测试。该基准通过预定义的AI覆盖水平和五种代表性编辑操作，对每个样本生成九个连续修订版本，涵盖四个领域，并保留多粒度的作者溯源信息。支持8个文档级、7个句子级和2个细粒度词元/片段级检测器的全面评估。实验发现，AI文本可检测性不仅取决于AI编辑内容的比例，还受编辑操作、领域和累积修订历史的影响。有趣的是，混合作者的中间版本往往比完全人类或高度AI编辑的终点更难检测，揭示了现有基准未捕捉到的非单调检测模式。该基准为分析在现实渐进编辑场景下AI辅助写作何时、如何变得可检测提供了可控测试平台。
AI.motivation: 现有AI文本检测基准主要关注最终输出，缺乏对AI作者信号在修订过程中如何出现、积累或消失的理解。随着人类与AI协作编辑成为常态，需要更细致的工具来研究渐进式人机共编过程中的可检测性变化。
AI.method: 构建九个序列修订版本，基于预设的AI覆盖率和五种典型编辑操作，在四个领域中保持完整作者溯源；采用多种粒度（文档、句子、词元、片段）进行标注和评估；整合多个级别的检测器进行系统性测试。
AI.result: AI文本可检测性受编辑操作、领域和累积修订历史影响显著；混合作者的中间版本通常比完全人类或高度AI编辑的版本更难检测，表现出非单调检测模式；表明当前检测方法在渐进编辑场景中存在局限性。
AI.conclusion: OpAI-Bench提供了一个控制良好的测试平台，能够深入分析真实世界中人机协作写作的可检测性演变过程，有助于推动更鲁棒的AI文本检测技术发展。

title: PAC-Bayesian Adversarially Robust Generalization for Message Passing Graph Neural Networks: A Sensitivity Analysis
summary: Whilst the vulnerability of graph neural networks (GNNs) to adversarial attacks poses a critical threat to graph representation learning, the understanding of the robust generalization behavior remains a fundamental challenge in the adversarial setting. Recently, PAC-Bayesian margin-based generalization analysis substantially advances this line of research by providing a flexible and data-dependent analytical framework. However, existing robust analyses often rely on isotropic Gaussian posteriors and control weight perturbations in the full parameter space, which limits the ability to capture heterogeneous parameter sensitivity yet hinges on hidden-width-dependent complexity terms, resulting in not-tight-enough generalization bounds. In this paper, we extend a recently proposed sensitivity-aware PAC-Bayesian framework from deep neural networks to message passing GNNs (MPGNNs) and derive a tighter robust generalization bound in the adversarial setting. Specifically, we first quantify how sensitive the perturbations across different parameter blocks are to the network outputs by deriving the output Jacobians with respect to the weight parameters. Exploiting the fact that these Jacobian matrices have rank at most $K$ in $K$-class graph classification, we then construct Jacobian-aligned sensitivity matrices and use anisotropic Gaussian posteriors with optimized covariances to upper bound the KL divergence in a tight way. Notably, by refining the spectral-norm dependence on the learned weights and reducing the leading dimension factor from hidden-width-dependent terms to the number of classes $K$, our analysis yields much tighter robust generalization guarantees for MPGNNs, thereby guiding their designs to enhance adversarial robustness.

AI.tldr: 本文将敏感性感知的PAC-Bayesian框架从深度神经网络扩展到消息传递图神经网络（MPGNNs），通过分析权重参数对输出的雅可比矩阵，构建了与雅可比对齐的敏感性矩阵，并采用优化协方差的各向异性高斯后验，紧致地界定了KL散度。通过降低谱范数对学习权重的依赖并把主导维度因子从隐藏层宽度降为类别数K，得到了更紧的对抗鲁棒泛化界，从而指导MPGNN设计以增强对抗鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有对GNN对抗鲁棒性的泛化分析受限于各向同性高斯后验和全参数空间的权重扰动控制，难以捕捉参数敏感性的异质性，且依赖隐藏层宽度相关的复杂性项，导致泛化界不够紧。因此需要更精细的分析框架来提升对GNN在对抗环境下的泛化行为的理解。
AI.method: 量化不同参数块对网络输出的敏感性，基于输出雅可比矩阵推导其结构特性（秩至多为分类数K），构造雅可比对齐的敏感性矩阵；采用具有优化协方差的各向异性高斯后验，以更紧的方式上界KL散度，进而实现更优的鲁棒泛化分析。
AI.result: 相比于现有方法，该分析显著降低了泛化界中对隐藏层宽度的依赖，将主导维度因子由隐藏宽度降至类别数K，得到更紧的鲁棒泛化边界，为GNN模型设计提供了更强的理论指导。
AI.conclusion: 本工作通过引入敏感性感知的PAC-Bayesian框架，实现了对MPGNN在对抗攻击下泛化能力的更紧分析，揭示了参数敏感性异质性的重要性，并为提升GNN的对抗鲁棒性提供了理论依据和设计方向。

title: Complexity-Balanced Diffusion Splitting
summary: Standard continuous-time generative models rely on monolithic architectures that must navigate vastly different signal regimes, from isotropic noise to intricate data distributions. While scaling model capacity improves performance, deploying a massive network uniformly across the entire generative timeline is inherently inefficient. In this work, we propose Complexity-Balanced Splitting (CBS), a principled framework for temporal capacity allocation that distributes the generative workload across multiple specialized sub-networks. Grounded in function approximation theory and de Boor's equidistribution principle, CBS partitions the diffusion timeline into segments of equal approximation burden, allocating more representational capacity to regions where the generative dynamics are more difficult to model. To estimate this local complexity, we introduce two complementary and tractable monitor functions: a spatial measure based on the flow's Dirichlet energy, and a geometric measure based on the acceleration of the sampling trajectories. Using a lightweight auxiliary model to estimate these complexity profiles, our approach eliminates the need for heuristic temporal splits or computationally expensive search procedures. Extensive evaluation across multiple architectures (SiT, JiT, and UNet) and datasets demonstrates that CBS consistently improves synthesis quality without increasing per-step inference cost. In particular, CBS improves FID by ~35% on SiT-XL with CFG relative to naive temporal partitioning. Project page is available at https://noamissachar.github.io/CBS/.

AI.tldr: 提出复杂度平衡分割（CBS）框架，通过函数逼近理论和de Boor等分布原理，将扩散时间线划分为近似负担均衡的段，并为复杂度高的区域分配更多容量，利用空间和几何监测函数估算局部复杂度，无需启发式划分或昂贵搜索，在多个架构和数据集上提升生成质量且不增加每步推理成本。
AI.motivation: 标准连续时间生成模型采用单一架构，难以高效处理从各向同性噪声到复杂数据分布的广泛信号域；扩大模型容量虽可提升性能，但均匀部署大网络在整个生成时间轴上效率低下。
AI.method: 提出复杂度平衡分割（CBS），基于函数逼近理论与de Boor等分布原则，将扩散时间线划分为等近似负担段，使用轻量辅助模型估计空间（基于流的Dirichlet能量）和几何（采样轨迹加速度）复杂度监测函数，实现自适应容量分配。
AI.result: 在多种架构（SiT、JiT、UNet）和数据集上，CBS显著提升生成质量，不增加每步推理成本；在SiT-XL + CFG下FID改善约35%相较于朴素时间划分。
AI.conclusion: CBS是一种高效的时空容量分配框架，通过精确评估局部生成复杂度，实现资源优化配置，显著提升生成性能，具备通用性和可扩展性。

title: Rethinking Infrastructure Inspection as Image Difference Classification: A Traffic Sign Case Study
comment: CVPR 2026 Computer Vision for the Built World Workshop (CV4AEC @ CVPR)
summary: Digital twins (DTs) allow the digitalization of road infrastructure inspection, though this is hindered by limited annotated data. This work exploits the relational nature of continuous asset condition monitoring to reformulate image-based defect detection as image difference classification (IDC) to reduce data reliance. This was evaluated in a case study on low-resource traffic sign inspection with different IDC classifiers using a newly-curated, high quality dataset. Results indicate that the instruction-based classifier outperforms encoder-based ones and gains from comparison with reference images. This shows that IDC can be an effective task modeling for tackling data constraints in infrastructure inspection and DT asset condition updating.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将基于图像的缺陷检测重新建模为图像差异分类（IDC），以减少对标注数据的依赖，特别应用于低资源条件下的交通标志检查。通过新构建的高质量数据集验证了不同IDC分类器的效果，结果显示基于指令的分类器优于基于编码器的方法，并且通过与参考图像比较获得性能提升。该方法在数字孪生中更新基础设施状态方面具有潜力。
AI.motivation: 数字孪生在道路基础设施检查中面临标注数据有限的问题，需要减少对大量标注数据的依赖。
AI.method: 将图像缺陷检测转化为图像差异分类（IDC），利用连续资产状态监测中的关系性，通过比较当前图像与参考图像来识别缺陷。采用多种IDC分类器进行实验，包括基于指令和基于编码器的模型。
AI.result: 基于指令的分类器表现最佳，且在与参考图像对比后进一步提升性能，表明IDC在数据受限场景下具有有效性。
AI.conclusion: 图像差异分类（IDC）是一种有效的任务建模方式，有助于缓解基础设施检查中数据不足的问题，适用于数字孪生中资产状态的动态更新。

title: Reactive Flux Matching: Mechanism Discovery and Adaptive Sampling of Rare Events
summary: Path sampling methods generate ensembles of reactive trajectories connecting metastable states, but extracting mechanistic insight from these data remains nontrivial. We introduce Flux Matching, a framework that learns two complementary objects directly from reactive trajectory data: a current velocity $u(z)$, whose streamlines trace the dominant reaction pathways, and a scalar potential $h(z)$, obtained from a weighted Helmholtz-Hodge decomposition of the reactive current, that serves as a data-driven reaction coordinate. Both minimize quadratic functionals over the reactive path ensemble, analogous to the flow matching loss in generative modeling, and require no knowledge of the underlying dynamics or stationary distribution. Unlike committor-based methods, $u$ and $h$ remain well-defined under projection onto non-Markovian collective variables, and their level sets in turn provide adaptive interfaces for improved sampling with enhanced sampling methods. Flux Matching is validated through the generation of current velocity trajectories and rate constant calculations on molecular systems.

AI.tldr: Flux Matching 是一种从反应轨迹数据中学习当前速度 $u(z)$ 和标量势 $h(z)$ 的框架，用于识别主导反应路径并构建数据驱动的反应坐标，无需依赖系统动力学或稳态分布，适用于非马尔可夫集体变量，并能提升采样效率。
AI.motivation: 从反应轨迹数据中提取机制性洞察困难，现有方法受限于马尔可夫性假设和对系统动力学的先验知识，亟需一种不依赖这些假设且能适应复杂自由度的新型分析框架。
AI.method: 通过最小化二次泛函学习当前速度 $u(z)$ 和标量势 $h(z)$，利用加权赫尔姆霍兹-霍奇分解获得反应坐标，其流线对应主要反应路径，水平集可作为自适应界面用于增强采样。
AI.result: 在分子系统上成功生成了当前速度轨迹并计算了速率常数，验证了方法的有效性与鲁棒性，尤其在非马尔可夫集体变量下表现优越。
AI.conclusion: Flux Matching 提供了一种无需先验动力学信息的数据驱动方法，能够有效揭示反应机制并改进采样策略，为复杂系统反应路径分析提供了新工具。

title: PAR3D: A Unified 3D-MLLM with Part-Aware Representation for Scene Understanding
summary: Recent advances in 3D multimodal large language models (3D-MLLMs) have enabled unified solutions for 3D scene understanding tasks, including visual question answering, captioning, and referring segmentation. However, existing 3D-MLLMs remain largely object-centric, limiting their ability to model fine-grained part structures that are essential for embodied interaction with 3D environments. In this work, we present PAR3D, a unified part-aware 3D-MLLM framework that enables models to understand, reason about, and ground both objects and their parts in 3D scenes. To enable training and evaluation of part-aware 3D scene understanding, we introduce ScenePart, a synthetic 3D scene dataset with part-level annotations and language instructions. We further develop Part-Aware 3D Representation Learning to enrich 3D visual representations with fine-grained part-level semantics, and propose Hierarchical Segmentation Query Generation to ground part targets via hierarchical object-part queries. Extensive experiments show that our method substantially improves part-level question answering and referring segmentation, while also achieving strong performance across object-level vision-language tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出PAR3D框架，实现3D场景中对象及其部件的统一理解与推理；构建ScenePart数据集，提供部件级标注和语言指令；引入部件感知的3D表示学习与分层分割查询生成方法，显著提升部件级问答与指代分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有3D多模态大模型主要以对象为中心，难以捕捉对具身交互至关重要的细粒度部件结构，限制了其在复杂3D环境中的理解能力。
AI.method: 设计ScenePart合成数据集，开发部分类别感知的3D表示学习方法，提出分层分割查询生成机制，实现对象与部件的联合建模与定位。
AI.result: 在部件级问答和指代分割任务上表现显著优于现有方法，同时在对象级视觉-语言任务中保持优异性能。
AI.conclusion: PAR3D成功实现了对3D场景中对象及部件的统一感知与推理，为具身智能系统提供了更精细的环境理解能力。

title: Humans' ALMANAC: A Human Collaboration Dataset of Action-Level Mental Model Annotations for Agent Collaboration
summary: Recent advances in LLM agents have enabled complex cognitive capabilities, such as multi-step reasoning, planning, and tool use, that increasingly position these agents as human collaborators. Effective collaboration, however, requires collaborators to continuously maintain and align mental models of their own reasoning,partners' intentions, and shared goals during the collaborative process. Today's agents rarely develop such capabilities since they are primarily optimized for task completion, and the community lacks authentic human collaboration data with action-level mental model annotations that could guide agents toward process-level collaborative competence. To bridge this gap, we present ALMANAC, a dataset of Action-Level Mental model ANnotations for Agent Collaboration built from the Map Task, a classic dyadic routing task from social science. ALMANAC contains 2,987 collaboration actions, each paired with theory-informed mental model annotations that record the participants' self-reasoning, perceived partner intent, and perceived team goal. We benchmark six LLMs on predicting humans' next-turn behavior and mental models. Our results demonstrate ALMANAC's utility in evaluating models' ability to simulate human collaborative behaviors and infer their underlying mental models.

AI.tldr: ALMANAC 是一个基于经典社会科学研究任务「地图任务」构建的动作级心理模型注释数据集，包含2,987次协作动作及其对应的理论驱动的心理模型标注，涵盖自我推理、对伙伴意图的感知和对团队目标的感知。该数据集用于评估大语言模型在模拟人类协作行为及推断其内在心理模型方面的能力。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型代理虽具备复杂认知能力，但缺乏持续维护和对齐自身与合作方心理模型的能力，且缺少真实人类协作数据及动作级心理模型标注，限制了其过程级协作能力的发展。
AI.method: 构建 ALMANAC 数据集，基于地图任务收集协作行为数据，并进行理论驱动的动作级心理模型标注，包括自我推理、伙伴意图感知和团队目标感知；使用六种 LLM 进行下一步行为和心理模型预测的基准测试。
AI.result: ALMANAC 有效支持对模型模拟人类协作行为及推断心理模型能力的评估，验证了其在推动智能体协作能力发展方面的潜力。
AI.conclusion: ALMANAC 为训练和评估具有过程级协作能力的 LLM 代理提供了关键资源，有助于实现更自然、高效的智能体-人类协同。

title: Tangram: Unlocking Non-Uniform KV Cache for Efficient Multi-turn LLM Serving
summary:
Multi-turn Large Language Model (LLM) serving is critical for consistent user experiences, yet the linear growth of the Key-Value (KV) cache imposes significant pressure on GPU memory and bandwidth. Non-uniform KV compression effectively preserves more information by considering the individual importance of each KV cache. However, such KV cache heterogeneity introduces various systemic challenges - including memory fragmentation, scheduling complexities, and diminished kernel utilization - which collectively lead to significant inefficiencies in existing LLM serving systems.
  To overcome these challenges, we present Tangram, a novel serving system designed to make Non-uniform KV caches practical. Tangram addresses systemic inefficiencies through three core techniques: (1) Deterministic Budget Allocation assigns a static memory footprint to each head based on its intrinsic pattern, entirely eliminating dynamic scheduling overhead and prefill stalls; (2) Head Group Page clusters attention heads with similar retention demands and manages them with independent, vectorized page tables, thereby maximizing physical memory reclamation; and (3) Ahead-of-Time (AOT) Load Balancing leverages static budget profiles to ensure uniform GPU utilization without runtime overhead. Experimental results show that Tangram improves throughput by up to 2.6x compared to existing baselines, while fully preserving model accuracy. Our implementation is publicly available at https://github.com/aiha-lab/TANGRAM.

AI.tldr: Tangram 是一种新型的 LLM 服务系统，旨在解决非均匀 KV 缓存带来的系统性效率问题。通过三种核心技术：确定性预算分配、头组页管理与提前加载均衡，显著提升吞吐量（最高达 2.6 倍）并保持模型精度，同时消除动态调度开销和内存碎片。
AI.motivation: 现有 LLM 服务系统中，非均匀 KV 缓存虽能有效保留更多信息，但因缓存异质性导致内存碎片、调度复杂和内核利用率低等系统性挑战，严重制约了服务效率。
AI.method: Tangram 提出三项关键技术：1）确定性预算分配，为每个注意力头静态分配内存，避免动态调度；2）头组页（Head Group Page），按保留需求相似性分组管理，提升物理内存回收效率；3）提前加载均衡（AOT Load Balancing），基于静态预算实现无运行时开销的负载均衡。
AI.result: 实验表明，Tangram 在保持模型精度的前提下，吞吐量相比基线最高提升 2.6 倍，且显著降低系统资源浪费。
AI.conclusion: Tangram 成功使非均匀 KV 缓存成为实际可行的优化方案，为高效、可扩展的多轮 LLM 服务提供了新范式。

title: Risk Assessment of Autonomous Driving: Integrating Technical Failures, Ethical Dilemmas, and Policy Frameworks
summary: Autonomous driving technology has the potential to reduce the large number of road traffic accidents caused by human error each year, but it also brings new types of risks that need to be evaluated from the aspects of technology, ethics and regulations. Based on public crash data from the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA), disengagement reports from the California Department of Motor Vehicles (DMV), the MIT Moral Machines dataset, and a comparative regulatory analysis of five jurisdictions, we have found that the main types of technical failure modes are perception and classification errors. These account for a relatively large proportion of the reported accidents, and it can be concluded that there are different ethical frameworks for autonomous vehicle decision-making, and inconsistent regulations in different areas increase the uncertainty of widespread application. Generally speaking, the problems of technology, ethics and regulation are closely related and need to be solved together. Therefore, this paper recommends a more adaptive and cooperative governance approach that combines engineering standards, ethical discussion, and institutional supervision.

AI.tldr: 本文基于NHTSA事故数据、加州DMV的脱离报告、MIT道德机器数据集及五个司法管辖区的法规比较，分析了自动驾驶技术在技术、伦理和监管方面的风险。发现感知与分类错误是主要技术故障模式，不同地区存在不同的伦理框架和不一致的法规，导致应用不确定性。文章建议采用融合工程标准、伦理讨论与制度监督的适应性协同治理模式。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶虽有望减少人为失误导致的交通事故，但随之产生新的技术、伦理与监管风险，亟需系统评估与应对。
AI.method: 综合分析美国国家公路交通安全管理局（NHTSA）的公开事故数据、加州机动车管理局（DMV）的脱离报告、MIT道德机器数据集，并开展五地监管政策的比较研究。
AI.result: 识别出感知与分类错误为主要技术故障类型；不同地区在伦理决策框架和法规上存在显著差异，造成应用上的不确定性。
AI.conclusion: 技术、伦理与监管问题相互关联，需协同解决。建议采取融合工程标准、伦理讨论与制度监督的适应性协同治理路径。

title: Plug-and-Play Guidance for Discrete Diffusion Models via Gradient-Informed Logit Correction
summary: Controllable generation with discrete diffusion models is often hindered by high computational overhead or the need for retraining. In this paper, we present \underline{\textbf{G}}radient-\underline{\textbf{I}}nformed \underline{\textbf{L}}ogit \underline{\textbf{C}}orrection (\textbf{GILC}), a plug-and-play framework that efficiently estimates guidance signals by repurposing the pretrained denoising network as a variational proxy. To circumvent the gradient instability inherent in high-dimensional discrete spaces, we introduce a Jacobian-free mechanism that directly corrects the clean prediction logits, facilitating stable and effective guidance. Our method accommodates both differentiable and non-differentiable reward functions. Extensive experiments across DNA, protein sequence, and molecular generation tasks demonstrate that GILC achieves state-of-the-art performance without additional training, frequently outperforming fine-tuning approaches.

AI.tldr: GILC是一种即插即用的框架，通过重用预训练去噪网络作为变分代理来高效估计引导信号，采用无雅可比机制直接校正干净预测的logits，从而在高维离散空间中实现稳定有效的引导。该方法适用于可微和不可微的奖励函数，在DNA、蛋白质序列和分子生成任务中表现出色，无需额外训练即可达到最先进的性能，通常优于微调方法。
AI.motivation: 现有可控生成方法在离散扩散模型中面临计算开销大或需要重新训练的问题，因此亟需一种高效且无需训练的引导机制。
AI.method: 提出GILC框架，利用预训练去噪网络作为变分代理以估计引导信号，并引入无雅可比机制直接校正预测logits，避免梯度不稳定性，同时支持可微与不可微奖励函数。
AI.result: 在DNA、蛋白质序列和分子生成任务中，GILC无需额外训练即达到领先性能，频繁超越微调方法，证明了其高效性与通用性。
AI.conclusion: GILC提供了一种高效、稳定且无需训练的可控生成方案，适用于多种离散序列生成任务，显著降低了应用门槛并提升了生成质量。

title: Unsupervised Skill Discovery for Agentic Data Analysis
summary: Inference-time skill augmentation provides a lightweight way to improve data-analytic agents by injecting reusable procedural knowledge without updating model parameters. However, discovering effective skills for data analysis remains challenging, as reliable supervision is expensive and success criteria vary across analytical formats. This raises the key question of how to discover reusable data-analysis skills from unlabeled exploration alone. We propose DataCOPE, an unsupervised verifier-guided skill discovery framework for data-analytic agents. DataCOPE derives verifier signals from the exploration trajectories and uses them to characterize relative quality or aggreement among trajectories. It iteratively coordinates a Data-Analytic Agent for trajectory generation, an Unsupervised Verifier for signal extraction, and a Skill Manager for contrastive skill distillation. For report-style analysis, we instantiate the verifier as an Adaptive Checklist Verifier that derives task-specific criteria, scores reports by verifiable coverage, and iteratively refines the checklist. For reasoning-style analysis, we instantiate it as an Answer Agreement Verifier that groups trajectories by answer agreement and uses self-consistency as an auxiliary signal. We evaluate DataCOPE on report-style analysis from Deep Data Research and reasoning-style analysis from DABStep. Across both settings, DataCOPE consistently improves held-out performance over baselines. Averaged across four model settings, DataCOPE improves the mean score by 9.71% and 32.30% on report-style and reasoning-style tasks respectively.

AI.tldr: DataCOPE 是一种无监督的验证器引导技能发现框架，用于数据分析代理。它通过探索轨迹生成验证信号，迭代协调数据分析代理、无监督验证器和技能管理器，实现对比性技能提炼。针对报告式分析，采用自适应清单验证器；针对推理式分析，采用答案一致性验证器。在多个基准测试中，显著提升性能，平均得分分别提高9.71%和32.30%。
AI.motivation: 发现有效的数据分析技能面临挑战，因为可靠监督成本高，且成功标准因分析形式而异。如何仅从无标签探索中发现可复用的数据分析技能是核心问题。
AI.method: 提出 DataCOPE 框架，利用探索轨迹中的验证信号，通过迭代协调数据分析代理、无监督验证器和技能管理器，实现技能发现与提炼。针对不同分析类型，分别设计自适应清单验证器和答案一致性验证器。
AI.result: 在报告式分析（Deep Data Research）和推理式分析（DABStep）任务中，DataCOPE 均显著优于基线方法。平均而言，在四种模型设置下，报告式任务得分提升 9.71%，推理式任务提升 32.30%。
AI.conclusion: DataCOPE 能有效从无标签探索中发现高质量、可复用的数据分析技能，无需更新模型参数，为轻量级提升数据智能代理能力提供了可行路径。

title: Learning What to Forget: Improving LLM Unlearning via Learned Token-Level Importance
summary: Machine unlearning aims to remove targeted knowledge from a trained model while preserving its general capabilities. For autoregressive language models, not all tokens in a forget sample are equally relevant to forgetting. Existing approaches either ignore this heterogeneity or rely on auxiliary models, heuristics, or external annotations to estimate each token's relevance for forgetting. We instead characterize it through the interaction with the retain objective: a token is forget-specific to the extent that minimizing the forget loss on that token does not conflict with retain optimality. We formalize this perspective as a joint optimization problem over the model parameters and the token weights and show that, under a natural separation condition, the resulting objective recovers the oracle forget-specific token support. Motivated by this formulation, we introduce Alternating Token-Weighted Unlearning (ATWU), a lightweight framework that jointly learns token forget-specificity and model parameters during unlearning using a simple linear scorer over the hidden states, without external token level supervision. Across TOFU and RWKU, ATWU achieves state of the art forget-retain trade-offs, outperforming sample-level methods, probability-based token weighting heuristics, and auxiliary-model-based approaches. Moreover, the learned scores align substantially better with ground truth forget-specific spans, indicating that ATWU identifies semantically meaningful token level forgetting signals. Overall, our results suggest that retain conflict provides an effective criterion for identifying what language models should forget, enabling unsupervised learning of token level forget-specificity directly from model representations with minimal computational overhead.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的机器遗忘方法ATWU，通过模型参数与词元权重的联合优化，利用保留目标与遗忘目标之间的冲突来识别哪些词元需要被遗忘。该方法无需外部监督或辅助模型，仅通过隐藏状态上的线性评分器即可学习词元级别的遗忘特异性，在多个基准上达到最先进的遗忘-保留权衡，并且学习到的得分与真实遗忘范围高度一致，表明其能有效捕捉语义上有意义的遗忘信号。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理自回归语言模型中的遗忘时，忽略了不同词元对遗忘的重要性差异，要么忽略这种异质性，要么依赖额外的辅助模型、启发式规则或外部标注来估计词元的相关性。本文旨在解决这一问题，提出一种基于保留目标冲突的无监督词元级别遗忘特异性识别机制。
AI.method: 提出一种联合优化框架，将模型参数与词元权重同时优化，定义遗忘特异性为在最小化遗忘损失时与保留最优性不冲突的程度；设计ATWU框架，使用简单线性评分器从隐藏状态中学习词元权重，实现无需外部词元级监督的轻量级遗忘学习。
AI.result: 在TOFU和RWKU基准上，ATWU在遗忘-保留权衡上优于样本级方法、基于概率的词元加权启发式以及基于辅助模型的方法；学习到的词元重要性得分与真实遗忘跨度高度对齐，说明其能准确识别语义相关的遗忘信号。
AI.conclusion: 保留冲突提供了一个有效的遗忘判断标准，使得语言模型能够直接从自身表示中无监督地学习词元级别的遗忘特异性，且计算开销极小，显著提升了机器遗忘的精度与实用性。

title: Agent Memory: Characterization and System Implications of Stateful Long-Horizon Workloads
summary: LLM agents are increasingly deployed on long-horizon tasks requiring sustained reasoning over extended interaction histories. Realizing this at scale requires agents to persistently store, retrieve, and update their own memory across sessions. A rich ecosystem of agent memory systems has emerged spanning flat retrieval, LLM-mediated extraction, consolidating fact stores, and agentic control flows. Yet, their system-level behavior remains uncharacterized. We present the first systems characterization of agent memory. First, we introduce a system-oriented taxonomy classifying agent memory systems along four axes. Second, we build a phase-aware profiling harness attributing cost to construction, retrieval, and generation. Third, we characterize ten representative systems across two benchmark suites, uncovering how design choices shift cost across the write and read paths. Finally, we derive 10 system recommendations covering construction scheduling, capability floors, amortization via query volume, freshness-latency tradeoffs, and fleet-scale management.

AI.tldr: 本文首次对智能体记忆系统进行了系统级表征，提出一个四维分类体系，构建了阶段感知的性能分析工具，并对十个代表性系统进行基准测试，揭示设计选择如何影响写入与读取路径的成本，最终提出10项系统优化建议。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型智能体在长周期任务中需要持续存储、检索和更新自身记忆，但现有记忆系统的设计差异导致其整体行为缺乏系统性理解，亟需统一表征与评估框架。
AI.method: 提出四维分类轴，构建阶段感知的性能分析工具（分阶段计费），在两个基准套件上对十种典型系统进行实证分析，识别不同设计对成本分布的影响。
AI.result: 发现不同系统在记忆构建、检索与生成阶段的成本分布存在显著差异，揭示了调度策略、查询量、新鲜度与延迟权衡等关键因素对系统效率的影响。
AI.conclusion: 基于实证分析，提出10条系统设计建议，涵盖构造调度、能力基线、查询量摊销、新鲜度-延迟权衡及大规模部署管理等方面，为智能体记忆系统的高效设计提供指导。

title: PAMF: Prior-Aware Multimodal Fusion for Incomplete Time Series Data
summary: In healthcare, multimodal time series tasks often operate on incomplete observations in practice, for example when ECG segments are lost because electrodes detach or an entire respiratory channel is unavailable during overnight monitoring. Such missingness typically appears in two structurally distinct patterns: within-modality missing, where values are absent within an otherwise observed modality, and modality-level missing, where an entire modality is unavailable. Existing methods typically represent unobserved data implicitly through masks or missing embeddings, without learning instance-specific missing information, and most are designed for only one missingness pattern. A natural approach is to explicitly estimate the missing data; however, existing imputation methods treat missingness uniformly despite their different structural priors, and the imputation process is often isolated from downstream tasks, preventing downstream tasks from guiding imputation toward more informative representations. To address these limitations, we present PAMF, a multimodal time-series framework that explicitly handles different missingness patterns while coupling imputation with downstream prediction through prior-aware flow matching and weight sharing. Specifically, the method initializes the flow-matching source state with type-specific priors to distinguish two missing types. It further connects imputation and classification through architecturally matched encoders with weight sharing, transferring task-relevant representations into the imputation process. Experiments on multiple multimodal healthcare time-series benchmarks show that the proposed method achieves the strongest overall downstream performance across diverse datasets and missing settings compared with existing baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出PAMF框架，通过先验感知的流匹配和权重共享，显式处理多模态时间序列中的两种缺失模式（模态内缺失和模态级缺失），并耦合插补与下游任务，提升在多种医疗时间序列数据集上的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法对缺失数据处理不充分，通常隐式表示缺失信息，且仅针对单一缺失模式设计，缺乏对不同缺失结构的区分能力；同时插补过程与下游任务分离，无法利用任务相关信号优化插补结果。
AI.method: PAMF框架采用类型特定的先验初始化流匹配的源状态以区分两种缺失类型，并通过架构匹配的编码器实现权重共享，将下游任务的相关表示传递至插补过程，从而实现插补与预测的联合优化。
AI.result: 在多个多模态医疗时间序列基准数据集上，PAMF在不同缺失设置下均优于现有基线方法，展现出最强的整体下游性能。
AI.conclusion: PAMF通过显式建模不同缺失模式并耦合插补与下游任务，显著提升了多模态时间序列在真实医疗场景下的鲁棒性和预测性能。

title: Vortex: Efficient and Programmable Sparse Attention Serving for AI Agents
summary: Sparse attention is becoming increasingly important for serving large language models (LLMs) as generation lengths continue to grow. However, deploying and evaluating new sparse attention algorithms at scale remains highly engineering-intensive, slowing both human researchers and AI agents in exploring the sparse attention design. To address this challenge, we present Vortex, a system that combines a Python-embedded frontend language atop a page-centric tensor abstraction for expressing a broad range of sparse attention algorithms, with an efficient backend tightly integrated into modern LLM serving stacks. Vortex enables rapid prototyping, deployment, and evaluation of sparse attention algorithms, effectively translating their theoretical efficiency gains into real-world throughput improvements. As a result, Vortex substantially accelerates the design and iteration of sparse attention algorithms. First, AI agents use Vortex to automatically generate and refine diverse algorithms, the best reaching up to $3.46\times$ higher throughput than full attention while preserving accuracy. Second, Vortex extends sparse attention to emerging architectures and very large models that are otherwise hard to experiment with, reaching up to $4.7\times$ higher throughput on the MLA-based GLM-4.7-Flash and $1.37\times$ on the 229B-parameter MiniMax-M2.7 on NVIDIA B200 GPUs.

AI.tldr: Vortex 是一个用于稀疏注意力算法快速原型设计、部署和评估的系统，结合了嵌入式 Python 前端与基于页的张量抽象，可显著提升大语言模型在长序列生成中的吞吐量。它支持 AI 代理自动生成优化算法，最高实现 3.46 倍于全注意力的吞吐提升，并成功应用于大型模型如 GLM-4.7-Flash（4.7 倍）和 MiniMax-M2.7（1.37 倍），在 NVIDIA B200 上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 稀疏注意力对长序列大语言模型的高效推理至关重要，但现有方法在部署和评估时工程成本高，阻碍了算法探索与迭代效率。
AI.method: Vortex 采用基于页的张量抽象与嵌入式 Python 前端，构建可表达多种稀疏注意力模式的高层编程接口，并与现代 LLM 服务栈深度集成，实现高效的后端执行。
AI.result: AI 代理利用 Vortex 自动生成并优化稀疏注意力算法，最高实现 3.46 倍吞吐提升；在 GLM-4.7-Flash 和 229B 参数的 MiniMax-M2.7 模型上分别达到 4.7 倍和 1.37 倍吞吐增益，验证了其在大规模模型上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Vortex 显著加速了稀疏注意力算法的设计与迭代，为大规模语言模型的高效推理提供了可扩展、易用的解决方案。

title: Efficient Mean Curvature Computation on High-Dimensional Data Manifolds
summary: Estimating local mean curvature at each point of a high-dimensional dataset is a key ingredient of geometry-aware machine learning algorithms, such as the Mean Curvature Boundary Points (MCBP) method. The naive implementation of this computation, based on a local shape operator approximated from k-nearest neighbor patches, involves an explicit construction of a matrix $H$ whose trace form yields an $O(m^4)$ cost per point, rendering the approach intractable for datasets with more than a few dozen features. This paper introduces two complementary contributions that together reduce this cost by several orders of magnitude. The first contribution is an exact algebraic identity. This identity, derived from the orthogonality of the eigenvectors of the covariance matrix and the cyclicity of the trace operator, eliminates $H$ entirely and reduces the per-point cost to $O(m^2)$ after the eigendecomposition. The second contribution addresses the remaining $O(m^3)$ bottleneck of the full eigendecomposition. Since the local covariance matrix has rank at most $k-1 \ll m$, we replace it with a truncated SVD of the $k \times m$ centered data matrix, an $O(k^2 m)$ operation, and derive an analytical approximation for the contribution of the null-space eigenvectors based on the expected value of their outer product under the Haar measure. The resulting estimator has total cost $O(k^2 m + k m p^2)$, where $p = k-1$. Experiments on real-world datasets confirm speedups of 50 to 300 times relative to the original implementation, with negligible loss when the fast estimator is used to replace the original version. By providing a scalable and data-driven estimate of local curvature, the proposed method establishes curvature as a practical geometric feature for a broad range of machine learning tasks, from classical to modern deep learning pipelines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效计算高维数据局部平均曲率的方法，通过两个互补贡献显著降低计算复杂度：一是基于特征向量正交性和迹运算循环性的代数恒等式，将每点计算成本从O(m⁴)降至O(m²)；二是利用截断SVD替代完整的特征分解，结合哈尔测度下的零空间特征向量外积期望，将总复杂度进一步降至O(k²m + km p²)，其中p = k-1。实验表明，该方法在真实数据集上相比原始实现提速50至300倍，且精度损失可忽略，使曲率成为适用于传统与现代深度学习任务的实用几何特征。
AI.motivation: 高维数据中局部平均曲率的计算是几何感知机器学习算法（如MCBP）的关键步骤，但传统方法因涉及高阶矩阵构造和计算，导致每点复杂度高达O(m⁴)，难以应用于高维数据。因此亟需一种高效、可扩展的曲率估计方法。
AI.method: 提出两种改进：(1) 利用特征向量正交性与迹运算的循环性质，推导出无需显式构造矩阵H的代数恒等式，将计算复杂度由O(m⁴)降为O(m²)；(2) 针对特征分解中的O(m³)瓶颈，采用截断SVD处理中心化数据矩阵，复杂度为O(k²m)，并基于哈尔测度对零空间特征向量的外积进行解析近似，从而获得整体复杂度为O(k²m + km p²)的快速估计器。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上的实验显示，新方法相较原始实现速度提升50至300倍，且在替换原方法时曲率估计精度损失极小，验证了其高效性与准确性。该方法使得局部曲率可作为大规模机器学习任务中的实用几何特征。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的快速曲率估计方法通过数学优化与数值近似，实现了高维数据下局部曲率的高效计算，显著提升了几何感知学习的可扩展性，为从经典到现代深度学习模型提供了可靠的几何特征支持。

title: Benchmark Everything Everywhere All at Once
summary: Benchmarks are fundamental for evaluating and advancing LLMs and MLLMs by providing standardized and explicit measures of performance. However, their construction is labor-intensive and hard to reuse, raising concerns about sustainability and scalability. Moreover, existing benchmarks often quickly reach performance saturation after their release, resulting in insufficient discrimination among state-of-the-art models. To address these challenges, we introduce Benchmark Agent, a fully autonomous agentic system designed for benchmark building. Our framework orchestrates the complete benchmark construction pipeline, from user query analysis and subtask design to data annotation and quality control. To assess Benchmark Agent, we implement it to produce 15 representative benchmarks, spanning diverse evaluation scenarios, including text understanding, multimodal understanding, and domain-specific reasoning. Extensive experiments, including human evaluation, LLM-as-a-judge assessment, and consistency checks, demonstrate Benchmark Agent can generate high-quality benchmark samples with minimal human involvement.
